name: Trump Endorsement Alert
subject: Judges and state officials do not decide elections.

body:
Wendy Davis Endorses Trump

| [ ](http://links.davisforin.com/u/click?_t=3e9e6097e33749f890adf7e8c9b24a4e&_m=87800d366e434ef9b9d6469461402cce&_e=dcCAr8y1_PrZLZoy4JwWsEeIvVSiGIMTbp7RnA8iExYTjIp9N2-jdMdKgNePtARFwWLpKtDfOPqlAFs89lAZIGGQeVQIDSjxhGYCdCpStPXH6Jet9qw1R_sBEkTFZ8c-Rxszf-GlFd6UkOvln8EbvJHW-hkVxtHF97KzBSRi_w7_aChL0vDvtZyhiCaJEh5FzzUz_hAXhtiQ2VrFg4ZUeTFQDM768-7ipiH3rJoZDkr503MBHGNfuABiy0Ewty6lOc-FhsEkVZOFq4mdzbuWTQJmQWZsdRtp14fNt-owlt9a-pwFJJAiDHQ8Ng10q1GD)
---
| [**WATCH ENDORSEMENT VIDEO HERE** ](http://links.davisforin.com/u/click?_t=3e9e6097e33749f890adf7e8c9b24a4e&_m=87800d366e434ef9b9d6469461402cce&_e=dcCAr8y1_PrZLZoy4JwWsGHxdX0ANxo5dPJbkam8AlBQGyLmsTA2MHhz0x_nvtTCxMklurIhahOHw5o3iha-6UwMHgOr8fd4Aw5aSu-CTJSP035T-3LFa8xy0AQcEIskC95h5OorNodPXGB5taOR7Z_2wTZTaASarYwIr70IbLhuaqCvVTUl73GMI8rTeho08_ELIjZVi7v8HPUfbOfEL7DrU_Rlig34olUIoCan0T4%3D)
---

Fellow American,

As you may know, my background includes serving as a former judge, and I have always taken great pride in upholding the principles of justice and fairness. Recently, the Colorado Supreme Court and Maine's Secretary of State have decided to bar President Trump from the ballot in 2024.

This has left me deeply concerned about the state of our democracy and the integrity of our electoral process.

I can no longer stand by as a witness, allowing partisan politics to overshadow the voice of the people.

**Judges and state officials do not decide elections. THE AMERICAN PEOPLE DO.**

****That is why I am**OFFICIALLY ENDORSING** President Donald J. Trump for President of the United States. ****

President Trump has shown a dedication to addressing the concerns of everyday Americans, and I believe his leadership is essential in these challenging times. **While our political landscape may be divisive, it is crucial that we unite for the greater good of our community and our nation.**

**[I STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP! DO YOU?](http://links.davisforin.com/u/click?_t=3e9e6097e33749f890adf7e8c9b24a4e&_m=87800d366e434ef9b9d6469461402cce&_e=dcCAr8y1_PrZLZoy4JwWsEeIvVSiGIMTbp7RnA8iExYTjIp9N2-jdMdKgNePtARFwWLpKtDfOPqlAFs89lAZIGGQeVQIDSjxhGYCdCpStPXH6Jet9qw1R_sBEkTFZ8c-Rxszf-GlFd6UkOvln8EbvKHulPQ8Gi1CrDexc44u1fTZT3K9Dl35qbhBvHzCSjz5UZ6HApbo2fi-W6cGYdvSQquM6cdYRV7lnuA37CO_o7wwXWJV4DmCmOK8451-MXPHIsM3gZ25bczeYcIC0LxCE4lpdspRTM4M5DWYYCdy6axSoZDAJxeHGkZXYaZFJ2J3)**

name: Chief James Craig
subject: I can’t look anymore
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Senate
body:
It's too sad

| [ ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=008e69613b41448da3e4b7c5ac897ef3&_e=9XIRBleW6NPBn8HdV2AF-LXu53RQUZFQv4ziAHBvf03cPIlRan7J8kF7BhyFtgIRTXjpofJEJZBi7yzQtrRm-_WH-KQa_idrov2Ykx1Wd0BTHp64glpwMHsSh9fNgzJpfiOWtwuC6Xyljmz-thyrjJdBKIvYmddlRoEwybuDs_cQNJSYUh4M0bSJmvaLl0ZlUQLzFtepSfv0FE5_aRgHP2G9mZWXmMgGasRePO106yVc-yOZ7_VmLep34z-k9a3FVU0yKrP2R066LIkY4dXwHSfyhS5U-bYcH1SV-zZs5K6j9xoIg6paAqLWFXBJyIoD48GxzWRu3s6racV6wY5qFBWiIyNiqfTq1TdyZl-HbuOgQ6jNYyLgu-Dbe8M8_CqC)

---
I can’t look at what America has become. When you care so much about something, it is hard to see it **WASTE** away.

Under Democrat rule, Michigan and our country are in trouble. A place where I served as a police chief and loved the community is now a place marked by **civil unrest, crime, and inflation.**

[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=008e69613b41448da3e4b7c5ac897ef3&_e=9XIRBleW6NPBn8HdV2AF-LXu53RQUZFQv4ziAHBvf03cPIlRan7J8kF7BhyFtgIRTXjpofJEJZBi7yzQtrRm-_WH-KQa_idrov2Ykx1Wd0BTHp64glpwMHsSh9fNgzJpfiOWtwuC6Xyljmz-thyrjJdBKIvYmddlRoEwybuDs_cQNJSYUh4M0bSJmvaLl0ZlUQLzFtepSfv0FE5_aRgHP2G9mZWXmMgGasRePO106yWgbMpBOeWvG6CF5KFVfzo27kHAdNTlP7aZAZKsORuWhv42_U3NRfl69iNF_dh6YMg-pbv0CSoBr6c6TodqIzlaaXeQQkAZZLtigNQRHLgvrznQ-NMQpVJMEwnS3wmeyP6VJnfAwhB06ngW3OWKJTAE)
[**It saddens my heart to see this outcome, but with your support, we can FLIP Michigan RED and get our state back on track!**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=008e69613b41448da3e4b7c5ac897ef3&_e=9XIRBleW6NPBn8HdV2AF-LXu53RQUZFQv4ziAHBvf03cPIlRan7J8kF7BhyFtgIRTXjpofJEJZBi7yzQtrRm-_WH-KQa_idrov2Ykx1Wd0BTHp64glpwMHsSh9fNgzJpfiOWtwuC6Xyljmz-thyrjJdBKIvYmddlRoEwybuDs_cQNJSYUh4M0bSJmvaLl0ZlUQLzFtepSfv0FE5_aRgHP2G9mZWXmMgGasRePO106yWirTXVlwfkU1FH5F3VHIZoma_83bld42fgIYc3Bws5_P_VvkSX66ISW3srzX2RlxPrKdE36SY9lXuTQaE9mDkHHUp1ipjK_OPRNNSW-TLrPQVbvdehEj_h8AhscJeEI1_Pb5RENOI-lb1c2ObKyXwf)

However, there are two choices that one can make: you can either complain or **DO** something about it. I chose to **DO SOMETHING ABOUT IT.** That is why I am running for US Senate. I am not just going to complain and turn a blind eye to America, but I am going to bring **CHANGE.**
| [ **SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN** ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=008e69613b41448da3e4b7c5ac897ef3&_e=9XIRBleW6NPBn8HdV2AF-LXu53RQUZFQv4ziAHBvf03cPIlRan7J8kF7BhyFtgIRTXjpofJEJZBi7yzQtrRm-_WH-KQa_idrov2Ykx1Wd0BTHp64glpwMHsSh9fNgzJpfiOWtwuC6Xyljmz-thyrjJdBKIvYmddlRoEwybuDs_cQNJSYUh4M0bSJmvaLl0ZlUQLzFtepSfv0FE5_aRgHP2G9mZWXmMgGasRePO106yUmxImugfsWqqyQuqjgZZPw4ept73A6Kb1uM6ljVzRUwPoQC1eCAKpCLT_BUQ8HBTBp-hJLxPChExHSNv0OrmZk5gMbOArZgnxI-Sec6WAi7RsFXGv1pVoMvgyT9T8b9zJ6Tnlckg-9clheqnYKhckG)
---

Being a former Chief of Police, I don’t back down from a challenge, and I won’t back down on Michigan. This state is dear to me, and I will fight for what I love.

**The question now is if you will join me.**

[**Will you put your support behind a man whose heart breaks for America and who is willing to do anything to RESTORE what has been lost?**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=008e69613b41448da3e4b7c5ac897ef3&_e=9XIRBleW6NPBn8HdV2AF-LXu53RQUZFQv4ziAHBvf03cPIlRan7J8kF7BhyFtgIRTXjpofJEJZBi7yzQtrRm-_WH-KQa_idrov2Ykx1Wd0BTHp64glpwMHsSh9fNgzJpfiOWtwuC6Xyljmz-thyrjJdBKIvYmddlRoEwybuDs_cQNJSYUh4M0bSJmvaLl0ZlUQLzFtepSfv0FE5_aRgHP2G9mZWXmMgGasRePO106yWMcSySFjYvEDlb2mf-aFlbbrkIHkAM2Edho9dk9E-KYPjJoxd82kFLqItILtbaX5NY6Zw1WpXQOa7BBWDo4w5Ztkqcd5WPAEd6ziVQCoARPvIVg7IOFc3ffbY-_az7YWpJwnVe6oSQNI812NzOviS7)

You make or break this effort, and **I NEED** you now more than ever before. Don’t just do this for me, but do this for **MICHIGAN.**
[ **SAVE MICHIGAN** ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=008e69613b41448da3e4b7c5ac897ef3&_e=9XIRBleW6NPBn8HdV2AF-LXu53RQUZFQv4ziAHBvf03cPIlRan7J8kF7BhyFtgIRTXjpofJEJZBi7yzQtrRm-_WH-KQa_idrov2Ykx1Wd0BTHp64glpwMHsSh9fNgzJpfiOWtwuC6Xyljmz-thyrjJdBKIvYmddlRoEwybuDs_cQNJSYUh4M0bSJmvaLl0ZlUQLzFtepSfv0FE5_aRgHP2G9mZWXmMgGasRePO106yVk5ifLozdaimViMxvNSNdhRFiPDFAzvieQal8ogpbRzGbLzjY5BleWZ3ZsaBucOwkLOSLvXgEaBmIGOOUIlJEUBMPH5_ggXC_NHOEY8eTx1Y5x9AHC_MwkzL-QLn_LXeNsedRllFOW-aEaOQfk_Sss)
---
[ **SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN** ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=008e69613b41448da3e4b7c5ac897ef3&_e=9XIRBleW6NPBn8HdV2AF-LXu53RQUZFQv4ziAHBvf03cPIlRan7J8kF7BhyFtgIRTXjpofJEJZBi7yzQtrRm-_WH-KQa_idrov2Ykx1Wd0BTHp64glpwMHsSh9fNgzJpfiOWtwuC6Xyljmz-thyrjJdBKIvYmddlRoEwybuDs_cQNJSYUh4M0bSJmvaLl0ZlUQLzFtepSfv0FE5_aRgHP2G9mZWXmMgGasRePO106yWnyBqfNguM6paqh4WG3Gm2EFo_-iv_mDfLP9c4inVdjIjxPkXpwkAXYQ4Ej4lyTwgJ-zRvXl7PRVbILzC5hbgz5GJwKe8StStO-Kf7mpnvOWZL9T7UPVlFL9BDWSeLffVH12N-YAdSWEK8znr8Ycg0)

name: Chuck Grassley
subject: 1 Week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc
body:
Iowa caucuses

| [ ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=d7fc787d2b314e26b8ff8af92f066309&_e=PSgMJ8Yrbo0QOMMjE3wrvQca2X1N35mnjwdu6c8NW1mDi5tOn0E4_j9K0Dwz3ad97KUQYueZEzKii9snMkdLqhS6owzBGy1BOM5fsPTRptl9CLpIt336zXkUv6T7MLSMGkjHGP5z1-bFOaAaUjBrcUjIXHbzzgKYKdLapX_votCkHoR8VdCZjCu_dJSO0lUcrlugvpwROEAhu8tYofkiyv0NtDm-RdyZTrOAxNdWYgAWPK00cNjljM5lySXRr02MXcVL9DJfsEjQpeQMAhfupjIR6GhnHRV1OxbPceab0wc%3D)
---
Friend,

The Iowa caucuses are just a week away.

This means the 2024 presidential election will officially begin, and the Democrats will start doing everything they can to ensure they hold the White House and Senate. We can't let that happen.

More Democrat control means an open border and continued out-of-control spending.

With your **[support](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=d7fc787d2b314e26b8ff8af92f066309&_e=PSgMJ8Yrbo0QOMMjE3wrvQca2X1N35mnjwdu6c8NW1mDi5tOn0E4_j9K0Dwz3ad97KUQYueZEzKii9snMkdLqhS6owzBGy1BOM5fsPTRptl9CLpIt336zXkUv6T7MLSMNSE5-ig7m29LBAbnNbNO1bA71RiJ52Qf79z7B3JL3R8RyPqA6knCnnR4vKeIjnXVMlTSl4hMlMR9r-1QGaNoRiWs6whFNIosrRD5Kr3iwaylGekBE_PLpO4h3CDsVjHp8bXKKDp4Yd8eW9VfX8r3I-pOXVIwiJHBOqKoM_swbTk%3D)** , I am confident we can secure a strong Republican victory in 2024. Now, more than ever, it is crucial that we work together to ensure our Conservative values are represented in both the Senate and the White House.

I am committed to working day and night to pave the way for success in 2024. But I can't do it alone - I need your support:

clean_body: Iowa caucuses | Friend, The Iowa caucuses are just a week away. This means the 2024 presidential election will officially begin, and the Democrats will start doing everything they can to ensure they hold the White House and Senate. We can't let that happen. More Democrat control means an open border and continued out-of-control spending. With your , I am confident we can secure a strong Republican victory in 2024. Now, more than ever, it is crucial that we work together to ensure our Conservative values are represented in both the Senate and the White House. I am committed to working day and night to pave the way for success in 2024. But I can't do it alone - I need your support: | The Iowa caucuses mark the beginning of a pivotal election season, and your support will set the tone for our success. Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life.
Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government.
Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home.

clean_body: | | | | Hey, Fellow Patriot - you won't believe this... Disgraced DHS Secretary Mayorkas recently threatened me in a closed-door meeting. He told me that if I dared impeach him, I “wouldn’t like who comes next.” This isn’t a servant of the American People – this is a radical dictator and an existential threat to our country. Let’s call his bluff. Let’s close the border. Let’s STOP him once and for and IMPEACH SECRETARY MAYORKAS. | Thank you, | | Kat Cammack Congresswoman FL-03 | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- | Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life. Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government. Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home. | | FOLLOW KAT ONLINE | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- Donate by Mail Kat For Congress 5200 NW 43rd Street SUITE 102-180 Gainesville, FL, 32606 | | [PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]() Kat Cammack 5200 NW 43rd st, suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 \- =

Fellow Conservative, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It’s a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden’s desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden’s to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it’s not just the FBI, it’s the Department of Justice as well. I just heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney’s offices in Brooklyn, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I’ve been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don’t have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con·spir·a·cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in “conspiracy theories” like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a872866c74904ccdafcd3d999afd7503&_e=2HooZPJf64mWP1PUtUbhl4q2lYUH-j9RE-MaOfraY_IWtvdEpjFpE4UCGYlI5SGzgwPRMU0o05SHcAHK82XqI3ODKMv5Pr_2CexGF0XrTZJlYtJv-1S2QYObZpegzKfAKccA3yveiZbXtLe48pZq230pbtSXUzXX4Tgvfh6rZGW54cz8mOz6VTN1UTdd1bB_-3sYJ9hg05hGAwpmIOBX6VAVZUeWIsIWADyU4eSXCZI7Zp0n2eAoXFve-a7WVWCeIELYQgkAmnQ3T94mqdId3i3PtrnuYm68WxiQe0v7S0BD8slnko17egWd4-Vhd9KUDtotGF7saVq9O7HELBCfSCDJ16nSMs0v3WfYjnXixtfByrullCjiknTHnO8Bj2vz)

It’s because they are complicit in the cover-up. I’ve said it before, and it’s more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I’ll be honest, it is brutal... but I’m a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what’s right, and who certainly doesn’t back down from a fight.**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a872866c74904ccdafcd3d999afd7503&_e=2HooZPJf64mWP1PUtUbhl4q2lYUH-j9RE-MaOfraY_IWtvdEpjFpE4UCGYlI5SGzgwPRMU0o05SHcAHK82XqI3ODKMv5Pr_2CexGF0XrTZJlYtJv-1S2QYObZpegzKfAKccA3yveiZbXtLe48pZq230pbtSXUzXX4Tgvfh6rZGW54cz8mOz6VTN1UTdd1bB_-3sYJ9hg05hGAwpmIOBX6VAVZUeWIsIWADyU4eSXCZLkzuMlU1wV7CTrp7zanDuLgRcbWyiY8EQWKeHPzxkEI8Mxl5XmADC9ZuqJrkUtXeH-CvPVWeVbL_Zwz6kQK6s3TxpBx5XWDhrXYd6m05ABe3TsAvPtdYj8o3WjMB6GjbchKHnE_H9RWRzQzyZq3TbN)

I’ve only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I’m once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY.
As Theodore Roosevelt said “Nothing worth having is easy” and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, **it’s the promise of America to all of her citizens.**
[**If you’re with me, I’d be honored to have your support.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a872866c74904ccdafcd3d999afd7503&_e=2HooZPJf64mWP1PUtUbhl4q2lYUH-j9RE-MaOfraY_IWtvdEpjFpE4UCGYlI5SGzgwPRMU0o05SHcAHK82XqI3ODKMv5Pr_2CexGF0XrTZJlYtJv-1S2QYObZpegzKfAKccA3yveiZbXtLe48pZq230pbtSXUzXX4Tgvfh6rZGW54cz8mOz6VTN1UTdd1bB_-3sYJ9hg05hGAwpmIOBX6VAVZUeWIsIWADyU4eSXCZLADitN23oQ4wBbbqqLBwIfz67ZO-cc89g67VtR-Ctg0VdNGXUhhw5XqyA5GddnQiir3lisJBxHBtFcW-4yqctkrsWTOtlMDr42qEcJ4qdl1PQTUletIf6oTVZQy0lc-piRtE-EXOHsUdfGcFVctOq4)

clean_body: In the Biden Family | | | Fellow Conservative, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It’s a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden’s desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years. For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden’s to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it’s not just the FBI, it’s the Department of Justice as well. I just heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney’s offices in Brooklyn, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. As I’ve been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE! While words don’t have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. CONSPIRACY NOUN con·spir·a·cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in “conspiracy theories” like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family. | It’s because they are complicit in the cover-up. I’ve said it before, and it’s more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. I’ll be honest, it is brutal... but I’m a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what’s right, and who certainly doesn’t back down from a fight. | I’ve only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I’m once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY. As Theodore Roosevelt said “Nothing worth having is easy” and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, it’s the promise of America to all of her citizens. | With Courage, James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee | | | | | | | | Paid for by Comer for Congress ../../../private/var/folders/r/prmwhjj3zq7czqp52lmjdcw0000gn/T/com.microsoft.Outlook/Outlook Temp/%unsubscribe_url%

Friend, It's the honor of my life to go to work every day for the community where I grew up. My constituents aren't just constituents — they're neighbors and old friends, family members, and former classmates. **So when I say that your opinion matters to me, I mean it. Making your voice heard in Congress is the purpose of my work.** Right now, my team and I are making plans for this critical election year, and we need your input to guide our work. **_What are the most important issues you'd like to see us focus on in 2024? Reply to this email to let me know!_** My team and I will read every response, and your opinion will shape our priorities for the year ahead. clean_body: In just one week... | | | Friend, In just one week’s time, the first vote of the most consequential election of our lives will be cast. And mark my words, that very first vote will be the spark... ...The spark that ignites the WILL of WE THE PEOPLE to save our country from the dark forces of tyranny. This is the FINAL BATTLE for America. And with YOU at my side this election year, we will counter Crooked Joe and his accomplices’ vicious witch hunts at every turn, we will cast off the sick political class that hates our country, we will rout out the globalist and warmongers who sold you out, we will dismantle the Democrats’ Deep State, and we will peacefully SAVE our country from these villains once and for all. But because I am counting on YOU, Friend, in this FINAL WEEK now more than ever, I had to follow up one more time about your PENDING 2024 Sustaining Membership. Out of the millions and millions of records in our campaign’s database, you were even among the exclusive group of select patriots I chose to offer our FIRST RENEWALS of the election year. So please, with just 1 WEEK until 2024 voting officially begins, see below for full details regarding the status of YOUR 2024 Sustaining Membership within our campaign. | | 2024 MEMBERSHIP RENEWAL MEMBER: Friend OFFER: Renewal (2024) STATUS: [PENDING] | On January 20, 2025, I will place my hand upon the Bible and take the Oath of Office as I am inaugurated as your 47th President of the United States. I will thank God for granting us the strength to prevail against the most vicious witch hunts ever conceived. But I also hope to thank YOU. You see, as I make my way through the crowd and wave to our many, many supporters, I will quickly be able to identify who has been with me since this pivotal moment right now when they show me their 2024 Campaign Membership Card. I’ll know that YOU peacefully defended our movement in this final week before 2024 voting began, as Democrats tried to JAIL me for life as an innocent man and REMOVE my name from the ballot to disenfranchise a majority of Americans. And in the end,OUR victory will be thanks to YOU, and your decision to RENEW your 2024 Sustaining Membership TODAY. Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. name: Officer Harry Dunn (ret.)
subject: I'm running to serve Maryland in the U.S. Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| I couldn't have been any closer to the chaos of January 6. I put my life on the line during the violence and destruction that Trump encouraged.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5008%2E5257348%2EpMAHEB)
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em_dunn.6Z0NCv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240108_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=5008%2E5257348%2EpMAHEB)
Hey Derek, it's Harry Dunn here, one of the Capitol police officers who defended the U.S. Capitol against MAGA insurrectionists just three years ago and testified in front of the January 6th Committee.
I've got an important announcement: **I'm hoping to make my return to DC – but not as a Capitol police officer. I'm officially running to serve Maryland's 3rd Congressional district in the U.S. House.**
**[I’m counting on your support to get there. Can you rush a split donation of $10 or more between Adam Schiff and me to become a Founding Donor of my campaign?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em_dunn.6Z0NCv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240108_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=5&akid=5008%2E5257348%2EpMAHEB)**
**[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR: CHIP IN $10 >>](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=jan2024_abs_em_dunn.h6DSHm&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240108_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=5008%2E5257348%2EpMAHEB)**
Here’s the thing Derek, I _never_ thought I would run for office. Growing up, I wanted to be just like my dad, who was an athlete and a U.S. Air Force Veteran. I played football and earned an athletic scholarship that sent me to college. (_I was pretty good, but being 6-foot-7 sure didn’t hurt!_)
But wearing a football uniform taught me something special: it gave me purpose and made me feel a part of something bigger than myself.
So when I put on my Capitol police uniform for the first time over 15 years ago to protect our nation’s Capitol, _it felt right_.
But I never thought I’d see the day that our democracy would be attacked by Donald Trump and an army of insurrectionists that HE directed to the Capitol.
I couldn't have been any closer to the chaos of January 6. I put my life on the line during the violence and destruction that Trump encouraged. So trust and believe when I tell you: **we cannot allow our democracy to be in the hands of these MAGA-extremists**.
I fought for our democracy and our Capitol once as Officer Dunn, and I'll do it again as Congressman Dunn.
**[Please, can you chip in a split donation between Adam Schiff and me of $10 or $25 to become a Founding Donor of my campaign? I seriously appreciate any help you can give today >>](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em_dunn.6Z0NCv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240108_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=7&akid=5008%2E5257348%2EpMAHEB)**
_If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Harry Dunn and Adam Schiff will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em_dunn._Ud0mX&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240108_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=8&akid=5008%2E5257348%2EpMAHEB)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $25](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em_dunn._Ud0mX&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240108_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=9&akid=5008%2E5257348%2EpMAHEB)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em_dunn._Ud0mX&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240108_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=10&akid=5008%2E5257348%2EpMAHEB)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em_dunn._Ud0mX&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240108_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=11&akid=5008%2E5257348%2EpMAHEB)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $250](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em_dunn._Ud0mX&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240108_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=250&t=12&akid=5008%2E5257348%2EpMAHEB)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em_dunn.6Z0NCv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240108_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=13&akid=5008%2E5257348%2EpMAHEB)
---
Let's do it,
Harry Dunn
135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=5008%2E5257348%2EpMAHEB) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=5008%2E5257348%2EpMAHEB)**

subject: 🌟 View From The Campaign Trail: Celebrating The Wins! 🎉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
My campaign dropped two new TV ads this week! Plus can you guess how many events I️ attended in 2023?

https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=3261c82847-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_03_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3261c82847-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Friends and fellow Hoosiers,

As we kick off 2024, I wanted to take a moment to update you on the happenings of the past week. But first, a big thank you for your unwavering support—your belief in our vision drives this campaign forward.

Reflecting on 2023, I️ have to say, wow, you truly made it an extraordinary and impactful year! Check out the recap (https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana/posts/pfbid0WgenVW3PVJ8j2yHnGSM1jTbmtw7JxkqydktbWmoW7JzgGfzMeoh7G7uLTZ2BZG9Kl?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=3261c82847-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_03_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3261c82847-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) below 👇
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana/posts/pfbid0WgenVW3PVJ8j2yHnGSM1jTbmtw7JxkqydktbWmoW7JzgGfzMeoh7G7uLTZ2BZG9Kl?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=3261c82847-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_03_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3261c82847-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Grassroots engagement defined the year, setting the tone for an energetic start to 2024!

Now, let's dive into the highlights of the past week! 🌟

** ICYMI: I️ just dropped 2 new TV ads!
------------------------------------------------------------

Hoosier families, land, and lives are under threat, and I️ won't waver in the battle to protect them.

In the new ads (here (https://crouchforindiana.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db6332b918877c0167cdddb48&id=b5468f3304&e=2451eaeeac&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=3261c82847-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_03_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3261c82847-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) and here (https://crouchforindiana.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db6332b918877c0167cdddb48&id=4cde7291fd&e=2451eaeeac&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=3261c82847-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_03_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3261c82847-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ), I️ share actions I've taken to safeguard our great state.

When China started eyeing land near military sites, I️ slammed the door on them. I️ made a critical vote protecting the unborn, and today, Indiana is one of the most Pro-Life states in the country.
https://crouchforindiana.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db6332b918877c0167cdddb48&id=4cde7291fd&e=2451eaeeac&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=3261c82847-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_03_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3261c82847-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

As Bidenflation restricts Hoosiers' bank accounts, I'm fighting to Axe The Tax, ensuring your financial freedom.

And, as your Governor, I️ won't stand idly by as fentanyl floods our streets, killing our neighbors. I'll tackle the problem head-on, making sure the dealers are punished.

** 2024 Legislative Session
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=3261c82847-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_03_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3261c82847-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Today signifies the start of Indiana's legislative session. As your Lieutenant Governor, I️ serve as President of the Senate and head several state agencies, including the Department of Agriculture, Office of Community and Rural Affairs, and Indiana Destination Development Corporation.

I am prepared and eager for the tasks ahead. This is a crucial juncture where we will craft policies to fortify the foundations of our beloved state.

** IN THE NEWS: Gubernatorial candidates speak on campaigns as election year begins (https://fox59.com/indianapolitics/indiana-gubernatorial-candidates-speak-on-respective-campaigns-as-election-year-begins/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=3261c82847-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_03_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3261c82847-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------
We recently had the opportunity to share our vision with Fox 59. The article highlighted my dedication to Indiana and our focus on crucial issues like "Axe The Tax" and mental health.

Your support fuels these impactful policy discussions.
https://fox59.com/indianapolitics/indiana-gubernatorial-candidates-speak-on-respective-campaigns-as-election-year-begins/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=3261c82847-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_03_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3261c82847-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
ARTICLE (https://fox59.com/indianapolitics/indiana-gubernatorial-candidates-speak-on-respective-campaigns-as-election-year-begins/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=3261c82847-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_03_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3261c82847-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** New Year's Eve Prayer
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=3261c82847-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_03_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3261c82847-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

On New Year's Eve, I joined 22 faithful Hoosiers for a powerful prayer outside the Federal Court Building in Evansville. We prayed for our state, country, and world, seeking divine guidance for our lawmakers as they step into this legislative session.

** Sue Finkam's Inauguration
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=3261c82847-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_03_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3261c82847-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Attended the inauguration of Sue Finkam, Carmel's new Mayor! Sue's commitment to leadership and her dedication to Carmel's success are inspiring.

I️ believe in her leadership and am confident that she will keep Carmel special!

** Vigo County GOP Breakfast
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=3261c82847-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_03_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3261c82847-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

I️ was thrilled to join the Vigo County GOP breakfast on Saturday! We discussed my vision for Indiana, highlighting key initiatives like Axe The Tax, fighting the fentanyl crisis, and championing pro-life values.

Grateful for the opportunity to connect and share our vision with the wonderful people of Vigo County!

** Sneak Peek! Interview with Indy Politics' Abdul-Hakim Shabazz
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=3261c82847-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_03_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3261c82847-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

We looked ahead at my plan to Axe The Tax and how I️ will fight for justice against fentanyl dealers harming Hoosiers. We also looked back at my proven track record of standing up for Hoosier land, lives, and families—from stopping China's land grab attempts near Indiana military sites to making a critical vote to protect the unborn.

Check out the interview here (https://indypolitics.org/my-conversation-with-crouch/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=3261c82847-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_03_03_41&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3261c82847-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) !

clean_body: My campaign dropped two new TV ads this week! Plus can you guess how many events I️ attended in 2023? Friends and fellow Hoosiers, As we kick off 2024, I wanted to take a moment to update you on the happenings of the past week. But first, a big thank you for your unwavering support—your belief in our vision drives this campaign forward. Reflecting on 2023, I️ have to say, wow, you truly made it an extraordinary and impactful year! Check out the recap () below 👇 Grassroots engagement defined the year, setting the tone for an energetic start to 2024! Now, let's dive into the highlights of the past week! 🌟 ICYMI: I️ just dropped 2 new TV ads! Hoosier families, land, and lives are under threat, and I️ won't waver in the battle to protect them. In the new ads (here () and here () ), I️ share actions I've taken to safeguard our great state. When China started eyeing land near military sites, I️ slammed the door on them. I️ made a critical vote protecting the unborn, and today, Indiana is one of the most Pro-Life states in the country. As Bidenflation restricts Hoosiers' bank accounts, I'm fighting to Axe The Tax, ensuring your financial freedom. And, as your Governor, I️ won't stand idly by as fentanyl floods our streets, killing our neighbors. I'll tackle the problem head-on, making sure the dealers are punished. 2024 Legislative Session Today signifies the start of Indiana's legislative session. As your Lieutenant Governor, I️ serve as President of the Senate and head several state agencies, including the Department of Agriculture, Office of Community and Rural Affairs, and Indiana Destination Development Corporation. I am prepared and eager for the tasks ahead. This is a crucial juncture where we will craft policies to fortify the foundations of our beloved state. IN THE NEWS: Gubernatorial candidates speak on campaigns as election year begins () We recently had the opportunity to share our vision with Fox 59. The article highlighted my dedication to Indiana and our focus on crucial issues like "Axe The Tax" and mental health. Your support fuels these impactful policy discussions. ARTICLE () New Year's Eve Prayer On New Year's Eve, I joined 22 faithful Hoosiers for a powerful prayer outside the Federal Court Building in Evansville. We prayed for our state, country, and world, seeking divine guidance for our lawmakers as they step into this legislative session. Sue Finkam's Inauguration Attended the inauguration of Sue Finkam, Carmel's new Mayor! Sue's commitment to leadership and her dedication to Carmel's success are inspiring. I️ believe in her leadership and am confident that she will keep Carmel special! Vigo County GOP Breakfast I️ was thrilled to join the Vigo County GOP breakfast on Saturday! We discussed my vision for Indiana, highlighting key initiatives like Axe The Tax, fighting the fentanyl crisis, and championing pro-life values. Grateful for the opportunity to connect and share our vision with the wonderful people of Vigo County! Sneak Peek! Interview with Indy Politics' Abdul-Hakim Shabazz We looked ahead at my plan to Axe The Tax and how I️ will fight for justice against fentanyl dealers harming Hoosiers. We also looked back at my proven track record of standing up for Hoosier land, lives, and families—from stopping China's land grab attempts near Indiana military sites to making a critical vote to protect the unborn. Check out the interview here () ! INDY POLITICS INTERVIEW () ICYMI: Endorsements () Suzanne Crouch is the only gubernatorial candidate who has been endorsed by more than 100 past and present elected officials in Indiana. A full list of those endorsements can be found here. () Last but not least... As we venture into the new year, expect bold ideas and a commitment to delivering results that improve Hoosiers' lives. Strengthening the economy, investing in education and infrastructure—these are the cornerstones of our vision. Thank you for standing with me on this journey. Let's make 2024 a year of progress and positive change for Indiana. Onward and upward, Let's keep the conversation going! Follow me on social to keep up with the campaign. Have questions, comments or concerns? Send me an email! Facebook () Twitter () Instagram () Website () mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com Email (mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com) Get Involved! Ready to make an impact? By joining my campaign, there are several ways that YOU can be a catalyst for change! Tap the "Get Involved" button below to get hands-on with the campaign, request yard signs, host an event and more. GET INVOLVED () Attend one of my upcoming fundraisers! Your support plays a pivotal role in our mission to connect with Hoosiers across the state and convey our vision for Indiana's future. If you'd like to be a part of our journey and attend one of our upcoming fundraisers, here's the list of events: For more information or to RSVP, contact Heather at: heather@crouchforindiana.com (mailto:heather@crouchforindiana.com) or 615-438-3531 (tel:6154383531) . name: Tom Suozzi
subject: the NY-03 special is key

body:
this is our first step to retaking the House [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Hi there, it's Tom Suozzi. I’m the Democratic nominee in NY-03 to replace the expelled George Santos, and we have a special election coming up on February 13. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Team, the implications of this election in just a few weeks are huge. There’s so much at stake for Nassau, Queens, and the whole country. Everyone is watching to see if we can finally break through the partisan gridlock in Congress to get things done and solve the critical problems our country faces. With George Santos gone, we have a chance to do just that.
In short, team, we have to win. This special election will set the tone for all of 2024–including the general election in November.
So team, I’m asking if you’ll split a contribution between Kirsten Gillibrand and I so we can win NY-03, finally get to solving the problems our country faces, and start off 2024 with a big win? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_4_suozzi?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Tom Suozzi and Kirsten Gillibrand:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_4_suozzi?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5]

Tom Suozzi

name: Dr. Cornel West
subject: Join Us in Solidarity - Historic March in DC for Palestinian Rights
body:
On Saturday, January 13th, we stand together in Washington, DC, marching for justice, for peace, and for the rights of our Palestinian brothers, sisters, and siblings in Gaza.

| | | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=psQUkJGc26u6Wi0imicX-00jZnUVaZYVu06OFU-xtOc&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=march_on_dc_for_gaza&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, This is a heartfelt call to action. On Saturday, January 13th, we stand together in Washington, DC, marching for justice, for peace, and for the rights of our Palestinian brothers, sisters, and siblings in Gaza. They are enduring a brutal, genocidal assault – an affront to their human dignity marked by ethnic cleansing and oppressive apartheid-like conditions.
---
[ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=rnE9YhnYr4J_7Au8CsjhkEjwKpkAsyOeToam5DLYn2rHYocm4Zhq0Rm8Hl782pbmkY3dUkJtqhudqD8R2M3__w&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=march_on_dc_for_gaza&n=2)
---
I urge you, regardless of your color, gender, national identity, or sexual orientation, to join us. This is a call to all persons of moral conscience. **We must gather in unity to exert pressure on the Biden administration, challenging their immoral complicity in the genocide against Palestinians in Gaza.** Our voices will resound in unison, calling for an immediate and permanent ceasefire. We demand an end to U.S. complicity in these atrocities. It's time to echo and commend the courageous stance taken by South Africa in invoking the Genocide Convention. We call upon other nations to stand with us, to support this call for justice and human dignity.
---
[ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?amount=10&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=march_on_dc_for_gaza&n=3)
---
This march is a historic moment of solidarity - bearing witness to our collective resolve to fight against injustice wherever it rears its ugly head. Let us come together to show that our commitment to human rights knows no bounds. I look forward to standing shoulder to shoulder with you in Washington, DC. Together, we can make a difference. Together, we can be the change. In Solidarity and Hope, Dr. Cornel West
---
| [](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?amount=27&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=march_on_dc_for_gaza&n=4 "DONATE NOW >>") [DONATE NOW >>](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?amount=27&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=march_on_dc_for_gaza&n=4)
---
Cornel West for President · 420 N McKinley St, Ste 111-512, Corona, CA 92879, United States
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com · [Unsubscribe](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/unsubscribe?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=march_on_dc_for_gaza&n=5)
---

Hey there Fellow American, it's Pat Harrigan.
---
As a former Green Beret, I know better than most that no great mission is achieved without teamwork. Without my fellow soldiers by my side, I probably wouldn't be here today. Out in the field, we work together to take down the enemy and keep each other safe. Now that I'm running for Congress, I've learned that the ropes here aren't that different. We have a real shot at winning and bringing real, service-first representation to Congress, but only if we work together. **[Will you join my A-Team today so we can fight for our freedom through Election Day 2024?](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=778336df569b40d98663a9d67143707c&_e=oeP738M5NZC5t0NEtXnPub_2z00Gq7p8nnM88Bz6AjGKUuwDeOcQC09N4y76iAasnipvEUB1iUga6gArzqSN56tkSJ902a71rdW22Hpv02sFWrB5PWyk6BAW8LSpaWwjBU3R870oNlkWI3CSs6uVswCtUg3Q0SNHvFU6CKCaaGNbuKLctvkaKJyjwK2K6a8EG77aKm-W3xpwH1d135FBaIWx4x4xcfjcB-gZSajiIf-qzJ_OIGKctEbCw0QGWUsZRCqzv6T7R-lVJYaBuwR_0p2coAxqkbqa7KJsUm9OJHg%3D)**

I'm running for Congress to stop the Biden crime wave, secure our border, bring down inflation, and protect the American Dream that I've benefitted so much from for the next generation. It's time to make America work for all of us, and that means building a majority in Congress made up of hardworking people who put our country before themselves. I've had it with politicians who sell out to the highest bidder. That's not what I fought for in combat, and it's not who I am. clean_body: | | | Hey there Fellow American, it's Pat Harrigan. As a former Green Beret, I know better than most that no great mission is achieved without teamwork. Without my fellow soldiers by my side, I probably wouldn't be here today. Out in the field, we work together to take down the enemy and keep each other safe. Now that I'm running for Congress, I've learned that the ropes here aren't that different. We have a real shot at winning and bringing real, service-first representation to Congress, but only if we work together. I'm running for Congress to stop the Biden crime wave, secure our border, bring down inflation, and protect the American Dream that I've benefitted so much from for the next generation. It's time to make America work for all of us, and that means building a majority in Congress made up of hardworking people who put our country before themselves. I've had it with politicians who sell out to the highest bidder. That's not what I fought for in combat, and it's not who I am. As your Congressman, I promise to ALWAYS put the American people first in everything I do, and I can't wait to see all we can achieve together. Thank you, Pat Harrigan | | Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee | | Pat Harrigan is a former member of the U.S. Army. body:

Dear Peter,
In his interview with FOX News correspondent Jesse Watters, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. called for the total and complete release of the Epstein Files.
RFK Jr. asked the question, **_“Why are we hiding this from the American people?”_**
If there were prominent politicians and other government officials and US businessmen on the list and involved in Epstein’s nefarious activities, _U.S. citizens should know about it_.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=epstein_1_8_24_email_1u_1_nd&n=2)
RFK Jr. also called for the total and unconditional release of all details surrounding the mysterious death of Jeffrey Epstein.
The loss of faith in our institutions and political class is directly connected to high profile incidents like the Epstein case, and what appears to be an FBI cover-up.
_Were politicians and world leaders blackmailed or coerced by foreign governments?_
_How widespread was the sex trafficking of minors, and exactly who was involved?_
Questions like these will never be answered by the current, corrupt leadership in Washington, and American citizens are left to themselves to piece together answers.
This is unacceptable, and as your next president, Robert F. Kennedy Jr. will restore integrity and honesty to Washington and demand the same from the leaders of its institutions.
[Your contribution will put RFK Jr. onto the national debate stage, on your state ballot, and into the White House.](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=epstein_1_8_24_email_1u_1_nd&n=3)

By adding a spouse, you are making a joint contribution to be attributed evenly between you and your spouse.

Mail: To contribute by mail, please send a personal check made payable to “Elizabeth for Nevada” to:

Elizabeth for Nevada
PO Box 750382
Las Vegas, NV 89136

Please include your full name, address, email address, occupation and employer in the envelope.

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Our average donation last quarter — and why I’m so proud of it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Insiders told me it would be impossible to run this campaign the right way. You’re helping us prove them wrong.
#
Hey Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce.
This was our average online donation last quarter, and today I want to take a few moments to tell you why I’m so proud of this number. **Will you let me explain?**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42441?refcode=em20240108-4568&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4568%2E614464%2EDVtri1)
**[ADD A DONATION NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42441?refcode=em20240108-4568&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4568%2E614464%2EDVtri1)**
**When we launched this campaign to replace Josh Hawley last January, I knew we had to run it the right way** — without a cent from corporate PACs or the corrupt elites responsible for stripping our communities for parts, like Big Oil and Big Pharma execs.
Insiders told me it would be impossible. Our system is so broken, they thought we’d never be able to run a serious campaign without that support.
But since then, everyday people like you have stepped up to prove them wrong. Together, we’ve built one of the most powerful grassroots movements in the entire country — fueled by donations of $5, $20, $35, or just whatever you can afford to help us defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat this November.
The record-breaking support behind our campaign gave us the ability to hold Hawley accountable to Missouri voters throughout last year, so much that multiple polls have now confirmed that this race is already in a dead heat:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42441?refcode=em20240108-4568&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4568%2E614464%2EDVtri1)
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42442?refcode=em20240108-4568&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=4568%2E614464%2EDVtri1) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42442?refcode=em20240108-4568&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=5&akid=4568%2E614464%2EDVtri1) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42442?refcode=em20240108-4568&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=4568%2E614464%2EDVtri1) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42442?refcode=em20240108-4568&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=4568%2E614464%2EDVtri1) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42442?refcode=em20240108-4568&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=4568%2E614464%2EDVtri1) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42442?refcode=em20240108-4568&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=4568%2E614464%2EDVtri1) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42441?refcode=em20240108-4568&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=4568%2E614464%2EDVtri1)
---
Whether you donated after reading an email like this one, shared one of our Facebook ads, got one of our texts, or even visited our website, your support is helping us take advantage of our best opportunity to flip a GOP-held U.S. Senate seat this year — and I’m just so proud to have you on this team, Peter.
**But here’s why I still need your help:** the national insiders and corporate mega-donors propping up Josh Hawley are doing everything they can to tear me and our grassroots movement down. They started attacking me on the day I got into this race and, over the course of last year, they spent BIG to make Hawley look strong.
**So now, I’m counting on you to help our campaign stay prepared for the fight ahead.[Will you rush a donation of $10, $15, $27.88, or whatever you think is best today so we can keep building this people-powered movement to defeat Josh Hawley and take this U.S. Senate seat back for everyday working Missourians?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42441?refcode=em20240108-4568&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=4568%2E614464%2EDVtri1)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42442?refcode=em20240108-4568&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=12&akid=4568%2E614464%2EDVtri1) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42442?refcode=em20240108-4568&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=13&akid=4568%2E614464%2EDVtri1) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42442?refcode=em20240108-4568&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=14&akid=4568%2E614464%2EDVtri1) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42442?refcode=em20240108-4568&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=15&akid=4568%2E614464%2EDVtri1) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42442?refcode=em20240108-4568&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=16&akid=4568%2E614464%2EDVtri1) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42442?refcode=em20240108-4568&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=17&akid=4568%2E614464%2EDVtri1) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42441?refcode=em20240108-4568&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=18&akid=4568%2E614464%2EDVtri1)
---
For too long, our country’s corrupt politicians have bought their way into power and maintained a broken status quo. That cycle stops with our movement.
Thanks for being part of it,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240108-4568-footer&t=19&refcode2=4568_614464_DVtri1&akid=4568%2E614464%2EDVtri1)**
---

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=20&akid=4568%2E614464%2EDVtri1). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jesse=20James=20Mullen?=
subject: Never Whistle at Night -- Jesse James Mullen book club
body:
Read along with Jesse in 2024 | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mullenformontana/never-whistle-at-night-jesse-james-mullen-book-club?e=805e709ff8)
---
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=a52ab37e0c&e=805e709ff8)
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=b264e90ab7&e=805e709ff8)
# “Never Whistle at Night”
In addition to running community newspapers, my wife, Sasha, and I own two small bookstores in SW Montana (Browsing Bison Books).
I’m inviting you to read along in 2024 as we explore books relevant to Montana life but also our connections with the land, our neighbors, and the mythology and history of this fantastic place we call home.
In addition to highlighting new books, I’ll highlight different independent Montana bookstores in each email to encourage Montanans to shop local and I’ll share information about some cool people working at bookstores across this state.
Our first read is “Never Whistle at Night,” an anthology of short horror stories written by Indigenous American authors that tie a history of verbal storytelling with unique and varied Indigenous mythologies. I’m halfway through and loving it.
For our first bookstore, I chose [Libro.fm](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=2d9fd96c9c&e=805e709ff8), an audiobook alternative to Amazon that allows listeners to assign a sales commission to the local bookstore of their choice. I’ve put close to 20,000 miles on my van since launching this campaign, so it comes in useful for me. Most of my colleagues across Montana with independent stores have a Libro.fm profile. It’s a great way to shop locally, conveniently.
If you’d like to read along with me, reply or send me an email with the subject line: Book Club. If you’re not interested, no need to reply. My team will only send a few book-related emails to the entire subscriber list.
Best wishes,Jesse James Mullen
| [Donate Any Amount](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=c48af7906f&e=805e709ff8)
---

|

name: Katie Porter
subject: This is core to who I am.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Washington DC is broken.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=36146%2E3422442%2EzbwxtY)
Derek,
It is incredibly clear that Washington, D.C. is broken.
**We have seen Washington fail to act on our most pressing issues, often siding with special interests and corporations over Californians.** In instances where progress has been made, it has been too little, too late.
Before my election six years ago, I worked as a consumer advocate and law professor. I sat with families across the state who had lost their homes to predatory lenders. I didn’t spend the last 20 years being wined and dined by lobbyists in D.C. Instead, I spent those years holding corporate cheaters and government officials accountable.
Now, in the U.S. House, I have a reputation for “doing Congress” differently. I am one of just 11 members of the House and the only person in this race who refuses contributions from federal lobbyists.
**I am the only person in this race who has never, ever taken corporate PAC money. I didn’t change my stance on that to boost my credibility in this Senate race.** _It is core to who I am_ , and it reflects why I do things in Washington differently.
Here’s where we’re at in this race: early polling suggests that I am in a very strong position to win the general election, no matter the other candidate, but the math in this primary on March 5 is weird. A celebrity Republican is gaining traction in the polls, and he could advance to second place and keep us from qualifying for the general election.
**[So](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240108-2?refcode=em20240108-36146&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36146_3422442_zbwxtY&akid=36146%2E3422442%2EzbwxtY)****[, Derek, I have to ask today: Will you make your first contribution to help me reach the voters who will decide the outcome of the primary election on March 5?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240108-2?refcode=em20240108-36146&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36146_3422442_zbwxtY&akid=36146%2E3422442%2EzbwxtY)**
Thank you,
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAP24_2_SBI_20230108_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=36146_3422442_zbwxtY&akid=36146%2E3422442%2EzbwxtY)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=36146%2E3422442%2EzbwxtY)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=36146%2E3422442%2EzbwxtY)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

subject: What’s important to you?

body:
Please remember that with Democrats writing off West Virginia, the Montana Senate race has become the number one priority for both Republicans and Democrats. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=398eee35fa9e4d088dd648596ae10ce1&_t=koJ4p0QpqKYdKst_pY3ZylxwWjtu_qCEKlVIrKZ7wP-mBeARPdyoasFjVVxsh4FoqedTOxfwHWovtqo_7EXVvtY-05PPuNMluwnkjWoIWCw%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=398eee35fa9e4d088dd648596ae10ce1&_t=koJ4p0QpqKYdKst_pY3ZylxwWjtu_qCEKlVIrKZ7wP-mBeARPdyoasFjVVxsh4FoqedTOxfwHWovtqo_7EXVvtY-05PPuNMluwnkjWoIWCw%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=398eee35fa9e4d088dd648596ae10ce1&_e=7XMmeKWKT7VYFPA7wM8V-Of1jyjUOvSJgGDzCQVa1O8V6WmHajssrDVvPJKyh-RCLxjk6y8_aT1CYd4uO7eovq8iPvFje78ig8HKxhqrciV706mDKdCi_weWr6_CEbDL-3WEEpGzMGvCOfnneQiBWYX8sk1f58v1BZE3Md0AyjaPvOrX8mKwch7yuXxQpXc3iQl6xq7fEiezvvvFyv2f4FfGi5WTJmAJqtS9dOVRkOtVm1TjozWb1lMeszu6qx0H-fppGws3hPG0E637nDEwMiBZslW8IpR39sbxAe7js2WqF0q1yP6v0AeWTRApRsFtFJFVXjVwC5AIvXg9CX592xC3GA_Ya1a496B3jauPkPDS-xV_oFfsGlNraV3xe5pPdUwGSXjIqF5C_l5lHFEGgb_Q2jVbhDy2YK0NJUMcahY%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

Happy New Year! It’s Montana Republican Senate candidate Tim Sheehy writing to ask you to **[participate in my Election Year Survey](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=398eee35fa9e4d088dd648596ae10ce1&_e=7XMmeKWKT7VYFPA7wM8V-Of1jyjUOvSJgGDzCQVa1O8V6WmHajssrDVvPJKyh-RCLxjk6y8_aT1CYd4uO7eovq8iPvFje78ig8HKxhqrciV706mDKdCi_weWr6_CEbDL-3WEEpGzMGvCOfnneQiBWYX8sk1f58v1BZE3Md0AyjaPvOrX8mKwch7yuXxQpXc3iQl6xq7fEiezvvvFyv2f4FfGi5WTJmAJqtS9dOVRkOtVm1TjozWb1lMeszu6qx0H6eL93R5_b0WwVtyK-ap2S7rFdDleaEHj-BpuE3ugC4hrL-qyS4bc8WFRfzA2hQYsl5GD_gXgPUt0NL5FMp3bj7D6OfUBv29c8GFCNBZQtPT4VYy2vQOfHW4OOzudXwMHTgf3js79fBdu806ZlZrAzj1FuxCt73TiMoRMDa4a1x8%3D)**.

[**BEGIN 2024 ELECTION YEAR SURVEY ->** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=398eee35fa9e4d088dd648596ae10ce1&_e=7XMmeKWKT7VYFPA7wM8V-Of1jyjUOvSJgGDzCQVa1O8V6WmHajssrDVvPJKyh-RCLxjk6y8_aT1CYd4uO7eovq8iPvFje78ig8HKxhqrciV706mDKdCi_weWr6_CEbDL-3WEEpGzMGvCOfnneQiBWYX8sk1f58v1BZE3Md0AyjaPvOrX8mKwch7yuXxQpXc3iQl6xq7fEiezvvvFyv2f4FfGi5WTJmAJqtS9dOVRkOtVm1TjozWb1lMeszu6qx0H8g3f0MkeYYoJfgOms3Dt0lendRdUVF2DTK4apfiZHUU0d0jhNchev9jWYVtxBubsrhb9AIcc5mhUVy0VBVkvxONqOwlc5_RLZCV7xI-0hZWCV_qVxo1RAk7YUCq7KcFZJkoiIPoLDzdRq6eCgCNT-DNURhw_ijrwPYwkUhxSZW4%3D)

As you may recall, I sent a few emails in December asking for your participation in my 2023 end-of-year survey. Unfortunately, we didn’t receive enough feedback to gauge where voters stand ten months before Election Day.

_**[Why your participation today matters:](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=398eee35fa9e4d088dd648596ae10ce1&_e=7XMmeKWKT7VYFPA7wM8V-Of1jyjUOvSJgGDzCQVa1O8V6WmHajssrDVvPJKyh-RCLxjk6y8_aT1CYd4uO7eovq8iPvFje78ig8HKxhqrciV706mDKdCi_weWr6_CEbDL-3WEEpGzMGvCOfnneQiBWYX8sk1f58v1BZE3Md0AyjaPvOrX8mKwch7yuXxQpXc3iQl6xq7fEiezvvvFyv2f4FfGi5WTJmAJqtS9dOVRkOtVm1TjozWb1lMeszu6qx0H3P_jA_DdgiF7J_p-2qy678S9TxdBOLAXn1q4Ky1VNaq8u5_NWez5CxvtoANeqr0tZMXBSDN2QwJEJ0M9fT0l9rGmr-7ii3n7ZS1zsAjz1BITgdtWhaoib5wfvCpZg74zES2jxAfch_KDY2ptLAy7LxrgmNi2_YTYGw-3gqdhfL8%3D) **_This will be the most expensive Senate race in U.S. history, per vote. You may not hear about my race in the news much now, but give it a few months, and my name and my opponent's name will be hard to miss.

_**[Your response](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=398eee35fa9e4d088dd648596ae10ce1&_e=7XMmeKWKT7VYFPA7wM8V-Of1jyjUOvSJgGDzCQVa1O8V6WmHajssrDVvPJKyh-RCLxjk6y8_aT1CYd4uO7eovq8iPvFje78ig8HKxhqrciV706mDKdCi_weWr6_CEbDL-3WEEpGzMGvCOfnneQiBWYX8sk1f58v1BZE3Md0AyjaPvOrX8mKwch7yuXxQpXc3iQl6xq7fEiezvvvFyv2f4FfGi5WTJmAJqtS9dOVRkOtVm1TjozWb1lMeszu6qx0Hx2LHNk_XiQJqm5HD4ThUQw-0b3Gfg9JzN-uJjqQbze2rbJLgR7-5PRzcGxS_Vfhu2C9HmUU1ZM5vCHRA8n_iueuTeWxiFuRCM_hSPKgF0HN0nY36ywQusUmk6IMcmOOV10YHagVuSt8H5Vuwx0kjO2pTpCr3n1nc01IcFcUHUF8%3D)**_ to my Election Year Survey will provide my team and me with critically important information to tailor our message, adjust campaign strategy, and win the votes needed to flip this Democrat-held Senate seat.

Please remember that with Democrats writing off West Virginia, the Montana Senate race has become the _**number one priority for both Republicans and Democrats**_.

[**BEGIN 2024 ELECTION YEAR SURVEY ->** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=398eee35fa9e4d088dd648596ae10ce1&_e=7XMmeKWKT7VYFPA7wM8V-Of1jyjUOvSJgGDzCQVa1O8V6WmHajssrDVvPJKyh-RCLxjk6y8_aT1CYd4uO7eovq8iPvFje78ig8HKxhqrciV706mDKdCi_weWr6_CEbDL-3WEEpGzMGvCOfnneQiBWYX8sk1f58v1BZE3Md0AyjaPvOrX8mKwch7yuXxQpXc3iQl6xq7fEiezvvvFyv2f4FfGi5WTJmAJqtS9dOVRkOtVm1TjozWb1lMeszu6qx0HKFAX1GgkVay-iBTLLkIq-_dYupqLf7OQjPz_w5NmCEcv_fxHHSjbpivw6SqWPUU0qnvhSOYZ5sZ5DHm5v870BVaBXy5R4QSgA4ZExEG3Mkv-0ocStP1Fl3ZRojPwgl_hrESfJb4Yd9YTnJFX45IXGWH2XsLn-OrmPBp6G63M2vg%3D)

If you have a few minutes to spare right now, I cannot tell you how valuable _**[your input](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=398eee35fa9e4d088dd648596ae10ce1&_e=7XMmeKWKT7VYFPA7wM8V-Of1jyjUOvSJgGDzCQVa1O8V6WmHajssrDVvPJKyh-RCLxjk6y8_aT1CYd4uO7eovq8iPvFje78ig8HKxhqrciV706mDKdCi_weWr6_CEbDL-3WEEpGzMGvCOfnneQiBWYX8sk1f58v1BZE3Md0AyjaPvOrX8mKwch7yuXxQpXc3iQl6xq7fEiezvvvFyv2f4FfGi5WTJmAJqtS9dOVRkOtVm1TjozWb1lMeszu6qx0HkBMANClcacnguYD5k76r-nwFJpX4HS983v2kZ0UBGN_nx58y46BOMKKIatQCHn2vSZG5biJPoQbhDcW2RFnqpJBaq9CRcrSbo9IAQNniU97iTxjBipJW6G81i8F76GaV2sSYIH7F1LupYvUBltQ3H_RiDRCjUxUunqv-2f1s8WY%3D)**_ would be to me and my team.

For America's Future,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

[**BEGIN SURVEY NOW ->** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=398eee35fa9e4d088dd648596ae10ce1&_e=7XMmeKWKT7VYFPA7wM8V-Of1jyjUOvSJgGDzCQVa1O8V6WmHajssrDVvPJKyh-RCLxjk6y8_aT1CYd4uO7eovq8iPvFje78ig8HKxhqrciV706mDKdCi_weWr6_CEbDL-3WEEpGzMGvCOfnneQiBWYX8sk1f58v1BZE3Md0AyjaPvOrX8mKwch7yuXxQpXc3iQl6xq7fEiezvvvFyv2f4FfGi5WTJmAJqtS9dOVRkOtVm1TjozWb1lMeszu6qx0HZNeJ3i2IIliWqGLVLzCNN1_AG2odf8MX2wYMTWcY_2zGM9_jFk9OIqzUX6SQGKBJzZGgEt_L9Cz8EA3IESgltPtSlR94jLf5GxaY0rTXoiweQmgBmUuAIKuE9qqqGmkh0Ly09mdR6qzX7DsMXOezjIli8r3gMmhtTHS0-11bFRo%3D)

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

clean_body: Please remember that with Democrats writing off West Virginia, the Montana Senate race has become the number one priority for both Republicans and Democrats. | | Fellow Conservative, Happy New Year! It’s Montana Republican Senate candidate Tim Sheehy writing to ask you to . As you may recall, I sent a few emails in December asking for your participation in my 2023 end-of-year survey. Unfortunately, we didn’t receive enough feedback to gauge where voters stand ten months before Election Day. This will be the most expensive Senate race in U.S. history, per vote. You may not hear about my race in the news much now, but give it a few months, and my name and my opponent's name will be hard to miss. to my Election Year Survey will provide my team and me with critically important information to tailor our message, adjust campaign strategy, and win the votes needed to flip this Democrat-held Senate seat. Please remember that with Democrats writing off West Virginia, the Montana Senate race has become the number one priority for both Republicans and Democrats. If you have a few minutes to spare right now, I cannot tell you how valuable would be to me and my team. For America's Future, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: They say we don’t have a prayer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana
body:
But I have other plans. | | | [](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6b934f07bed6432693834294d4b7309b&_e=msT26CId4SzRAJ4aLtcOSutndeEw9CmaQIXTdgCF7cQPj-iy9RVUDPtnLfXD2t3Z2XnGGQxP1hoMt2QqUl_OM4mmI1g5bfyhPHr4z78_Z9PvqjHzU5cJAnDVBWMrb_6hwCsv9C8lXb0XoRYE28rT-lPQs8OjJTUX6bd5aYkHk2t_KSXln8sFBsVHvlCtBnrgegYqJb81P46HHmVNv9HFBER_N1ILR2q8gXGFi8EcxanxBu4C2RcijlHfUs53YPUlBZkaxay6LPOMDbD5TBBVXFPgI1gPUJgECnaGX0XrtbONb3cQU_r0jKNe0z_7PijDuUqgWSRaiJsa9liCK1JAqTFMYOq6wOWzSocvqhc4q7pogcL4eI66QobBdwxkdFJ_aAmkPpNnoHHfPPsx4QwgOqLai86q6rScBHYyUdXvIXSSDdPVgmlzysCqCvvYEcI9)
---
Friend, I was raised to never cower down to a bully. To never let someone else define who you are. And to never, _EVER_ give up.

Growing up the kid of a firefighter, you learn pretty quickly that you are only as good as the team around you.

And when you are running into a burning building, you have to be able to count on the men and women by your side to know that they have your back, and are just as invested in getting the job done as you are.

That's the same mentality that I am bringing to the House of Representatives. And as the newly-elected Speaker, **[I am working overtime to ensure that I have a team of reliable, steadfast conservatives who will push forward and fight with all that they have to maintain and grow our Republican House majority.](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6b934f07bed6432693834294d4b7309b&_e=msT26CId4SzRAJ4aLtcOSutndeEw9CmaQIXTdgCF7cQPj-iy9RVUDPtnLfXD2t3Z2XnGGQxP1hoMt2QqUl_OM4mmI1g5bfyhPHr4z78_Z9PvqjHzU5cJAnDVBWMrb_6hwCsv9C8lXb0XoRYE28rT-lPQs8OjJTUX6bd5aYkHk2t_KSXln8sFBsVHvlCtBnrgegYqJb81P46HHmVNv9HFBER_N1ILR2q8gXGFi8EcxanxBu4C2RcijlHfUs53YPUlBZkaxay6LPOMDbD5TBBVXFPgI1gPUJgECnaGX0XrtbPEQZBn3sqCt63j2tWUT2lgm2JzpDyftv-ZY9FirdexO86FiiUvAxDo8Wo1TBI18eauarx5x7OTBJeVUhVGtqr7_qd9M00wxI1kMcR5t06OwAzSj0WgKrHahlw-kmwQaeGS-OzV-vo9Bf8_8_zhqG2Y)**

Let me lay the groundwork: Right now, Republicans have the thinnest of majorities in the House. And the Democrat Machine smells blood in the water.

They think we are weak. That we are vulnerable. That we are ineffective.

**But they 've got it all wrong. **

While they are spending their time pointing fingers and poking fun, House Republican leadership is putting our heads down and getting to work for the American people -- to ensure that our conservative majority stays intact. **[And we'd love to have you on our team, Friend.](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6b934f07bed6432693834294d4b7309b&_e=msT26CId4SzRAJ4aLtcOSutndeEw9CmaQIXTdgCF7cQPj-iy9RVUDPtnLfXD2t3Z2XnGGQxP1hoMt2QqUl_OM4mmI1g5bfyhPHr4z78_Z9PvqjHzU5cJAnDVBWMrb_6hwCsv9C8lXb0XoRYE28rT-lPQs8OjJTUX6bd5aYkHk2t_KSXln8sFBsVHvlCtBnrgegYqJb81P46HHmVNv9HFBER_N1ILR2q8gXGFi8EcxanxBu4C2RcijlHfUs53YPUlBZkaxay6LPOMDbD5TBBVXFPgI1gPUJgECnaGX0XrtbPhoPQodPgU3opcqd3FFLXF7D9g7OZrZrPtrqlqDlNOVNAE9DsYHitTE6ZKXQdbRugMDotjLsh73_VmURWNCjLswieP8M6DZ7ml6cmX6qGB6I_1zrGkmojKoIVKsfUJQt-uvh9QJAhXqBwmlWKRHUS0)**
Look, I'm not the kind of leader to scream into the void and use scare tactics to try and force a donation from you. I know times are tough.

But I am the kind of leader to tell you the truth -- **the whole truth. ** **[And the truth is, if we as conservatives don't start putting up serious fundraising numbers, you'll be referring to a radical leftist as Speaker this time next year.](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6b934f07bed6432693834294d4b7309b&_e=msT26CId4SzRAJ4aLtcOSutndeEw9CmaQIXTdgCF7cQPj-iy9RVUDPtnLfXD2t3Z2XnGGQxP1hoMt2QqUl_OM4mmI1g5bfyhPHr4z78_Z9PvqjHzU5cJAnDVBWMrb_6hwCsv9C8lXb0XoRYE28rT-lPQs8OjJTUX6bd5aYkHk2t_KSXln8sFBsVHvlCtBnrgegYqJb81P46HHmVNv9HFBER_N1ILR2q8gXGFi8EcxanxBu4C2RcijlHfUs53YPUlBZkaxay6LPOMDbD5TBBVXFPgI1gPUJgECnaGX0XrtbNLijJdrwNjHUf2vayvyZ9cHPZZhfYf2Wv2w96KWKFIxR1wbaF-OXNyt4WNyUZSUJ57mHwxrmAKDQde9CIMEWZ6iytJXQ-c7HvkyIXwBawVcpI_sN1USBBEFn7r0QQuimWIFbk73QYi4qKz7nrfiVQ-)**
So, as I said at the beginning. I've never been one to cower to a bully, allow others to define me, or back down from a fight.

And I'm not going to start now.

**[Serving as Speaker of the House is the honor of a lifetime-- and it would be an honor to know that I have earned your support as well.](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6b934f07bed6432693834294d4b7309b&_e=msT26CId4SzRAJ4aLtcOSutndeEw9CmaQIXTdgCF7cQPj-iy9RVUDPtnLfXD2t3Z2XnGGQxP1hoMt2QqUl_OM4mmI1g5bfyhPHr4z78_Z9PvqjHzU5cJAnDVBWMrb_6hwCsv9C8lXb0XoRYE28rT-lPQs8OjJTUX6bd5aYkHk2t_KSXln8sFBsVHvlCtBnrgegYqJb81P46HHmVNv9HFBER_N1ILR2q8gXGFi8EcxanxBu4C2RcijlHfUs53YPUlBZkaxay6LPOMDbD5TBBVXFPgI1gPUJgECnaGX0XrtbN9m7C4by-qdwrS6ynfzO_9bMOTKfIiEntPdBI38rMgSv_KTrjXiMlkld9OmOrANMzd4QV6h6qGbCDpg4NShZgtPK7xUo48lmtHpsD8jBHosK_RB2WsbwNYeGfF5EgV3LxxhfHn0munznZiC6osZi4_)**
---
[**JOIN TEAM JOHNSON TODAY**](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6b934f07bed6432693834294d4b7309b&_e=msT26CId4SzRAJ4aLtcOSutndeEw9CmaQIXTdgCF7cQPj-iy9RVUDPtnLfXD2t3Z2XnGGQxP1hoMt2QqUl_OM4mmI1g5bfyhPHr4z78_Z9PvqjHzU5cJAnDVBWMrb_6hwCsv9C8lXb0XoRYE28rT-lPQs8OjJTUX6bd5aYkHk2t_KSXln8sFBsVHvlCtBnrgegYqJb81P46HHmVNv9HFBER_N1ILR2q8gXGFi8EcxanxBu4C2RcijlHfUs53YPUlBZkaxay6LPOMDbD5TBBVXFPgI1gPUJgECnaGX0XrtbNi6LS0SD-ol9YK6nkcW-1ePuQKBQizu4c_xPwb9UekdkeDEXlBC58FaAgEDTDFJsTtgptWlI3zKrRVnFicVOBLnQGAFYpOT0iddXrciLcxFpZK_iH8RjIJHIlWNRbUI22Lhgp8di0X7AYkzd-0xeCk)
---
Thank you for your time,
---
[](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6b934f07bed6432693834294d4b7309b&_e=msT26CId4SzRAJ4aLtcOSutndeEw9CmaQIXTdgCF7cQPj-iy9RVUDPtnLfXD2t3Z2XnGGQxP1hoMt2QqUl_OM4mmI1g5bfyhPHr4z78_Z9PvqjHzU5cJAnDVBWMrb_6hwCsv9C8lXb0XoRYE28rT-lPQs8OjJTUX6bd5aYkHk2t_KSXln8sFBsVHvlCtBnrgegYqJb81P46HHmVNv9HFBER_N1ILR2q8gXGFi8EcxanxBu4C2RcijlHfUs53YPUlBZkaxay6LPOMDbD5TBBVXFPgI1gPUJgECnaGX0XrtbMZG1zuFvSc06OzMjVZpznnYD31eVPSdGVjipZtjArSQmsfbEmyhl45q5uU1jwEuOLo1aic8q90YuDacUEv6619XSmj63cPUEYnE5vSnxPgCZlQwBCADlbofSe-AO0HibBOW4CkxrsC5T5uhGoK_Bsq)
---
Mike Johnson Speaker of the House

name: Team AOC
subject: What matters most to you in 2024?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
As someone who has helped grow our movement, we’d love to hear what's important to you in 2024.
#
**Our work for 2024 is gearing up,** and this team is as dedicated as ever to achieving the progressive world we dream of. There’s so much more work to be done, but with your support we’re feeling more hopeful than ever.
With that said, we want to make sure our priorities are aligned with yours going into this year. Your input is valuable. We’re committed to sending you emails that are useful and provide ways you can take action in our democracy and in your communities.
[With that said, will you take 2 minutes to complete our 2024 Team AOC Priorities Survey, and share with us what matters most to you going into this new year?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/2024-priorities-survey/?source=em20240108-5608-P_ENG_SUR_MIS&t=1&akid=5608%2E2526796%2Eapp3sm)
[ **[Take the survey](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/2024-priorities-survey/?source=em20240108-5608-P_ENG_SUR_MIS&t=3&akid=5608%2E2526796%2Eapp3sm)** When Alexandria and our team launched this campaign, going door-to-door in 2018, we could never have imagined how these last five years would unfold. We’re incredibly grateful, and excited for what we can accomplish together heading into 2024. Thank you for everything, Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20240108-5608-P_ENG_SUR_MIS&t=4&refcode2=5608_2526796_app3sm&akid=5608%2E2526796%2Eapp3sm)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20240108-5608-P_ENG_SUR_MIS&t=5&akid=5608%2E2526796%2Eapp3sm)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=6&akid=5608%2E2526796%2Eapp3sm) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=7&akid=5608%2E2526796%2Eapp3sm) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=8&akid=5608%2E2526796%2Eapp3sm)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com) This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
