subject: Sen. Elizabeth Warren called on ALL Democrats
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20617%2E4449941%2EgKU_WO)
---
| []() | [Elizabeth just made an AMAZING call to action to ABOLISH the Electoral College — and she needs 10,000 Democrats to stand with her RIGHT NOW and sign our urgent petition. Sign on now to abolish the Electoral College »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/abolish_electoral_college?source=FFR_20240108_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20617%2E4449941%2EgKU_WO)
---
**Elizabeth Warren is 100% right** — the Electoral College is eroding our Democracy election by election!

_Donald Trump would NEVER have been President if it wasn’t for the Electoral College._

**Republicans have only won the popular vote ONCE since 1988.**

But they’ve won the Presidency three times during that period thanks to the Electoral College – it’s SO UNFAIR and COMPLETELY undemocratic!!

**[__So we’re launching a MASSIVE petition to stand with Elizabeth Warren & demand Congress to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ABOLISH the Electoral College IMMEDIATELY! Add your name right away! »__](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/abolish_electoral_college?source=FFR_20240108_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20617%2E4449941%2EgKU_WO)**
[Sign my name now: Abolish the Electoral College »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/abolish_electoral_college?source=FFR_20240108_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=20617%2E4449941%2EgKU_WO)
---
Don’t forget to hit submit to record your signature. Thank you,

-Fight For Reform

subject: Let’s make our communities safer.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76730263/448325282/-401216107?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTUyYTMxNWQtOTBhZS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nwelDZP1RKPB-CmSJyNS1Lxm8gEU5CYCNTjK0hyK8wc=)
Friend,

13 years today, we witnessed a horrific act of violence where 19 people, including former Rep. Gabby Giffords, were shot, 6 fatally, at a constituent meet-and-greet in Tucson.

This is a solemn reminder of the violence that Rep. Giffords – a champion in the effort to end gun violence – faced 13 years ago and that we still have so much work to do in order to stop these horrific events.

Gun violence is ripping apart families, creating unsafe environments in our schools and places of work. Doing nothing is not an option. We must act. And with courageous leadership, we can make our communities safer.

**We must pass common sense gun reform, including universal background checks and banning assault-style weapons.** These weapons of war have no place in our neighborhoods where they so easily and often fall into the wrong hands. Meanwhile, our GOP opponent David Schweikert is doing nothing to combat this epidemic. In fact, he has a 92% approval rating from the NRA.

**[Will you sign on to my petition to pass universal background checks and ban assault weapons now? Addressing this issue is a critical piece of my campaign, and I know together, we can make the change we so desperately need in AZ-01 and the rest of the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76730264/448325283/-2095032538?refcode=em-1.8.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTUyYTMxNWQtOTBhZS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nwelDZP1RKPB-CmSJyNS1Lxm8gEU5CYCNTjK0hyK8wc=&emci=f70db605-8eae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=952a315d-90ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=626985)**

Marlene

body:

__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=ec678a76937943bd98f3e18a901e54b6&_e=1qBKXogieoBr82LCetBY8ZQvNFSw4c-6K4onzzh8YOMXaP3k_I6ohICl7INT_a-aqhjihRxJ0_h43Suwp17hfqKQIxYo5z_lGqWPhQeqOgRp4bST_sKcJ6XGUJGldmp84aBIVeBvmpfZx9WVTfkBMMIIJ4sNipTc2x2e4FKJpebvZHYVoZ3qmf7KZX7RvtJkb0Y0lCKdcCkWEjV5R99GoX4h5VNveFe1qO4i3O4t4UKuQJCUfuNetbbmqIMlDT7XYrdpn448th6JbNSepyEXbtNt-0YSnHpTGdamDXCls4xxyLFVNmMBIT1GvOwufPiOv5M6xlEbclWggZVENAApC-4lq_GwMIe6LzGbLAGHmCl_K_QeaO38swEGhGlRouiAkC8wTpHCBPrcR988hsi5eA%3D%3D) Folks, Lauren Boebert is in the news YET AGAIN. At this point, Boebert is in the news nearly every day for something reckless, stupid, extreme, or just downright embarrassing. Do we really want that to be our representative for CO-04? clean_body: She’s such an embarrassment that she is fleeing her district to run in one 300 miles away from her home! | | Friend, Since her first day in Congress, Lauren Boebert has made it abundantly clear that she doesn’t care about her constituents - she only cares about making headlines. She’s such an embarrassment that she is fleeing her district to run in one 300 miles away from her home! Her dangerous rhetoric may have made her a superstar in MAGA World, but it’s done NOTHING to help the constituents she was elected to serve. We’re building a grassroots movement here, and with supporters like you powering the team – there’s nothing we can’t accomplish. Talk soon, Team Ike | | Our mailing address is: Ike McCorkle for Congress , | | Sent via . | Dear Patriot, Did you see what happened this weekend? [The Left is absolutely out of control!](https://trk.klclick2.com/ls/click?upn=AOF0UcH39oinW-2B1Srdz7jrJzy5Slm2mmt58jDAYU-2BR9i3pvyjOBpAB49x-2BlUviyLNWMu2XjrByO-2F5dfWbSGuU-2BbdH0wEUZ1IaSC9VMrIz0mHAHL9zB-2BPsQZ46GFx47IpB0prwxmD219ZUgPp4EIRflN9vBwpDkmLXstkU0OdMmucBQPXG-2BWuLmKq6nHR8SzE8sVhQ7eOUy8eBuyGmT-2B65i-2FTT2Tb929QW1aGCDPsdpU-3DwxpG_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymgAsQ4nDpcKawhuaTqrZd2bsWemEXdhv1-2FJ9KVurqEF7AKl3wP31JWzpstPcFFsH-2B7tjuFYT6BHuxh-2BmDYTuutp-2Bu4h0qA3acLcWzxWNprS94XlCvCf8yUht2LjUR4TYm8TxFNcfnhkP2eKApquJB87yFwtKErmp7z8g2-2FyKNl8zvjJW6pWDJrMqe-2Focl5TRbre1O8-2BCWaAAqKemPIMA-2BUi6Qb6eb5GbENoh7-2BjxVpGtct3NmB9M15g-2FLfew5nKpwkESJZI2DECPqVHBC9x7wOhZBcXBoT1zBk5MKQPnQET95sdpCscigcrVDk6f6fEEvlzXyrXTdv-2B3DXULc-2BtRkfuTgXj4HTOtoLnziDgkO2jg6UbJoQL9XBQjvtBbrQx4h5dEaOOYtH5JyZ4e-2Fen7e3Jl0v7Ek5coZxGe5yFpY-2BUfg-3D-3D) Marjorie Taylor Greene was scheduled to attend a book signing in Orlando, Florida, and the Leftists lost their minds. Over 400 Woke-Leftists barraged the venue with horrible phone calls and pressured them to cancel the book signing! The Left isn’t tolerant; they will attempt to silence anyone who disagrees with them. Cancel culture is still alive and well! Thankfully, all those nasty people wasted their time because a new venue was found and the book signing was a huge success!

2024 will be Biden’s last year in office | | |

Friend, Joe Biden has been in public office for the last 5 decades, but next year will be the **END** of his political career. With the lowest approval ratings of any president in the last 70 years, and polls continuing to show a crushing defeat, the Biden campaign is getting **DESPERATE.** Other Democrats are even worried that having Biden on the ballot spells doom for their campaigns. Friend, 2024 is our chance to deliver a **CRUSHING** defeat not only to America's worst president, but to the entire Democrat Party! name: Elizabeth "Liz" Johnson
subject: It all changed when...
body:
My life changed dramatically 30 years ago with an unexpected divorce, but as you know, that thrust me into a deeper life of
advocacy.

[https://email.email.talkswithliz.com/c/eJxskU-v1SAUxD8N7F5z-A8LFkaticlLngtjdNMg0BYfvWDB2-inN-3CuLjbk8nM78z4KQX748thqvloPr1Xz-ztd_j8oX3DwWrQzkscLVHAlRRGAY6bS3nqv2u03m3VpeX23-00k8I4raKTdNaOaT6HQJjRgFdrIjgGZJ4j4ZpQZbgKs1Yzl8yDpxInS4FyIGCAgiQwBGqkkFxpp8AYHhCHK23oLr-2I_U1pz-DLxvOdu29NsTeIDoiOrZedrfEYSllydHV1E4ZouPWlnYLO6IjKzy8c4dqz-vXny8v7D7SfgpiSA7RUQqjhReaBc6JIODnIJiQcai3BedyNffIAm-xryVYVxPebahHyjk1qRCH5WI_cVv5tftor2eeUrs_HWV_jTvu1pdtejhIt7FP_0rv9kR4lP83AAD__6a7lRo]

> Hey Peter,
>
> My life changed dramatically 30 years ago with an unexpected divorce, but as you know, that thrust me into a deeper life of
> advocacy.
>
> I had been an advocate most of my adult life. As a mother, I always advocated for my children, but I realized later that I could
> do even more good if I became an advocate for the people.
>
> What I didn't realize was that my voice was needed. As you now know, it was 28 years ago when I managed to run my first
> political campaign! And it was all due to a mindset shift.
>
> Here's what happened. After I resolved that I was an advocate for the people, I set out to inform everyone of each elected role
> that I was running for. I held meetings, voter registration drives, and rallies to educate and share my message. The more I
> informed people, the more support I received, then I knew I was going in the right direction. Even though I didn't win my
> campaign in 2014, 2020 nor 2022, I never gave up.
>
> The 2020 and 2022 campaign motivated me to continue sharing my message and show that our democracy works when we get involved as
> active participants. I realized that this movement was bigger than me. It’s about you, your family, humanity and more voices
> like ours. It is time to hear your voices.
>
> I’ve never been so excited about anything in my life! We’ve kick started a fantastic transformational process to bring your
> voice to the table where decisions are being made on you and your family’s behalf without your input. Realizing this gave me
> renewed hope and has inspired me to keep going. I’m working to become The People’s Representative from Georgia 12 and I’m ready!
> You’re ready! We’re ALL Ready to go from surviving to thriving together!
>
> As I said, this campaign will continue being about you; therefore, I want to hear from you. I want to hear your concerns and
> your stories. I want to know how I can support you. I also want to keep you updated on each phase of our 2024 campaign to become
> “The People’s Representative” for Georgia’s 12th District and America.
>
> Let's connect and discuss what the words freedom, security, and opportunities to thrive means to you. These three words are the
> bedrock of our great nation and the platform of this campaign. If you would like to speak with me, reply, and it comes directly
> to me.
>
> I am forever grateful for receiving your support for our Liz Johnson for Us 2024 campaign. Everyone who donates will be added to
> a special guest list to receive access to special virtual events. No contribution amount is too small.
>
> With much gratitude,
>
> Elizabeth "Liz" Johnson
>

clean_body: My life changed dramatically 30 years ago with an unexpected divorce, but as you know, that thrust me into a deeper life of advocacy. [] Hey Peter, My life changed dramatically 30 years ago with an unexpected divorce, but as you know, that thrust me into a deeper life of advocacy. I had been an advocate most of my adult life. As a mother, I always advocated for my children, but I realized later that I could do even more good if I became an advocate for the people. What I didn't realize was that my voice was needed. As you now know, it was 28 years ago when I managed to run my first political campaign! And it was all due to a mindset shift. Here's what happened. After I resolved that I was an advocate for the people, I set out to inform everyone of each elected role that I was running for. I held meetings, voter registration drives, and rallies to educate and share my message. The more I informed people, the more support I received, then I knew I was going in the right direction. Even though I didn't win my campaign in 2014, 2020 nor 2022, I never gave up. The 2020 and 2022 campaign motivated me to continue sharing my message and show that our democracy works when we get involved as active participants. I realized that this movement was bigger than me. It’s about you, your family, humanity and more voices like ours. It is time to hear your voices. I’ve never been so excited about anything in my life! We’ve kick started a fantastic transformational process to bring your voice to the table where decisions are being made on you and your family’s behalf without your input. Realizing this gave me renewed hope and has inspired me to keep going. I’m working to become The People’s Representative from Georgia 12 and I’m ready! You’re ready! We’re ALL Ready to go from surviving to thriving together! As I said, this campaign will continue being about you; therefore, I want to hear from you. I want to hear your concerns and your stories. I want to know how I can support you. I also want to keep you updated on each phase of our 2024 campaign to become “The People’s Representative” for Georgia’s 12th District and America. Let's connect and discuss what the words freedom, security, and opportunities to thrive means to you. These three words are the bedrock of our great nation and the platform of this campaign. If you would like to speak with me, reply, and it comes directly to me. I am forever grateful for receiving your support for our Liz Johnson for Us 2024 campaign. Everyone who donates will be added to a special guest list to receive access to special virtual events. No contribution amount is too small. With much gratitude, Elizabeth "Liz" Johnson Lizjohnsonforus.com [] $25 [] $50 [] $100 [] $250 [] $300 [] Other [] YOUR VOICE, YOUR SUPPORT, AND OUR FUTURES MATTER! THANK YOU IN ADVANCE FOR YOUR EARLY SUPPORT! [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [ ] Liz Johnson for Us 2024 P.O. BOX 1404 Statesboro, GA 30459 United States Want to change how you receive these emails? You can update your preferences [] or unsubscribe from this list []. [] []

body:
Tomorrow, I am flying to... | | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=ef30698a75f0474fa21d31ae4bef1d29&_e=PmLhEaZ7VQcbkuIo-v-X5iFH8TUxKCXdLrGaywQoaZXbB5bCXaBNXQVgH6Zvwl6NMsvtcBWHeni8WvWGYpA8hWd5S2YFYWXK6XrNwgP08BwetKlRKBw9ORu5HBqhe5zya1anomANQE6H--9ZHptXv56RJvFyyOePEbTR0ZgYanKIOzNtIvBeAcHVP0njfuWYCb0-a10jlt9S7axo1WAPisNu8HwoxVnttw0I81gq8Dsq0fepz0xMUvOKBfMSCOwn8Az44gbTapgd2uDs13ovG08cEAgucUoTxstDFZ6xl36QjV3YGZwsXYsZAisBFnor_piD1VvebU3CqrREUhEmXNtUQypd-afjMtdx2IY3SEq8qNYtZaxqh2rIP6GN5i2EqBkld0_mkQux6Ph6UA4fQyOUAiR5Al2icpE-9BX46HkjzBSYAfVBQW_DSaqV9DiPVoq5bSk6Q-m_BT6ruEWDpOMrslXDqj4L26aGJx_bM3jOg2vaieuAkIf1Cwz8vXDh)
---
| | Patriot,

---
We’re in the final week leading up to the FIRST VOTE of the 2024 election – and tonight, I am burning the midnight oil.
---
_Wouldn’t you love to hear I was working late on a final get-out-the-vote plan or critical Election Day operations – or even a detailed plan to save our country?_
---
But, no — Crooked Joe is forcing me into a courtroom in our nation’s capital to _defend_ my right to presidential immunity – a right granted to _every_ other president in history.
---
_I will march into the belly of the beast of Washington D.C. to appear at the Circuit Court of Appeals tomorrow, January 9._
---
[](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=ef30698a75f0474fa21d31ae4bef1d29&_e=PmLhEaZ7VQcbkuIo-v-X5iFH8TUxKCXdLrGaywQoaZXbB5bCXaBNXQVgH6Zvwl6NMsvtcBWHeni8WvWGYpA8hWd5S2YFYWXK6XrNwgP08BwetKlRKBw9ORu5HBqhe5zya1anomANQE6H--9ZHptXv56RJvFyyOePEbTR0ZgYanKIOzNtIvBeAcHVP0njfuWYCb0-a10jlt9S7axo1WAPisNu8HwoxVnttw0I81gq8Dsq0fepz0xMUvOKBfMSCOwn8Az44gbTapgd2uDs13ovG08cEAgucUoTxstDFZ6xl36QjV3YGZwsXYsZAisBFnor_piD1VvebU3CqrREUhEmXK-KE8OLUGk01YIfSDuWTtIODuXL_S5bTFXI11cm45hIlgzEHNxbz06ibbWpi4F6AEhSnlw2izubSRJIxGAC6TxhFE7kSjAHyaPoWWK20pb-trK7CXJo-YPwskDV7VlBNk5XFdMBMXgElIU_iDipyeYaklrPSycXr2wcmy94dnL_)
---
I REFUSE to let any of these witch hunts actually hurt our campaign even in the slightest.
---
So, if that just means I now have to work extra late in preparation for all of these disgusting court battles, _then so be it!_
---
**_As I said in Iowa on Saturday night, I’ll stay up all night if that’s what it takes to win the 2024 election and SAVE AMERICA._**
---
_If you could see me right now, you’d know that I wrote that sentence with a smile on my face. I will never let the crooks and fools break my spirit!_
---
I am more committed to saving America than ever before. Are _YOU_?
---
**Of course, if you’re doing poorly right now due to the very corrupt people running America at the moment, please do not feel pressured to donate at this time!**

clean_body: Tomorrow, I am flying to... | | | | | Patriot, We’re in the final week leading up to the FIRST VOTE of the 2024 election – and tonight, I am burning the midnight oil. Wouldn’t you love to hear I was working late on a final get-out-the-vote plan or critical Election Day operations – or even a detailed plan to save our country? But, no — Crooked Joe is forcing me into a courtroom in our nation’s capital to defend my right to presidential immunity – a right granted to every other president in history. I will march into the belly of the beast of Washington D.C. to appear at the Circuit Court of Appeals tomorrow, January 9. I REFUSE to let any of these witch hunts actually hurt our campaign even in the slightest. So, if that just means I now have to work extra late in preparation for all of these disgusting court battles, then so be it! As I said in Iowa on Saturday night, I’ll stay up all night if that’s what it takes to win the 2024 election and SAVE AMERICA. If you could see me right now, you’d know that I wrote that sentence with a smile on my face. I will never let the crooks and fools break my spirit! I am more committed to saving America than ever before. Are YOU? Of course, if you’re doing poorly right now due to the very corrupt people running America at the moment, please do not feel pressured to donate at this time! | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

subject: Can I tell you about a friend of mine?

body:
It’s important to have good friends.| | | Peter, Rick Scott isn’t just a major supporter of my father - he's also a good friend. name: Kimmie Gonzales
subject: Volunteer for Brandon Herrera!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee
body:
Dear Patriot,
Brandon Herrera is running against a powerful incumbent Republican, and he needs the help of grassroots supporters to spread the word about his campaign.
We need volunteers who will:
* Put up yard signs
* Door knock
* Host Meet and Greets
* Host Fundraisers
* Phone Bank
* And much more!

Please fill out this form and the campaign will be in touch with you soon: [https://brandonherreraforcongress.com/volunteer/](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/5dThBXWNbfuoucOgR7Qfvg/dBNRd1xLZC7Sm892xqb1HjZA)
Tony Gonzales voted for Biden's gun control legislation and fought against securing our border. We need your help getting a conservative fighter into Congress!
Sincerely,
Kimmie Gonzales
Brandon Herrera for Congress
Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee
---

| | Peter, Joe Biden’s failure at securing the border is tearing our country apart. Just ask the mayors of New York and Chicago. Ask our family members and friends whose lives have been impacted by the illegal drugs, specifically opioids that have killed many Americans. Ask the faith-based ministries and nonprofits working in the growing human trafficking crisis.

**The drug cartels now control the entire southern border.** Biden’s approach to our exploding border has been reckless at best and intentional at worst and it’s now coming to North Carolina, at Joe Biden’s academy for illegals right here in the Triad.

[](http://links.markwalkerfornc.com/u/click?_t=6fc2ebfb23714a63b96314a1ce86a7f7&_m=6531f873dad448b990fec513c9d0b9c5&_e=6zCHWf6w-lyMr5PCDhU0Qay1VbviV3eIJmeXt77D6nt2ezTgv4rzY9IP4fFb8gCHhxwjeTlXcSc9b5MgNVQvo2s9D_AEeihEJhGv2k_Fw5wEQCIBSAnkYPXAgaJZjQqqKpuiuMQW8irLWLtpzLMx1dfw0g29zNg48E9Y0uwQ4U4b7Q9AibzUMR2wHEp9RAWdShrlCJbmnpNuG2KrtmNXq7kRwxF9MmNleZ6_T8B32_HGUeiM59rm3p7Y96noBAgGavEciQDZ2W_7d6-omJkPYeKYugX3fkFhbMl4oZDR3EKeDFLirkKib5CAtUHJ7F4quVBF1dIPeA9IhgE2zki-tJNGyOP-9_lOywLl5yXhhs0zntO1t3_pyuZnTZMh4m12)The American Hebrew Academy, a 501 C3, launched more than two decades ago but was wrought with poor management and alleged financial improprieties by its leadership. _Without notice, the school abruptly closed in 2019 and soon entered a $26 million deal with China’s Puxin Limited, the 3rd largest education programming company in China. _
The American Hebrew Academy board members were removed and replaced with three new members from China’s Puxin Limited: Ni Zhang, Shong Gao, and Wei Yang became the President, Vice President and Treasurer, the top three highest ranking roles on the board. **The “Academy” also took out PPP loans in 2021 though no students were on the campus at the time.** Where did this money go? As the former ranking member on the Congressional Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counterterrorism subcommittee, we should know if there’s a CCCP connection. China cyber-attacks American entities on a daily basis. Shouldn’t we be concerned?

Maybe the greater concern began in 2022 when the federal government, through US Dept. of Health and Human Services (DHHS), entered a contract to house illegal immigrants, mostly teenage migrant males. The lease is for five years with an option to renew the pristine 100-acre property for an additional five years. _Yet, the operation of the facility, which is the largest in the country, remains covered in a cloak of unanswered questions._
As a Christian, like many of you, I believe in being compassionate. I have served and worked in refugee camps from Jordan to Belgium: however, this is a crisis that is damaging our ability to help our most vulnerable. On a local level, much like we’ve seen in Chicago and New York; **some of our regional schools have poor facilities and short on faculty – even cutting programs while hundreds of millions of taxpayers’ dollars are being pumped into this state-of-the-art campus without any accountability or disclosure...** Again, it’s time we know the true cost and who’s getting paid in Joe Biden’s academy for illegals.

Thank you,

---
---
Mark Walker _Former Congressman and Pastor_ _Candidate for North Carolina's 6th Congressional District_

clean_body: | | | https:// | | Peter, Joe Biden’s failure at securing the border is tearing our country apart. Just ask the mayors of New York and Chicago. Ask our family members and friends whose lives have been impacted by the illegal drugs, specifically opioids that have killed many Americans. Ask the faith-based ministries and nonprofits working in the growing human trafficking crisis. The drug cartels now control the entire southern border. Biden’s approach to our exploding border has been reckless at best and intentional at worst and it’s now coming to North Carolina, at Joe Biden’s academy for illegals right here in the Triad. The federal government’s lack of transparency at this “academy for illegals” in Greensboro is quite concerning. I recently tried again to get answers attempting to visit the 100-acre campus or to at least speak with someone about the dealings behind the gated property. Why is there such a lack of transparency and who’s getting paid potentially hundreds of millions of dollars for Joe Biden’s boarding academy for illegals? American Hebrew Academy, a 501 C3, launched more than two decades ago but was wrought with poor management and alleged financial improprieties by its leadership. Without notice, the school abruptly closed in 2019 and soon entered a $26 million deal with China’s Puxin Limited, the 3rd largest education programming company in China. The American Hebrew Academy board members were removed and replaced with three new members from China’s Puxin Limited: Ni Zhang, Shong Gao, and Wei Yang became the President, Vice President and Treasurer, the top three highest ranking roles on the board. The “Academy” also took out PPP loans in 2021 though no students were on the campus at the time. Where did this money go? As the former ranking member on the Congressional Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counterterrorism subcommittee, we should know if there’s a CCCP connection. China cyber-attacks American entities on a daily basis. Shouldn’t we be concerned? Maybe the greater concern began in 2022 when the federal government, through US Dept. of Health and Human Services (DHHS), entered a contract to house illegal immigrants, mostly teenage migrant males. The lease is for five years with an option to renew the pristine 100-acre property for an additional five years. Yet, the operation of the facility, which is the largest in the country, remains covered in a cloak of unanswered questions. As a Christian, like many of you, I believe in being compassionate. I have served and worked in refugee camps from Jordan to Belgium: however, this is a crisis that is damaging our ability to help our most vulnerable. On a local level, much like we’ve seen in Chicago and New York; some of our regional schools have poor facilities and short on faculty – even cutting programs while hundreds of millions of taxpayers’ dollars are being pumped into this state-of-the-art campus without any accountability or disclosure... Again, it’s time we know the true cost and who’s getting paid in Joe Biden’s academy for illegals. Thank you, Mark Walker Former Congressman and Pastor Candidate for North Carolina's 6th Congressional District This email was paid for by Walker4NC PO BOX 99247, RALEIGH, NC 27624 | | | | | | ---|---|---|---

Now that 2024 is here, Democrats are going to kick their fundraising into an even higher gear.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: re: Maddow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| We discussed the January 6 anniversary on Saturday and what we’ve learned in the three years since.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5011%2E5257348%2EJApfl1)
Derek, I just finished live on air with Rachel Maddow’s _MSNBC_ program.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240108_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=5011%2E5257348%2EJApfl1)
We discussed the January 6 anniversary on Saturday and what we’ve learned in the three years since.
For Donald Trump and the Republican National Committee, the answer: _practically nothing. Or maybe they learned that the Big Lie really works for them._
The RNC devoted part of the anniversary to attacking me as a **“conspiracy theorist”** and **“national security risk.”**
**Trump referred to the jailed rioters as “hostages.”**
After watching Proud Boys, white nationalists, and QAnon conspiracy theorists fight the police and rampage through the Capitol, they want to reinvent these people as some kind of freedom fighters. It would be laughable, if it weren’t so dangerous and if so many people didn’t believe them.
With a GOP candidate surging in _our_ race — one who has voted for Trump **twice** — I need your support more than ever to help make the case that I'm best poised to take him on, fight back against Trump and the RNC’s efforts to rewrite history, **and win**.
With just weeks until early voting begins, can you help?
Chip in here: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/elect-adam?refcode=Maddow](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240108_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=5011%2E5257348%2EJApfl1)**
Thanks,
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240108_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=5011%2E5257348%2EJApfl1)

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: we’re not letting her get away with this. . .
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

2024 has only just begun and the Republican establishment is already caving into the Abortion Lobby’s demands on abortion!

So, I want to cut through all the noise coming from them and set the record straight. . .

**Despite what they’d all tell you, a national 15-week abortion “limit” is NOT ENOUGH to protect innocent life!**

In fact, it doesn’t even come remotely close to protecting preborn little boys and girls whose lives are being threatened by abortion since it allows for _at least_ **94%** of abortions across the country to continue as usual.

But of course, that’s exactly why weak-kneed Republicans love it so much. . .

_A national 15-week abortion law does virtually** _NOTHING_!**_

Sadly, too many self-proclaimed “pro-life” politicians are spending their time cozying up to the pro-abortion national media to earn a few nice headlines and a pat on the head instead of standing up to protect innocent preborn babies.

That’s why, what we need every single Republican to get on board with – _if they truly want to save countless preborn lives_ – is a _National Life at Conception Act!_

If you agree, **[then please sign your _“Life at Conception Act”_ Petition right away to demand that Republicans actually join the pro-life movement instead of paying us lip service by saying they’re "pro-life](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sikhra-duchtdja-y/)."**

Your signed **[_“Life at Conception Act”_ Petition](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sikhra-duchtdja-j/)** will tell every member of the GOP _(especially the Presidential candidates)_ that you and I will **_NOT_** allow them to compromise with the Abortion Lobby by giving us a do-nothing 15-week law instead of the national _Life at Conception Act_ that the preborn deserve!

Pro-Life Friend, I don’t know about you, but I’m tired of being taken advantage of by politicians who claim to be pro-life just to get our votes in election years. . . only to stab us in the back when it comes time to pass strong pro-life legislation.

But what I’m seeing now, could be even worse!

As I mentioned, too many politicians are trying to get in the good graces of people who will never support them, like former South Carolina Governor and current Presidential candidate, Nikki Haley.

Yes, I know Governor Haley isn’t the only Republican in the race kowtowing to the Abortion Lobby by pushing for a 15-week law, but she’s been getting on my nerves recently by calling for a “consensus” on abortion despite claiming to be “unapologetically pro-life.”

You see, what slick politicians like her fail to understand is that being unapologetically pro-life means protecting **_ALL LIFE_** – _from the moment of conception until natural death_ – and _**NOT**_ being sorry about it.

It means not apologizing to (_or compromising with_) radical pro-abortion extremists who want to forcefully make abortion-on-demand up until (_and even after_) birth the law of the land.

No one in the GOP should be “reaching a consensus” with the Abortion Lobby (_the same people who support ending the lives of innocent preborn babies_), and Republicans like Nikki Haley are kidding themselves if they think they can support that idea while calling themselves “unapologetically pro-life.”

With the 2024 elections right around the corner, the GOP is going to need to clean up that messaging if they want to get pro-lifers to the polls.

And the smartest thing Nikki Haley and any other Republicans up for election this year can do to help with that is to **_STOP_** running away from a _National_ _Life at Conception Act!_

Pro-Life Friend, that’s why I need your help to get this through these politicians’ thick skulls!

**[So, before they shoot themselves in the foot again by being weak on abortion, could you please sign your _“Life at Conception Act”_ Petition demanding a united GOP that is strong on Life](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sikhra-duchtdja-i/)?**

And after you’ve signed, **[would you please consider making your most generous contribution to _Students for Life Action_ so we can get this petition to even more pro-life voters](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sikhra-duchtdja-d/)?**

Pro-Life Friend, Nikki Haley and others boast about their 15-week stance, but, if a law like that ever passed, it couldn’t even be considered a pro-life accomplishment.

**Even France has a 14-week abortion prevention law in place!**

It’s no wonder these Republicans who get squishy when it comes to passing **_REAL_** pro-life laws keep losing in elections. . .

What Nikki Haley and others in the GOP establishment are proposing is **_TO THE LEFT_** of France!

On the other hand, candidates who run on a strong pro-life platform are proven to do _**FAR**_ better in elections because the polls get **_FLOODED_** with pro-life support – _especially by the ever-increasing number of young pro-lifers!_

But more often than not, Republicans will flake on the issue of abortion (_just to lose their elections_) after the Abortion Lobby puts a little pressure on them – _or in some cases lines their pockets._

And several in the current field of Republican Presidential candidates are undoubtedly making that same mistake by embracing a 15-week law as their go-to position.

In fact, Reid Hoffman, the billionaire co-founder of LinkedIn and a major Democratic donor, recently gave **_$250,000_** to a super PAC supporting Nikki Haley’s campaign.

Because nothing says “unapologetically pro-life” quite like taking Democrat mega-donor money while touting a weak 15-week abortion law. . .

The ONLY way these politicians will learn to grow a spine is if you and I turn up the heat on them.

**[That’s why I need you to sign your _“Life at Conception Act”_ Petition to let the GOP and their selection of Presidential hopefuls know that a do-nothing 15-week abortion position is unacceptable](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sikhra-duchtdja-h/)** – _and that a national _Life at Conception Act_ is what the Pro-Life Movement wants!_

And after you’ve signed, would you please consider making your most **[generous contribution to _Students for Life Action_ so we can get this petition to even more pro-life voters](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sikhra-duchtdja-k/)?**

Thank you for everything you do for Life.

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

P.S. – Despite what former South Carolina Governor and Presidential candidate Nikki Haley might tell you, a national 15-week abortion “limit” is **_NOT ENOUGH to protect**_ innocent life!

In fact, if passed, it couldn’t even be considered a pro-life accomplishment since it would allow for _at least_ **94%** of abortions across the country to continue as usual.

But of course, that’s exactly why weak-kneed Republicans like Haley love it so much. . .

_A national 15-week abortion law will do virtually** _NOTHING_!**_

That’s why, what we need every single Republican to get on board with – _if they truly want to save countless preborn lives_ – is a _National Life at Conception Act!_

If you agree, **[then please sign your _“Life at Conception Act”_ Petition right away to demand that Republicans actually join the pro-life movement instead of paying us lip service by saying they’re "pro-life](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sikhra-duchtdja-u/)."**

And after you’ve signed, **[would you please consider making your most generous contribution to _Students for Life Action_ so we can get this petition to even more pro-life voters](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sikhra-duchtdja-o/)?**

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

# **[What's Behind the Fight Over A-F School Grading?](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Gradebooks may be less alphabetical in Georgia after the state recently released school accountability numbers for the first time since the pandemic. This suggests the state may be transitioning away from A-F grades. Instead, schools have their content mastery test scores instead of letter grades. Georgia is the latest state to consider eliminating traditional letter grades for public schools in favor of different accountability metrics.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)

# **[X seeks to disclose FBI's surveillance requests to users, but Supreme Court rejects case](http://trk.libertyledger.-cMw)**
---
On Monday, the United States Supreme Court refused to hear a decade-old lawsuit filed by Twitter, now X, that sought to publicly disclose how many times the federal government requests user data in connection with national security investigations.In 2014, then-Twitter filed a lawsuit after the Federal Bureau of Investigation declared that the social media platform could not reveal such information to its users in its biannual transparency report.

Right here, right now... is the time to take action and take control of our future.

Watch Ron DeSantis' Call to Action

The Iowa Caucus is coming up NEXT MONDAY, and the nation is watching. We know we must turn this country around, and 2024 is our only shot. If we don't come together to secure a victory in Iowa, we slip farther away from DEFEATING Joe Biden and taking down the radical Left next November. Americans cannot afford this.

Friend, Ron DeSantis, is
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7b33499104190bd3fd52cb295b4bbed61c5cb9e2b78a424d330ed91c21365b12d8c243599f48f8831d524439d4ae610cb23eee9e0f7fc8746e4699d2b1b68b4a
personally asking for your support today because this matters too much to stand by. As he promises, we will put every single dollar you can give to us toward getting the job done to win this caucus and get our team to the polls.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7b33499104190bd33386e873c0334983e29ef03964a22cbf996a5a7912aa95af5845bf943712016e8da099cfc9282ad51a3406bd2489896f88f47b26ad97ae95
Chip in $15

Chip in $30

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7b33499104190bd36873dc5b67affba63c5c0f6afc92b6a2f97c9175c525a0f1dcccdd9105bbb96392b612dc23d2590f188959a28be3c412f117c99c76c926e6
Chip in $45

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7b33499104190bd387df63e7e26ba45b59ac25e51acd841a6dfdcababde80f83da7bb1d9ffc05f9125325e425e8bbcf85d6b9d12c181c90c5e4cead5a8f052af
Chip in $75

We won't be able to do this without you, and we don't have any time to waste. This is the moment we have FOUGHT for. Please help us win our first big victory of 2024.

And don't forget to watch Ron DeSantis' video for you
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7b33499104190bd3667b76f9b39095cedfde1ec2171008db24d366ddd946bc208c2007127e11ebe6b72fbd4c651f0bc7502a22019b23aa2b92fa9f86c6f58cc8
here.

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7b33499104190bd3667b76f9b39095cedfde1ec2171008db24d366ddd946bc208c2007127e11ebe6b72fbd4c651f0bc7502a22019b23aa2b92fa9f86c6f58cc8

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7b33499104190bd3164a3bc4a032049caed15e5e7cddcebef69287a7498c388f7d3344a81ac266df9415096b2f82feebc2f5e5e7f42832a32d6f217167d058fc
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7b33499104190bd3b948e76bb175e1c2fcb390de0ae4752ddbd40d59824a65627d5d1bdb4464b5d18453cd44c48f09b5ac4984a5abe3c30e054b0f7943196247
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7b33499104190bd3667b76f9b39095cedfde1ec2171008db24d366ddd946bc208c2007127e11ebe6b72fbd4c651f0bc7502a22019b23aa2b92fa9f86c6f58cc8

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7b33499104190bd3667b76f9b39095cedfde1ec2171008db24d366ddd946bc208c2007127e11ebe6b72fbd4c651f0bc7502a22019b23aa2b92fa9f86c6f58cc8

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules - I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). - This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. - I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. - I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

subject: Why Dave Ramsey Is Dangerously Wrong About This Biden Move
body:
Asked whether we’re on the cusp of a US Dollar crash, Dave Ramsey made a stunning miscalculation while live on air:

Blackrock warns "Prepare for a recession unlike any other." Central banks igniting a global recession with their fight to stop inflation.
| | | |
---|---|---
---
# Dave Ramsey Is Dangerously Wrong
# And Here’s Why>>

---
Asked whether we’re on the cusp of a US Dollar crash, Dave Ramsey made a stunning miscalculation while live on air:

“Am I worried about this? Absolutely not.”

Frankly, I've never seen someone so confident in being wrong...

Because what’s happening to the US Dollar is not something you should “keep an eye on”...

But instead, is an imminent threat you should get ahead of right NOW.

See, China, Brazil, India, and Russia have finally teamed up to create 1 common currency...

And they’re now joined by the oil-producing giants of the Middle East, and dozens of other countries.

This means it will be the greenback against 1 single currency for the rest of the world.

And let me tell you, that's a showdown we might not win.

After all, the combined wealth of these countries is bigger than the US.

Even Trump has gone on to declare:

[“Our currency is crashing and will soon no longer be the world standard which will be our greatest defeat frankly in 200 years.”](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdbnjf4refbfis9oa6kacjcsbj7h5rvaslil8qjo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3g6apj0clh2bs)

This looming dollar devaluation could potentially be a financial earthquake that devastates the economy, Wall Street, and your retirement savings.

That’s why [**you should read this 100% free, no-strings-attached guide while you still can.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlvls1q36gq47437hm9u2t33vn4iadeb63808g50_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3g6apj0clh2bs)

It reveals a little-known IRS Loophole that bulletproofs your 401(k), IRA, and even pension savings from what’s coming next.

Thousands of insiders are already using [this legal loophole](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvvdlij8sd7e8akuv175i5tsqr7ure0ibf79ae20_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3g6apj0clh2bs) to take back control of their retirement.

And with America’s enemies finally banding together to dethrone the US Dollar, you cannot afford to watch as your wealth is devalued, perhaps down to pennies.

So act now. [Claim your free retirement protection guide below before copies run out.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4me07qmlnrc6smlaclukmqknf4918t3h8voneh0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3g6apj0clh2bs)

name: Alaskans For Honest Elections
subject: We submit our signatures this week, Thank You Alaska!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alaskans For Honest Elections, 2521 E Mtn Village Dr #904 Wasilla, AK 99654 Phillip Izon, Director Approved This Message
body:
Please share this with as many people as you can. Share with 5-10 people. | | | [](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=659d0956356dd600b3aac83b&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D659d0822a62c5578b53a789d%26ss_email_id%3D659d0956356dd600b3aac83b%26ss_campaign_name%3DWe%2Bsubmit%2Bour%2Bsignatures%2Bthis%2Bweek%252C%2BThank%2BYou%2BAlaska%2521%2521%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-01-09T08%253A52%253A59Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_659d0822a62c5578b53a789d&l=en-US&s=SRwtL51bSrGJbx-VX3OqcGH0SiI%3D)
---
|
### **We Submit Our Signatures This Week!!!**
---
---
|
---
**We did the impossible, with 700 volunteers. We led the drive to get the required signatures. We did this for fractions of what they did. They hired an out of state firm and flew professional signature gatherers from all over the country to Alaska to get their signatures We used Alaskans, led by Alaskans. The Pro-RCV group is taking money from the 1630 Fund which is directly linked to Arabella Advisors. Even the New York Times labels them as "Dark Money" Let's beat them in 2024, make sure to tell everyone to show up and vote in 2024**
---
#### **How did we get here?**
---
**October / November 2022, Before the November 2022 election, we initiated a petition, bravely submitting it on November 23rd, a day marked with anticipation for election results. Our action was more than just timely; it was a testament to our foresight and commitment to our cause. We submitted our signatures to remove**[**#RankedChoiceVoting**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=659d0956356dd600b3aac83b&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fhashtag%2FRankedChoiceVoting%3Fsrc%3Dhashtag_click&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_659d0822a62c5578b53a789d&l=en-US&s=xVxps4UC4JWb8O6Fwi0V-X0HJj0%3D)**prior to knowing the results. Why? We like most of Alaska knew what the results would be. Alaskans didn't show up to vote. Alaska had disheartening voter turnout in 2022 (44.38%), which was the lowest in state history and coincided with the first use of ranked choice voting. Our group, though underfunded and inexperienced, was driven by a belief in our mission, standing as true underdogs in the face of daunting opposition. Our adversaries were formidable, backed by immense "dark money" interests. Yet, each attack, each challenge only strengthened our resolve. Even when faced with espionage and false narratives, our spirit remained unbroken, fueled by an unwavering determination. Now, a year later, we stand stronger and more knowledgeable. We've unraveled the complexities of the "RCV Dragon," understanding its foundation in dark political maneuvers. We see ranked choice voting as a threat to the very fabric of our Alaskan Republic, an obstacle that must be overcome. This story is not just about a struggle; it's a call to action. It's an invitation to join a movement to protect and uplift the democratic process. The incredible effort of over 700 volunteers, gathering over 40,000 signatures – far exceeding the required 26,000 – is a testament to what can be achieved through collective effort and unwavering dedication. Join this crusade to remove ranked choice voting in 2024. Be a part of this historic moment, and help steer Alaska towards a future where every vote truly counts, and our republic thrives in its purest form. Your voice, your support, can be the difference in this pivotal chapter of Alaskan history.**
---
#### **Where We Go From Here?**
---
---
|
---
#### **The Tale of the Ranked Choice Voting Dragon**
---
In a land of breathtaking mountains and icy wonders, a story unfolds – a tale of determination and unity among the people of Alaska. This is the story of how over 700 Alaskan volunteers, driven by a shared purpose, embarked on a quest to challenge the mighty Ranked Choice Voting Dragon. It began as a murmur among the people, a shared sentiment that grew into a roaring call for change. The Ranked Choice Voting Dragon, a formidable creature reigning over the electoral landscape, needed to be confronted. To do this, a band of brave volunteers united, each one as determined as the other, each one a proud Alaskan. Their mission was daunting: to gather 40,000 signatures from across the vast and rugged terrain of Alaska, a number far exceeding the required 26,000. This was no small feat in a land where distances are great and the elements unforgiving. But the spirit of Alaskans is strong and resilient, born of the land they call home. From the fishing villages to the snow-capped peaks, from the bustling streets of Anchorage to the remote corners of the wilderness, these volunteers ventured. They worked tirelessly, their voices echoing the sentiment of thousands, their efforts a testament to their dedication to their cause and to their state. In every signature collected, there was a story – a story of an Alaskan who believed in the power of unity and the importance of their voice. Each signature was a pledge, a commitment to the vision of a different future, a future shaped by the will of the people. As they reached and surpassed their goal, the volunteers knew that their journey was about more than signatures. It was a journey of empowerment, a demonstration of what can be achieved when Alaskans come together for a common purpose. Their effort, By Alaskans, For Alaskans, was a beacon of hope and a symbol of the indomitable Alaskan spirit. And so, the story of these volunteers, their quest against the Ranked Choice Voting Dragon, became a legend, a reminder of the power of unity and the strength of the Alaskan heart. It was a story that would be told for generations, inspiring others to stand together, for their state, for their beliefs, and for each other.Thank You All for Your Support,~Phil Izon
---
---
#### **550+ Petition Books Returned Mail your petition book after getting it notarized to:**
**Phil Izon - 4201 Dimond Way Wasilla, AK 99654 - Call if you need help**[**907-802-8116**](tel:+19078028116)
---
---
#### **Let's do some digging on the Pro-RCV group here in Alaska. Disclaimer from their most recent newsletter.**
#### **The Pro-RCV group appears to be the “Dark Money” they were so worried about, Arabella Advisors and 1630 Fund are about as “Dark Money” as “Dark Money” gets.**
#### _**Their new Incorporation is their top donor.**_
#### _**Then "Article Four from Virginia"**_
#### _**Then "1630 Fund in Washington D.C."**_
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
---
|
---
---
| [](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=659d0956356dd600b3aac83b&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskawatchman.com%2F2023%2F12%2F07%2Felection-commission-rejects-ranked-choice-groups-attempt-to-halt-signature-gathering-campaign-to-repeal-rcv%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_659d0822a62c5578b53a789d&l=en-US&s=hoyJpiob6jHbxT6gJEO78ok4tVo%3D)
---
**The Pro-RCV Group Hired a “SPY” & “LIED” “STOLE” & Lost Anyway!!!****Imagine a scene straight out of a spy novel: The Pro-Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) group, in a twist of espionage, allegedly hired a 'spy' to infiltrate and disrupt the grassroots movement against RCV, and Stole 2 of our Petition Books, which we filed a Police Report on. But the plot thickens. In a bold move, the Pro-RCV group and their attorney attempted to persuade the State of Alaska to shut down our constitutional right to petition the government. Fortunately, the State stood firm and declined their request.****This isn’t fiction. It’s the reality of our ongoing battle to uphold our Republic in Alaska. We emerged victorious in this clash, but the war is far from over.****Our determination is stronger than ever, reflected in the over 34,000 signatures we've gathered so far, a number that continues to grow each day.****Our focus now turns to Anchorage Districts 14 through 18, where our efforts need to intensify. Below, you'll find an up-to-date chart detailing our progress and the work that lies ahead. Your support and participation are crucial. Join us in this fight to preserve our right to petition and shape the future of voting in Alaska.**
---
---
|
---
### [**Read The Article On The Watchman**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=659d0956356dd600b3aac83b&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskawatchman.com%2F2023%2F10%2F13%2Fpro-ranked-choice-voting-group-hit-with-elections-complaint-from-leader-of-repeal-effort%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_659d0822a62c5578b53a789d&l=en-US&s=wXJu9CQYN80wcBpPBSxOBzDDwXI%3D)
---
#### **PSA:**
#### **We submitted a formal complaint to APOC (Alaska Political Office Commission) concerning the actions of the Pro-RCV group in Alaska. While they have accused us of breaching various State Campaign Finance Laws, we assert that this group should also adhere to the same rules and regulations. Contrary to their portrayal, this organization is not grassroots and receives substantial funding from outside of Alaska. Our objective is to hold them responsible for their apparent hypocrisy and their attempts to intimidate and tarnish the image of Alaskans, their organizations, and families. Their efforts to suppress our movement against ranked choice voting should not go unnoticed, and they must answer for potentially breaking the same laws they accuse us of. It's concerning that these well-informed political activists, who have benefited from massive out-of-state donations for their ranked choice voting agenda and campaign finance law changes, manipulate the system to their advantage, expecting regular citizens to falter and then overwhelm them with financial and legal burdens. We trust that the State of Alaska will ensure that these laws are applied uniformly, calling this Pro-RCV group to account for any disregard of Alaskan laws and norms.**
#### **Please see the full 111 page complaint when it is made public by the news and APOC. All of this information is public information.**
---
---
|
---
|
---
### Please Share with Friends, Family, and Co-Workers!
---
[_ _ Call Us or Text Us Here _ _](tel:+19078028116)
---
[_ _ Email Us Today _ _](mailto:info@alaskansforhonestgovernment.org?subject=Newsletter)
---
---

The Top 3 Contributors Are Phillip Izon, Wasilla, AK, Ranked Choice Education Association, Anchorage, AK, ; And Carolyn Overstreet, Anchorage, AK | | | [ ](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=659d0956356dd600b3aac83b&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fprofile.php%3Fid%3D100088118914747&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_659d0822a62c5578b53a789d&l=en-US&s=NWSkJokyiyhJwDyQVy_gEzyD_98%3D) | | [ ](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=659d0956356dd600b3aac83b&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2F907honest&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_659d0822a62c5578b53a789d&l=en-US&s=6MRkg6ZFOSpNuy1shgRZUM8Y_gg%3D) | | [ ](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=659d0956356dd600b3aac83b&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftruthsocial.com%2F%40alaskansforhonestelections&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_659d0822a62c5578b53a789d&l=en-US&s=rY2KsQ90cf4q-r_QeoAYEFWEb9g%3D) | | [ ](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=659d0956356dd600b3aac83b&u=http%3A%2F%2Finstagram.com%2F907honest&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_659d0822a62c5578b53a789d&l=en-US&s=G0Y-_NKNgwoIQSsaYchKBpfwr4I%3D) | | [ ](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=659d0956356dd600b3aac83b&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fchannel%2FUCxAo88ci9JI4abIy2OhqAAQ&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_659d0822a62c5578b53a789d&l=en-US&s=2b3Zmfm9nskWoujF0-Q60stV4oU%3D)

But the plot thickens. In a bold move, the Pro-RCV group and their attorney attempted to persuade the State of Alaska to shut down our constitutional right to petition the government. Fortunately, the State stood firm and declined their request.This isn’t fiction. It’s the reality of our ongoing battle to uphold our Republic in Alaska. We emerged victorious in this clash, but the war is far from over.Our determination is stronger than ever, reflected in the over 34,000 signatures we've gathered so far, a number that continues to grow each day.Our focus now turns to Anchorage Districts 14 through 18, where our efforts need to intensify. Below, you'll find an up-to-date chart detailing our progress and the work that lies ahead. Your support and participation are crucial. Join us in this fight to preserve our right to petition and shape the future of voting in Alaska. | PSA: We submitted a formal complaint to APOC (Alaska Political Office Commission) concerning the actions of the Pro-RCV group in Alaska. While they have accused us of breaching various State Campaign Finance Laws, we assert that this group should also adhere to the same rules and regulations. Contrary to their portrayal, this organization is not grassroots and receives substantial funding from outside of Alaska. Our objective is to hold them responsible for their apparent hypocrisy and their attempts to intimidate and tarnish the image of Alaskans, their organizations, and families. Their efforts to suppress our movement against ranked choice voting should not go unnoticed, and they must answer for potentially breaking the same laws they accuse us of. It's concerning that these well-informed political activists, who have benefited from massive out-of-state donations for their ranked choice voting agenda and campaign finance law changes, manipulate the system to their advantage, expecting regular citizens to falter and then overwhelm them with financial and legal burdens. We trust that the State of Alaska will ensure that these laws are applied uniformly, calling this Pro-RCV group to account for any disregard of Alaskan laws and norms. Please see the full 111 page complaint when it is made public by the news and APOC. All of this information is public information. | | Please Share with Friends, Family, and Co-Workers! tel:+19078028116 mailto:info@alaskansforhonestgovernment.org?subject=Newsletter | | This Communication Was Paid For By Alaskans For Honest Elections, 2521 E Mtn Village Dr #904 Wasilla, AK 99654 Phillip Izon, Director Approved This Message. The Top 3 Contributors Are Phillip Izon, Wasilla, AK, Ranked Choice Education Association, Anchorage, AK, ; And Carolyn Overstreet, Anchorage, AK | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- Alaskans For Honest Elections 2521 E. Mtn Village Dr Ste B #904 Wasilla, AK USA

name: Ron DeSantis (Urgent Message)
subject: Important: We need to talk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWvkkKoiNc

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWvkkKoiNc

Friend,

It's Ron DeSantis. I need you to know that what happens in Iowa
will directly affect the course of next year, so it's important
to me that we talk.

Rush in your support before midnight

Today, every campaign competing in this race will be counting on
their grassroots team to stand up, fight with whatever they can
give, and finish out 2024 on top. I believe we have the best
grassroots team backing this campaign-and the generosity I've
seen pour in at every critical point in this race has proven that
to me time and time again.

The
tens of thousands of caucusgoers we've gotten to know in Iowa are
FIRED UP to fight for our Great American Comeback on January
15th... but if they see that the rest of our team isn't joining
in this fight during this critical stretch, we run the risk of
losing their support.

This isn't a risk I'm willing to take. We have come too far to
let up now.

Send in
$10

Send in
$25

Send in
$50

Send in
$100

One
last time this year, I'm asking you to be the most important part
of this campaign. Without you, we would not be on course to
defeat the Left, save American kids from radical indoctrination,
restore our economy, and stomp the swamp into pieces.

With you, we will get this done. I need your help now.

Yours,

Ron
DeSantis

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

Ron DeSantis comes from
blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to
him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the
Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate
degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was
so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered
to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a
life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and
now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting
to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in
this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every
turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and
consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his
life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and
3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that
this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents
face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political
agenda down the throats of children.

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has
promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected
bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to
children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by
immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our
southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the
mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring
our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on
track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record
speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment,
politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the
legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his
leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has
stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next
President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill
for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for
President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the
decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for
another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act
is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &
$6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute
$10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident
(i.e., green card holder).

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not
being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose
of making this contribution.

I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card
and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued
to another person.

I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this
contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization,
national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal
contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron
DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his
military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not
imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department
of Defense.

Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

PO Box 3696

Tallahassee, FL 32315

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW59fKoiN2

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW59fKoiN2

Dear
Friend,

I hear
from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their
heroes. For those people-and you may be among them-I'm thrilled
to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you,
absolutely free: "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the
Rich."

"Tax cuts
for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower
tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy
Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the
federal government?

Hoover
Institution Senior Fellow Thomas Sowell takes an empirical
approach in his commentary, "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts
for the Rich."

Sowell
separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses
real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all
actually lead to greater revenue for the government.

As a
friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to
offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of
charge. Click here to get your free copy of "Trickle Down" Theory
and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" now.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

inclusion (DEI) practices amid intense legal pressure from
conservatives and even their own shareholders, multiple outlets
reported. Conservative activists, shareholders and investors have
issued challenges to various corporate diversity policies, including
Republican attorneys general and others sending letters challenging
racial recruiting quotas, alleging unlawful discrimination.

body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=21cb3a1b22a14e53b6d8e07307e423f2&_e=wZy1meGWMZYSBToH-a2H8vdcl6JErc8Dn1dqgctboEkLyasMJlb36DBEC9iKwUlX6_K--eJlEYuZENJKUrf2B9USrxiqB8u9FDPOfctW8kkCKKuX6KfkgmxN7GfVU-aGVcaR_m0Q2tJtAdoVUTPund2MF71xZ1lj9pGfYAqduk9bLfaL9R56fZ079XjYS0s4u1KxZ4d1HZpbSa9pmgrzK0AafuleDcAnHp7YKSQMIToIeAikQQbVK3AnxOUC5qRSftHLy__p2KhCUQeX3ysu2yOwVdkoBjsFLfbXlQ4OZSSKByYEYKCOe5dzPAOr4eT9) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=21cb3a1b22a14e53b6d8e07307e423f2&_e=wZy1meGWMZYSBToH-a2H8vdcl6JErc8Dn1dqgctboEkLyasMJlb36DBEC9iKwUlX6_K--eJlEYuZENJKUrf2B9USrxiqB8u9FDPOfctW8kkCKKuX6KfkgmxN7GfVU-aGVcaR_m0Q2tJtAdoVUTPuneWlnAJB1TMp4g2oCP2MDpfZTyYgBtiDMII34_Py9X3Cjap__rMEnTDjNqkEsTAzil8zpUSvP2_Ojj5E0p0Xi9CsvmF1sM0IVU6OKW9VI7KfqqTND9NxdLIxW5Ta7laEmUd6vKaRs9i6YlPcLQ-Gj_IIzKWGs0T2-3ae83R5mjrr) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=21cb3a1b22a14e53b6d8e07307e423f2&_e=wZy1meGWMZYSBToH-a2H8vdcl6JErc8Dn1dqgctboEkLyasMJlb36DBEC9iKwUlX6_K--eJlEYuZENJKUrf2B9USrxiqB8u9FDPOfctW8kkCKKuX6KfkgmxN7GfVU-aGVcaR_m0Q2tJtAdoVUTPunSZS12xaSmGMexoK4bbfWl3zM-fxOQS84WL7k2K1x2U-Xisudy53k6f5-bOOsNrwBzBelgjMeWNFitMRuLBDQ4mfusivI_SjeHxHJKDKnTPoqjTwoGwUSl19BGzB7TPc0GgNkmmqgssqxeWtY1Zu62dfUjOoCdYQ_A0pLf2R0nNY). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=21cb3a1b22a14e53b6d8e07307e423f2&_e=wZy1meGWMZYSBToH-a2H8vdcl6JErc8Dn1dqgctboEkLyasMJlb36DBEC9iKwUlX6_K--eJlEYuZENJKUrf2B9USrxiqB8u9FDPOfctW8kkCKKuX6KfkgmxN7GfVU-aGVcaR_m0Q2tJtAdoVUTPunVfcMLAFCp7gLupDixQ6-iRym1wJGytWjP90noVVvF7z7bh2ywX01Ev-N3O1goeQTrAGnU3DDEA9ZkNnPW0Bjqxa7xrwDBOWhIECTKeNjTnMuvhV7XkyTP6hJBmj61rV77m2Lei_I3dft0i6WbJ-efYvdLoieb5Cu7KIK7UdIhKl)

It's a real threat. That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the . THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever. And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on Fox & Friends... And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now. Demand is surging... "It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE." Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _
