## House Seeks Contempt Charges for Hunter Biden
Two House committees released reports Monday recommending that Hunter Biden be charged with contempt of Congress [for defying a subpoena ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvwyAQRn8NbERwhtgMDF28pWtHC-NzuAqDZV8S9d9Xzdztkz49Pel93aZbpEL1_hk3DLy2KSamJ05GeQV2snIJKyJgJzGYXttBe_BO5hC7VV8774yzs7fznKKzq8chDbAszjhJATRYbbQ32jkDlzj33s3ddfVpgD6hsBoX4nZcvhtVzriWn_bE45LaJkvIzPspug8Bo4CRM2Yq5e8TMOa2YcXX-Z6PEwWMtvMO9KDyozIeaqYFq0qtMm47qwPPVh5Mrao3oO5tFzDKIyz7i0qh89oLq-9bpLdD8n8xfgMAAP__ly1hDg)to appear for a closed-door deposition. The Oversight and Judiciary panels are scheduled to consider the contempt resolution on Wednesday. If the resolution passes, it will [move to a vote](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD-vpCAURz-Ndhi44iAFxTZ2s-2Whj9XvRsEA8yY_fabea993S-_05ycP8_1aSlS2n_bE03b8mp9ozeugmkGcpV9MBsi4NijEYrLmWvQU3-YSW0yaLRKAirrwCm_TW50Ung9h3nuyQAHyQXXgk-TgME6pSc3PjbtZ1AeO8kxUMtl-JsptQO3-C-_sQw-n300R2tX7cZfHSwdLPd9D8n5hHf98A6WK0dq5GsHi89pL1g_88iviqzg9XKRvE2VFYxov79cGivo83liCpR2drxSw8IcBUzswBiYz6nhyYpPVowwc94XE66bYqT6UJ3k-2kpfim2n3r9DwAA__9aCG_M) in the full House, which can then refer that matter for prosecution to the Justice Department. Biden refused to testify at a closed-door session, insisting the hearing be open to the public. Instead, he held a press conference when he was supposed to be meeting behind doors with the House committee.
## Fuel Leak Imperils Moon Mission After Launch
The first U.S. moon mission in 50 years ran into trouble just hours after its successful blast-off after it [developed a fuel leak](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1utDAQAJ8GOp_8B2YLF19z3X1tSrQ262MjYyNwOOXto0udcjTNaD4e8wM5c3n-x418S3XG2PiiWQkQ2s62X3wi0mR68spJO0nQMPSrhwTJjMmFqBwRkh0jBrVMBgcrMUDPXkttpZKg5DAofcPgYAhmTBAn7SJ1VtLCrR63z8qlrZTyd73ouMW69dmvre1nZ_51-t7pO-6FXudbveFoHDN1-r7VWkTGsnB5ioxfJa5iP_jCRqLgiULC5IJRQUsV3BQNmCGpkEICdBEX6g-_7C_Omc_RdVY-N-T8W9D-2vETAAD__82MYQU), dimming hope that its lunar lander would reach the moon's surface. Astrobiotics, the private company behind the mission, managed to orient its lander toward the sun to charge its solar battery but said the "critical loss of fuel" left it without the maneuverability needed for a soft lunar touchdown. The spacecraft was launched into a long elliptical orbit that wouldn't have reached the moon until Feb. 23. The company said it's assessing ["what alternative mission profiles might be feasible at this time."](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7Fu7CAQQNGvsTssGGN7KShes92-NqU14GF3IgwWEFv791FSp77F1fl4rA_kyOn5H3eyLeQVfeOTViWMAL3qfrOBCGjsyapF6ps0YKb-ZfUc0I1AbpscKiP9HCacpVMjkBlvpmcLErRU0ig5TQoGdIuZ3DgH42-weOq0pI1bLsNn5tReFOI7n1QGn_c-2ldrR-3Gfx3cO7hf1zXUAz391A7uR-ETGwmsrWSXG3txUKFn4URizzmJiGmjIupXCFSqwJR3jO--2O24OEau89Jp-dyR4--x_cX_DgAA__87pF5q) Another private company, [Intuitive Machines,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1u7CAUhJ8Gd1hwwD8UFLdxt7dNaR3j44UIg4XxJvv2kVOnmpFGGn36Ph7zA0MM6fkfd7J1yzO6Gl40S2446Fk3q92IgFRDVg5Cj8KA6Rpvt073gKvqJYEYjRoVYq_kgqA6uRjVBAsCtJDCSNF1ElpcBtMtqt-MG2FwxLSgNdRc2s8cUvW0xXd-UWld3ptofa3HydQ_BhODqZLzrlzJ-XtmMIEAxWCScHfJYAqpXuFm5zs6HxKd_DzQ0Tc_rtPzeCUsPGJa6Y77ia9YidfMN1rKheXNYGqKXY-vEGM4-4Fp8dwxxF-i-peenwAAAP__ndxmAQ) also backed by NASA, is planning a similar moon mission next month. It will use a rocket from SpaceX and will also attempt to carry scientific and commercial payloads to the moon's surface.
## Michigan Wins Football National Championship
The Michigan Wolverines dominated the Washington Huskies 34-13 Monday night to win their first college football national championship in 26 years. [Here are the highlights.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uxCAQBp8Gd7ZgwT8UFGncXdqU1oLXZiMM1hmdlbePLnWar_mKGc3XY3kgJ877Jx7k6lYWDJVftKjWtmAW06xuIwLSDTk1SjNJC7Zvopv8hoM2Vupp9CEoHRROfliVDsH3Ght2IMFIJa2Sfa-gQz_a3uths2GCMZAwklau5dl9F8410pZ-youeXShHk1ys9byE_hAwC5jv--4ufl8C5lBSop0EzG-EgFmq91gB88Eh8o659YT1am-8Iue9ltzenNuMlUvG1IaIx8klX5HP5unW8-aU-BpGYeR-IKc_ifpfkd8AAAD__y_YYjs) Michigan's defense got the better of Washington quarterback Michael Penix Jr., who ended the game clutching his side and limping. On offense, Michigan ran for [over 300 yards,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L3u4yAQBPCnwd1GsJDYFC7SuPtfe2VE8MZsxIcFJNa9_clXXzfSaKSf5vfP48dx5Lz9conm_ioP5zt_6aHAApqHGdb5RYSkB5rVKM0kLdrrEOZpWqcb2fXpDSqNN2MnVFr6kVCPVuuBZ5RopJJWyetV4cU9R3t96tvL-glHT8JIWrmXenkXzj3QK_4pX6oXX9IQ59D73oS-C1wELsdxXFLLZydwoQyfJnBpe6n9DKUHqgKXNycIrj7dZwuwUuQv1QYOsutcsovQuUcCX-onQfOlUgOEvjZI7ANvLsNJ2Mtx7g7XAuetlwzagNICF1fhfldpKUYNdV73g2PkdhuFkVtyHP_h-_-e_BsAAP__91517Q) led by running back Blake Corum's two touchdowns. For Michigan, it was a sweet ending to a dramatic year. The program was accused of cheating by stealing signals, and coach Jim Harbaugh was suspended for three games over it. Nonetheless, the team went undefeated.

clean_body: Two House committees released reports Monday recommending that Hunter Biden be charged with contempt of Congress for defying a subpoena to appear for a closed-door deposition. | | | | | | TUESDAY, JANUARY 9, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning! On this date in 1839, the daguerreotype photographic process was unveiled. Inventor Louis Daguerre had already used it to capture the first photo of a person ever taken. () Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that . Today's edition is brought to you by . | House Seeks Contempt Charges for Hunter Biden Two House committees released reports Monday recommending that Hunter Biden be charged with contempt of Congress appear for a closed-door deposition. The Oversight and Judiciary panels are scheduled to consider the contempt resolution on Wednesday. If the resolution passes, it will in the full House, which can then refer that matter for prosecution to the Justice Department. Biden refused to testify at a closed-door session, insisting the hearing be open to the public. Instead, he held a press conference when he was supposed to be meeting behind doors with the House committee. Fuel Leak Imperils Moon Mission After Launch The first U.S. moon mission in 50 years ran into trouble just hours after its successful blast-off after it , dimming hope that its lunar lander would reach the moon's surface. Astrobiotics, the private company behind the mission, managed to orient its lander toward the sun to charge its solar battery but said the "critical loss of fuel" left it without the maneuverability needed for a soft lunar touchdown. The spacecraft was launched into a long elliptical orbit that wouldn't have reached the moon until Feb. 23. The company said it's assessing Another private company, also backed by NASA, is planning a similar moon mission next month. It will use a rocket from SpaceX and will also attempt to carry scientific and commercial payloads to the moon's surface. Michigan Wins Football National Championship The Michigan Wolverines dominated the Washington Huskies 34-13 Monday night to win their first college football national championship in 26 years. Michigan's defense got the better of Washington quarterback Michael Penix Jr., who ended the game clutching his side and limping. On offense, Michigan ran for led by running back Blake Corum's two touchdowns. For Michigan, it was a sweet ending to a dramatic year. The program was accused of cheating by stealing signals, and coach Jim Harbaugh was suspended for three games over it. Nonetheless, the team went undefeated. () ➤ **Pro-Palestinian protestors interrupted a speech by President Biden in a South Carolina church on Monday. The demonstrators were escorted out while chanting "Cease-fire now!" () ➤ GOP leaders called for Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin to resign after he kept the White House and Congress in the dark about a hospital stay last week. The White House says his job is safe. () ➤ Florida Republicans ousted state party chairman Christian Ziegler in a special vote Monday as police investigate rape allegations against him. Evan Power, vice chair of the state GOP, replaced Ziegler. () | Flying together with: Looking for a New Year's Resolution ? Try therapy from the comfort of your own home. others on BetterHelp-- the world's largest . No more driving to and from appointments or getting on a waitlist. | ➤Tiger Woods ended his 27-year partnership with Nike, announcing the split in a statement posted to social media platform X. Woods hasn't identified his new equipment and apparel partner but said to stay tuned. () ➤ Atlanta Falcons coach Arthur Smith was fired Monday after a blowout loss to the New Orleans Saints Sunday. Smith angrily confronted Saints coach Dennis Allen after the game about running up the score. I have nearly 20 years of experience practicing law including time spent in private practice, the Utah Attorney General's office, and providing legal advice to the State Board of Education and Utah League of Cities and Towns. I grew up in rural Idaho, graduated from Utah State with an undergraduate political science degree, and graduated with my Juris Doctorate from Brigham Young University. body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=398b2a0744ae4f4bb1c092b56ae0a03d&_e=uKrT8PetDaZHGdE2MrWvrfn-B0hjW1JdKkQ6e-_MORN1BMxovxMhGr9gjK2D84wfAVfraDIY4MrM4uT39GYnFJAKtJmuYTCNqwEztd1G_U8ovt2GO9wX0qXDfNxxby5OAfDkv6axJmYPzKGxHUgoZE-BA625KY_uostAaolk5ziF6rJdCMY-g8Z9eeh4s4F2xkaCLTmS3bXyZ5UlZt-GSs6RidP1GQ6_V6VKLFzn3lZrd12mBxTxgvlm66zVkpLOaEzNOIch4EKPiujodkaA5tve_9rrSXPLuS0u0aaXxOvNqgTDXos0cML5KiIRg-TQ) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=398b2a0744ae4f4bb1c092b56ae0a03d&_e=uKrT8PetDaZHGdE2MrWvrfn-B0hjW1JdKkQ6e-_MORN1BMxovxMhGr9gjK2D84wfAVfraDIY4MrM4uT39GYnFJAKtJmuYTCNqwEztd1G_U8ovt2GO9wX0qXDfNxxby5OAfDkv6axJmYPzKGxHUgoZDL2xAdpKi7NAQvboN0wVwWRPmEhtBFITZOkzrhbvZF_FrHDq0Umrek8mE_31gRRd9FW8VtdIhlz7HXNYXOqqosG90WkcbdNsVm14_rIRLCVDzXCXpJmO9EvehLmXfKwUwr10YSiO4fRn2pMaqvqh1-tU_yQLQbjRK2EoFP1GB35) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=398b2a0744ae4f4bb1c092b56ae0a03d&_e=uKrT8PetDaZHGdE2MrWvrfn-B0hjW1JdKkQ6e-_MORN1BMxovxMhGr9gjK2D84wfAVfraDIY4MrM4uT39GYnFJAKtJmuYTCNqwEztd1G_U8ovt2GO9wX0qXDfNxxby5OAfDkv6axJmYPzKGxHUgoZG8uK7a9CRkO8K58HptymkvnsaLVUvO0XvxEngIZb4t34sXYa1kaZAZsfl00pMQkLSej-Hd7mP8lC3hzckAuNnzxxUt1vcRysJBe6ldOYwG7r4JWbBSTOSiVMjxVEDpuYn6-H2JjeWlNs6zTzMe-Mp7lzzXstWw7j5ZTjfyR4GmB). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=398b2a0744ae4f4bb1c092b56ae0a03d&_e=uKrT8PetDaZHGdE2MrWvrfn-B0hjW1JdKkQ6e-_MORN1BMxovxMhGr9gjK2D84wfAVfraDIY4MrM4uT39GYnFJAKtJmuYTCNqwEztd1G_U8ovt2GO9wX0qXDfNxxby5OAfDkv6axJmYPzKGxHUgoZCqE3zm9dJ5fDMLRWiVfnnKc_rlH_5PrMUQU-PwfMofxvvF4r1TXNzp4DLjz6XMUN5KPo1As_Qdk5JVii19UHF-8ZK1OqUUMdwyLUgBcXCGOrG9GEFQ5pMrF5ao9VoVCv91BxSgHK8sPkW62oi_XooepyndXyMwGP9IJpM_8LIgc)

name: Jon Tester via Blue Amp Action
subject: beat around the bush
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T917296f6-e9b6-4ea9-9a73-7e407b7d81d3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, I won’t beat around the bush. [Can you pitch in three bucks to fuel my people-powered reelection campaign? Your gift will be split between Blue Amp Action and my campaign.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T056c1398-6822-43c2-8fa4-3cf1068d7f47/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [DONATE $3 >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T88b90b28-3a0f-45e6-9f73-ea74f56e88da/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This might surprise you, but $3 goes a long way toward winning this race. That’s because we’re powered by folks just like you and I’m damn proud of that. I don’t answer to super PACs or special interests. We’ve got what it takes to defeat Mitch McConnell and his cronies, but the truth is that they’re already pouring truckloads of money to defeat me. They’re trying to turn me into something I’m not, because they can’t beat who I am. I’m a farmer. I’m a senator. And I’m a Montanan til I die. I’ve never let my time in Washington change me. I’m not about to start now. [If every person reading this email chipped in $3 today, we would get ahead on our fundraising goals for the month and kick off the election year swinging. So I need to ask you: Will you support our grassroots-funded campaign and split a donation today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5d6648f2-1356-48bb-ab92-138ff6677ace/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sen. Tester and Blue Amp Action will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta799cece-cc61-4306-a298-c9ea89c76fda/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T337e61e4-a282-49a4-8c2d-c1e63ffd181c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $25](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0ef25932-7639-4819-b32b-783b78613859/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Or, donate another amount](https://default.salsalabs.org/T257ffcbc-0b69-49a7-9289-b6dc0aa1db8f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc3b8f06b-219a-477b-ba0e-23c4187804b1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Fellow Conservative,

Happy New Year! It’s Montana Republican Senate candidate Tim Sheehy writing to ask you to **[participate in my Election Year Survey](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0e378fda40ca4af59fdf2fdf94d5e89b&_e=8gjor7BJuoGn5rXbM0W2sT15Fb_1qO0T94cROHsNwduMocck-0_pUoGaNEj_9TfCFVD4k1HOYwM65AePMRE0PTXvjn7eff4HzMtfWURYF5Ah-PTZF9RYBXQtSTezYshLbnckRQaLovNLSleQEx5ksjAajXq1qtnHwaUN6IsBLTkCwY53j9vO5WGSkix16ZOb28JSEKZGhX70JF_EbSl2Ct8DIMHfZUie27V4EsrKoGwPxqbIsuNWfq-rLCRgEtyZhp0w4l8KBa85Zjjupz9VgB4BM10on3OODLczSIbyftanuACQwU4V8WHks2gu68rZzBITCFUb-LB554Bl6uGb41q0xR8CosLxKGUzJDPSBtdbtUcudXLZaYHtFegolFRV0M4Ryt-xeDmXjft0aMTTLgZ1FM9tErcWvNCo7_MWH5c%3D)**.

[**BEGIN 2024 ELECTION YEAR SURVEY ->** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0e378fda40ca4af59fdf2fdf94d5e89b&_e=8gjor7BJuoGn5rXbM0W2sT15Fb_1qO0T94cROHsNwduMocck-0_pUoGaNEj_9TfCFVD4k1HOYwM65AePMRE0PTXvjn7eff4HzMtfWURYF5Ah-PTZF9RYBXQtSTezYshLbnckRQaLovNLSleQEx5ksjAajXq1qtnHwaUN6IsBLTkCwY53j9vO5WGSkix16ZOb28JSEKZGhX70JF_EbSl2Ct8DIMHfZUie27V4EsrKoGwPxqbIsuNWfq-rLCRgEtyZP5EESfKo-AgQr67HF84piPIDJ-siOYRZvXOuqMZ_aUBdEZKaLPWHMuicyfy5JtjSMV1L2PBfzLJdXQth7KI2EsJzbkwbqNriXDizly8J4R10t5WMYwLDWMKVsq9i7WDWGI965oe5hQUOnWzbyeiarF-PQuib2axjdvJhyACL3Jw%3D)

As you may recall, I sent a few emails in December asking for your participation in my 2023 end-of-year survey. Unfortunately, we didn’t receive enough feedback to gauge where voters stand ten months before Election Day.

_**[Why your participation today matters:](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0e378fda40ca4af59fdf2fdf94d5e89b&_e=8gjor7BJuoGn5rXbM0W2sT15Fb_1qO0T94cROHsNwduMocck-0_pUoGaNEj_9TfCFVD4k1HOYwM65AePMRE0PTXvjn7eff4HzMtfWURYF5Ah-PTZF9RYBXQtSTezYshLbnckRQaLovNLSleQEx5ksjAajXq1qtnHwaUN6IsBLTkCwY53j9vO5WGSkix16ZOb28JSEKZGhX70JF_EbSl2Ct8DIMHfZUie27V4EsrKoGwPxqbIsuNWfq-rLCRgEtyZlZo6EdNhNl5qNGl7VRRpAoi4PtqQbL9KBduubD9TPvgEADm0t3kMJDqqe4olmg7AgeWsXEW9yP6xb5-q1jzYHPh7B_06xg208KHNrXwwcelZ1hX89piMZ1YH5es_nUyTOX6z8fEqvoP-iVxKk1GsuLWTiISKzkMEQfH-gfOWGgg%3D) **_This will be the most expensive Senate race in U.S. history, per vote. You may not hear about my race in the news much now, but give it a few months, and my name and my opponent's name will be hard to miss.

_**[Your response](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0e378fda40ca4af59fdf2fdf94d5e89b&_e=8gjor7BJuoGn5rXbM0W2sT15Fb_1qO0T94cROHsNwduMocck-0_pUoGaNEj_9TfCFVD4k1HOYwM65AePMRE0PTXvjn7eff4HzMtfWURYF5Ah-PTZF9RYBXQtSTezYshLbnckRQaLovNLSleQEx5ksjAajXq1qtnHwaUN6IsBLTkCwY53j9vO5WGSkix16ZOb28JSEKZGhX70JF_EbSl2Ct8DIMHfZUie27V4EsrKoGwPxqbIsuNWfq-rLCRgEtyZqvU4PWCwphtH57cKBc3i3TQ4Vu4Eep9_OTOOYIYjhpor25zuV87Zd1idTLb_6cgldLK3waiwAtyFhMhZB4FYdyqxM0E-4yu1vtl40InbcuylPYiBm-VnFOsT8dUBceT0GTkLcZfqgmXTtC3F41EIcZxYDsG8PIpOiJXlz6ouYBg%3D)**_ to my Election Year Survey will provide my team and me with critically important information to tailor our message, adjust campaign strategy, and win the votes needed to flip this Democrat-held Senate seat.

Please remember that with Democrats writing off West Virginia, the Montana Senate race has become the _**number one priority for both Republicans and Democrats**_.

[**BEGIN 2024 ELECTION YEAR SURVEY ->** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0e378fda40ca4af59fdf2fdf94d5e89b&_e=8gjor7BJuoGn5rXbM0W2sT15Fb_1qO0T94cROHsNwduMocck-0_pUoGaNEj_9TfCFVD4k1HOYwM65AePMRE0PTXvjn7eff4HzMtfWURYF5Ah-PTZF9RYBXQtSTezYshLbnckRQaLovNLSleQEx5ksjAajXq1qtnHwaUN6IsBLTkCwY53j9vO5WGSkix16ZOb28JSEKZGhX70JF_EbSl2Ct8DIMHfZUie27V4EsrKoGwPxqbIsuNWfq-rLCRgEtyZqqbxTwdiJ3XEEOGNkbJiOBdsqOFQh3fjSv7aGJKYGAr8wweWmNolFBWrmrgEsEF_OfaQt2SZu4yNyxPAZJMuT4jOlNtlNaSf7sndw1I_FvZYNkM-QD8OZ_M74gPffW52uQPComLc9f0j22bRSGghD9700eeb1mA3LffiRtdZps8%3D)

If you have a few minutes to spare right now, I cannot tell you how valuable _**[your input](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0e378fda40ca4af59fdf2fdf94d5e89b&_e=8gjor7BJuoGn5rXbM0W2sT15Fb_1qO0T94cROHsNwduMocck-0_pUoGaNEj_9TfCFVD4k1HOYwM65AePMRE0PTXvjn7eff4HzMtfWURYF5Ah-PTZF9RYBXQtSTezYshLbnckRQaLovNLSleQEx5ksjAajXq1qtnHwaUN6IsBLTkCwY53j9vO5WGSkix16ZOb28JSEKZGhX70JF_EbSl2Ct8DIMHfZUie27V4EsrKoGwPxqbIsuNWfq-rLCRgEtyZcqsnaHCsSejYiAvGS7Fd4gqapdCSmwcvvtJZrbsXd2R1xuHO4K_0l4UdpvlDFPZB4-XttL-GqGmxAuLsA68G7dN2WuJ_BiefdUUQLO-Ud-HcujFomZxN-lZv4hVEg-AxJS2o_AHGVP9EZeif378lUW64t9mBoVoplZ82GnD1_-Q%3D)**_ would be to me and my team.

For America's Future,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

[**BEGIN SURVEY NOW ->** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0e378fda40ca4af59fdf2fdf94d5e89b&_e=8gjor7BJuoGn5rXbM0W2sT15Fb_1qO0T94cROHsNwduMocck-0_pUoGaNEj_9TfCFVD4k1HOYwM65AePMRE0PTXvjn7eff4HzMtfWURYF5Ah-PTZF9RYBXQtSTezYshLbnckRQaLovNLSleQEx5ksjAajXq1qtnHwaUN6IsBLTkCwY53j9vO5WGSkix16ZOb28JSEKZGhX70JF_EbSl2Ct8DIMHfZUie27V4EsrKoGwPxqbIsuNWfq-rLCRgEtyZJojnIlzLsqf5KAnYYd0bbNpLSBJtAohs7Yk4GBt3az70xBppHclnYrGrxwc-WxvvOiWsIKRKhL5J8X0DxR-LiWHrHYtKN282_drvbp0b_ujxBaWtTjDxKtfaCXIDs0S2teK4r2NX8Yc6He-gxhleRGvX5rcLD-ijdcukQFAf3Hk%3D)

|

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

## Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38829%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ty%2fYQPY1ERigUQ9nNRd62Q&sysid=1 "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| _Get matched with up to three advisors that serve your area, free!_
---
| Your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions
---
| | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
| [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38820%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L9qMC5tlDjmPymhb78A2ng&sysid=1)
---
|
---
| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38821%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ToZB9AC5Dj7gDbzXMLDhkg&sysid=1)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38822%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EwMD6cxCVNEPLbOiI1hCDQ&sysid=1) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

[See how Vanguard, Fidelity and Schwab stack up »](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38823%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EjcJXI3BtpbX210mITe4Bw&sysid=1)
---
|
---
| **Try SmartAsset's Financial Advisor Matching Tool**

subject: Suzanne Crouch ends 2023 with more than $3.7 million Cash on Hand while also submitting more than 9,000 names to meet state’s Signature Threshold
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
Lt. Governor Crouch’s “Axe the Tax” plan and tough stand against China generates more than $1.2 million in donations since the last reporting period

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/crouchforindiana/conservativefighter-12672737?e=8f9fef7158)
https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-suzanne-crouch/web?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=75fd0652b2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_12_06_56_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-65daf18f47-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
January 9, 2024

MEDIA CONTACT
Robert Vane
Robert@veteranstrategies.com
Indiana Gubernatorial Candidate Suzanne Crouch ends 2023 with more than $3.7 million Cash on Hand while also submitting more than 9,000 names to meet state’s Signature Threshold

Lt. Governor Crouch’s “Axe the Tax” plan and tough stand against China generates more than $1.2 million in donations since the last reporting period.
(Evansville, IN) - The Suzanne Crouch for Governor campaign reported more than $3.771 million cash on hand at the close of 2023.

The campaign also reported $1.275 million since the previous reporting period (which ended in June) and $2.39 million raised in 2023.

“The support of so many Hoosiers is humbling and encouraging,” said Crouch. “Our campaign has the boldest ideas, the most miles traveled, and clearly will have the necessary resources to fight all the way through to the primary election.”

Ninety-six percent of the donations to the Crouch for Indiana campaign came from people living in Indiana.

Complementing the millions of dollars in donations received in 2023, the Crouch campaign has unparalleled grassroots support throughout Indiana.

Crouch for Indiana will meet the statutory signature deadline by submitting more than 9,000 signatures—double what is required by law—to counties throughout the state.

Since the beginning of 2023, Lt. Governor Crouch has received more than one hundred personal endorsements (https://crouchforindiana.com/endorsements/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=75fd0652b2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_12_06_56_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-65daf18f47-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) from law enforcement officials, elected county officeholders, retired public servants, and members of the Indiana Legislature.

“At the beginning of the year, our team set high goals: raise two million dollars and collect 9,000 signatures,” said Crouch. “I am grateful for the hard work of our volunteers, supporters, and Hoosiers who have helped us exceed these goals and more.”

Earlier in January, Crouch released two campaign ads detailing her priorities as governor and how she has fought to prevent the Chinese Communist Party and its leaders from acquiring land in Indiana.

You can watch the ads here (https://vimeo.com/899679899/fffe98b3c2?share=copy&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=f3a393a89f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_12_06_56_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-65daf18f47-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=75fd0652b2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_12_06_56_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-65daf18f47-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) and here (https://vimeo.com/899678221/cd4e31014b?share=copy&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=f3a393a89f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_12_06_56_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-65daf18f47-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=75fd0652b2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_12_06_56_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-65daf18f47-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) . Crouch also asked Hoosiers to support her in the efforts to “Axe the Tax (https://crouchforindiana.com/axe-the-tax/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=75fd0652b2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_12_06_56_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-65daf18f47-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ” and return thousands of dollars to Indiana taxpayers annually.
###

To learn more about how Suzanne is the only conservative Republican fighting China, proposing an elimination of Indiana’s individual income tax, and casting the key votes to protect unborn Hoosiers, please visit her web site at www.crouchforindiana.com (https://crouchforindiana.com/protect-indiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=75fd0652b2-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_12_06_56_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-65daf18f47-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

============================================================
Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com (mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

Blackrock warns "Prepare for a recession unlike any other." Central banks igniting a global recession with their fight to stop inflation.

“Am I worried about this? Absolutely not.”

Frankly, I've never seen someone so confident in being wrong

Because what’s happening to the US Dollar is not something you should “keep an eye on”

See, China, Brazil, India, and Russia have finally teamed up to create 1 common currency

And they’re now joined by the oil-producing giants of the Middle East, and dozens of other countries.

This means it will be the greenback against 1 single currency for the rest of the world.

After all, the combined wealth of these countries is bigger than the US.

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Thrilled to be back in Dover
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sarah McBride
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76736167/448333401/1954656641?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20240109_fr_firstday_cand_kw_act_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzY4MDJiMi1lOGFlLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5m8X2kOTzdfqF2FW7aZoSbF0-RhK38H8SdS51lNKBbw=)

**Today marks the 2nd Session of the 152nd General Assembly!** I’m thrilled to be back in Dover to kick off the first day of session. name: Shift WA
subject: SURVEY: Legislative Priorities for 2024
body:
Please take our survey and give your input on the most pressing issues that state lawmakers should address during the upcoming 2024 legislative session. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62670850:WOq8Woi3N:m:1:2610672541:9CD1A3B7DAE068F48B98A1BAA9D272A9:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends,

We all know that 2024 promises to highlight the differences between the Right and the Left in our state, and country. To help guide our coverage of the 2024 legislative session in WA, we want to know your thoughts on the most critical issues facing our state!

_**[Please take our survey and give the Shift team your input on the most pressing issue that state lawmakers should address during the upcoming 2024 legislative session.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62670851:WOq8Woi3N:m:1:2610672541:9CD1A3B7DAE068F48B98A1BAA9D272A9:r)**_

Here are the key issue areas being set up for debate in Olympia:

1. **Public Safety:** Repealing previously passed laws that hinder police officers from performing their duties, contributing to an increase in crime rates.
2. **Affordability:** Reducing existing taxes and addressing the housing crisis to make living in our state more affordable.
3. **Education:** Ensuring K-12 standards are upheld and solidifying parental rights within our public education system.
4. **Initiatives to the Legislature - and then the People: **Highlighting the six initiatives submitted by Let's Go Washington, putting a spotlight on the efforts to repeal the state's carbon tax and state income tax on capital gains, banning future local incomes taxes, allowing police to again pursue car thieves, letting people opt-out of the state's insolvent Long-Term Care scheme, and including parental rights in our public education approach.

Your participation in this survey will help inform our coverage of the 2024 legislative session.

_**[Please consider taking just one minute to take the survey now!](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62670851:WOq8Woi3N:m:1:2610672541:9CD1A3B7DAE068F48B98A1BAA9D272A9:r)**_

**[>>>Take the survey now<<<](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62670851:WOq8Woi3N:m:1:2610672541:9CD1A3B7DAE068F48B98A1BAA9D272A9:r)**
Thank you,

The Shift WA team

| [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62670852:WOq8Woi3N:m:1:2610672541:9CD1A3B7DAE068F48B98A1BAA9D272A9:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14388729&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oWOq8Woi3N).

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Why Dave Ramsey Is Dangerously Wrong About This Biden Move
body:
Asked whether we're on the cusp of a US Dollar crash, Dave Ramsey made a stunning miscalculation while live on air:

Blackrock warns "Prepare for a recession unlike any other." Central banks igniting a global recession with their fight to stop inflation.
| | | |
---|---|---
---
# Dave Ramsey Is Dangerously Wrong
# And Here's Why>>

---
Asked whether we're on the cusp of a US Dollar crash, Dave Ramsey made a stunning miscalculation while live on air:

"Am I worried about this? Absolutely not."

Frankly, I've never seen someone so confident in being wrong...

Because what's happening to the US Dollar is not something you should "keep an eye on"...

But instead, is an imminent threat you should get ahead of right NOW.

See, China, Brazil, India, and Russia have finally teamed up to create 1 common currency...

And they're now joined by the oil-producing giants of the Middle East, and dozens of other countries.

This means it will be the greenback against 1 single currency for the rest of the world.

And let me tell you, that's a showdown we might not win.

After all, the combined wealth of these countries is bigger than the US.

Even Trump has gone on to declare:

["Our currency is crashing and will soon no longer be the world standard which will be our greatest defeat frankly in 200 years."](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad667feecb594982b9f99bedb2d0a27d&_e=tTfUhcc6TO6-HxToLn0wB-2yaJkifTp8A2zz9DCu0Oi_bgGpyg8JGMGp8shX2xH-9psZdwdSutE-deBVCxqERLE5wIqlkRxljdKr5aaTykYe5jwrKf2ar0X57p1kiFsX9ZsP2OHD7epY_PDvpSjpRMoXQZSukI7JYZAlFOhvaCxqCGlmdPVXDJfeLJK-4sJlQjmERXOtTIUbs66F_L37gAIyltoD-H4OWte6S_ecYENad6wDLGUADKGc-zbTbcDKC-64_EtPtIrDjkO_JyXV7mLsvaXGI10HQdB-U6jwm1j9oLspzbJffae-yoR9rNjFnuT5xvUu_ixROJxvIDMoIvrOMhT7eYw0W9mCGV03q3v1DDLcI2sCE0Mv1wEy7DQGaukd-agsmcfmpGvvr8a3aKXos9Iq5n18rIbush33MN8dti8z9MGgbqJIFeYpUbPPcte4hyfgJk0nf_RW81IrLEI-afccamxxXmLLsW9Z2IPxWSiKWzLifYP-AuybAc7J)

This looming dollar devaluation could potentially be a financial earthquake that devastates the economy, Wall Street, and your retirement savings.

name: Officer Harry Dunn (ret.)
subject: Three years ago, I defended the U.S. Capitol from violent insurrectionists. Now, I'm the Democrat running for Congress in MD-03 and I hope you’ll become a Founding Donor of my campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T94ee345d-3fba-49bf-b28b-c896820f7356/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T913b41a6-3a4c-4246-8cd6-8ad4aa1e7fb6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hi Peter, it's Harry Dunn here, one of the Capitol police officers who defended the U.S. Capitol against MAGA insurrectionists just three years ago and testified in front of the January 6th Committee. I've got an important announcement: I'm hoping to make my return to DC – but not as a Capitol police officer. I'm officially running to serve Maryland's 3rd Congressional district in the U.S. House. [I’m counting on your support to get there. Can you rush $10 or more to become a Founding Donor of my campaign? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T08f6cd70-030e-4bf6-8375-cb885efb88ee/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR: CHIP IN $10 >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6dde4150-84f2-459c-b076-1ba4bd661fb6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Here’s the thing Peter, I never thought I would run for office. Growing up, I wanted to be just like my dad, who was an athlete and a U.S. Air Force Veteran. I played football and earned an athletic scholarship that sent me to college. (I was pretty good, but being 6-foot-7 sure didn’t hurt!) But wearing a football uniform taught me something special: it gave me purpose and made me feel a part of something bigger than myself. So when I put on my Capitol police uniform for the first time over 15 years ago to protect our nation’s Capitol, it felt right. But I never thought I’d see the day that our democracy would be attacked by Donald Trump and an army of insurrectionists that HE directed to the Capitol. I couldn't have been any closer to the chaos of January 6. I put my life on the line during the violence and destruction that Trump encouraged. So trust and believe when I tell you: we cannot allow our democracy to be in the hands of these MAGA-extremists. I fought for our democracy and our Capitol once as Officer Dunn, and I'll do it again as Congressman Dunn. [Please, can you split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action of $10 or $25 to become a Founding Donor? I seriously appreciate any help you can give today >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2c174291-0454-4721-95e3-b039a9504c01/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb947b800-b25d-4dd5-be1a-c10c9461f236/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Let's do it, Harry Dunn
---

|

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: Mike Johnson
subject: No half-measures and no second chances
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana
body:
Fellow American, allow me to introduce myself. My name is Mike Johnson. I am the Speaker of the House of Representatives. | | | [](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8c0daa947fcd4b0db8e1ba5aefd9b8ad&_e=Bz8h3BwgsoPniSy21h1-_bLXiWtrwXes0HyJU3TNxFtza1P3FaEGzpWVi5K8CbX8bOWnG7Nlf0yyx_BZPTuNM3xNTurifIssE3DTLGq2lKOa1f65KUW6agsX3r0Yoy63u0ceiwoGCTV5oCJQZKGcCmZm8N9HG6P-IRo1UvbBgqmZSxWXKgjCyFe0mpTIqn9KZI4Qg7Oie3uKxFXFVXLKhVddOhLJRQtjWlGAx1GVdCqUiE1uJU9VOMrkkGX6ikeAd_6QQh4uhzg75YVBRlsn0iie7r3Mt6VXCVYOW7trct4MIWu4RJKUyOQWSaiFEjg2su0cR0ZAB-1nVo_gyuk96O845OLgVTFUA4xVZUlsuFCePaZlEGykr2U_8bC7MeosEIXJhN4W0loHcE6hphuzpRhzBAbgJ_hx-IEkLyVn54l2kssIOXJ0Z3CUVv7HcRP4)

Once freedom has been taken, it's gone for good. **We can 't afford to take any half measures BECAUSE we won't get a second chance.** **[I'm reaching out to you today because I want to introduce myself... But more importantly I want you to join my team to save America, defend our Constitution, and restore our liberties.](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8c0daa947fcd4b0db8e1ba5aefd9b8ad&_e=Bz8h3BwgsoPniSy21h1-_bLXiWtrwXes0HyJU3TNxFtza1P3FaEGzpWVi5K8CbX8bOWnG7Nlf0yyx_BZPTuNM3xNTurifIssE3DTLGq2lKOa1f65KUW6agsX3r0Yoy63u0ceiwoGCTV5oCJQZKGcCmZm8N9HG6P-IRo1UvbBgqmZSxWXKgjCyFe0mpTIqn9KZI4Qg7Oie3uKxFXFVXLKhVddOhLJRQtjWlGAx1GVdCqUiE1uJU9VOMrkkGX6ikeAd_6QQh4uhzg75YVBRlsn0so6AEdSDQMdrT2j0TMfoaViEouF_MtO6AB4GlTvsmCyPzFXF6dcQSUTpxHpJoW8abGm9GB9TGUuxakgI_dMBaK85TC0HRlHvkOazLjzeHAhQkkuMWc974hRFEpzlUsRh7ogFm6yot_Qw818uHp6icOHvzLBwlu4_QthBH2TfSRZ)** Friend, allow me to introduce myself. My name is Mike Johnson. I am the Speaker of the House of Representatives. These are the three things you NEED to know about me. _**I'm a Christian, I'm a Conservative, and I will defend our Constitution to my last breath!**_ Growing up, I wanted to be a firefighter like my dad -- but more than anything, I wanted to serve my community and country. When I got older, I realized that the way that God had called me to serve was by fighting to defend freedom, and the values that made America great. I spent my early career defending Christians from religious persecution and protecting our religious liberties. Never in a million years did I think that God's plan for my life would lead me to where I am today. My God-given responsibility is to defend freedom from all those who seek to destroy it. Even if it costs me everything in the process. I'm guessing that before I was elected to become Speaker of the House, you probably never heard my name. That's why I'm reaching out to you right now, Friend. I want you to know where I stand, and I want you to hear this directly from me. This is my solemn promise to the American people: I will take no half-measures when it comes to defending our liberties. I will never compromise on what makes America GREAT. And I never take the support of patriots like you for granted. I don't make these promises lightly. You don't need me to tell you that saving our country from the radical left will be difficult. **[But that's why it's so crucial that I have you on my team. The more patriots who stand up and join Team Johnson, the more successful we will be.](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8c0daa947fcd4b0db8e1ba5aefd9b8ad&_e=Bz8h3BwgsoPniSy21h1-_bLXiWtrwXes0HyJU3TNxFtza1P3FaEGzpWVi5K8CbX8bOWnG7Nlf0yyx_BZPTuNM3xNTurifIssE3DTLGq2lKOa1f65KUW6agsX3r0Yoy63u0ceiwoGCTV5oCJQZKGcCmZm8N9HG6P-IRo1UvbBgqmZSxWXKgjCyFe0mpTIqn9KZI4Qg7Oie3uKxFXFVXLKhVddOhLJRQtjWlGAx1GVdCqUiE1uJU9VOMrkkGX6ikeAd_6QQh4uhzg75YVBRlsn0l4q5EyGFQ3cxDcVUdCDUlbh1G4HBVoSN2VmBc-VJIEkWaC6kildAQuqkwsTBRxNgcm1ziCAEpCM_MzWQyPy26Oo5eRVjajeyKnp9RXMLHGgBTQatAdKIlvV1PBRWdeK4eSPT2yMZBqo0k6M8uytxqGYfoeN2bnS0dbkZmmWgzi5)**

[**JOIN TEAM JOHNSON TODAY**](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8c0daa947fcd4b0db8e1ba5aefd9b8ad&_e=Bz8h3BwgsoPniSy21h1-_bLXiWtrwXes0HyJU3TNxFtza1P3FaEGzpWVi5K8CbX8bOWnG7Nlf0yyx_BZPTuNM3xNTurifIssE3DTLGq2lKOa1f65KUW6agsX3r0Yoy63u0ceiwoGCTV5oCJQZKGcCmZm8N9HG6P-IRo1UvbBgqmZSxWXKgjCyFe0mpTIqn9KZI4Qg7Oie3uKxFXFVXLKhVddOhLJRQtjWlGAx1GVdCqUiE1uJU9VOMrkkGX6ikeAd_6QQh4uhzg75YVBRlsn0oWNDpM-VgrYpa9RIcZjhm6Kqk3rZwfYlPvV-nvuUOr8A6OxbZJQGm0yF_VX3cmQAZuv_SGg1Uzqp82JRfMnBdtuHvkfDezokZpht5oqsmMDU5X-2yN5hRaqT1J-YIBKmzVUBTI4Ib25pLKYpI8HO6byCnY6IG5q8TNsGSeKO2uc)

Dear Peter,
In his interview with FOX News correspondent Jesse Watters, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. called for the total and complete release of the Epstein Files.
RFK Jr. asked the question, **_“Why are we hiding this from the American people?”_**
If there were prominent politicians and other government officials and US businessmen on the list and involved in Epstein’s nefarious activities, _U.S. citizens should know about it_.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=epstein_1_9_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=2)
RFK Jr. also called for the total and unconditional release of all details surrounding the mysterious death of Jeffrey Epstein.
The loss of faith in our institutions and political class is directly connected to high profile incidents like the Epstein case, and what appears to be an FBI cover-up.
_Were politicians and world leaders blackmailed or coerced by foreign governments?_
_How widespread was the sex trafficking of minors, and exactly who was involved?_
Questions like these will never be answered by the current, corrupt leadership in Washington, and American citizens are left to themselves to piece together answers.
This is unacceptable, and as your next president, Robert F. Kennedy Jr. will restore integrity and honesty to Washington and demand the same from the leaders of its institutions.

subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9fbahk6lgcfoom088b6hu4mamjfgvdek18b725g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3h6coj1c9h2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuq0hpiuvq46c4tps5cnrdg9i01f9e33hs4egdfo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3h6coj1c9h2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcboh6ks8uop80c9oi0l62vj1i9fcf314ldq1qeg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3h6coj1c9h2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z45grseac6bhud9sg1r293gt0279dsd45r95qv6g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3h6coj1c9h2bs)

name: Senator Rand Paul
subject: This petition will make them go ballistic
body:
It's a win-win scenario

Dear Concerned American,

Your petition to Senate Minority Leader Mitch
McConnell, House Speaker Mike Johnson, your Senators, and your
Congressman is linked below.

It's vital that you submit your petition
immediately.

Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, Joe
Biden, and the Big Labor bosses are about to go ballistic.

I have introduced the National Right to Work
Act to repeal forever Big Labor's power to force workers to pay
union dues in order to work.

So the union lobbyists, Chuck Schumer, Hakeem
Jeffries, and their allies are going to use every trick in the
book to bury the National Right to Work Bill.

And they want to do it as quietly as
possible.

The union kingpins (and their water-carriers
in Congress) can't afford the consequences of having their
coercive privileges publicly debated and voted on in Congress!

They don't want the American people to know
that:

*** Millions of workers are forced to
surrender part of every paycheck to keep their jobs.

This cash funds violent "organizing" drives,
a limousine lifestyle for union bigwigs, and bankrolls radical,
tax-and-spend politicians like Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and
Hakeem Jeffries.
*** Big Labor's power is deadly to millions
of small businesses.

Big Labor politicians and stacked bureaucrats
are strangling small businesses with confiscatory taxes,
destructive laws, and straitjacket regulations.
*** Forced unionism exports millions of good
jobs overseas.

Productivity-killing work rules, workplace
class warfare, slowdowns, "sick-outs," and strikes all take their
crippling toll, closing the doors of many businesses -- for good.
In the fight to force votes on a National
Right to Work law, opponents of forced unionism will face a
showdown against the full might of Big Labor.

That's why it's vital that you act at once to
ignite massive public support for a National Right to Work Bill.

Now is the time to act.

By the time the Right to Work Bill comes up
for a vote, every member of Congress must realize the eyes of the
American people will be watching.

National opinion polls all show that 80% of
the American people agree it's wrong to force workers to pay
union dues under the threat of being fired if they don't pay!

And the National Right to Work Committee, who
has led the fight against forced dues for over 50 years, must
have your help in demonstrating that to Congress.

If the public's attention is fixed on this
battle, Congress will be forced to recognize -- or defy to its
peril -- the massive public opposition to compulsory unionism.

Then we'll see who dares to stand with Big
Labor. . .

. . . and who stands with freedom and the
American people.

It's vital you click to submit your petition
to Mitch McConnell, House Speaker Mike Johnson, your Senators,
and your Congressman immediately to demonstrate to Congress and
the national media the strong support for Right to Work.

It's all part of the National Right to Work
Committee's four-part plan to pass a National Right to Work law:

*** Contact directly by mail up to 10 million
supporters, urging them to demand their Senators and Congressmen
vote for the National Right to Work Bill;
*** Brief personally the hundreds of
favorable columnists, radio talk show hosts, and editorial
writers nationwide who can help mobilize public opinion;
*** Deploy digital advertising through email
and across social media in the days before the vote to really
make Congress feel the heat; and
*** Run TV and radio ads targeting swing
votes in key states and districts.
It is critical in this battle that Congress
hears loud and clear from the nearly 80% of Americans who support
Right to Work.

Of course, Congress may choose to obey Big
Labor bosses rather than the majority of their constituents.
That's their choice.

But time and again, when politicians defied
the public and voted for forced unionism, they've paid the price
with the end of their political careers!

Of course, this whole effort will be very
expensive.

An all-out media and direct-mail blitz to
mobilize massive public pressure on Congress will be the key to
our success.

To pay for the expensive ads, mailings, and
other efforts, it's urgent you send a special contribution to the
National Right to Work Committee today.

Will you make a generous contribution of
$1,000, $500, $250, $100, or $50 to launch the next, crucial
phase for ultimate passage of a National Right to Work law?

It's vital you act immediately to put the
politicians' feet to the fire to bring the National Right to Work
Act up for a vote.

It would be a crime to let politicians who
support compulsory unionism off the hook.

Up against the forced-dues fed,
billion-dollar might of Big Labor, all the Committee has on its
side is truth, public opinion. . .

. . . and you!

Unlike Big Labor, the National Right to Work
Committee doesn't have (or want) the power to force anyone to pay
dues.

So it has to depend on generous folks like
you.

Please don't make it easy for Chuck Schumer,
Hakeem Jeffries, Joe Biden, and Big Labor to bury the National
Right to Work Bill.

Some folks have already sent $500, $1,000,
and even more. For others, a contribution of $50 or $100 has been
as much as they could afford.

Please submit your petition so we can
demonstrate to Congress and the media the strong support for
Right to Work.

Without your contribution of $1,000, $500,
$250, $100, or $50, the National Right to Work Committee won't be
able to contact 10 million Americans, place the advertising,
deploy the whole digital program, or do anything else to put Big
Labor on the spot with a public vote on the National Right to
Work Bill.

And if you and I don't press forward now, we
may never have a chance like this again.

Please help today.

Be sure to submit your petition to Senate
Minority Leader Mitch McConnell, House Speaker Mike Johnson, your
Senators, and Congressman, and then give your contribution of
$1,000, $500, $250, $100, or $50 to the National Right to Work
Committee.

Sincerely,

Rand Paul
United States Senator

P.S. Since most Americans oppose Big Labor's
forced-unionism powers, a public debate on my National Right to
Work Bill is Big Labor's (and their water-carriers' in Congress)
worst nightmare!

So please, submit your petition to Congress,
and then pitch in with your contribution of $500, $250, $100, or
$50 to the National Right to Work Committee today.

The National Right to Work Committee is a
nonprofit, nonpartisan, single-purpose citizens' organization
dedicated to combating compulsory unionism through an aggressive
program designed to mobilize public opposition to compulsory
unionism and, at the same time, enlist public support for Right
to Work legislation. The Committee's mailing address is 8001
Braddock Road, Springfield, Virginia 22160. The Committee can be
contacted toll-free at 1-800-325-7892. Its web address is
www.nrtwc.org

Not produced or e-mailed at taxpayer expense.

grow, please forward this to a friend.

clean_body: It's a win-win scenario Dear Concerned American, Your petition to Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell, House Speaker Mike Johnson, your Senators, and your Congressman is linked below. It's vital that you submit your petition immediately. Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, Joe Biden, and the Big Labor bosses are about to go ballistic. I have introduced the National Right to Work Act to repeal forever Big Labor's power to force workers to pay union dues in order to work. So the union lobbyists, Chuck Schumer, Hakeem Jeffries, and their allies are going to use every trick in the book to bury the National Right to Work Bill. And they want to do it as quietly as possible. The union kingpins (and their water-carriers in Congress) can't afford the consequences of having their coercive privileges publicly debated and voted on in Congress! They don't want the American people to know that: * Millions of workers are forced to surrender part of every paycheck to keep their jobs. This cash funds violent "organizing" drives, a limousine lifestyle for union bigwigs, and bankrolls radical, tax-and-spend politicians like Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Hakeem Jeffries. Big Labor's power is deadly to millions of small businesses. Big Labor politicians and stacked bureaucrats are strangling small businesses with confiscatory taxes, destructive laws, and straitjacket regulations. Forced unionism exports millions of good jobs overseas. Productivity-killing work rules, workplace class warfare, slowdowns, "sick-outs," and strikes all take their crippling toll, closing the doors of many businesses -- for good. In the fight to force votes on a National Right to Work law, opponents of forced unionism will face a showdown against the full might of Big Labor. That's why it's vital that you act at once to ignite massive public support for a National Right to Work Bill. Now is the time to act. By the time the Right to Work Bill comes up for a vote, every member of Congress must realize the eyes of the American people will be watching. National opinion polls all show that 80% of the American people agree it's wrong to force workers to pay union dues under the threat of being fired if they don't pay! And the National Right to Work Committee, who has led the fight against forced dues for over 50 years, must have your help in demonstrating that to Congress. If the public's attention is fixed on this battle, Congress will be forced to recognize -- or defy to its peril -- the massive public opposition to compulsory unionism. Then we'll see who dares to stand with Big Labor. . . . . . and who stands with freedom and the American people. It's vital you click to submit your petition to Mitch McConnell, House Speaker Mike Johnson, your Senators, and your Congressman immediately to demonstrate to Congress and the national media the strong support for Right to Work. It's all part of the National Right to Work Committee's four-part plan to pass a National Right to Work law: Contact directly by mail up to 10 million supporters, urging them to demand their Senators and Congressmen vote for the National Right to Work Bill; Brief personally the hundreds of favorable columnists, radio talk show hosts, and editorial writers nationwide who can help mobilize public opinion; Deploy digital advertising through email and across social media in the days before the vote to really make Congress feel the heat; and * Run TV and radio ads targeting swing votes in key states and districts. It is critical in this battle that Congress hears loud and clear from the nearly 80% of Americans who support Right to Work. Of course, Congress may choose to obey Big Labor bosses rather than the majority of their constituents. That's their choice. But time and again, when politicians defied the public and voted for forced unionism, they've paid the price with the end of their political careers! Of course, this whole effort will be very expensive. An all-out media and direct-mail blitz to mobilize massive public pressure on Congress will be the key to our success. Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

name: Jerrad Christian
subject: No, we won’t just “get over it”
body:
Trump shows how little he cares about human life
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015E8HiKzidHthyGqjujUFTmE-lu_yRCVMOAZ9O4Pc118Ri2a9bS1CM0pr3JiyrhjjhDza8QiAgZIpsG9KEdRGCX6UXfHTL5tFs3JgaVvjHmStFW4eKns6RS1DbGPcrup6Ywz0AWkVPydlmYMV1XkQrOCbY8gUpPXWjEtV3vBce2aGWl2_cfpI24tOJjJDmT1P5i3-NVfcBZm1s8S0CGr51g==&c=53lo9OIVfaOJaeyV1adAL-tO7iCoip7nlgslTsVK-bDlumnE5JRpxQ==&ch=zHyJDqSFt8Wl5Qyq510QjBcOxY5RREh4KEwF6UT5IN0xfRUmwDS6kA==)
---

Friend,
In Iowa over the weekend, another shooting at a school resulted in the death of a sixth-grade student and at least seven others injured, including students and school staff.
Trump said the shooting is "so surprising to see here" (narrator: it actually isn't--shootings in schools and many other public places have occurred in both rural and urban parts of the country, with no clear link to demographics or density). And then he ended with a note as callous as we've come to expect from him and his MAGA followers: "But we have to get over it" he said.
Other GOP contenders for president, as well as the usual cowards in Congress or running for federal office, at least offered their typical empty thoughts and prayers. Trump waited 36 hours, and then simply told everyone to get over it.
No one present at that school when the gunman rampaged is going to just "get over it." None--not a single one--of those young, impressionable kids is going to ever get over it. And the parents who lost their child to senseless murder will certainly not get over it.
Leaders don't shake off uncomfortable situations. They don't shrug in the face of life or death problems. They confront these situations with empathy, compassion, and a resolve to understand the issue and do everything they can to fix the problem.
I am a proud gun owner, and take my ownership seriously and responsibly. Closing every loophole on background checks, instituting red flag laws, and making real investments in mental healthcare are all things that we need to do to reduce and prevent gun violence and mass shootings.
But we've gotten so numb to this happening time and again that the GOP frontrunner for president can simply tell us to "get over it" and blithely move on with his revenge tour.
Our political system cannot abide cowards like Trump and my opponent Troy Balderson who would rather run away from controversy than attempt to resolve it. We need people who will put leadership and service above self, and who will not buy into the gun lobby propaganda that there is literally nothing we can do to prevent these awful tragedies. They are lying to us. We can do more.
I pledge to put our safety and our children's safety above nonsense political games. When it comes to kids dying by firearms in the hands of those who should never have them, I won't get over it--and neither should you.
Thank you for your support for someone who will fight for our kids and our communities.
-Jerrad

None--not a single one--of those young, impressionable kids is going to ever get over it. And the parents who lost their child to senseless murder will certainly not get over it. Leaders don't shake off uncomfortable situations. They don't shrug in the face of life or death problems. They confront these situations with empathy, compassion, and a resolve to understand the issue and do everything they can to fix the problem. I am a proud gun owner, and take my ownership seriously and responsibly. Closing every loophole on background checks, instituting red flag laws, and making real investments in mental healthcare are all things that we need to do to reduce and prevent gun violence and mass shootings. But we've gotten so numb to this happening time and again that the GOP frontrunner for president can simply tell us to "get over it" and blithely move on with his revenge tour. Our political system cannot abide cowards like Trump and my opponent Troy Balderson who would rather run away from controversy than attempt to resolve it. We need people who will put leadership and service above self, and who will not buy into the gun lobby propaganda that there is literally nothing we can do to prevent these awful tragedies. They are lying to us. We can do more. I pledge to put our safety and our children's safety above nonsense political games. When it comes to kids dying by firearms in the hands of those who should never have them, I won't get over it--and neither should you. Thank you for your support for someone who will fight for our kids and our communities. -Jerrad | | | == | Jerrad Christian Candidate for Congress (OH-12) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | Donate == | | == | Mail checks to: Citizens for J Christian P.O. box 315 Galena, OH 43021 | | | | | | | | | | Citizens for J Christian | P.O. box 315, Galena, OH 43021 | Sent by mailto:jerrad@christianforohio.com powered by

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: These questions are at the core of what it means to be human
body:
Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate.

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38834%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ayT2ycLA4yBaYeD40hgwGQ&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate. And every academic year, I’m reminded of the joy it is to pursue the answers to questions like “ _Does God exist? Can we know God?_ ” with my students.

These questions are at the core of what it means to be human - both in our relationship with each other and with God. [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38845%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cKluEua1se7N4rFjmGmftw&sysid=1) Today, I want to offer you that same experience by sending you [**a limited-edition DVD box set of Hillsdale's popular online course, “Western Heritage - From the Book of Genesis to John Locke,”**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38846%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=30j%2by2bGHt5Ck%2f%2b3Pg5KsA&sysid=1) as a token of our thanks for a generous contribution in support of Hillsdale's efforts to educate America.

I invite you to study the history of the "big questions" with my colleagues and me.

Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link: **[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-western-heritage-dvd](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38847%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Hyl3gSpBVEBgnEQJOvLQpA&sysid=1)**

More than 2,000 people have already requested theirs, so make sure to get your set before they are all gone.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
---

Your America News
---

Hail to the victors! Congratulations, Wolverines.
Last night, the Wolverines turned the Nation blue. This November, Democrats will turn rural America blue, too.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
It's been 26 years since the Wolverines won a National Championship. Michigan proved impossible is nothing . On Election Day, with your help, so will we.
Friend, we hit our fundraising goal to end 2023, but we're off to a slow start this January. A contribution today can help Dr. Bob stay on pace. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/altext?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/altext?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/altext?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
Friend,
You don't have to be an alum to appreciate the undefeated season and the National title by the Wolverines. Our Congressional district in Northern Michigan and the UP had some great representation at the game last night:
*
#40,
Christian
Boivin
is
from
Traverse
City.
*
#1,
Roman
Wilson's
mother
is
from
St.
Ignace.
*
Nanette
Hanson
of
Escanaba
was
celebrated
for
her
work
as
Michigan
Teacher
of
the
Year
at
the
game.
I am especially encouraged that Nanette was featured. One of her platforms is to shine a light on rural Michigan schools.
Behind every player on the field, there is an educator who helped them along the way. Teachers deserve the spotlight and they deserve better pay.
Further, every pupil should be able to attend post-secondary education without insurmountable financial burden. A significant amount of money is invested in college athletics, but not enough attention is focused on making education affordable to everyone.
The wealth of our Nation lies in its educated and trained workforce. Public education, community college, trade schools, and apprentice programs are all vital in strengthening our communities.
My opponent, Rep. Jack Bergman wants to defund education.
As an educator and lifelong student, I will strive to enhance, not destroy, what made our Nation great.
Michigan is excelling in sports and state policies but we need to extend the momentum with better federal representation from our rural communities.
Thank you for joining our fight.
-Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan and the UP
Democrat, MI01
Together, we can shape a better future for students, student-athletes, and rural education. A contribution from you today, no matter the amount, will help me put education first .

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: Why Dave Ramsey Is Dangerously Wrong About This Biden Move
body:
Asked whether we’re on the cusp of a US Dollar crash, Dave Ramsey made a stunning miscalculation while live on air:
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
Blackrock warns "Prepare for a recession unlike any other." Central banks igniting a global recession with their fight to stop inflation.
| | | |
---|---|---
---
# Dave Ramsey Is Dangerously Wrong
# And Here’s Why>>

---
Asked whether we’re on the cusp of a US Dollar crash, Dave Ramsey made a stunning miscalculation while live on air:

“Am I worried about this? Absolutely not.”

Frankly, I've never seen someone so confident in being wrong...

Because what’s happening to the US Dollar is not something you should “keep an eye on”...

But instead, is an imminent threat you should get ahead of right NOW.

See, China, Brazil, India, and Russia have finally teamed up to create 1 common currency...

And they’re now joined by the oil-producing giants of the Middle East, and dozens of other countries.

This means it will be the greenback against 1 single currency for the rest of the world.

And let me tell you, that's a showdown we might not win.

After all, the combined wealth of these countries is bigger than the US.

Even Trump has gone on to declare:

[“Our currency is crashing and will soon no longer be the world standard which will be our greatest defeat frankly in 200 years.”](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/eAkhlGCyPJZ3GTZEyIP5bg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnf_)

This looming dollar devaluation could potentially be a financial earthquake that devastates the economy, Wall Street, and your retirement savings.

body:
Illegals Everywhere! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3990372f027d/conforti-for-congress-8394012?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

Illegals are everywhere!

They are in my town, and probably in your town too. If they aren't now, they will be soon. And with the illegals comes increased crime, prostitution - and disease.

Yes, I've seen reports that the police officers from stations where the illegals have been housed are taking home diseases to their families. And diseases never been seen here in the Americas have been found among children! That will lead to an infectious disease crisis - along with all the other problems that the illegals bring.

We must secure the border! It is of utmost importance to the security of our people and our nation. Sean Casten is complicit on the issue. He has voted against HR 2, which would secure the border, and is working against the American people.

It is time for change - our kind of change. If you don't like what is happening, the only way to end the craziness is to change who you send to WDC. It's time to vote Republican and pass policies that protect the American people.

When I am in Congress, I will work with your best interests at the forefront. Please consider making a contribution to my campaign to help me beat the radical democrat.

Can you donate $25 today?

[](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=35a0706e83&e=25f4fa3311)

Your support is greatly appreciated.
Stay strong!
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District
---
| PS: Follow my campaign on [Facebook](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=7f84e12162&e=25f4fa3311), [Twitter](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=956f64e54e&e=25f4fa3311), and [Instagram](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=a774544088&e=25f4fa3311)!
