As you may recall, I sent a few emails in December asking for your participation in my 2023 end-of-year survey. Unfortunately, we didn’t receive enough feedback to gauge where voters stand ten months before Election Day.

_**[Why your participation today matters:](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d8c1586150904c68bf3f2acf14f1b10e&_e=GE9clsn9PAQ-oKTd9e90C-1_g-VUJ97nZhiP03aH4K26KEDBK6SdUskWYCGTbqzEWQaEZM2AArvyr8bAVaNxX-e6V_Tpc7rQhZFH0UpmIanZ8aSfh6X10Yxduz2B9M2FHP6RVlDQ7BPHwJWkpGLtvbaAgtO2u435ASA6I5vhaOKCCDLhudRFUhZPJ1SRG1JcHJZH8_CwPhdg1cGKegh9UAFlqCL5kMfsYbpu77nUYhVwq_jYsPJI49Dx9Na5dTAunHYvouASS2P4iBPUuhqE7CkyQOQXs6RT3TPU6JB2hc1Cb-ZY2U7upKYczgbinqSYlNHG09VVkFuK7G2BENbkuvY1TYc86k1FRrOYWUuiE8hS7ibzC9SbtMFtMRDeotjsw359deqGV7cL2zCnyKycqeas_861B1ovqen4O465feQ%3D) **_This will be the most expensive Senate race in U.S. history, per vote. You may not hear about my race in the news much now, but give it a few months, and my name and my opponent's name will be hard to miss.

_**[Your response](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d8c1586150904c68bf3f2acf14f1b10e&_e=GE9clsn9PAQ-oKTd9e90C-1_g-VUJ97nZhiP03aH4K26KEDBK6SdUskWYCGTbqzEWQaEZM2AArvyr8bAVaNxX-e6V_Tpc7rQhZFH0UpmIanZ8aSfh6X10Yxduz2B9M2FHP6RVlDQ7BPHwJWkpGLtvbaAgtO2u435ASA6I5vhaOKCCDLhudRFUhZPJ1SRG1JcHJZH8_CwPhdg1cGKegh9UAFlqCL5kMfsYbpu77nUYhVwq_jYsPJI49Dx9Na5dTAuBkcBaovUI9PmR5cDohLpLIyun6NwiDik476McoEtX8TUvELmvz8JIHsvggAZFCFedYknNzhruRSKU-ZmJS0iuU4hwe4w-5mpDcLPyzh7EhgLhL2b-f6PDPFHzmyyZYWh9ENM8sGx2M2cEJCkBTnKVfV_jEackXStDE5zotU3uz4%3D)**_ to my Election Year Survey will provide my team and me with critically important information to tailor our message, adjust campaign strategy, and win the votes needed to flip this Democrat-held Senate seat.

Please remember that with Democrats writing off West Virginia, the Montana Senate race has become the _**number one priority for both Republicans and Democrats**_.

[**BEGIN 2024 ELECTION YEAR SURVEY ->** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d8c1586150904c68bf3f2acf14f1b10e&_e=GE9clsn9PAQ-oKTd9e90C-1_g-VUJ97nZhiP03aH4K26KEDBK6SdUskWYCGTbqzEWQaEZM2AArvyr8bAVaNxX-e6V_Tpc7rQhZFH0UpmIanZ8aSfh6X10Yxduz2B9M2FHP6RVlDQ7BPHwJWkpGLtvbaAgtO2u435ASA6I5vhaOKCCDLhudRFUhZPJ1SRG1JcHJZH8_CwPhdg1cGKegh9UAFlqCL5kMfsYbpu77nUYhVwq_jYsPJI49Dx9Na5dTAuONX8j7AFiem3ZdDf4kUXJ6XSMipqdV2MhaoLsmWQcmU3QO6TE11Bk59w_1v1iWkXG0KSh3FwOj9FSj0xaMKTRp_2-a5VN6ihbbaFti0dHD7JKnoCGik1lbqVDybGZUJHEx7AYudius-w4A-3EkRICbmeImz3Q3BPltFfNNchUI8%3D)

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

As you may recall, I sent a few emails in December asking for your participation in my 2023 end-of-year survey. Unfortunately, we didn’t receive enough feedback to gauge where voters stand ten months before Election Day. This will be the most expensive Senate race in U.S. history, per vote. You may not hear about my race in the news much now, but give it a few months, and my name and my opponent's name will be hard to miss. to my Election Year Survey will provide my team and me with critically important information to tailor our message, adjust campaign strategy, and win the votes needed to flip this Democrat-held Senate seat. Please remember that with Democrats writing off West Virginia, the Montana Senate race has become the number one priority for both Republicans and Democrats. If you have a few minutes to spare right now, I cannot tell you how valuable would be to me and my team. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: Reserve Your “Western Heritage” DVD Set
body:
Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate.

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpedvn7fle7a00hutlnn9d69rgtucngpfb3mspmo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3h66o73chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate. And every academic year, I'm reminded of the joy it is to pursue the answers to questions like "_Does God exist? Can we know God?_ " with my students.

These questions are at the core of what it means to be human - both in our relationship with each other and with God. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcr6smoacnr3bo6slber5lpvgfklj0qlmrq2daeg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3h66o73chh2bs) Today, I want to offer you that same experience by sending you [**a limited-edition DVD box set of Hillsdale's popular online course, "Western Heritage - From the Book of Genesis to John Locke,"**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z91960k9a0alin9k6q6a9bqi7kj460v4t0esu27o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3h66o73chh2bs) as a token of our thanks for a generous contribution in support of Hillsdale's efforts to educate America.

I invite you to study the history of the "big questions" with my colleagues and me.

Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link: **[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-western-heritage-dvd](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrc5cte7rtr2npvd6i0bsd3dsf4f42fj372b3g70_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3h66o73chh2bs)**

More than 2,000 people have already requested theirs, so make sure to get your set before they are all gone.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

name: Team Gallego
subject: This generation faces one of the greatest threats to our democracy in our nation’s history
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
After an outright attack on our democracy on January 6th 2021, the people responsible for that attack will be on the ballot.
#

Peter, democracy is never guaranteed.
And today, we are asking you to make a donation to Ruben Gallego’s campaign to help defend our democracy.
If you understand the significance of this campaign and how critical Arizona will be in this year’s elections, please use this link to make a contribution.
[**https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/J6-24**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240109-1-30&t=1&akid=1656%2E734936%2Ec75Cmm)
If you need more, let us explain why your donation is so important.
When asked what form of government we’d be given after the Constitutional Convention, Benjamin Franklin is said to have responded: “A democracy, if you can keep it.”
Every generation must choose to sustain that democracy through small acts — staying informed, being involved in their community, voting.
Some generations are faced with a greater opportunity to shape the future of our democracy than others. Flashpoints in history like the Civil War, the Second World War, the Civil Rights movement.
Today, this generation faces one of the greatest threats to our democracy in our nation’s history. After an outright attack on our democracy on January 6th in 2021, the people responsible for that attack will be on the ballot.
Whether anti–democratic extremists like Donald Trump or Kari Lake win or lose will determine whether our democracy survives for another generation or if it slips out of our grasp.
That is why we are asking you to support Ruben Gallego — a veteran, a leader, someone who will fight to defend this country and our democracy.
It might seem like a donation of $3 is insignificant against everything we’re up against. But hundreds and thousands of people taking small acts like this together add up to something greater than the sum of their parts.
Good people doing the right thing is what will save our democracy. So please, if you can, we are humbly asking:
[**Make your first donation of $3 to Ruben Gallego’s campaign and help him defeat Kari Lake in Arizona. Help Ruben defend our democracy.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240109-1-30&t=2&akid=1656%2E734936%2Ec75Cmm)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Eric=20Underwood?=
subject: ☕Coffee w/ the Chairman
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY ()
body:
2024 Updates and Proactive Preparation

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12672822?e=25844e23a8)
https://ne.gop/?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=dc671b057d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-dc671b057d-21732365

** Good Morning Republicans,
------------------------------------------------------------
Snow days bring back so many memories. Remember, as kids watching the news at night and hoping your schools name would scroll by? Wondering why some schools have closed and YOURS is holding out? Is it snowing harder somewhere else or different roads or maybe only the country schools close?

AND sometimes you had to wait until morning and then there it was...Your School Name. You'd watch it go by in alphabetical order like, 3 times to make sure it didn't change.

And then it was cartoon time. It was cereal, or oatmeal, or maybe pancakes time.
Maybe a bit later it was snowsuits and build a fort time.

I spent Monday at home with the kiddos and they DID build a fort outside. As I watch them enjoy the Good Life of Nebraska snowy weather 😆, I know that there is work to do. There is always work to do. Which is another very defining thing about Nebraskans, we are always working and always preparing.

These are my thoughts for January. We must prepare. We must be proactive in seeing a year's worth of outcomes and putting into motion the effort needed to be ready. If we've learned anything over the last 5 years is this...don't ever think it can't happen here because we are safe. Safety and stability are where most people's anxiety and nervousness come from and it would be obtuse to think that Nebraska is immune to what we see on the news. We have to PREPARE on all facets for 2024.

So let's not blind ourselves to what we know to be an eventual outcome of 2024.

#1 War is coming in some fashion or another. It will more than likely be fought on many fronts from Ukraine/Russia - Israel/Middle East - Taiwan/China - North/South Korea. And what I believe to be the foremost front line, our Southern Border. The overarching element to all of this will be at what cost? A strong President backed by focused/trained military is the deterrent to most of these challenges. But we aren't there yet and November 2024 and any subsequent change over is a LONG way off. Prepare now for the cost.

#2 YOUR Health will be used as a mental weapon against you. FEAR of death and suffering will be amplified to affect your common sense approach to your health. This emotional manipulation will affect many as they make what they believe to be logical choices and then transpose those same FEARS onto others through guilt, shame, aggression, and ridicule. You know how to eat healthy and you know how to take care of yourself. You, will always be your best medical advocate.

#3 Costs of Living will increase. This will make many Nebraskans truly define 'wants versus needs'. However, many will struggle with the employer compensation and balance of income increases versus spending decreases. Small businesses will be impacted the most as they juggle the direct effect of cost of living to their interwoven personal/business life AND maintaining staff morale and volume.

#4 Election Fraudulent Activity. IT IS GOING TO HAPPEN. There is fraudulent activity at some level, in some way, small or large scale, obvious or covertly, IT IS going to happen in every election. We have to put EVERY effort into securing our elections. In my opinion, we are at risk of losing our election in close, swing areas AND then subsequently believing a lie as to what is trending culturally because of THE BALLOT BOX manipulation. In the year 2000, there were 80,000 Absentee Ballots cast in Nebraska, by 2024 the estimate will be over 500,000. Whether someone is circling a bubble for President or Congress, school board or PETITION For/Against, mailed out ballots NOT secured by a Photo ID presented to an Elected Official at the EXACT moment of casting a ballot/vote is going to be exploited. We will lose elections. We will have constitutional amendments to Nebraska's Statues or Constitution. In fact, I believe that the most proactive way to defend our rights like free speech, bear arms,
freedom of religion AND our defense of Human Life will come not from a bill through the Unicameral, but the manipulation of the ballot box. If a petition is signed by enough signatures roughly 120,000, and representing 38 counties, it is on the ballot in November. At that point, any ballot initiative just needs 50% + 1 to be successful. Our opposition party that threatens life & liberty have been mailing out 100,000's of absentee applications EVERY election cycle targeting Douglas, Sarpy and Lancaster County. This is their plan. This is the national strategy to alter the culture when they do not have the legislative votes necessary like in our Unicameral.

#5 Spiritual Attack (This is really #1). Your Faith will be tested. In every way. Because as Paul Harvey aptly details in his monologue "If I were the Devil" (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cg5i7OPRaNg&utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=dc671b057d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-dc671b057d-21732365) , "I'd subvert the churches first. I'd begin a campaign of whispers with the wisdom of a serpent." We must spend time with God and we must spend time understand His purpose for each one of us. Then, we can have His words full our hearts and minds to overflowing abundance of Love, Hope, Peace, & Joy and spread that message to others. We must proactively seek out others to share the Good News, because it is rare anymore that people even know where to begin when they are lost. Seek others.

#6 Truth. Truth will be at a premium in 2024 and sometimes it will be extremely hard to believe. Truth will come from seemingly TRUSTED sources with the backing of titles and money and popularity. But it will still not be the truth. We must cast aside emotions while discerning the truth, use common sense and logic, and then, and only then, apply empathy or sympathy. When Truth tells you the hard facts of a situation or of a person's character, we must be measured and thoughtful...but at the same time...bold and courageous. Because Truth is the greatest of disinfectants and what it exposes or who it exposes can be difficult to bear...hard to imagine.

But as I've said in all my emails...the Truth shall set us free. If you want the outcomes of 2024 that you CAN make a difference to...you must be BOLD and COURAGEOUS, yet seek peace and solutions as your objectives.

As I've stated, our NEGOP constitution details the objective of the party to be the maintenance of the government of, by, and for the people AND to further our principles. With the stability and growth occurring at the local level...that's EXACTLY what we are going to do in 2024.

Blessings,
–Chairman Underwood

2024 NEGOP VISION

In 2024, the Republican Party of Nebraska is going ALL-IN on the VALUES of Education, ALL-IN on Election Accountability and Voter Verification, ALL-IN on Tax Reform, ALL-IN on Protecting Human Rights. This will come to fruition in our Legislative Plan and through the voices of the people who will expect the very most from their elected representatives. The groundwork has been completed and in 2024 it will all come down to a choice by EVERY Republican.

The choice is to remove oneself from the party politics and personalities normally associated with power and money AND engage at the doorstep of Nebraskans sharing the truth of our values because our values bring the solutions to local struggles of taxes, community safety, election security, & educational excellence.

The Values of the Republican Party resonate with Nebraskans. We are reaching out and connecting in 2024 and this will be a victory for Conservative Principles. 2024 is a victory we can all share in. Americans are thirsting for people of courage, people of honesty and truth...they are hungry for leaders to say what they are going to do...AND...then DO what they say!

I am beyond measure proud of the Republican grassroots and coalitions. They are creating stability within this organization. Every false narrative sowing chaos is an attempt by those who seek their power back. The Republicans who prioritize our principles are actively fulfilling the objectives of the party by doing maintenance of the government of, by, and for the people AND furthering their principles within the community. And this effort will continue to grow and grow as more principled Republicans join the efforts.

I see this growth and stability EVERYWHERE in Nebraska now. Dixon County, Seward County, Gage County, York County, Sarpy County, Saline County, Madison, Keith, Hall, and on and on...and the growth and stability is coming FROM the people. From leaders of the party, who CHOOSE to grow and build their counties because the people matter and connecting people to our values matters. Common Nebraskans, who say enough is enough...who choose to sacrifice their time to become better every day and engage more volunteers to make more engagement opportunities. From County Chairs and Secretaries, committeemen and women, elected officials to candidates, they SEE the reality of what strong, healthy County Parties can do.

These next 3-4 months there will be a purposeful and respectful focus of engagement to demographics and people who share conservative values. We are going ALL-IN on local campaigns and local elected positions such as school boards, city council, county seats, NRD's, power boards.

We are going ALL-IN on people of Nebraska who make Nebraska the ‘Good Life’.

–Chairman Underwood

| | Hi Peter,
* It’s Hung Cao, and if you don’t know me yet, here’s a quick rundown:
* I’m a refugee from Vietnam and a legal immigrant, and I’m fighting to make sure socialism and communism stay OUT of America.
* I’m a 25-year Navy combat veteran who served in naval special operations, in some of the most dangerous war zones in the world.
* I’m running for U.S. Senate to send Tim Kaine packing because America has had ENOUGH of far-Left career politicians.

Running for U.S. Senate was never part of my plan, but when I saw what out-of-touch politicians like Tim Kaine and Joe Biden were doing to America, I knew I had to take action.

name: Mayra Flores
subject: It’s a sin to kill a mockingbird
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mayra Flores for Congress
body:
I am praying this reaches you in time

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm48nplbj4qfr6f53g5o7hh0gnc9pb02idiq2fqg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3h61or6clh2bs)
---

We're now just a few days away from the first ballots being cast in the primary election.

And I'm afraid of what happens if this email doesn't reach you in time.

But I'm not afraid to tell you that I am a Christian who is Pro-God, Pro-Family, and 100% Pro-Trump.

Democrats & their overlords in the liberal media have spent years pushing the narrative that "conservatives will never support someone of Mayra Flores's ethnicity & age because they're the party of racism & misogyny."

They've made this race their hill to die on & defeating me is their highest priority in 2024.

Who I am & what I stand for makes their blood boil.

And Biden & the liberal billionaires that bankroll the Democrat party take great pleasure in destroying the lives of Hispanic conservative women like me.

And if this email doesn't work, that is exactly what will happen.

As a conservative, I don't believe in sugar coating things. So let me be clear- without a surge in grassroots support today, our campaign will be lucky to make it across the finish line in just a few weeks.

---

---

I'll be humiliated, while the Democrats walk away another victory in a MUST-WIN battle ground race.

So I'm coming to you from the bottom of my heart & I hope I can count on you to stand with me.

---

And if I can ever help you the way you've helped me, please just say the word.

God Bless America,

Mayra Flores

Candidate for U.S Congress

The reason I ask is because Facebook has become almost 100% irrelevant (they block, censor, and throttle conservatives like crazy).

Whereas Twitter/X..._is just the opposite._

Brian

Senator Vance closed out strong his first year as Ohio's newest Senator! Senator Vance is committed to his diligent work for the People of Ohio in 2024. Thank you for all of your support in 2023 - Here's to a great New Year! [****](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=02b08f9d314c4f509e7e8bebb35b2483&_e=wtIaAmv9-t1sQcuDkR_NHXKd5L9dcpNl0-9jMcowiLrMef4xSISMoGxZjFZ-PJcBGTY3njAJDTg1AI-KCcMUaSL_y4ts3zxuawL_gglGujouKNOZ-mExN98fkf0C4XYMG98xKhcSDV9DUzrWtgBh_yIcYwe6NjWKBJzjsq1RRphZz3NtljVKCJ82TfPHbOEuScDDVUAZB9-x4sR13xtt2zg57ggHGhCo7eCFNEuItbx5Is5STvIeln1VF99IApmAlwiAEHHXMTO46QDbIBBMoOoRIMSUrpI_LaOzYYpV-N0%3D)[********](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=02b08f9d314c4f509e7e8bebb35b2483&_e=wtIaAmv9-t1sQcuDkR_NHUoCWMoOI9b95blZjVfoKgmrPXMltxSONpqpGj2O_TCgQyq-ppwMnLn-S1ZM1IIyhLCezV-_GMoQhhw42O-N9dDAXlMdJdxty8JObmyhdgxeVUHC-te10BTCuM-rR4whFgxB5fTsejTwCJBV9Xg1WSiYLUy-xHFPfq8TN61ZhgkXqhRRS6eHS0xitKqSf720e2V56YLirp2GJnCSQnl026FKAO1T5B6berkggyEe3Zsu)**' I AM ALARMED THAT ONE OF OUR CLOSEST FRIENDS, A DEMOCRACY DEDICATED TO UPHOLDING CHERISHED FREEDOMS, SHOULD UNDERTAKE SUCH LEGISLATION'** ([Fox News](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=02b08f9d314c4f509e7e8bebb35b2483&_e=wtIaAmv9-t1sQcuDkR_NHXKd5L9dcpNl0-9jMcowiLrMef4xSISMoGxZjFZ-PJcBGTY3njAJDTg1AI-KCcMUaSL_y4ts3zxuawL_gglGujouKNOZ-mExN98fkf0C4XYMG98xKhcSDV9DUzrWtgBh__U3y0xmzOSiEKnm9BfZoVkGB1EKOcambldAC91B17up0R4qEs611mXcVr00Un7pFPYyUFgLdv9eVdZg-b0q8Chu4T0exwJVLQPTCm-BWxDqAVfieI2wizDok8-w7IGhGhFPg46KZT1_V2-xWCDxcl8%3D)) - U.S. Sen. JD Vance, R-Ohio, raised questions for lawmakers in Ireland, who are proposing a bill that could jail citizens for merely possessing material that criticizes certain protected characteristics, like gender or national origin.
Ireland Sen. Pauline O'Reilly spoke to the Seanad Éireann, where she claimed the law protects people from "discomfort" associated with views about their identities.
Vance said the U.S. condemns similar "censorious conduct" from China, Myanmar or Iran, explaining the U.S. imposed visa restrictions on government officials from the latter because they were believed to have been censoring "peaceful protesters" and "inhibiting their rights to freedom of expression" and peaceful assembly.
"I am alarmed that one of our closest friends, a democracy dedicated to upholding cherished freedoms, should undertake such legislation," Vance wrote. [Read _Fox News '_ article here. ](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=02b08f9d314c4f509e7e8bebb35b2483&_e=wtIaAmv9-t1sQcuDkR_NHXKd5L9dcpNl0-9jMcowiLrMef4xSISMoGxZjFZ-PJcBGTY3njAJDTg1AI-KCcMUaSL_y4ts3zxuawL_gglGujouKNOZ-mExN98fkf0C4XYMG98xKhcSDV9DUzrWtgBh_ykZSY2ImBv-QMIV5oLdqbQV0Um-fDcE-BtKjDifErUdSW40eSq6HTgdcpLMdLPIwgIbxt6Drq1CqaREGrGyrUrJGb49eSQuh6bMOMoyE75RLSyIkxay2yiazcYaruM5FkhD0_bDw5mHwbNDuTLX1HQ%3D) [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=02b08f9d314c4f509e7e8bebb35b2483&_e=wtIaAmv9-t1sQcuDkR_NHXKd5L9dcpNl0-9jMcowiLq7L24_k0-Vk8mBS3g62YDPWDoKekGvawZrCMbPd4NXgN1ioluLhCWX1hvrKIDCUrLuVV5grtFWg7UGNwbqTV__n0WvkOTH3-kkJMusJk-HQhUB9i3HcfAoCw5-GyjFlu50_eXTE0qo9m8Y7EV1M7AapT8ERRTqWJSdWZYu7moDCFmd87lG8og9uAKxD8dIpaw%3D) [****](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=02b08f9d314c4f509e7e8bebb35b2483&_e=wtIaAmv9-t1sQcuDkR_NHZ0yybQ02cZRSLH4J6wCFliKwfs6xM2L0IE2NjMLep1PzPG2-Wv4Jr0r7-TOUcMyKPLS2Wvi6qDcRxdRyO50Z7MuMGku98kXGGnW0qwJiT4zIxZ6r3h1RCE2hlNnsH2YtcShWtYrjHvzdIWo1mXRRWKmRC3otaxNHbeJa-uh3RkMgFxclS2IG8diBB7mCfacgVDjay7F0vRAGFTcv5qwtE9V5iQhM_6W2PF0C3Kz9xWfKeL0N_aeF5ohhQ51HiVcO7LCErfW1ZPaloRnorYSwoH4HPPqQw13jGxLvqK6z-aT)**' IRELAND SENATOR WANTS TO CRIMINALIZE SPEECH THAT CAUSES TOO MUCH 'DISCOMFORT' - IF THIS WERE HAPPENING IN RUSSIA OR CHINA OR MANY OTHER NATIONS WE WOULD CALL IT TOTALITARIAN AND THREATEN ECONOMIC SANCTIONS'** ([The Daily Signal](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=02b08f9d314c4f509e7e8bebb35b2483&_e=wtIaAmv9-t1sQcuDkR_NHZ0yybQ02cZRSLH4J6wCFliKwfs6xM2L0IE2NjMLep1PzPG2-Wv4Jr0r7-TOUcMyKPLS2Wvi6qDcRxdRyO50Z7MuMGku98kXGGnW0qwJiT4zIxZ6r3h1RCE2hlNnsH2YtT8Ya7PTFF6D6pbb90--9QDzUsRNrrsIwQI-zqoRg2jOpcYuuk7l1NGWR5e0AU6sP3jle2sR-PJqcPm7TgHT7fqT7AbD3a9trtQ8AV6h_Q8wC9MGi_5OOTQsVXs7g--wsqHWy8qAHMVWNFfeH-Qw6dFylEHlc_NSAM19HOgjfGtt)) -- FIRST ON THE DAILY SIGNAL: Republican Ohio Sen. JD Vance sent a letter Tuesday to Irish Ambassador Geraldine Byrne Nason expressing strong concerns about legislation that would undermine Irish citizens' freedom of speech.
Vance's letter, first obtained by The Daily Signal, references the Criminal Justice (Incitement to Violence or Hatred and Hate Offences) Bill 2022, which is supported by Irish politicians such as Sen. Pauline O'Reilly, who is in the country's Green Party.
"We are restricting freedom but we're doing it for the common good," O'Reilly said in viral remarks earlier this year as she discussed the legislation. "Yes, you have rights, but they are restricted for the common good." The Ohio Republican warns that this Irish bill is "full of vague prohibitions that would chill important public debate if they were to become law, particularly with respect to the most controversial and publicly significant matters."

J.D. Vance and Oklahoma Republican Rep. Kevin Hern will introduce legislation Thursday that would tax the cartels' international money transfers.
The Daily Caller first obtained a copy of the bill, which is titled the Withholding Illegal Revenue Entering Drug Markets (WIRED) Act. The legislation would specifically impose a 10 percent fee on remittances out of the U.S., with the plan of penalizing illegal activity, like drug and human smuggling.
"We cannot stand idly by as illegal immigrants and drug cartels profit from breaking our nation's laws," Vance told the Caller before introducing the bill. "This legislation is a commonsense solution to disincentivize illegal immigration and reduce the cartels' financial power."

J.D. Vance of Ohio is demanding answers around Stellantis NV's decision to cut as many as 1,225 jobs at its Jeep Wrangler and Gladiator plant in Toledo, Ohio. The automaker on Thursday said it was moving the plant -- currently on a two-shift alternative schedule that allows full-time workers to choose how many hours they want to work each week -- to a traditional two-shift operation in February. The move was made in an agreement as part of negotiations with the United Auto Workers. It also temporarily was cutting the third shift at Detroit's Mack Assembly Plant, one of the plants building the Jeep Grand Cherokee. A Worker Adjustment and Retraining Notification for that site suggests 2,455 jobs could be lost there, though Stellantis says the final number could be much lower. "They are decent, hardworking people," Vance wrote of the autoworkers he met. "I hear their stores of frustration and financial hardship -- of parents who couldn't afford soccer cleats for their kids and linemen who couldn't replace their broken-down cars. These are the people who make Stellantis the success that it is. Though they had reason to be angry with you and your management team, I did not hear vitriol directed at you. Instead, I heard a just desire to share in your success and get a fair shake." -- Sen. JD Vance (R-Ohio) said Monday that he opposes the sale of American-based manufacturing company U.S. Steel Corp. to Japanese steelmaker Nippon Steel. "Today, a critical piece of America's defense industrial base was auctioned off to foreigners for cash," Vance said in a statement, adding that he had "warned of this outcome months ago." "U.S. Steel announced the sale by celebrating the 'certain and immediate value' to be delivered to its shareholders," Vance continued. "But rest assured that I will interrogate the long-term implications for the American people, and I will do everything in my power to protect the future of our nation's security, industry, and workers." J.D. Vance (R-Ohio) published to social media an open letter to the incoming president of Ohio State University, urging the new administrator to abandon "diversity, equity and inclusion" mandates. "Today I wrote to the leadership of Ohio State, a university I love, to ask about the troubling rise of racial prejudice on campus," Vance said of the letter on social media. JD Vance, R-Ohio, wants to raise the stakes for climate change activists who vandalize historical artworks or damage museum property by creating harsher penalties for the crime. The Consequences for Climate Vandals Act, introduced in the Senate on Wednesday, would also apply to the grounds or property of the National Gallery of Art, the Smithsonian museums and the Kennedy Center, among others, and raise the maximum prison time from five years to 10. clean_body: | Senator Vance closed out strong his first year as Ohio's newest Senator! Senator Vance is committed to his diligent work for the People of Ohio in 2024. Thank you for all of your support in 2023 - Here's to a great New Year! ' I AM ALARMED THAT ONE OF OUR CLOSEST FRIENDS, A DEMOCRACY DEDICATED TO UPHOLDING CHERISHED FREEDOMS, SHOULD UNDERTAKE SUCH LEGISLATION' () - U.S. Sen. JD Vance, R-Ohio, raised questions for lawmakers in Ireland, who are proposing a bill that could jail citizens for merely possessing material that criticizes certain protected characteristics, like gender or national origin. Ireland Sen. Pauline O'Reilly spoke to the Seanad Éireann, where she claimed the law protects people from "discomfort" associated with views about their identities. Vance said the U.S. condemns similar "censorious conduct" from China, Myanmar or Iran, explaining the U.S. imposed visa restrictions on government officials from the latter because they were believed to have been censoring "peaceful protesters" and "inhibiting their rights to freedom of expression" and peaceful assembly. "I am alarmed that one of our closest friends, a democracy dedicated to upholding cherished freedoms, should undertake such legislation," Vance wrote. ' IRELAND SENATOR WANTS TO CRIMINALIZE SPEECH THAT CAUSES TOO MUCH 'DISCOMFORT' - IF THIS WERE HAPPENING IN RUSSIA OR CHINA OR MANY OTHER NATIONS WE WOULD CALL IT TOTALITARIAN AND THREATEN ECONOMIC SANCTIONS' () -- FIRST ON THE DAILY SIGNAL: Republican Ohio Sen. JD Vance sent a letter Tuesday to Irish Ambassador Geraldine Byrne Nason expressing strong concerns about legislation that would undermine Irish citizens' freedom of speech. Vance's letter, first obtained by The Daily Signal, references the Criminal Justice (Incitement to Violence or Hatred and Hate Offences) Bill 2022, which is supported by Irish politicians such as Sen. Pauline O'Reilly, who is in the country's Green Party. "We are restricting freedom but we're doing it for the common good," O'Reilly said in viral remarks earlier this year as she discussed the legislation. "Yes, you have rights, but they are restricted for the common good." The Ohio Republican warns that this Irish bill is "full of vague prohibitions that would chill important public debate if they were to become law, particularly with respect to the most controversial and publicly significant matters." ' WE CANNOT STAND IDLY BY AS ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS AND DRUG CARTELS PROFIT FROM BREAKING OUR NATION'S LAWS' () -- Ohio Republican Sen. J.D. Vance and Oklahoma Republican Rep. Kevin Hern will introduce legislation Thursday that would tax the cartels' international money transfers. The Daily Caller first obtained a copy of the bill, which is titled the Withholding Illegal Revenue Entering Drug Markets (WIRED) Act. The legislation would specifically impose a 10 percent fee on remittances out of the U.S., with the plan of penalizing illegal activity, like drug and human smuggling. "We cannot stand idly by as illegal immigrants and drug cartels profit from breaking our nation's laws," Vance told the Caller before introducing the bill. "This legislation is a commonsense solution to disincentivize illegal immigration and reduce the cartels' financial power." ' THIS IS NOT JUST ABOUT DONALD TRUMP, THIS IS ABOUT MILLIONS OF AMERICAN VOTERS WHO ARE BEING TOLD BY JUDGES IN COLORADO 'YOU DON'T GET TO VOTE FOR THE CANDIDATE THAT YOU WOULD LIKE TO VOTE FOR' HOW IS THIS DEMOCRACY?' () - Senator Vance joins Hannity to discuss the ways the Biden Administration is taking right away from voters. ' MIDDLETOWN HAS ALWAYS BEEN GOOD TO ME' () -- U.S. Sen. James David "JD" Vance, a Middletown native, has said all his successes began at home. "Middletown has always been good to me," he once said. Now Vance has opened an office in his hometown, his fourth office in Ohio, the Journal-News has learned. The others are located in Columbus, Toledo, and Cleveland. "Middletown means so much to me and my family - our new office here will work to ensure Southwest Ohio receives the services it deserves," Vance told the Journal-News. "We are here to help." ' THESE ARE THE PEOPLE WHO MAKE STELLANTIS THE SUCCESS THAT IT IS' () -- U.S. Sen. J.D. Vance of Ohio is demanding answers around Stellantis NV's decision to cut as many as 1,225 jobs at its Jeep Wrangler and Gladiator plant in Toledo, Ohio. The automaker on Thursday said it was moving the plant -- currently on a two-shift alternative schedule that allows full-time workers to choose how many hours they want to work each week -- to a traditional two-shift operation in February. The move was made in an agreement as part of negotiations with the United Auto Workers. It also temporarily was cutting the third shift at Detroit's Mack Assembly Plant, one of the plants building the Jeep Grand Cherokee. A Worker Adjustment and Retraining Notification for that site suggests 2,455 jobs could be lost there, though Stellantis says the final number could be much lower. "They are decent, hardworking people," Vance wrote of the autoworkers he met. "I hear their stores of frustration and financial hardship -- of parents who couldn't afford soccer cleats for their kids and linemen who couldn't replace their broken-down cars. These are the people who make Stellantis the success that it is. Though they had reason to be angry with you and your management team, I did not hear vitriol directed at you. Instead, I heard a just desire to share in your success and get a fair shake." ' TODAY, A CRITICAL PIECE OF AMERICA'S DEFENSE INDUSTRIAL BASE WAS AUCTIONED OFF TO FOREIGNERS FOR CASH' () -- Sen. JD Vance (R-Ohio) said Monday that he opposes the sale of American-based manufacturing company U.S. Steel Corp. to Japanese steelmaker Nippon Steel. "Today, a critical piece of America's defense industrial base was auctioned off to foreigners for cash," Vance said in a statement, adding that he had "warned of this outcome months ago." "U.S. Steel announced the sale by celebrating the 'certain and immediate value' to be delivered to its shareholders," Vance continued. "But rest assured that I will interrogate the long-term implications for the American people, and I will do everything in my power to protect the future of our nation's security, industry, and workers." ' DESPITE THE ABSENCE OF ANY SECURITY-FOCUSED DELIBERATION ON U.S. STEEL'S PART, DOMESTIC STEEL PRODUCTION IS VITAL TO U.S. NATIONAL SECURITY' () -- Three U.S. Republican senators on Tuesday urged Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen to block the $14.9 billion acquisition of U.S. Steel by Japan's Nippon Steel, the world's fourth largest steelmaker, citing national security concerns. "Despite the absence of any security-focused deliberation on U.S. Steel's part, domestic steel production is vital to U.S. national security," according to the letter on Tuesday from Republican Senators JD Vance, Josh Hawley and Marco Rubio. ' IT'S UTTERLY DISGRACEFUL' () - Senator Vance joins Laura Ingraham to discuss why we should stop writing blank checks to Ukraine. ' IF UNIVERSITIES KEEP PUSHING RACIAL HATRED, EUPHEMISTICALLY CALLED DEI, WE NEED TO LOOK AT THEIR FUNDING' () -- Sen. J.D. Vance (R-Ohio) published to social media an open letter to the incoming president of Ohio State University, urging the new administrator to abandon "diversity, equity and inclusion" mandates. Vance, an alum of Ohio State, accused the school of using racial justice rhetoric to mask "racial hatred" in its hiring of personnel and curricula. "Today I wrote to the leadership of Ohio State, a university I love, to ask about the troubling rise of racial prejudice on campus," Vance said of the letter on social media. "If universities keep pushing racial hatred, euphemistically called DEI, we need to look at their funding." "I write to express frustration with the culture at my alma mater, The Ohio State University, and to understand how that culture might change once you become its president," the senator's letter reads. "In particular, I am concerned about recent news reports that considerations related to 'diversity equity, and inclusion' have been infused into the university's hiring practices and curricula." ' HOW DOES THE DOJ DISTINGUISH BETWEEN HEATED POLITICAL RHETORIC AND EVIDENCE OF A CONSPIRACY TO VIOLATE RIGHTS OR REBEL AGAINST THE UNITED STATES' () - FIRST ON FOX: Sen. J.D. Vance, R-Ohio, sent a letter Wednesday to Attorney General Merrick Garland and Secretary of State Antony Blinken demanding answers regarding a recent Washington Post op-ed that he said suggested "open rebellion" against the United States. Robert Kagan, an editor at large at the newspaper, wrote a piece last week, claiming that "resistance" to former President Donald Trump, should he win the 2024 presidential election, "could come from the governors of predominantly Democratic states such as California and New York through a form of nullification. States with Democratic governors and statehouses could refuse to recognize the authority of a tyrannical federal government." Vance wrote in his letter to Garland and Blinken that Kagan's piece potentially violates federal law. "Excuse me? I must have missed that day in civics class," he wrote after quoting Kagan's piece. "According to Robert Kagan, the prospect of a second Donald Trump presidency is terrible enough to justify open rebellion against the United States, along with the political violence that would inevitably follow." "How does the Department of Justice distinguish between heated political rhetoric and evidence of a conspiracy to violate rights or rebel against the United States?" he asked. "In the view of the Department of Justice, could a demand for 'nullification' or secession 'intimidate' a voter into changing his behavior at the ballot box?" ' THERE SHOULD BE NO TOLERANCE FOR VANDALIZATION OF OUR HISTORIC WORKS OF ART' () -- FIRST ON FOX: Sen. JD Vance, R-Ohio, wants to raise the stakes for climate change activists who vandalize historical artworks or damage museum property by creating harsher penalties for the crime. The Consequences for Climate Vandals Act, introduced in the Senate on Wednesday, would also apply to the grounds or property of the National Gallery of Art, the Smithsonian museums and the Kennedy Center, among others, and raise the maximum prison time from five years to 10. The consequences would mirror the current maximum prison time in England, where climate activists have frequently glued themselves to artworks or thrown soup or other liquids on protective casings of museum pieces. ' THE SENATORS' LETTER BLAMES THE STEEL INFLUX FOR AT LEAST ONE PLANT CLOSURE, THE LOSS OF OVER A THOUSAND JOBS, AND THE DEFERMENT OF HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS IN NEW INVESTMENT' () -- Both Ohio's U.S. Senators want the Biden administration to stop a surge in steel imports from Mexico that violates a 2019 agreement between the United States and Mexico, and that they say threatens the U.S manufacturing base and national security. A bipartisan group of U.S. Senators including Cleveland Democrat Sherrod Brown and Cincinnati Republican JD Vance are sending a Wednesday letter to National Security Advisor Jake Sullivan that blames the steel influx from Mexico for at least one plant closure, the loss of over a thousand new and existing jobs, and the deferment of hundreds of millions of dollars in new investment. Senator JD Vance continues to deliver for all of Ohio as a conservative outsider in the United States Senate. | Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. JD Vance for Senate Inc., 1391 W 5th Avenue, Suite 314, Columbus, OH 43212 Copyright (C) 2023 JD Vance for US Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Officer Harry Dunn (ret.)
subject: I’m running for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Hey Hey – Harry Dunn here.
3 years ago, I was defending the Capitol, the Constitution, the Members of Congress who you and I both may not agree with, and my own life from MAGA insurrectionists. Now, I’m announcing my campaign to serve as the next Congressman Maryland’s 3rd District.
On January 6, 2021, we were inches from watching democracy crumble right before our eyes.
It’s not an exaggeration to say that democracy is on the brink of extinction. We’re one administration from it. And if we lose it, we’ll never get it back.
I refuse to stand by and watch. I’m prepared to fight to protect our rights, our fragile democracy – and to be honest, I’m prepared to win.
In Congress, I’ll be one of the loudest voices defending democracy – but I need your help to get there. I’m humbly asking you to make a donation -- split with Seth Moulton -- to my campaign to be the next Congressman from Maryland’s District 3. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]Here’s the cold hard truth:
All across our great nation, rights are being stripped-back one-by-one by Trump’s MAGA army who would rather oppress folks than treat them as human beings. They cry “freedom,” fight tooth-and-nail to dismantle our democracy to protect their power, and dictate the choices people are allowed to make.
That’s where everyday Americans like you come in:
$5 will help me have a vote to protect and expand voting and reproductive rights.
$5 will be able to conduct investigations and hold folks accountable.
$5 will help me fight for democracy through legislation.
If you’re ready to get in Good Trouble and redeem the soul of America, as my hero, John Lewis, urged us all to do, I need you to join this movement today.
I’ve set an ambitious goal to raise $500,000 within the first week and I need your help to reach it. Please, will you make a donation -- split with Seth Moulton -- to my campaign right now to send me to Congress and flip the House blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]Thank you,
Harry 💙

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: Our children are scared to go to school
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Peter —

It’s barely the start of the new year, and another school shooting traumatized a community. **Enough is enough.**

Last week – only four days into the year – as students and teachers in Perry, Iowa went back to class after winter break, a senseless act of gun violence left one sixth grader dead and five others wounded. **And this wasn’t even the first mass shooting of 2024.**

[**How many more must we lose before Congress finally takes action? To end the epidemic of gun violence we must have the courage to act. Will you join me and add your name to my petition demanding Congress reinstate the federal assault weapons ban?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76750229/448365267/475475571?ms=em24_240108_GRP_adv_gq_act___DBW_ettx&refcode=em24_240108_GRP_adv_gq_act___DBW_ettx&source=em24_240108_GRP_adv_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240108_GRP_adv_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=6lYhvPsjF1vaGe2BeBSFKQsHr8YL1oSlGupaFqWlLd0qvT/N3M8GyEsY6QFV4RSWq93r2gLvRmDq5euwVCDwrzkW9rlmaqKRRbedP/Vi2fx6AWsRuTS3rYG8ZbeLUvVBXKgcXchFfgWWZKN4+JyKng==&refcode2=4823fdbe-ffae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDgyM2ZkYmUtZmZhZS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fbzyjjpycW3UmXlIEDti7popX9sA-S0ERJfb0Hwbcnk=&emci=d2415197-77ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=4823fdbe-ffae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=13153572)

clean_body: | | Peter — It’s barely the start of the new year, and another school shooting traumatized a community. Enough is enough. Last week – only four days into the year – as students and teachers in Perry, Iowa went back to class after winter break, a senseless act of gun violence left one sixth grader dead and five others wounded. And this wasn’t even the first mass shooting of 2024. To build a future where all are safe to thrive, we must pass common sense gun safety legislation. Our children and teachers should go to school without fear. It’s time for Congress to act, and I’m ready to go to Washington and make sure it gets done. Onward, Dr. Brian Williams | = = | | Click to unsubscribe from our email list. Dr. Brian Williams is an Air Force Veteran, trauma surgeon, and Democrat running for Congress in Texas' 32nd district to fix our broken systems and create life-saving change. name: Matthew Diemer
subject: What do you want to see in Congress?
body:
| |
---
Peter, On Saturday, I announced my campaign for Congress against former Trump aide Max Miller. The timing of the announcement was not coincidental. The timing of this announcement was not coincidental. Saturday was the third anniversary of January 6th. Our Representative Max Miller had a major role in planning the events on that day, and he appeared in the January 6th hearings. **January 6th was one of the worst days in this country’s history. We can’t let a man who helped lead an attack on democracy represent us in Congress.** Last cycle, we had an incredibly strong showing that included winning Cuyahoga County. If we’d had better fundraising, we could’ve won outright. I genuinely hate asking for money. It’s by far my least favorite part about running for office. But this cycle, we simply need to hit the ground strong and raise a strong total right out of the gate. [I would really appreciate it if you could donate anything you could spare to help our campaign get off the ground.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDZWX9f_QGXYt8-x-WTsfww5zUCljOUEKPG6phBYcoPNMbuW8HSBldybMkkWubjHcLepkV0XZxGCqojLwUnZs6fXDD1E7jBiogjTGoQGFkrWdf6ocl12KCxmcCjJbYCSigOtRUyTos0c-ZehdB_ZhOeaUAT22jATeM7wOnAPbdIy-QW0dIZL6OPjcPawYEXgBw61mV44PKyc2NEXqBFkLBHQbiISKojcTBMaYT-sodnWTlOtZpVOU0gtbZJADZNCAtke1zQmJjgo2aw6ghpjcfsBSBn8sKwgdN8s9QN2D5d2KR59yRjvynXEwd-Cu6lQjayTFNNd_rKe4FUz3RBr8g/42u/RQNDn6afRwmJCWOwH_Pnew/h0/bzFUHLJsZWbOgelm4SA2iOdDViFsRsy3wWUJa1uKlxc)

clean_body: | | Peter, On Saturday, I announced my campaign for Congress against former Trump aide Max Miller. The timing of the announcement was not coincidental. The timing of this announcement was not coincidental. Saturday was the third anniversary of January 6th. Our Representative Max Miller had a major role in planning the events on that day, and he appeared in the January 6th hearings. January 6th was one of the worst days in this country’s history. We can’t let a man who helped lead an attack on democracy represent us in Congress. Last cycle, we had an incredibly strong showing that included winning Cuyahoga County. If we’d had better fundraising, we could’ve won outright. I genuinely hate asking for money. It’s by far my least favorite part about running for office. But this cycle, we simply need to hit the ground strong and raise a strong total right out of the gate. I am also always open to feedback and looking to make new connections, so never hesitate to email me back at info@diemerforcongress.com. Sincerely, Matthew Diemer Democratic Candidate for Congress OH-7 | Diemer for Congress P.O. Box 16753 Rocky River, Ohio 44116 | | | Sent via . name: Hillsdale College via Pro Life Update
subject: Reserve Your “Western Heritage” DVD Set
body:
Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate.

| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgvifrjiotva310b4bvc7lfi73mgc8qpe838ev98_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3j60ob4clh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate. And every academic year, I'm reminded of the joy it is to pursue the answers to questions like "_Does God exist? Can we know God?_ " with my students.

These questions are at the core of what it means to be human - both in our relationship with each other and with God. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfheca2cc1obod0u3b2ard5l28dvgpfdpptjjj3o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3j60ob4clh2bs) Today, I want to offer you that same experience by sending you [**a limited-edition DVD box set of Hillsdale's popular online course, "Western Heritage - From the Book of Genesis to John Locke,"**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zaqufr6q619k3plu1vbjbrj5gg7p50qqffljcpu0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3j60ob4clh2bs) as a token of our thanks for a generous contribution in support of Hillsdale's efforts to educate America.

I invite you to study the history of the "big questions" with my colleagues and me.

Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link: **[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-western-heritage-dvd](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfun8b0poarsh6fnkkhl71gk0l4rporodc1jg0lo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3j60ob4clh2bs)**

More than 2,000 people have already requested theirs, so make sure to get your set before they are all gone.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
---

Pro Life Update

clean_body: To deliver the PEOPLE’S message... “NEVER SURRENDER!” | | | | | Patriot, As you’re reading this note, I’m making my way to the Circuit Court of Appeals in Washington, D.C. – the belly of the beast – to fight for my rights as Crooked Joe and his Special Counsel of “war crimes prosecutors” are attempting to strip them from me. The last time I stepped foot in Washington, I faced the Deep State and Crooked Joe’s Third World regime as an innocent man to plead “NOT GUILTY” to their phony charges in this vicious witch hunt. And today, I will face them head on once more with a POWERFUL message on behalf of the more than 74 MILLION patriots who make up our beautiful movement... ....WE WILL NEVER,EVER**SURRENDEROUR COUNTRY TO TYRANNY! | | At the beginning of the new year, I emailed you a reminder that “saving our country in 2024 would not come easy.” But Patriot, nothing in life worth doing ever comes easy! So, when I look at the lengths that Crooked Joe and the Radical Democrats have gone to try and stop us, all it tells me is that we MUST keep pushing forward! They’ve wrongfully ARRESTED me four times, took a MUGSHOT of me, forced me off the campaign trail and into the courtroom for SHAM TRIALS, unlawfully REMOVED my name from the ballot, GAGGED and CENSORED me, are attempting to JAIL me for life as an innocent man, and are even seeking the “corporate death penalty” against me and my family. And despite all this, with YOU at my side, I’ve never been more confident that WE will prevail in our noble mission... just as we always have. Come November 5, WE THE PEOPLE will PROVE that good and honest Americans had the courage to peacefully cast off this Radical Democrat regime that is destroying our country once and for all and replace it with a government that serves and protects YOU. Thank you and God bless you, Donald J. The contrast between Democrats and Republicans couldn’t be clearer. Look at what each party does when they’re in power: **In Republican-controlled states,** extremists have free rein. Florida Republicans’ passed the Don’t Say Gay law to target LGBTQ+ youth. North Carolina Republicans used their supermajority to severely limit abortion rights.**The more power they have, the more hateful legislation they’ll pass.** **Democrats are doing the opposite.** In states like Michigan and Minnesota, Democratic trifectas _(that you helped elect!)_ safeguarded reproductive rights, fought for gun safety, and protected voting rights. **Democrats are protecting our democracy, and we need to keep it up.** [Will you chip in $10 to renew your official membership and join us in these fights?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuG0DIvBkTCI0Lr6bZYKgp3W54iBoNGewOEKGEza8zKPiQJZGRlS737Za6EZMhnKAuMiRqyQteApvHe7Wb_zShHzlwDKRqW_fs8vngUVPzHuwg20SIVvsCI_kjTp40B72V4TB901uJbjbLmpV1UZ8OZpcDLF5xhnWywJ5f2QW749L6z7fN6idnwxzxm_aMb3S_0JXrAallVfa2FR1G0dt3O04VI_eMnsUIz5cyOaonuet1WOet7eH68hPQJlD1IyyR1z6kGoJ0VrDTnFV7SGpBBmW82mIM8lkyJ_7oKz6TrzSl2CrDt7lT8VQZBbcD0tZ25zFNw9fWk43QDGTZogby9KOLYlzomsD82kE3ddpxnjwlakbIAR7gU4SalE0Yb_-CPz-44MVUz-BpkbjAQo1M/42u/tvinxK5-RRG8MxxiHQjHiw/h0/TCymtH8tgyFo-xCeGl2-JVooB4mJO5YmH986_pF7xOI) State-level races fly under the radar as Republican megadonors dump millions to maintain control. Fellow Conservative, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It’s a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden’s desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden’s to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it’s not just the FBI, it’s the Department of Justice as well. I just heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney’s offices in Brooklyn, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I’ve been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don’t have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con·spir·a·cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in “conspiracy theories” like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=036898a3415c4ee78c59fb7c32feca4c&_e=BGwNkC3m8GsyEBmAgSKp8o8acwX0O8GVSPDknp77jXoVpvYCS9KopcowsiMsz9DnwGE6aLQ792jwRUeCHlSGumMZ9EzOCkYR1R4pSfi_GalumsL10B3HVD5q7xgTczMXEjZvEtvL9m_pNsQJzQx4GdUpDAcwr0z-WJcBivjy5mZfE2myWTl4DF7nHg5g1lNBoC7VOCPdzXRxJhVsU1oDq-CapF4E-vc-be-ajZBZJhmjhvNGswqjF3YDJYikCVKAfIC_KM_9p4_4o9jt-vDy1pQ6-ecjJvx6Z7ScT-jjn3jriIVh0JcwuaaEd3JN29ACfFzIAImqQvIX51VcoLTKiivyGadNnw1BrUzVhh8mnayKHDCJtCqlEl--PxhH64pU)
---
It’s because they are complicit in the cover-up. I’ve said it before, and it’s more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I’ll be honest, it is brutal... but I’m a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what’s right, and who certainly doesn’t back down from a fight.**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=036898a3415c4ee78c59fb7c32feca4c&_e=BGwNkC3m8GsyEBmAgSKp8o8acwX0O8GVSPDknp77jXoVpvYCS9KopcowsiMsz9DnwGE6aLQ792jwRUeCHlSGumMZ9EzOCkYR1R4pSfi_GalumsL10B3HVD5q7xgTczMXEjZvEtvL9m_pNsQJzQx4GdUpDAcwr0z-WJcBivjy5mZfE2myWTl4DF7nHg5g1lNBoC7VOCPdzXRxJhVsU1oDq-CapF4E-vc-be-ajZBZJhkaJsUMavZ1ol2MfjeC9hwJHzlswkjbf8JghaIqERqIWadLUe3v2kwJ3Ogj_wJ8u0jTbqciMRgn5aldVeGFOtWgyc3oYCfgE-N-A2ya7uZ69RUOZiVwcvc3YjKKx5psyriiNNVZ29GedCmKg_yr4TBC)
---
I’ve only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I’m once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY.
As Theodore Roosevelt said “Nothing worth having is easy” and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, **it’s the promise of America to all of her citizens.**
[**If you’re with me, I’d be honored to have your support.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=036898a3415c4ee78c59fb7c32feca4c&_e=BGwNkC3m8GsyEBmAgSKp8o8acwX0O8GVSPDknp77jXoVpvYCS9KopcowsiMsz9DnwGE6aLQ792jwRUeCHlSGumMZ9EzOCkYR1R4pSfi_GalumsL10B3HVD5q7xgTczMXEjZvEtvL9m_pNsQJzQx4GdUpDAcwr0z-WJcBivjy5mZfE2myWTl4DF7nHg5g1lNBoC7VOCPdzXRxJhVsU1oDq-CapF4E-vc-be-ajZBZJhlkrCogg7rswYgNr_lNdYib0horvEtu1P7VH8edBMYeatp13nxnng21ir9aAXKrGjq9QULzgpZL6SuD0thBPSVMHr7Avm6R8EqVot_g-9WLSz-gPkTvYadMMwGhs6NihteIFuZmL5Fw4rtJWT4IIW_6)

Peter Willis, you’re
invited!

On Wednesday, Our Revolution will kick off the new year with our LIVE Call
to Fight the Filibuster and Save Democracy with Senator Jeff Merkley, U.S.
Rep. Barbara Lee, and progressive activists around the country!

Progressives are leading the fight for a government and an economy that
works for all of us — that means ending the racist relic of the filibuster
and delivering material change for people’s lives.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13140?source=email-20240109&t=1011&akid=5159%2E5885482%2E94Srfb ]RSVP now and we’ll send you a Zoom link to join the conversation
directly with Sen. Merkley, Rep. Lee and other special guests starting at
5:30 pm PT/8:30 ET!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13140?source=email-20240109&t=1012&akid=5159%2E5885482%2E94Srfb ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13140?source=email-20240109&t=1013&akid=5159%2E5885482%2E94Srfb ]RSVP

Senator Merkley and Rep. Lee are both champions for peace who have called
for a Ceasefire in Israel/Gaza, and now they are joining us to organize
with us to save democracy here at home in America.

We will delve into Sen. Merkley’s new book “Filibustered: How to Fix the
Broken Senate and Save America” — and offer signed copies for purchase at
a special price!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13140?source=email-20240109&t=1014&akid=5159%2E5885482%2E94Srfb ]Click here to make sure you get a reminder to tune in to the exciting
live event on Wednesday — and share it with your friends!

When we organize, we win.

name: Marissa Espinoza
subject: The Jim Gaughran I know
body:
https://jimgaughran.com/ [https://jimgaughran.com/]
Dear Peter,
I worked for Jim Gaughran when he was a State Senator. So I speak from personal experience when I say that Jim truly cares about the people he serves and never stops working to make our community a better place.
Jim has a long list of accomplishments. As Senator, he voted to protect my right to an abortion. He passed common sense gun safety laws, like keeping weapons of war off the streets and guns out of the hands of violent individuals. His opponent, Nick LaLota, is a right-wing extremist who votes in lock-step with the party bosses who want to take away reproductive rights and ignore the gun violence crisis plaguing our country.
That’s why I’m asking you to donate to Jim’s campaign for Congress today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jim-gaughran-4-congress]
This Congress is the most dysfunctional in our nation's history. They ousted the Speaker of the House and have done nothing to improve the lives of working class families like mine. Jim Gaughran knows how to work hard and get things done. When I worked for Jim, he called back every single constituent who called our office for help. He kept the office open when a tropical storm knocked power out of half of Long Island, so that even when our neighbors couldn't reach the power company for help, they could call Jim.
He has stood up for us. Now we need to stand with him - any little bit helps. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jim-gaughran-4-congress]
But more important than anything, Jim shows up. He knows that serving in Congress means showing up every day to deliver for our community, for our schools, for families and seniors, for protecting our climate, and for bringing funding back to the district. Jim is responsive to voters, he's accountable to the press, and he's the most honorable man I know.
Long Island doesn't need another anti-abortion, NRA sycophant in Congress. Long Island needs Jim Gaughran.
Will you please join me in sending Jim Gaughran to Congress by making a donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jim-gaughran-4-congress]
Sincerely,
Marissa Espinoza
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]

Gaughran for Congress
P.O. BOX 20574
HUNTINGTON STATION, NY 11746
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/f_vvu-FClEq9eRpIgw-bdQ2?unsubscribedata=wmr3GIaXdA8NkXEfEpQtD08lw8DDNgZqfN0EAAAD9eFHJhgy6Z291qbh4iI3%2BeKcP2ASzMju2NpemltaZZPuV1d%2BfCSg%2BpyYOoLBig3iRCu3319kBxC47DbUNLEcpNIWOfBRpRiBVBeGVFHeaz0SUThpoRhLQ1auGn%2BiDc67qglYk76C%2BjebjFz9dEXmu%2FvbAEBF0gIS%2F7V1COSQGjTsUdlRhaSV1rX3%2FIttUctSQUFsaaDiVCYth1dYZZKTU4j6eITAh%2F%2Bah3dYrmjwV88UY13wbLXJBdHojxiJSAEPyX9DwnstA6ViZQWK9CrA6ndvguBewk%2FFuqOSarexhP00QYq0qEv%2BKSaOL0qCwv%2F4jchRecpgfXVDTMjAUNTJ3zjlHXngqNf3K0A0x7DcP%2FQv9xaUkR94%2FCq4FHBVK%2FsT2eemVcaAJ7g6HlMMEQcFvEbv .

name: Greg Casar
subject: Texas is being sued…again.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG CASAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
The Justice Dept. is suing Greg Abbott over SB4
Peter,
**Once again, the state of Texas is being sued by the federal government for Greg Abbott’s extreme and unconstitutional crusade against immigrants and asylum seekers.**
Before the winter break, Greg Abbott signed SB4, a “show me your papers” bill allowing local law enforcement to arrest, detain, and ultimately deport asylum seekers before they’re even heard by federal immigration authorities.
It’s cruel. It’s dangerous. And importantly, it’s blatantly unconstitutional—which is why the Biden Department of Justice is suing the state of Texas once again.
The Supreme Court has affirmed many times that immigration enforcement authority lies with the federal government. Greg Abbott doesn’t have the right or authority to strip desperate immigrant families of their rights for his own extreme, far-right politics.
That’s why my colleagues and I urged the Biden Administration to block these laws in court before they’re enacted. Thankfully, the DOJ is now taking Greg Abbott to court—but we can’t let our foot off the gas.
****This fight is far from over. We must do everything in our power to fight back against Greg Abbott’s unconstitutional anti-immigrant attacks.**[**Can you chip in $10 to help Team Casar take on Greg Abbott and fight for a more humane, more effective immigration system?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76758169/448384161/-556462639?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDU5ZjIxZi0wN2FmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J-cl25jPP7eW4KmJrAm_RVcPL41iuOdsPwUnDOhFmX4=)**

name: Team Cori
subject: Coldwater Creek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Cori is a leader on protecting our communities from toxic waste in Congress, and she’s an environmental justice champion. | |
---
Peter, **** **** **** **** **** **Every single person deserves to live without having to worry about their water and air being contaminated.** And yet for decades, tens of thousands of people who have lived near Coldwater Creek in St. Louis have been affected by the toxic radioactive waste from the Manhattan project that’s polluted that river. **Last year, Cori Bush introduced the Justice for Jana Elementary Act of 2023, which would create a fund to clean up and test schools impacted by toxic radioactive waste from the government’s Manhattan Project.** Since even before being elected to office, Cori’s been committed to working with residents to clean up the life-threatening Manhattan Project Waste in St. Louis, and has been committed to continuing this work every day since. Cori won’t stop until all this waste is cleaned up for good and the individuals harmed by it are rightfully compensated. **** [**Can you donate today to support Cori in her effort to undo the dangerous effects of environmental racism that have impacted countless people of this country?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zrl7hAwtfC3RQ56zUloyYjed_Ld7Sd4Xzv79OEIgLsEmWBRviJmIQK4Boval6uAfMymZyE2Vw89RxXdIPXFG78d2DUD7MGuiS4gRLofuAEjtik4nNUwZyqwqeRZ4nCpYSizEtl9dACsQ8Gz7IRnichmTShW_tDRmS2TEs6oeBP-3G5bLmFZgEBoOEKQQpLftD1qSfWuPO6ZEmHI8W323gTgtJyelmXd372OktJC_RDNjIxnHdpXiMx4i3bdxNzdpRa2hBs7Sj6h3rh9p-1BlIu/42u/jUVztzXHSzCscXuiOMW55g/h0/MAaMQQ640BX6fTMGcAr8n2QdKjC57LUcmWIuovvrKF0) **[DONATE $5 TODAY >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zrl7hAwtfC3RQ56zUloyYjed_Ld7Sd4Xzv79OEIgLsEm6iyjX3iewuQMG0t8fpG-L7emDp4zLKkQ0wAMevRoXxYvfm8kaTAhDkP-F-fRiNn7qVtMxyzmC2wfpsI6R6ZBdVlQJpRRF4Z5kAASOCQhqSmVmpmGHCUGpM0_M6L1C7BCohDDUm00VUc9iIorG4QbWJZnSS8syua4i8CpReJYmNjqqyuBbEP6gh8JqNss46lSMiKFptAWVSfdn5qb3PcNMy5nPHRPGlZyU6l5Vj4kOB/42u/jUVztzXHSzCscXuiOMW55g/h1/wwM1k1WlOgUlS-1J37xPCmaKJciHaKlt-LgMO2ntvjA)** In St. Louis County, Coldwater Creek was a dumping ground for radioactive waste, increasing the risk of cancer for generations of people playing in the Creek. When Cori used to live near the Creek, her basement would regularly flood with potentially radioactive water. That toxic waste still endangers the community: A recent report found unsafe levels of radioactive waste in and around an elementary school that sits on the Creek. **Cori’s advocacy has secured a federal environmental review of Coldwater Creek** , which is especially urgent now that communities living near the Creek experience more frequent flooding due to climate change. **Cori is a leader on this important issue in Congress, and she’s an environmental justice champion.** Her bill to invest in marginalized frontline communities (the Environmental Justice Mapping and Data Collection Act) has been signed into law, and she’s continuing to lead transformative policies like the Green New Deal for Cities. clean_body: Cori is a leader on protecting our communities from toxic waste in Congress, and she’s an environmental justice champion. | | Peter, ** Every single person deserves to live without having to worry about their water and air being contaminated. And yet for decades, tens of thousands of people who have lived near Coldwater Creek in St. Louis have been affected by the toxic radioactive waste from the Manhattan project that’s polluted that river. Last year, Cori Bush introduced the Justice for Jana Elementary Act of 2023, which would create a fund to clean up and test schools impacted by toxic radioactive waste from the government’s Manhattan Project. Since even before being elected to office, Cori’s been committed to working with residents to clean up the life-threatening Manhattan Project Waste in St. Louis, and has been committed to continuing this work every day since. Cori won’t stop until all this waste is cleaned up for good and the individuals harmed by it are rightfully compensated. In St. Louis County, Coldwater Creek was a dumping ground for radioactive waste, increasing the risk of cancer for generations of people playing in the Creek. When Cori used to live near the Creek, her basement would regularly flood with potentially radioactive water. That toxic waste still endangers the community: A recent report found unsafe levels of radioactive waste in and around an elementary school that sits on the Creek. Cori’s advocacy has secured a federal environmental review of Coldwater Creek , which is especially urgent now that communities living near the Creek experience more frequent flooding due to climate change. Cori is a leader on this important issue in Congress, and she’s an environmental justice champion. Her bill to invest in marginalized frontline communities (the Environmental Justice Mapping and Data Collection Act) has been signed into law, and she’s continuing to lead transformative policies like the Green New Deal for Cities. She’s secured hundreds of millions of dollars for public transit infrastructure across the country, along with funding for federal climate action. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | In this together, Team Cori ** Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress | | Sent via . name: Team DeSantis
subject: Busy at 6 pm ET?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Tonight, Ron DeSantis will be the talk of the town at the FINAL town hall before the Iowa Caucus! All eyes will be on Fox News at 6 pm ET!
---
| | | | | | | | | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=abfb2c4c6b09d52c0054e0bafba7643e01f34a8e875f0ab5021d28c5237182ab6c94136bb9011b558c97e4df5b335d93c6dd6d8f1b187e71)
---
Hi friend, TONIGHT, Ron DeSantis will be on stage at the _final_ town hall before the Iowa Caucus.
---
| | | **🚨 TUNE IN 🚨** Watch the FINAL town hall before the Iowa Caucus on Fox News at 6 PM ET tonight! This is one of the most highly anticipated events of the race--don't miss out!
---
|
---
You CANNOT miss this, friend. Ron DeSantis will answer live questions from the audience, and every second will be**broadcast to the nation.****_This is our final chance for voters to get to know Ron DeSantis ahead of the most critical contest we've faced_.__ He needs your support before the night is out.** **_[Before he steps on stage, can we count on you to show your support by rushing in $5, $10, $25, or any other amount to help us surge forward to the Iowa Caucus? We have 6 days to raise the resources we need to WIN!](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=abfb2c4c6b09d52cdd0bc883edc52afcd8c15c80f98912ba588a992b870b9f38257a0ba7237b4b5d27f5bd36800dfc1d8d187822746c5605 "Before he steps on stage, can we count on you to show your support by rushing in $5, $10, $25, or any other amount to help us surge forward to the Iowa Caucus? We have 6 days to raise the resources we need to WIN!")[**__** ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=abfb2c4c6b09d52c2b032c2ad835f4acec1b3896b6fd79e6380913e8b166d42908055067cdaff0b33f47adea1c31c601d2270b671bacf4b9)_**
---
| | [DONATE TODAY](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=abfb2c4c6b09d52c0054e0bafba7643e01f34a8e875f0ab5021d28c5237182ab6c94136bb9011b558c97e4df5b335d93c6dd6d8f1b187e71)
---
Set your clock for 6:00 pm ET! This is sure to be an _incredible_ night. In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
| | | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=abfb2c4c6b09d52c0054e0bafba7643e01f34a8e875f0ab5021d28c5237182ab6c94136bb9011b558c97e4df5b335d93c6dd6d8f1b187e71)
---
| |
**🚨 ATTENTION 🚨** Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click **[here.](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=abfb2c4c6b09d52c982af72a45979d852e3fcf2c219d5d036488e38f9fcd576d2b700d1a2184a0e3ae572dd13a0a85924a85e745e112be82 "here.")**

---

**Volunteer!**
We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!
---
| | [Sign up here!](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=abfb2c4c6b09d52c5a7513c4ab9fceec094a1773651ea2ac8c0f29c72da02da1e77951f2c41d16dd807f04e48635773933bb67d85da458b9)
---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=abfb2c4c6b09d52c0054e0bafba7643e01f34a8e875f0ab5021d28c5237182ab6c94136bb9011b558c97e4df5b335d93c6dd6d8f1b187e71)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=abfb2c4c6b09d52c0054e0bafba7643e01f34a8e875f0ab5021d28c5237182ab6c94136bb9011b558c97e4df5b335d93c6dd6d8f1b187e71)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---
| Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
---
| This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President
PO Box 3696
Tallahassee, FL 32315
[Update Profile](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=af4ebf01283073743178971e5351778eac1e018f9864ab8e6bb0a16a96603e89061635ab9be8b253c3dff1bc8577af369d2a579c48009f4db4b44004b8b64f2b9076b750cfd59209) [Manage Subscriptions](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/subscription_center.aspx?qs=af4ebf0128307374640ef15043eecd734885490a052fa73f2ac574bdb127336fd4a589150e5d03c2d13a2779a59eb9a2b4adda84eeb7bddf1f6bec8f62fb37b1748d4c061fa6de45) [Unsubscribe](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=af4ebf0128307374640ef15043eecd734885490a052fa73f2ac574bdb127336f55bdceb77c3b6d2bb4ce9fcd9ee8454caa03fd2be6658c1039a39c937254797156edffe8e82bf24e)
