name: Dovid Efune | The New York Sun
subject: Now William Penn Statue To Be Torn Down
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
|
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-fLdKtygGUidcd67lg)
---
Dear Peter, **The Biden administration’s National Park Service will remove a statue of William Penn from a park at Philadelphia commemorating the founder of the state of Pennsylvania as part of an upcoming “rehabilitation” meant to make the park more “welcoming, accurate, and inclusive experience” for visitors, The New York Sun is reporting. **
---
[**Read for 1¢ →**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
It’s an important development, but you would be forgiven for not having seen this reported before. Too few media outlets have been covering the story. At The New York Sun we publish stories like this every day without blinking. Our purpose is to keep the American public informed on matters of vital importance to their wellbeing and the future of our country. We’re completely independent and serve no other agenda. We believe that many news outlets in this country have lost their way. It’s at the root of much of the rot we see in America today. If journalists aren’t doing their jobs, then politicians, government and corporate giants won’t be held to account. At the Sun, we’re committed to restoring American journalism to its finest traditions. We are almost completely funded by our readers and answer to no one but you. We know it won’t be easy. We’re up against some of the biggest corporations in the world. Our success depends on people like you. We need you to join us. **[For as little as 1c per day you can join the movement to save American journalism.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**
---

clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | | Dear Peter, The Biden administration’s National Park Service will remove a statue of William Penn from a park at Philadelphia commemorating the founder of the state of Pennsylvania as part of an upcoming “rehabilitation” meant to make the park more “welcoming, accurate, and inclusive experience” for visitors, The New York Sun is reporting. It’s an important development, but you would be forgiven for not having seen this reported before. Too few media outlets have been covering the story. At The New York Sun we publish stories like this every day without blinking. Our purpose is to keep the American public informed on matters of vital importance to their wellbeing and the future of our country. We’re completely independent and serve no other agenda. We believe that many news outlets in this country have lost their way. It’s at the root of much of the rot we see in America today. If journalists aren’t doing their jobs, then politicians, government and corporate giants won’t be held to account. At the Sun, we’re committed to restoring American journalism to its finest traditions. We are almost completely funded by our readers and answer to no one but you. We know it won’t be easy. name: Mark Meckler, Convention of States Action
subject: Border materials are baking in the desert
body:
| | |
---
Friend, Here’s the latest shocker: There are 20,822 border wall panels currently sitting in storage.
That’s no exaggeration.
On Biden's first day in office, his administration suspended wall construction at the southern border. The government suddenly abandoned everything, including contractors AND materials that the previous administration had organized.
Instead of assembling millions of dollars of supplies along the border, the **Department of Defense is paying a whopping $160,000 per month** to store over 20,000 panels, fiber optic cables, and lighting.
This waste must be _stopped_. Our border must be _secured_. American taxpayers must be _represented_. **[Friend, I’m asking you to please, right this second, simply sign the National Petition for an Article V convention to save America.](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJxckTGP3CAQhX8N7ryCYc_YhYtLnK0uTYpr0RhmvViAHcCxnF8f-bKJorQfT098bzCs3t2PnqlPDODhbGYATL4ygOn9x7x9g59fS52k7eovc3jj5yt8ZgDlWOlv9NlyoYDOn1QNle3Hl9Y0XUW9UPzaCiW4rB49da0y0sqmuyvBDXIUHMiSeBEWFFDleuBw5YJ3ouEtby9WGU5dR4ru2PIG2ZWHAwMlZzCuWJJbymVJU-X7Rylr_vjTjcHNLPkSN-NpyytOlC9mCQxuHqN1cWJwG5dkKdU7el_vmAvVwORtK0EHsm4LTA5PpeaEedmSISaHf6aJxuun_jNlMKzopsjk8Fuj5oK32ixZe5eLThQLej0mjFZH2rVZ1kOPyWGMqPM2zmSKBh1w_dO4xEKxMDlE4-v5oY7XcZdbZNDo6J1lcvgPfhxSDuP7rEzz3b5Vqbfr7rx3uVHsyqfT6pzjVwAAAP__7Kum1Q)**

While President Trump is at the D.C. Circuit Court today defending his rights from the Biden Special Counsel’s attacks, the President has tasked his HQ with an important assignment.
We are following up on all outstanding invitations to become a Founding Member of **THE PRESIDENT’S TRUST** – _established nearly 1 year ago to defend our movement from the never-ending witch hunts._
Over the course of a year, the Trust has proven to be a massive success, as we’ve fended off every last one of the Radical Democrats’ attacks to now be in the STRONGEST position of our entire campaign!
**But with the witch hunts accelerating in 2024, YOUR support through the President’s Trust has never been more critical than right now.**
_We saw that you were on the list of**PENDING** Founding Members who never accepted your place in the Trust in 2023, Friend... _
_However, President Trump directed us to say that if you didn’t accept because times are tough under Crooked Joe’s Third World regime, then please don’t even think about donating. He wants you to take care of your family and yourself first. He means it!_
But, if you were simply waiting for the election year – when Crooked Joe and the Left’s vicious attacks would no doubt reach their highest point – **then the President wants you to know that YOU are needed now more than ever.**
**_Our membership records in the Trust are permanently TIME-STAMPED with the exact date of acceptance._**
_So, if you accept today, your Founding Membership will always be recorded as the same day the President appeared in Court in the belly of the beast of Washington, D.C. to defend his rights from the Biden regime._
_**And upon acceptance, you will receive your very own Founding Membership Card as proof of your membership within the President’s inner circle of trusted defenders.**_

name: Wes Moore
subject: On the eve of the start of the legislative session
body:
For the next three months, I am laser-focused.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76762733/448395257/1666406465?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjIzMjMwOC0wYmFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cMmNMVDh2ZRCthu1gXVXoavtxieoEX05rQyVtLn4GSc=)
Friend, today is the last day we can accept contributions until April, and **[I am going to ask you to make a contribution right now to power our work through the next three months.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76762734/448395260/-1354668683?refcode=em20240109&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjIzMjMwOC0wYmFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cMmNMVDh2ZRCthu1gXVXoavtxieoEX05rQyVtLn4GSc=)** This fight for a better Maryland has shown me one thing: the resilience of Marylanders across the state. I am honored to join the cause to pass meaningful legislation that will have an actual impact on the everyday lives of all of us. On the day-to-day, most folks aren’t thinking about the petty Washington fights or the happenings of the state legislature. They are waking up every day to work, to spend time with their families, and to live their lives. My administration is laser-focused on making every day just a little bit easier. I won’t let extremists pass their agenda to get rid of our freedoms. I won’t let them make our lives harder when we should be doing the opposite. So as I head into my second legislative session, I am ready to get to work. But — with the fundraising freeze starting tomorrow, my team is working to make sure we have the resources we need for the next three months. Today is your last chance to make a contribution until April. **[If you’re ready to join the fight for a stronger Maryland, add a contribution right now to support our efforts. We’re shutting down all of our fundraising pages tonight, so don’t wait.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76762735/448395262/-1354668683?refcode=em20240109&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjIzMjMwOC0wYmFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cMmNMVDh2ZRCthu1gXVXoavtxieoEX05rQyVtLn4GSc=)** | **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76762736/448395264/-1354668683?refcode=em20240109&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjIzMjMwOC0wYmFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cMmNMVDh2ZRCthu1gXVXoavtxieoEX05rQyVtLn4GSc=)**

name: Dean Phillips
subject: Ending Homelessness and Making Housing Affordable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dean 24
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dean24-email?refcode=1.9.2024.housing&amount=24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dean24-email?refcode=1.9.2024.housing&amount=24]
Hi Friend,
Every night, hundreds of thousands of Americans experience homelessness in cities and suburbs across our nation . It’s a problem that’s not isolated to places like New York, San Francisco, or Los Angeles. It’s something I’ve seen on the ground in New Hampshire over the last few months, too.
But it’s not just that — millions more Americans are struggling to pay ballooning rents, and so many young people have given up on the American Dream of ever owning a home. As President, my priority is creating a more affordable America, and that can only happen if we address our housing crisis.
That’s why today I’m announcing my housing plan:
*
Building
7
million
new
homes
to
help
bolster
the
housing
supply
in
America.
*
Changing
zoning
laws
to
encourage
more
affordable
housing
in
the
areas
that
need
it
most.
*
Focusing
on
sustainable
housing
and
innovative
home
building
to
address
the
climate
needs
inherent
to
the
housing
market.
*
Increasing
access
to
financing
for
those
purchasing
a
home
and
providing
protections
for
renters
to
ensure
their
homes
remain
affordable.
*
Ensuring
all
veterans
have
access
to
homes
and
guaranteeing
mental
health
and
disability
support
for
all
Americans
who
need
it.
We’re the richest nation on Earth — we need to invest in Americans. Would you join us by chipping in $24 to make this vision a reality? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dean24-email?refcode=1.9.2024.housing&amount=24]
Want to learn more? Check out the full policy plan here [https://www.dean24.com/platform/end-our-housing-and-homelessness-crisis] .

clean_body: [] Hi Friend, Every night, hundreds of thousands of Americans experience homelessness in cities and suburbs across our nation . It’s a problem that’s not isolated to places like New York, San Francisco, or Los Angeles. It’s something I’ve seen on the ground in New Hampshire over the last few months, too. But it’s not just that — millions more Americans are struggling to pay ballooning rents, and so many young people have given up on the American Dream of ever owning a home. As President, my priority is creating a more affordable America, and that can only happen if we address our housing crisis. That’s why today I’m announcing my housing plan: Building 7 million new homes to help bolster the housing supply in America. Changing zoning laws to encourage more affordable housing in the areas that need it most. Focusing on sustainable housing and innovative home building to address the climate needs inherent to the housing market. Increasing access to financing for those purchasing a home and providing protections for renters to ensure their homes remain affordable. * Ensuring all veterans have access to homes and guaranteeing mental health and disability support for all Americans who need it. We’re the richest nation on Earth — we need to invest in Americans. Would you join us by chipping in $24 to make this vision a reality? [] Want to learn more? Check out the full policy plan here [] . name: Matt Gaetz
subject: I may not survive this
body:
This is your last chance

| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zaiejig5at0ak84m466o230aejs788fc40378du8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3j6ao76c5h2bs)
---
Friend, I just came back from the border, and I was shocked at what I saw.
Make no mistake: Joe Biden and the Democrats have ripped our border wide open so they can use the illegals invading our country as a tool for a total takeover of America.
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv76jsl213ibjk78de8eqpv189ogica40avdib68_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3j6ao76c5h2bs)
---
While Biden and his radical Democrat goons sit atop their pedestal in the Swamp and debate which ice cream flavor is the best, I’m fighting to make America better and safer for our citizens.
Because at this rate, **with OVER 300,000 illegal immigrants crossing the border just this month** , Americans could be the minority in our own country.
_**I’ve spent many years in Congress backing Trump and his secure-border, America-First policies, and I’m proud of that.**_
**However, amidst the Left’s full-on assault against me, I fell _thousands_ of dollars short of our most important goal to date.**
**[And if my campaign doesn’t meet that goal before the extended deadline the swamp-dwellers will have all the tools they need to take me out](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2r12ffe9gb9s513qogiibnocheg68gr02hushog_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3j6ao76c5h2bs).**
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhll80tsvu9ij46k7iferj2ii27bgre7mr0rsihg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3j6ao76c5h2bs)
---

---
With me being at the top of the Communist Democrats’ hit list, failing to meet this goal would be a huge setback for my campaign and a monumental win for the Left.
And we CANNOT afford to give them so much momentum at the start of this monumental election year. There is too much at stake.
**[So please, Friend, as a humble representative of you and the rest of the great citizens of the United States of America, I’m asking you to contribute anything you can](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl8el4l7a0716hok9kclr8nkq652hl6bvng065ro_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3j6ao76c5h2bs).**
Whether it be $50, $25, or even a small gift of $10, [any amount you can afford to give is absolutely crucial in helping me continue the good fight in Congress](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrpejnc9gnr4pbj0a6p6tojlimkvf25ekf1vnp9g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3j6ao76c5h2bs).
Unlike the Democrats in D.C., I take pride in the fact that I don’t rely on giant wads of cash being handed to me by lobbyists and dark money groups.
**I rely on the everyday, hard-working American like YOU.**
And I’m counting on you like never before.
There’s no time to waste. You have never let me down and I know you won’t now.
| [**STAND WITH GAETZ**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp35bhvosokpom6af01blkkp71g2tppo07obj39o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3j6ao76c5h2bs)

_Thanks for standing strong,_
Matt Gaetz

name: Samantha Donohue
subject: Preserve the values that form the bedrock of our society
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,In a world where the very foundations of justice, equality, and personhood are under threat, it's crucial for Catholics to stand up and make their voices heard. Your vote is not just a civic duty but a powerful tool to preserve the values that form the bedrock of our society.Are you concerned about the direction our nation is heading? Do you feel that your vote needs to be more informed by your Catholic faith? If so, you're not alone. At Belmont Abbey College, we understand the challenges you face, and we're here to help you navigate them.Introducing our new eBook, "Political Principles for Catholic Voters," based on the renowned course by Dr. Mary C. Imparato, Chair of Politics at Belmont Abbey College. This insightful resource will empower you to:
* Apply your faith to your civic responsibility
* Serve in civic life while upholding Christian values
* Understand the principles that make a law just or unjust
* Navigate living in an unjust society and discerning unjust laws

And much more...This FREE eBook is designed to equip you with the knowledge and understanding needed to make a difference in our political landscape while staying true to your Catholic beliefs.Ready to empower your vote and engage with the political process in a meaningful way? Simply complete the form below, and we'll send you your complimentary copy of "Political Principles for Catholic Voters."[https://resources.bac.edu/political-principles-for-catholic-voters-ebook/](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)Don't let your voice go unheard—join us in preserving the values that make our society strong and just.Thank you for being a beacon of faith in these challenging times. Catholic voters, go forth and let your voice be heard!Sincerely,

Samantha DonohueAssociate Vice President of Administration
Office of College RelationsBelmont Abbey College
---
__[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._XnrIIJAvFbNJWdkQ)
---
Faith & Liberty PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDA5LWI0N2VlNjRiNTkxNjRmZjk4OGU1NDg0YTQ5MDE2ZjZiIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/v9SMThxDBKx5h-ZWIvpOgQ) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Team Lizzie
subject: #TeamLizzie Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe240109wu?refcode=lpfe240109wu [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe240109wu?refcode=lpfe240109wu]
We’re eight weeks out from the Texas primary, but guess what—Texans will start casting their ballots even sooner than that! Early voting begins in just 42 days on February 20.
If you’re in Texas, you can find up-to-date voter information here [https://www.votetexas.gov/] . Make sure to make a plan to vote before the March 5 primary!
Our campaign is officially a go—we held our campaign kick-off this past weekend.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe240109wu?refcode=lpfe240109wu [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe240109wu?refcode=lpfe240109wu]
We’re not slowing down between now and the primary. We have phonebanks and postcard parties tonight, January 9, and this Thursday, January 11, followed by our next block walk this Saturday, January 13. [https://www.mobilize.us/mobilize/event/596441/]
We’re going to talk to as many voters as possible about the good work Lizzie is doing for our community in Congress and why it’s so important to send her back to the House. We hope you’ll join us.
Interested in joining this week or in the near future? You can sign up for volunteer opportunities here. [https://www.mobilize.us/fletcherforcongress/]
We recently shared a new round of Lizzie’s endorsements! In this latest slate, Lizzie received endorsements from:
House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries
House Democratic Whip Katherine Clark
House Democratic Caucus Chair Pete Aguilar
Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi
House Assistant Democratic Leader James E. Clyburn
Regional Leadership Council Chair and former Majority Leader Steny Hoyer
Harris County Judge Lina Hidalgo
Fort Bend County Judge KP George
The League of Conservation Voters
Texas Farm Bureau Federation
And more!
Check out all of the national and local endorsements Lizzie has received here [https://www.lizziefletcher.com/endorsements-2024/] , and if you haven’t already, add your name to our public list of #TeamLizzie supporters! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/QIiNuwnGsEuMQ1AHz7BriA2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/QIiNuwnGsEuMQ1AHz7BriA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/QIiNuwnGsEuMQ1AHz7BriA2]
Now it’s time for yard signs, and they are popping up all over TX-07. In TX07? Get your yard sign here! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lfcyardsign24]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lfcyardsign24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lfcyardsign24]
Thank you for being a part of the team,
Team Lizzie
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe240109wu?refcode=lpfe240109wu]
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Lizzie Fletcher for Congress
3262 Westheimer Road, PMB 636
Houston, TX 77098
United States

| Team,

In case you missed it: We have set the aspirational goal of collecting**60,000 voter registration forms.**

We are setting our sights high _(MORE THAN TRIPLING work accomplished in 2023)_ because this year is not just a presidential year. This year has the potential to reshape Pennsylvania from the ground up. We cannot afford to take any chances.

* Presidential election
* U.S. Senator Bob Casey up for re-election
* Congressional seats
* **_Entire_** PA House up for re-election
* **_Half_** PA Senate up for re-election
* Row offices: Treasurer, Auditor, Attorney General

**There is a LOT at stake up and down the ballot, and _with the presidential primary election in PA taking place in April_ , we only have a few months to mobilize and persuade the Democratic electorate to turn out to vote.**

subject: Did you miss me on Newsmax?
body:
|
---
| | Hey Peter - did you catch my _**live TV interview**_ on Newsmax yesterday?

We discussed Biden's border crisis and the Democrats' insane plan to give free healthcare to illegal immigrants.

You can check out the interview at the link below.

[**Check out the interview when you have a moment ... and then please chip in whatever you can to our campaign to help us push forward in the final weeks!**](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=e373b0c357&e=86e91e802d)

---
| [WATCH NEWSMAX INTERVIEW](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=180a05618b&e=86e91e802d "WATCH NEWSMAX INTERVIEW")
---
| [ ](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=cb1c1f1286&e=86e91e802d)
---
| Securing our southern border has to be Washington's top priority. Anyone who isn't doing everything they can to tackle this issue simply isn't serious.

And don't even get me started on free health care for illegal immigrants when our state budget is already billions of dollars in deficit!

_**These are serious, urgent challenges. We need serious, urgent leaders who are ready to fight for solutions.**_

We have the momentum in this race, Peter. I'm out on the campaign trail every day giving everything I've got.

I hope you're standing with me. Thank you,

Max Ukropina

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: These questions are at the core of what it means to be human
body:
Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate.

| | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e7de79afb0bc4c7f9b2e22246ae1943d&_e=s09WQlrgmnFpoXLmpntPiFA93vQy-Jpa_Ri0nz6gV70EgjGfBk80KpPuMAfPOtkuNlfR9h2v8IBjIGyNbSTVfiYxA9i2DoYin8OScHGintyz-Fj6lIy8XFaqs6X1nOTF2GJz67oHA_SoLM96o_CvczqsC5nQkYdjgcPQsU7K-JygRAYKvPmucY57qT3LeAfVBSH2lDvP4atPeBU_sg-dJJEm70wsyg65SpvC_1QK6_vZU5Y-CO8H4px3Yp-6hXNhMzMOUyHnJ-WRoMU2cbMu9tGoKd8YoEnkbR6JI0w2p8X4sJnsl4H8Uhqz7n4wKmXVHC7toQdyIXTGtQjoy_xi0nb878vVoA8yAL8MrHAnfqUS17sw8BECBfq_y9ChRIOm4zviJNvzuhxz9KG-2wXhySd35mcBm9MFEHdArSGkdr4%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate. And every academic year, I'm reminded of the joy it is to pursue the answers to questions like "_Does God exist? Can we know God?_ " with my students.

These questions are at the core of what it means to be human - both in our relationship with each other and with God. [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e7de79afb0bc4c7f9b2e22246ae1943d&_e=s09WQlrgmnFpoXLmpntPiFA93vQy-Jpa_Ri0nz6gV70EgjGfBk80KpPuMAfPOtkuNlfR9h2v8IBjIGyNbSTVfiYxA9i2DoYin8OScHGintyz-Fj6lIy8XFaqs6X1nOTF2GJz67oHA_SoLM96o_CvczqsC5nQkYdjgcPQsU7K-JygRAYKvPmucY57qT3LeAfVBSH2lDvP4atPeBU_sg-dJJEm70wsyg65SpvC_1QK6_vZU5Y-CO8H4px3Yp-6hXNhMzMOUyHnJ-WRoMU2cbMu9qUTi6Orb-bvAA88ernNEqOUqIP_otKhZN5s2sxHJ9HdXAROC4j_bE2M_14gh0ETMHWgUKyAy_lD3n9raVGnPVBPlcUjozUNgwij-XApUNnubEdq08rhW4tq6CFzpjlbdMfC-HfW02OsYur__ElXcYc%3D) Today, I want to offer you that same experience by sending you [**a limited-edition DVD box set of Hillsdale's popular online course, "Western Heritage - From the Book of Genesis to John Locke,"**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e7de79afb0bc4c7f9b2e22246ae1943d&_e=s09WQlrgmnFpoXLmpntPiFA93vQy-Jpa_Ri0nz6gV70EgjGfBk80KpPuMAfPOtkuNlfR9h2v8IBjIGyNbSTVfiYxA9i2DoYin8OScHGintyz-Fj6lIy8XFaqs6X1nOTF2GJz67oHA_SoLM96o_CvczqsC5nQkYdjgcPQsU7K-JygRAYKvPmucY57qT3LeAfVBSH2lDvP4atPeBU_sg-dJJEm70wsyg65SpvC_1QK6_vZU5Y-CO8H4px3Yp-6hXNhMzMOUyHnJ-WRoMU2cbMu9tuVluyPYrvYbJkk0TM2leeMLu0Pu7w_Q4IKe9-6VINODQSP762FLVU3dkitbmp3VVQTDL1HfDlvk4LCdJcnCxwy1D2DayaxA4hKa5mlmKTEzTMepUyf_EQ9ZB3d6aFFFjDzaoAFhA55gt0cbLLAFtc%3D) as a token of our thanks for a generous contribution in support of Hillsdale's efforts to educate America.

I invite you to study the history of the "big questions" with my colleagues and me.

Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link: **[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-western-heritage-dvd](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e7de79afb0bc4c7f9b2e22246ae1943d&_e=s09WQlrgmnFpoXLmpntPiFA93vQy-Jpa_Ri0nz6gV70EgjGfBk80KpPuMAfPOtkuNlfR9h2v8IBjIGyNbSTVfiYxA9i2DoYin8OScHGintyz-Fj6lIy8XFaqs6X1nOTF2GJz67oHA_SoLM96o_CvczqsC5nQkYdjgcPQsU7K-JygRAYKvPmucY57qT3LeAfVBSH2lDvP4atPeBU_sg-dJJEm70wsyg65SpvC_1QK6_vZU5Y-CO8H4px3Yp-6hXNhMzMOUyHnJ-WRoMU2cbMu9kbZGyjAZ95UYQVBojYlPVqDFCHYe3d0aERxtrZiV9BkJJw7efUzWFwllhDfrMcfE0XDAH48qs2ZuF9DhDfXYUs9d9p6ZoUzDSz4T0vL0wpnhc1zO8gZ-yWr2MRHTjIedy5VLRPgLpSqmRlBAhFfAeY%3D)**

More than 2,000 people have already requested theirs, so make sure to get your set before they are all gone.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
---

Defend the Constitution
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

body:
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76766076/448405000/18334046?refcode=UTS_EN_90DO_240109_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE0NjRhY2NiLTEwYWYtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AP2PCHwGWf34NW5z1BsqCXBtp1PArr_HEjgsnrNH_tQ=)
Peter,
I was recently visiting with my 95-year old father (his name is Ed, and he lives in sunny Boca Raton, so he is known as BocaEddy) and he reminded me about a photo that — well I just _had_ to share it with you.
Here you go. Me at 13, in all my “glory” at my Bar Mitzvah:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76766081/448405010/443154033?amount=3&refcode=UTS_EN_90DO_240109_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE0NjRhY2NiLTEwYWYtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AP2PCHwGWf34NW5z1BsqCXBtp1PArr_HEjgsnrNH_tQ=)
I’ll admit, it’s easy to chuckle at this photo — the classic 1970s bow tie, the braces, the yarmulke, the looks — but it is also an opportunity to tell you a little about how I approach my faith.
Throughout my career in public service, I’ve thought a lot about the Jewish tradition of “Tikkun Olam,” or repairing the world. And over the last few years, there has been a lot that was broken, and a lot to fix. It’s been my cause.
[_**Before I go any further, and while I still have your attention, I have to ask — will you click this link and pitch in a few dollars to split between Upset the Setup my campaign? If you are not ready yet or need more convincing, please read on. I have lots to share and more to say. I think you’ll like it.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76766092/448405017/443154033?amount=3&refcode=UTS_EN_90DO_240109_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE0NjRhY2NiLTEwYWYtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AP2PCHwGWf34NW5z1BsqCXBtp1PArr_HEjgsnrNH_tQ=)

---
I want to take you back to 1973. Our family moved around a lot because my father was in the “schmata” business. He started as a traveling salesman, and later worked as a regional manager for a men’s clothing company.
We moved from Massachusetts where I was born, lived a few years in Arizona, and ended up in the Bay Area. It was there where my dad got out of the clothing business and bought a lumber yard, where I worked during the summers. There’s nothing like hauling sheets of plywood and roofing, and shoveling concrete to make you want to go to graduate school.
This photo was taken when my family was a member of Temple Isaiah in Lafayette, California, a reform synagogue we joined after moving to the Bay Area. And it came after months of practicing for my Bar Mitzvah. I even taped my practice sessions on our tape recorder (I have a copy of that tape somewhere, believe it or not, voice cracking and all.)
While the Hebrew language skills I quickly acquired were just as quickly lost, the lessons that my faith taught me endure and guide me to this day.
**In fact, my favorite passage comes from Micah: What is required of us, but to do justice, to love mercy, and to walk humbly with thy God.**
These principles have guided my work in Congress. They have led me to pursue criminal justice reform, to make housing the homeless a key priority, to attack discrimination, and to ensure the rule of law is applied equally. They have also guided my path as I held accountable and stood up to the most unscrupulous man to ever occupy the Oval Office.
And they guide me in the fight we face today: repairing and rebuilding our democracy so that we leave it better for my children and yours.
That’s why I put everything I have into my work in Congress and for the cause of our democracy. It’s the first thing I think about when I wake up in the morning, and I don’t rest until I’ve done all I can for the day.
[_**If these priorities resonate with you, I’m asking for your help to continue that work by chipping in $3 to split between Upset the Setup and my campaign.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76766126/448405108/443154033?amount=3&refcode=UTS_EN_90DO_240109_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE0NjRhY2NiLTEwYWYtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AP2PCHwGWf34NW5z1BsqCXBtp1PArr_HEjgsnrNH_tQ=)

clean_body: = Peter, I was recently visiting with my 95-year old father (his name is Ed, and he lives in sunny Boca Raton, so he is known as BocaEddy) and he reminded me about a photo that — well I just had to share it with you. Here you go. Me at 13, in all my “glory” at my Bar Mitzvah: = I’ll admit, it’s easy to chuckle at this photo — the classic 1970s bow tie, the braces, the yarmulke, the looks — but it is also an opportunity to tell you a little about how I approach my faith. Throughout my career in public service, I’ve thought a lot about the Jewish tradition of “Tikkun Olam,” or repairing the world. And over the last few years, there has been a lot that was broken, and a lot to fix. It’s been my cause. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = I want to take you back to 1973. Our family moved around a lot because my father was in the “schmata” business. He started as a traveling salesman, and later worked as a regional manager for a men’s clothing company. We moved from Massachusetts where I was born, lived a few years in Arizona, and ended up in the Bay Area. It was there where my dad got out of the clothing business and bought a lumber yard, where I worked during the summers. There’s nothing like hauling sheets of plywood and roofing, and shoveling concrete to make you want to go to graduate school. This photo was taken when my family was a member of Temple Isaiah in Lafayette, California, a reform synagogue we joined after moving to the Bay Area. And it came after months of practicing for my Bar Mitzvah. I even taped my practice sessions on our tape recorder (I have a copy of that tape somewhere, believe it or not, voice cracking and all.) While the Hebrew language skills I quickly acquired were just as quickly lost, the lessons that my faith taught me endure and guide me to this day. In fact, my favorite passage comes from Micah: What is required of us, but to do justice, to love mercy, and to walk humbly with thy God. These principles have guided my work in Congress. They have led me to pursue criminal justice reform, to make housing the homeless a key priority, to attack discrimination, and to ensure the rule of law is applied equally. They have also guided my path as I held accountable and stood up to the most unscrupulous man to ever occupy the Oval Office. And they guide me in the fight we face today: repairing and rebuilding our democracy so that we leave it better for my children and yours. That’s why I put everything I have into my work in Congress and for the cause of our democracy. It’s the first thing I think about when I wake up in the morning, and I don’t rest until I’ve done all I can for the day. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Hopefully, this photo helped brighten your day and gave you a bit more insight into why I have dedicated my life to this cause. Shalom. name: Matt Gaetz
subject: I may not survive this
body:
This is your last chance

| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zaeruurlfnvgsbcdbon0e28ga1a2hjep072frd0o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3j6eor1c9h2bs)
---
Friend, I just came back from the border, and I was shocked at what I saw.
Make no mistake: Joe Biden and the Democrats have ripped our border wide open so they can use the illegals invading our country as a tool for a total takeover of America.
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z07q4md642sojernulat50sj7to1i103cdaergn8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3j6eor1c9h2bs)
---
While Biden and his radical Democrat goons sit atop their pedestal in the Swamp and debate which ice cream flavor is the best, I’m fighting to make America better and safer for our citizens.
Because at this rate, **with OVER 300,000 illegal immigrants crossing the border just this month** , Americans could be the minority in our own country.
_**I’ve spent many years in Congress backing Trump and his secure-border, America-First policies, and I’m proud of that.**_
**However, amidst the Left’s full-on assault against me, I fell _thousands_ of dollars short of our most important goal to date.**
**[And if my campaign doesn’t meet that goal before the extended deadline the swamp-dwellers will have all the tools they need to take me out](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z39ruo24l6auqqdrqedb2jt0qa7c188p7pt0vu4o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3j6eor1c9h2bs).**
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdkftulasbacpj0su97grcr5uk7v9elbfoslig3o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3j6eor1c9h2bs)
---
| [**STAND WITH GAETZ**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3djr2cvh8q00f6ind66g3bjf3kee9ot4tujgqig_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3j6eor1c9h2bs)
---
With me being at the top of the Communist Democrats’ hit list, failing to meet this goal would be a huge setback for my campaign and a monumental win for the Left.
And we CANNOT afford to give them so much momentum at the start of this monumental election year. There is too much at stake.
**[So please, Friend, as a humble representative of you and the rest of the great citizens of the United States of America, I’m asking you to contribute anything you can](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfpu004n32ff3v992fb44inkeeu7q6a1jiauupco_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3j6eor1c9h2bs).**
Whether it be $50, $25, or even a small gift of $10, [any amount you can afford to give is absolutely crucial in helping me continue the good fight in Congress](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zabrf177gqbqhcqq6anrd81q9ujscqmth39a3aag_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3j6eor1c9h2bs).
Unlike the Democrats in D.C., I take pride in the fact that I don’t rely on giant wads of cash being handed to me by lobbyists and dark money groups.
**I rely on the everyday, hard-working American like YOU.**
And I’m counting on you like never before.
There’s no time to waste. You have never let me down and I know you won’t now.
| [**STAND WITH GAETZ**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfrg6n1hl5ftapo97rg8ksdhlc8b51u49akpu4pg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3j6eor1c9h2bs)
---
_Thanks for standing strong,_
Matt Gaetz
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0quftjne1rad0saf0deij7mmkje2vqgs5v6agj0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3j6eor1c9h2bs)
---
| | |
---
| |
---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8jf1hs6ldscanoos7qr1er8jcmgarv7ctbp660o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8oj2cdgm1or246h22sh2s8i6eo31c3j6eor1c9h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zml7uf3fm7lu67f6ersn2ap04dt78vlr1k2q6nkg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3j6eor1c9h2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z37492er7b079s6n7q5nsfeq1ufp0gfkomlgrjk0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr0c5gecpr3c5h649fg)

Trump Advisor Roger Stone Endorses Elizabeth Helgelien for Congress | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c36064067311/roger-stone-endorses-elizabeth-helgelien?e=54a81bd33c)
---
| | [ ](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=27699cff34&e=54a81bd33c)

| | I've got some exciting news that I just couldn't wait to share with you! Roger Stone, a true patriot and a cornerstone in the conservative movement, has given us his support. [That's right, he's endorsing our campaign for Nevada's 3rd Congressional District!](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=1a892623c8&e=54a81bd33c)

Here's what Roger Stone personally said about our fight:
---
| _"Today, I'm endorsing my friend Elizabeth Helgelien for U.S. Congress in Nevada’s 3rd district, a fearless advocate for President Trump's America First agenda. Elizabeth stands strong for a secure border, economic growth, and our constitutional rights. She's the leader we need to continue President Trump's legacy and take on Washington's establishment, the DC Swamp. Join me in supporting a true patriot, a proven America First Conservative. Vote Elizabeth Helgelien for Congress and send President Trump the reinforcements he needs.

P.S. if I could add to Stone’s Rules I’d add:[ #141 Support Elizabeth Helgelien.](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=d01f77c831&e=54a81bd33c)"_
---
| This endorsement is huge for us! It's not every day you get a nod from someone who's been in the trenches, fighting the good fight for as long as Roger has. It's a real morale booster and tells us we're on the right track.

---
|
---
| [JOIN ROGER STONE AND SUPPORT ELIZABETH FOR CONGRESS](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=6758f35f22&e=54a81bd33c "JOIN ROGER STONE AND SUPPORT ELIZABETH FOR CONGRESS")
---

---
Roger Stone has endorsed Elizabeth Helgelien for Congress!
| But as you know, a nod from Roger Stone isn't where this ends; and with patriots like Roger Stone, Paul Gosar, Joe Arpaio, Mike Flynn. We've got to take this momentum and run with it. [Your support](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=7b6da44933&e=54a81bd33c), whether it's spreading the word, [volunteering,](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=c97e664f9f&e=54a81bd33c) or [chipping in a few bucks](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=24967a37f3&e=54a81bd33c), is what's going to take us across the finish line.

Let's show the establishment that when we say "America First," we mean it. Let's rally behind this endorsement and push forward with everything we've got. With Roger in our corner and an incredible team like you, I know we can make waves this election.

Thanks for being part of this journey. Your energy and commitment are what make this campaign so special. Let's do this!

---
| For America,

By adding a spouse, you are making a joint contribution to be attributed evenly between you and your spouse.

name: Rob Flaherty
subject: State of the race (three things to know)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Republicans are spending millions to attack Joe and Kamala on the airwaves. They’re trying to reach undecided and swing voters before we do. | | |
---
Peter, there are three things you need to know about the state of the race:
1\. Democracy is on the line. Period. As the President said last week: We all know who Donald Trump is. The question in this election is “who are we?” 2\. Republicans have a lot of money. They’re spending millions to attack the President and Vice President on air right now. They’re trying to reach the voters we need to win before we do. **3\. The campaign went out last week with our first TV ad of 2024, helping to get the word out about the stakes in this election. But, I’ll be transparent with you: spending this early ain’t cheap. And that’s why we need your help.**
The President and Vice President wake up every day, fighting to protect and expand our fundamental rights. And if we lose, Republicans will be lined up to take them away. We’ve got to hit the ground running this year, and that means we need your help to start strong. [**Will you chip in now to help keep our TV ads on the air, reelect Joe and Kamala, and defend the White House from MAGA extremism? There’s never been a better time to make your first $25 donation. They’re trying to reach undecided and swing voters before we do. | | | Peter, there are three things you need to know about the state of the race: 1\. Democracy is on the line. Period. As the President said last week: We all know who Donald Trump is. The question in this election is “who are we?” 2\. Republicans have a lot of money. They’re spending millions to attack the President and Vice President on air right now. They’re trying to reach the voters we need to win before we do. 3\. The campaign went out last week with our first TV ad of 2024, helping to get the word out about the stakes in this election. But, I’ll be transparent with you: spending this early ain’t cheap. And that’s why we need your help. The President and Vice President wake up every day, fighting to protect and expand our fundamental rights. And if we lose, Republicans will be lined up to take them away. I’ve left the D.C. Courthouse...
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGP2yAQhX8NvtmCwYB98GFTGlWKtFKrVt2eIgqTZLYGuzautf--Isru9XtP6H2Mi_NIl7eBmQMDuFFYGQCTTwzg1B5envXp58nWp8Ofl9pq1e4lhU8MIL_N-FF9vNJgdDQWamwVBvAdeF_hIAxvO-C6M9VtkEqEvhNGcejVReIFnNZdJ3opVe-4rGgADi0XvBdGGAUNduBNq_qgBWgNhrV8p9SEKbkxvOZli3Pjp1iNwy3neb1POjI4rui3BZud0oKhNApz_7B2ERfyrn6dKOX6sqWwOFopXWs_xUg5IzI4UkbOMbRBOW2EAKEkk8ctx3PEQFtk0j58dYHrtC0embSezu7BvIuzo2ti0r47vSdTypgyk1Zw03cM9DmNFJi0cfs8f3v68uP77zu8n0Ta51_zV7J_VaiWIcw7jSOtuvzEtUwocv8DAAD__2Z8i6U)

Friend,
I just left the D.C. Courthouse after defending my rights that are under attack by the Biden Special Counsel.
But I was honestly far more outraged when I learned about this attack on _you_ ...
_**...A new report shows that Crooked Joe Biden’s prosecutor Jack Smith spent $7.4 MILLION of YOUR taxpayer money just between April and September alone.**_
The next time you look at your grocery bill, the next time you see a clip of our unsecured southern border getting invaded, remember that Biden’s accomplices are lighting your precious money on fire to try and JAIL their opponent and remain in power.
This is why I could NEVER SURRENDER this battle _no matter what_.
Biden and his left-wing accomplices simply do not care about the United States. They do not care about improving the lives of _our_ citizens. They’d sell out America in a heartbeat to make a quick buck.
But I LOVE America. And I will NEVER, _EVER_ let these sick and twisted people destroy the greatest country in history.
If you’re with me, I ask that you make a contribution on this dark day before I board Trump Force One to depart the Swamp and ensure victory in the FIRST election of 2024 less than 1 week from today.
**[Please make a contribution to wrap up the primary ASAP and focus 100% of our attention on the _REAL_ mission: winning back the White House and saving America from the crooks who seek to destroy her!](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAQhX-NuYHssbHhwGFTi0vUlVqp6vYUee1JMltsKJii9NdXRMlev_dkvc_j4jTQ-dYxc2AAVwoLA2DyhQEc1eHtVR9_Hm15PPx-K62u1ban8IUB5NuEn9XHKxVGR8NOjS1CB74B7wvshOGqAa4bU1w7BNGczXvNz6iwaYV_l1r7tvYGuBLSFNQBB8UFb4URpoYKG_BG1W3QArQGwxTfKFVhTG4IH3le41T5MRZDd815Wu6Tegb9gn6dsdoozRj2xs7cXyxdxJm8Kz9GSrk8rynMjhZKl9KPMVLOiAx6ysg5BhVqp40QIGrJZL_meIoYaI1M2oev3uEyrrNHJq2nk3sw7-Lk6JKYtE-nZzKmjCkzaQU3bcNAn9JAgUn774e-vXztr9_9Hd5PIu3rr-kb2T91KOYuTBsNAy16_4nLPmGX-x8AAP__WOOMUQ)**

name: Jon Lovett
subject: Great sandwiches and mean people
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Nowhere is more important than PA.
Hi Peter, it’s Jon Lovett. I love Pennsylvania.
It’s home to Philly, the city that dares to ask the question: what’s the opposite of Southern hospitality?
One thing I learned about myself by visiting the Commonwealth is that I don’t care how you treat me, as long as the sandwiches are good, and you’ve got the best sandwiches in the country. (Cry about it, Chicago.)
Pennsylvania is also home to Bob Casey, who’s facing a tough re-election.
The senior Senator is up against David McCormick, an out-of-towner rich guy (PA Republicans sure do have a type) who supports extreme abortion bans with no exceptions for rape or incest.
This guy could self-fund this race and has a bunch of right-wing money hanging over the race like a piano on a fraying string. Republicans could spend _hundreds of millions of dollars_ in PA to flip this seat red.
[**That’s why I’m doing one of these classic emails asking you to chip in a few dollars to support Senator Bob Casey’s re-election campaign, because we need to do everything we can to help him win.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240109-1?refcode=em20240109-1&refcode2=1645_552475_6kM5Is&akid=1645%2E552475%2E6kM5Is)
We all know that Pennsylvania will be a top presidential battleground this year. It’s part of both Democrats’ and Republicans’ paths to victories.
**That puts an even bigger spotlight on this Senate race, where Mitch McConnell and national Republicans are all in for the mega-millionaire hedge fund exec (that’s McCormick, who I mentioned earlier).**
[**This is going to be a tough race, and we just can’t afford to lose this seat. Can you chip in to Bob’s campaign today? Every dollar counts!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240109-1?refcode=em20240109-1&refcode2=1645_552475_6kM5Is&akid=1645%2E552475%2E6kM5Is)
**[Donate to help re-elect Bob Casey ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240109-1?refcode=em20240109-1&refcode2=1645_552475_6kM5Is&akid=1645%2E552475%2E6kM5Is)**
This race could determine the Senate majority. _We have to win._
Thanks for the sandwiches,
Jon Lovett
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240109-1?refcode=em20240109-1&refcode2=1645_552475_6kM5Is&akid=1645%2E552475%2E6kM5Is)
Co-host of Pod Save America
Former Speechwriter to President Obama

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1645%2E552475%2E6kM5Is)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)

Friends,
2024 has just gotten under way and we have big plans for the State Freedom Caucus Network this year.
And we are so excited to open 2024 by announcing that we have officially helped launch the Missouri Freedom Caucus (MOFC).
The MOFC's eleven founding members, along with myself, gathered at the First Missouri Capitol in St. Charles on Friday morning to officially announce their formation.
We were also honored to be joined by Congressman Eric Burlison, the only member of the House Freedom Caucus in DC from Missouri.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/62946aa5-a3d1-47f2-a944-9212ad8a30f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Former MO Speaker of the House Tim Jones will serve as our Missouri State Director and the caucus will be chaired by Sen. Rick Brattin with Rep. Justin Sparks as Vice Chair.
The Show-Me State represents yet another deep red area of the country with elected leaders who claim to be conservative while working against the interests of their voters.
For too long, the Uniparty in Jefferson City has been in control. Republicans and Democrats have come together to push bloated budgets and work against the interests of their state, while telling conservatives to sit down and shut up.
Well, Missourians can now rest assure that conservative help is on the way. The MOFC will fight back against the institutional rot in their legislature and deliver victories for their constituents. As Chairman Brattin [said](https://substack.com/redirect/67593ee5-7061-4811-8cec-344a40f25899?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on the opening day of the legislature last week "peace is no option."
Even before they launched, they publicly got the Uniparty to agree to make school choice a priority this year. And the most ambitious universal school choice bill is sponsored by MOFC members!
You can follow the MOFC on Substack at [MO Freedom Caucus](https://open.substack.com/users/189539842-mo-freedom-caucus?utm_source=mentions) and their Twitter account is [here](https://substack.com/redirect/4c1b44a2-c53a-41e4-b979-27ac802dabaa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b6427331-e218-42de-88b7-24457b17cf0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
With many of our state legislatures beginning to gavel in, we're locked and loaded for a big 2024.
The launch in Missouri is only the beginning.
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/34ae69fb-db65-41c5-953c-ae964e45f889?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_
P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a [contribution](https://substack.com/redirect/b698edbb-2ad3-4ced-a7dc-ab6c6e92ade9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.

clean_body: Our 11th State Freedom Caucus | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Our 11th State Freedom Caucus | | | Jan 9 | | | | | | | | Friends, 2024 has just gotten under way and we have big plans for the State Freedom Caucus Network this year. And we are so excited to open 2024 by announcing that we have officially helped launch the Missouri Freedom Caucus (MOFC). The MOFC's eleven founding members, along with myself, gathered at the First Missouri Capitol in St. Charles on Friday morning to officially announce their formation. We were also honored to be joined by Congressman Eric Burlison, the only member of the House Freedom Caucus in DC from Missouri. | | ---|---|--- Former MO Speaker of the House Tim Jones will serve as our Missouri State Director and the caucus will be chaired by Sen. Rick Brattin with Rep. Justin Sparks as Vice Chair. The Show-Me State represents yet another deep red area of the country with elected leaders who claim to be conservative while working against the interests of their voters. For too long, the Uniparty in Jefferson City has been in control. Republicans and Democrats have come together to push bloated budgets and work against the interests of their state, while telling conservatives to sit down and shut up. Well, Missourians can now rest assure that conservative help is on the way. The MOFC will fight back against the institutional rot in their legislature and deliver victories for their constituents. As Chairman Brattin on the opening day of the legislature last week "peace is no option." Even before they launched, they publicly got the Uniparty to agree to make school choice a priority this year. And the most ambitious universal school choice bill is sponsored by MOFC members! You can follow the MOFC on Substack at and their Twitter account is . | | ---|---|--- With many of our state legislatures beginning to gavel in, we're locked and loaded for a big 2024. The launch in Missouri is only the beginning. Keep fighting, Andy Roth President State Freedom Caucus Network P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty. body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2024-fr-january?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2024-fr-january?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25]
Team, for years, many Americans (including us) have been fighting to receive immunity from the MAGA chaos.

But now, the source of the MAGA disease, Donald Trump, is the one who claims that HE needs immunity.

Friend, just yesterday, Trump claimed he would call for the dismissal of the Georgia election interference case because he has “presidential immunity.”

This bluff from our former insurrection-inciting president joins his two other claims of immunity that will be heard by the U.S. Circuit Court of Appeals. So ahead of Trump's appearance at the appeals hearing tomorrow, we wanted to ask you, friends:

Do you think Trump has immunity from the crimes he’s been accused of?
YES » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Jan2024-ENG-January?&refcode=E5886-20240109-Immunity-SB-Trump&amount=15]
NO » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Jan2024-ENG-January?&refcode=E5886-20240109-Immunity-SB-Trump&amount=15]

Trump is a liar, and he will do whatever it takes to continue spreading MAGA into the halls of our democracy, and into the nightmares of the American people. But team, we can’t wait until judges rule on the matter of Trump's crimes.

We must do everything in our power NOW to support Democrats like Eric, who are fighting to hold phonies like Trump accountable and out of power.

IMMUNITY FROM TRUMP » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Jan2024-FR-January?&refcode=E5886-20240109-Immunity-SB-Trump&amount=15]

Thank you,

Team Swalwell

It’s no secret that kids these days are spending more and more time on their phones...
But did you know that one of the most popular social media apps –******TikTok****** – is under fire for contributing to a rise in anti-Semitism, vandalism, and even violence amongst young people?

clean_body: | | | | Anti-Semitism, vandalism, and violence on the rise... Friend, It’s no secret that kids these days are spending more and more time on their phones... But did you know that one of the most popular social media apps –****TikTok**** – is under fire for contributing to a rise in anti-Semitism, vandalism, and even violence amongst young people? Senator Cassidy has been on a mission to investigate these alarming new trends, and he asked us to reach out and get your thoughts on the matter. Nothing is as important as the safety and well-being of our children. They are – quite literally – the future of our country. It’s imperative that we come together for their best interests before it’s too late. | For the next generation, Team Cassidy Team Cassidy Alerts PO Box 80505, Baton Rouge, LA 70898 \- =

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: These questions are at the core of what it means to be human
body:
Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate.

| | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=695cb1b28de547ff84cb9d51f48b95e6&_e=tdnSWwa5anMNkZ6dceoeYcx5CfyEgEeIp_ss5hufaNiuNRzaigHc1tI1LhJZSn7B6QYS3uaCD-5r6BkFbD6QBsoNfFlX7AvpG4oVGmZFIAklQP0rvsVFZ6yN8cqj5PEch-xMukSomFEJQR18oc1dBi2qT3AEIUgASxwGAzhmT1rvGfekoDv_7Z2T_0esNZhgF048HCC_2dLBZFFRP4x10MyOZThuMu0_692k2YV45mY20uPieBjv-MLEQR7W1Y6wDhE1IwzQZ0WMh6Pd00C9y5yaZ9kZzPIKK-vxePMHwmvblr1sFwsfAd87EVjRRGxMA8uDQ6LOw5x5AnvYfKh3KWY28aviJCy9BabWYRjoDlglPITDKFVBIgsU3SWrqbd9mEAhgh6gT3lUdubHIYsqU1UzMlrjCGwXyH7Zr7_bKgo%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate. And every academic year, I'm reminded of the joy it is to pursue the answers to questions like "_Does God exist? Can we know God?_ " with my students.

These questions are at the core of what it means to be human - both in our relationship with each other and with God. [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=695cb1b28de547ff84cb9d51f48b95e6&_e=tdnSWwa5anMNkZ6dceoeYcx5CfyEgEeIp_ss5hufaNiuNRzaigHc1tI1LhJZSn7B6QYS3uaCD-5r6BkFbD6QBsoNfFlX7AvpG4oVGmZFIAklQP0rvsVFZ6yN8cqj5PEch-xMukSomFEJQR18oc1dBi2qT3AEIUgASxwGAzhmT1rvGfekoDv_7Z2T_0esNZhgF048HCC_2dLBZFFRP4x10MyOZThuMu0_692k2YV45mY20uPieBjv-MLEQR7W1Y6wDhE1IwzQZ0WMh6Pd00C9y-7lmWA0gJmAbeSn6-Gdhovr4apQycaNPq5h2YqpLx_2pEnM7ETu8zC8hBOSt9Fa2s-jaKDzwlXECu5vrLaRq38qYxfq5wd1uXpbkMvKCQuXp2dECnhpsQNdX-9gakcXG5IkeZXvfBOwidcyni5akEE%3D) Today, I want to offer you that same experience by sending you [**a limited-edition DVD box set of Hillsdale's popular online course, "Western Heritage - From the Book of Genesis to John Locke,"**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=695cb1b28de547ff84cb9d51f48b95e6&_e=tdnSWwa5anMNkZ6dceoeYcx5CfyEgEeIp_ss5hufaNiuNRzaigHc1tI1LhJZSn7B6QYS3uaCD-5r6BkFbD6QBsoNfFlX7AvpG4oVGmZFIAklQP0rvsVFZ6yN8cqj5PEch-xMukSomFEJQR18oc1dBi2qT3AEIUgASxwGAzhmT1rvGfekoDv_7Z2T_0esNZhgF048HCC_2dLBZFFRP4x10MyOZThuMu0_692k2YV45mY20uPieBjv-MLEQR7W1Y6wDhE1IwzQZ0WMh6Pd00C9y6m6DQbQgDESvLPLtiZn11mFJh8k54ZWaYcxHgNKh8yN62inoLy-lZXBRP-u6FQ6GQgNvPaIpkunodVdPW46ZRO7IJusxDpNIet7GsHa0GmJq-GLXKLml_IyVzfh77z7zS7W5UvSu2iVII8xTJZbDfI%3D) as a token of our thanks for a generous contribution in support of Hillsdale's efforts to educate America.

I invite you to study the history of the "big questions" with my colleagues and me.

Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link: **[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-western-heritage-dvd](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=695cb1b28de547ff84cb9d51f48b95e6&_e=tdnSWwa5anMNkZ6dceoeYcx5CfyEgEeIp_ss5hufaNiuNRzaigHc1tI1LhJZSn7B6QYS3uaCD-5r6BkFbD6QBsoNfFlX7AvpG4oVGmZFIAklQP0rvsVFZ6yN8cqj5PEch-xMukSomFEJQR18oc1dBi2qT3AEIUgASxwGAzhmT1rvGfekoDv_7Z2T_0esNZhgF048HCC_2dLBZFFRP4x10MyOZThuMu0_692k2YV45mY20uPieBjv-MLEQR7W1Y6wDhE1IwzQZ0WMh6Pd00C9y3NSE6CbhfTyWj4ED2lRjVAnGhwgLQ-UCJ5Pbki38E13D8SWntTFFB-NyKy-9ZYKQXCtjcbAyx8b1joQom-D_yTF3rnwsNaHuuNTE0WGj5p0Rd73SSdfyF10nG1JBF7ZINwmFT8ioc3V6ErdIA1YP44%3D)**

name: Your America
subject: Who controls whom?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38844%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=P5xRIg0CMkbI62JLM1TD5g&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38955%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SkYTl9uxx%2fXzieD8c3fi1Q&sysid=1)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38956%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GYmePZWqEOzY6IhFa%2bbysA&sysid=1) [NO](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38957%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zjPzozJZC1rWZBhUFWFcAw&sysid=1) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38955%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SkYTl9uxx%2fXzieD8c3fi1Q&sysid=1)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c9705%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=ecm4OXtjzUJN9VVEup3H8w&sysid=1)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeffries for Congress
body:
Peter, I’m coming to you for the very first time this year with an ask so important, it will define our path to victory in this historic election: Will you be one of my first supporters of the year to become an official 2024 Democratic Member with $15 before midnight?

---
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76770540/448413323/1662333049?refcode=20240109_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGY3MzViNi0xNGFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4HXsuZUF8ihXc1x71VoElIuDURe3a3RWWcGwEn7rkl8=)
---
[_**Peter, I’m coming to you for the very first time this year with an ask so important, it will define our path to victory in this historic election: Will you be one of my first supporters of the year to become an official 2024 Democratic Member with $15 before midnight? I set an ambitious goal to kick the year off with 100 memberships from each state. If you help me reach this goal, Democrats will demonstrate an undeniable showing of support, overshadow extreme MAGA Republicans going into the new year and leave no doubt about our chances to win this election. Make no mistake: This is our historic opportunity to reclaim the House. It’s going to take every single one of us pitching in to compete with the MAGA mega-donors and their attempts to buy the majority. Will you be one of the first to step up for Democrats this year by activating your membership before midnight? body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmdhbdftbdqljrd7snj23ju4kc21v76r4retg0g8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3j69ob6c5h2bs)

| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1j6p2s46vj819amoefg5b7fuf6h4uf4oa7930m8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3j69ob6c5h2bs)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhgrrejp21kv4n85brfcf56icbckbjmgrhp9o2to_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3j69ob6c5h2bs) [NO](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0gsabsncb8478l2vfflgpduqtaqt4dgpdk83qug_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3j69ob6c5h2bs) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhgbcuik0l83n8c0io9e7i8fjctcptin06319ojo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3j69ob6c5h2bs)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
