clean_body: Marsha Blackburn vs. Gloria Johnson | Peter, you have a choice to make: Marsha Blackburn or Gloria Johnson? = Marsha Blackburn is a MAGA establishment politician who only cares about appealing to her far-right base. She takes money from corporate PACs and powerful political groups — all while ignoring the needs of everyday Tennesseans. = Meanwhile, Gloria is a former educator and state representative who stands tall for the people no matter who stands against her. She’s a fighter for women, families, teachers, and workers. While Marsha Blackburn attacks women’s reproductive rights, Gloria defends access to abortion care. While Marsha votes to cut taxes for the rich, Gloria prioritizes making this economy work for everyone. And while Marsha ignores victims of gun violence, Gloria champions common sense gun violence prevention. Peter, we think the choice is clear, but here’s the thing: Marsha has a MASSIVE campaign war chest to fuel her re-election bid, and we can’t compete without grassroots support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s do this! Team Gloria | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Send donations via check to: Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

name: Team DeSantis
subject: Joe Biden's schizophrenic position is dangerous
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=beaf78e833de0e98c0cddb1eaf2cad5754e084a9fed8d0af7bf0785ea2614a6ca71b133298467134bb199048d9278bdfeaa2af15f50a529d31d7e12501435c3410a26e48aeb635e6a2265212cacaf101

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e53bf2982aece2536b4256d7569006eff72e737bed023099806016399a3fc05b1a7b11b1ce1da69c6c09fdffcbd2b9508181ed225fba3452719cc9c309c0536b

Hey friend,

Joe Biden’s schizophrenic position on Israel is DANGEROUS. We can’t afford to have a president who is going to flip-flop on critical world issues that directly impacts Americans.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e53bf2982aece2536b4256d7569006eff72e737bed023099806016399a3fc05b1a7b11b1ce1da69c6c09fdffcbd2b9508181ed225fba3452719cc9c309c0536b

This is what Ron DeSantis has said about the situation in Israel. See below and chip in to help Ron DeSantis win the Iowa caucus.

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

--------Forwarded Message--------

From:
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e53bf2982aece2536b4256d7569006eff72e737bed023099806016399a3fc05b1a7b11b1ce1da69c6c09fdffcbd2b9508181ed225fba3452719cc9c309c0536b
Ron DeSantis

Subject: This is appalling. And it’s personal.

The atrocity we’re seeing unfold in Israel is personal to me.

I served in Iraq starting in 2007 and the casualties our troops suffered were at the hands of Iranian-backed Shia militias. American troops were killed, and Iran was responsible. In 1983, through Hezbollah, American Marines were bombed in their barracks in Beirut, and Iran was responsible.

The Iranian regime has American blood on its hands, and it is their religious and ideological worldview to continue to fund terrorists. We should be turning every screw to make sure that they are not getting a penny of our resources flowing into their terrorist-backing coffers.

We should be standing with our ally Israel as they root out Hamas. Joe Biden should not be considering any sort of practical rapprochement with a regime who is funding barbarous murder, rape, kidnapping, and the beheading of babies. It's absolutely despicable.

Here in Florida, I am using every available resource to support Israelis and cut off every source of funding for the Iranians. We are strengthening our sanctions and reinforcing our commitment to do no business with state sponsors of terrorists.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e53bf2982aece2536b4256d7569006eff72e737bed023099806016399a3fc05b1a7b11b1ce1da69c6c09fdffcbd2b9508181ed225fba3452719cc9c309c0536b

This is something that we should all agree on, unanimously. This is not a party issue. Our country should be drying up Iran’s ability to fund terrorism, not protesting in support of Hamas.

This is personal to me. This is personal to my state. With the second largest Israeli-American population in the country, the people across the communities I serve have friends and family members that have either gone missing or been brutally murdered in recent days. These emotions are raw.

As President, I would not be okay with the liberal institutions across this country siding with Hamas and leading pro-Hamas demonstrations. I would be reversing Biden’s disastrous open-border policies so that terrorists could not attack our vulnerabilities and enter our country armed with weapons, drugs, and intent to harm. And we would be expanding our sanctions so that American money never lines the pockets of the terrorist-backing Iranian regime.

We must focus on what matters and condemn the antisemitism mobilizing this appalling horror. Joe Biden isn’t getting the job done. We need a President who is going to be disciplined, focused, and put the mission first. Joe Biden is not that guy, but I am. When I am President, we will use every available resource to end the facilitation of these despicable acts.

If you’d like to support my campaign, please consider chipping in at the link below. Please, don't feel pressured. This time is difficult time and I understand if you do not want to provide resources to a political campaign during this crisis. Please know that I will always appreciate your support, no matter what form it takes.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e53bf2982aece2536b4256d7569006eff72e737bed023099806016399a3fc05b1a7b11b1ce1da69c6c09fdffcbd2b9508181ed225fba3452719cc9c309c0536b
Support Ron DeSantis for President

I know this is personal, and we won’t sit idly by. We will stand with Israel; not just today, not just tomorrow, but always.

Yours in Freedom,

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e53bf2982aece2536b4256d7569006eff72e737bed023099806016399a3fc05b1a7b11b1ce1da69c6c09fdffcbd2b9508181ed225fba3452719cc9c309c0536b

Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e53bf2982aece2536b4256d7569006eff72e737bed023099806016399a3fc05b1a7b11b1ce1da69c6c09fdffcbd2b9508181ed225fba3452719cc9c309c0536b

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e53bf2982aece253790cea2f39a9e31589ba1b59a8049c3617dff4938e665dbaeb7b75c5c91b8741a3f939a90952802324f6bc404046acc1c3e0e30fbabf847c
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e53bf2982aece2536b4256d7569006eff72e737bed023099806016399a3fc05b1a7b11b1ce1da69c6c09fdffcbd2b9508181ed225fba3452719cc9c309c0536b

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e53bf2982aece2536b4256d7569006eff72e737bed023099806016399a3fc05b1a7b11b1ce1da69c6c09fdffcbd2b9508181ed225fba3452719cc9c309c0536b

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

body:
In-fighting, culture wars, bureaucracy (continued).
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76771141/448415118/-2024045026?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTNiNjFmNi0xNWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tDcc7pTRct3Ku9v4NUPIlksFJwRig7nAm_KK7bbxfqQ=&emci=b3fee4e3-07ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=8e3b61f6-15af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=29359352)
---

| | Peter — We have just ten days. On January 19, Congress needs to take action to avoid _another_ government shutdown before the current Continuing Resolution expires. And, as that deadline rapidly approaches, there's one question on everyone's minds: **what will Lori Chavez DeRemer and the rest of the MAGA Republicans do?** Instead of focusing on the needs of our communities, the Republicans are more intent on culture wars and more interested in rolling back fundamental rights. **I can't help but say it: for people hellbent on claiming to be "the party of small government" — the GOP sure is a whole lot of government for functionally**** _zero_****delivered to their constituents.** Their decisions to continue their political theater while kicking the can down the road on a government budget is bound to catch up with them — and they're making it painfully clear that they won't deal with the consequences the same way the millions of Americans relying on them will. clean_body: In-fighting, culture wars, bureaucracy (continued). | | | | Peter — We have just ten days. On January 19, Congress needs to take action to avoid another government shutdown before the current Continuing Resolution expires. And, as that deadline rapidly approaches, there's one question on everyone's minds: what will Lori Chavez DeRemer and the rest of the MAGA Republicans do? Instead of focusing on the needs of our communities, the Republicans are more intent on culture wars and more interested in rolling back fundamental rights. I can't help but say it: for people hellbent on claiming to be "the party of small government" — the GOP sure is a whole lot of government for functionally zerodelivered to their constituents. Their decisions to continue their political theater while kicking the can down the road on a government budget is bound to catch up with them — and they're making it painfully clear that they won't deal with the consequences the same way the millions of Americans relying on them will. = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = I have spent my career working in local, regional, and state governments building coalitions to address urgent issues, from affordable housing to transportation, economic recovery and job creation. I know what it takes to find common ground and reach solutions that actually work for everyone — not just delay deadlines to appease the pontificating members of the MAGA cohort. = Lynn Peterson = | | | Paid for by Lynn Peterson for Congress |

name: Emily Hall
subject: A prayer guide to learn about the world’s lost
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.-ynw)
---
Dear Fellow Believer,

Have you ever heard these words before?

• Fulanke
• Figig Berbers
• Motilone-Bari
• Bangingi
• Sudra Das

These are the names of people groups in Mali, Algeria, Venezuela, Malaysia, and India, respectively. And as foreign as their names may sound to you, the gospel of Jesus Christ is just as foreign to them.
---
| | These are just a few of the unreached people groups all over the world who have not yet been given the hope of salvation in Jesus.

Are these people groups important to God? Of course. Should they be important to us as well? Absolutely.

What can move our hearts closer to God’s heart for the nations?

Prayer can!
---
| [](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
| | Because of the power of prayer, we have compiled a guide highlighting an unreached people group each week for a whole year. You will learn about unique and precious people and be guided in prayer for God to pour out His hope and help on them.

**Will you align your heart with God’s in prayer by following this unique prayer guide?** We call it _Loving the Lost_ , and it’s free to download and share by going here: [https://welcome.imb.org/loving-the-lost-LP.html](http://trk.secureandprosper._QZGvtJe2LfQEUF8A)

There’s no better way to develop loving care and compassion for someone than by lifting them to the Lord in prayer. I’m hoping that as you pray, God will put one of these people groups in your heart and mind, so that you will continue to pray for them for many years.

This is a great resource to help teach your children about the world and nurture their compassion for others!

Thanks for praying with us!

Emily Hall
Prayer Content Specialist
IMB Prayer Office

---
International Mission Board | 3806 Monument Ave. Richmond, VA 23230 | (804) 353-0515
---
Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDA5LTZmN2FjZTQzNmE1YjRlMzA5NjIxN2RlYzE5NDM0ZDNlIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/unzRLKSrnOfP8ee7vEzO1w) to unsubscribe.

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Just got back from the border.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana
body:
Here’s the truth
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0R_2PNDExmHFGeHsIttKKw~~/AARclAA~)
---
Friend, I just got back from my visit to Eagle Pass, TX, and I couldn’t wait to tell you what I saw. I, along with over 60 of my House Republican colleagues, visited the border to see Biden’s Border Crisis firsthand.
---
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0R_2PNDExmHFGeHsIttKKw~~/AARclAA~)
---

---
[**CHIP IN TO END THE BIDEN BORDER CRISIS**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0R_2PNDExmHFGeHsIttKKw~~/AARclAA~)
---
If you don’t live in a border state, or have never watched illegal immigrants cross the border, Biden’s Border Crisis is worse than you could ever imagine. I stood there and witnessed firsthand, migrants crossing the border, totally unfettered. You’ve seen the numbers on the news. More than 6.2 MILLION illegal immigrants crossed the border since Joe Biden took office. That’s more than the populations of Utah, Connecticut, Iowa, and Nevada. This isn’t an immigration problem. This is an INVASION problem. **[Either Joe Biden is utterly incompetent or he doesn’t have the will to solve this issue. There is no in between.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0R_2PNDExmHFGeHsIttKKw~~/AARclAA~)** Here’s the fact of the matter. During the Trump Administration, we built and repaired huge portions of the border wall, enforced the Remain in Mexico policy, and slowed illegal immigration to a crawl. But Joe Biden reversed President Trump’s policies, and now REFUSES to do what’s right. **_That’s why, this November, Joe Biden and the open-border Democrats are in for a rude awakening._** With your help, we’ll **EXPAND** our majority in the Congress. **[To make sure that happens, I need your support right now. Can I count on you?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0R_2PNDExmHFGeHsIttKKw~~/AARclAA~)**
---
[**CHIP IN TO EXPAND THE MAJORITY!**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0R_2PNDExmHFGeHsIttKKw~~/AARclAA~)
---
**When I say that we can’t afford four more years of Joe Biden and Democrat control, I mean it.** Friend, I truly hope I can count on you for help. Sincerely,
---
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0R_2PNDExmHFGeHsIttKKw~~/AARclAA~)
---
Speaker Mike Johnson
---
|
---

---
| | |
---

Restore Our Nation
---

name: Ron Wyden
subject: The new frontier
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
Modern problems require modern solutions.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76771683/448417138/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODYyMjM4MS0xN2FmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fjSltoan3jlDR7fGLNeuujyeSn9pFNAM6wmcuCTEyqA=&emci=b8c69f58-7aae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=a8622381-17af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=9818364)
---

| | It seems that every day we are encountering some new advances in artificial intelligence. Whether that be through a new chatbot or a service that can generate custom images upon your request, these advances are coming at a breakneck pace. While it is important that we allow fledgling technologies to be developed and applied in ways that are beneficial, the government needs to get serious about putting protections in place to safeguard Americans from new threats as these technologies evolve. In the case of AI, we've seen scammers misuse new tools to steal Americans' identities and commit other forms of fraud. In the wake of these developments, we need smarter approaches to confirm that a person really is who they claim to be. As it turns out, experts agree the most reliable way to verify someone's identity is in-person, face to face. This is why I've co-sponsored legislation in the Senate to tackle this problem head-on and ensure that our verification processes and privacy protections keep pace with the rapidly changing technological landscape. Identity verification is just one of the many side effects of AI technology that I believe lawmakers need to address. It may be a small piece of the puzzle, but it's an important one. I'm continuing to tackle this issue from every angle, including pushing federal agencies to put guardrails in place to ensure the AI technologies they're relying on aren't harming Americans. To that end, I'm also leading the charge in the Senate to pass my legislation that will reduce algorithmic bias in AI technology that disproportionately impacts Americans based on their race, gender, and age. Our hope is that as these technologies continue to advance and change our way of life, we act to account for unintended consequences. My commitment — as always — is to protect consumers and make sure that we always have a safety net for people as our economy and society evolve. More soon, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: Modern problems require modern solutions. | | | | It seems that every day we are encountering some new advances in artificial intelligence. Whether that be through a new chatbot or a service that can generate custom images upon your request, these advances are coming at a breakneck pace. While it is important that we allow fledgling technologies to be developed and applied in ways that are beneficial, the government needs to get serious about putting protections in place to safeguard Americans from new threats as these technologies evolve. In the case of AI, we've seen scammers misuse new tools to steal Americans' identities and commit other forms of fraud. In the wake of these developments, we need smarter approaches to confirm that a person really is who they claim to be. As it turns out, experts agree the most reliable way to verify someone's identity is in-person, face to face. This is why I've co-sponsored legislation in the Senate to tackle this problem head-on and ensure that our verification processes and privacy protections keep pace with the rapidly changing technological landscape. Identity verification is just one of the many side effects of AI technology that I believe lawmakers need to address. It may be a small piece of the puzzle, but it's an important one. I'm continuing to tackle this issue from every angle, including pushing federal agencies to put guardrails in place to ensure the AI technologies they're relying on aren't harming Americans. To that end, I'm also leading the charge in the Senate to pass my legislation that will reduce algorithmic bias in AI technology that disproportionately impacts Americans based on their race, gender, and age. Our hope is that as these technologies continue to advance and change our way of life, we act to account for unintended consequences. My commitment — as always — is to protect consumers and make sure that we always have a safety net for people as our economy and society evolve. More soon, Ron | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. Box 3498 Portland, OR 97208 United States Email is an important way for Ron Wyden to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Del. Jazz Lewis
subject: Before session convenes
body:
A few weeks ago, I spent a great morning celebrating with Employ Prince George’s at the grand opening of their Building Trades Career Center.
As a Maryland delegate, I secured the funding to make this dream a reality. I’m so excited to see the work being done to train a cutting-edge workforce in Prince George’s County.

But folks, there’s still so much work to do in the battle for a more just and equitable society. I’m ready to take on whatever obstacles come our way, but I won’t be able to get this done on my own.

We need to show that grassroots donors believe the work I’m doing to bring resources to the people of Prince George’s County matters. We need 57 more donations to meet our pre-session target. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2024email?refcode=Janemails]

Once this session convenes, I won’t be able to fundraise — and we’ll have to report what we’ve brought in. Can you chip in to help kick off this year strong? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2024email?refcode=Janemails]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2024email?refcode=Janemails]

Coming from a family that worked hard to get into the middle class, my campaign relies on grassroots support to pay the bills.

Anything you can chip in before our January 10 deadline will go a long way! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2024email?refcode=Janemails]

Thanks for all you do,

Jazz

As a proven progressive leader and champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to healthcare access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Majority Whip of the Maryland House. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Bowie with his wife and two kids.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2024email?refcode=Janemails]
By AUthority Friends of Jazz Lewis, Treasurer Chris Taitt
Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account
P.O. Box 341854
Bethesda, MD 20827
United States

body:

| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59545?t=6&akid=12404%2E878179%2EjZIyck) **An official impeachment of President Biden is expected ANY day now.** [**As Biden’s poll numbers tank, we need him to know that EVERY good Democrat has his back! You’re one of 100 regional supporters personally selected to sign our letter: Add your name by MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59545?t=7&akid=12404%2E878179%2EjZIyck) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59545?t=8&akid=12404%2E878179%2EjZIyck)
---
TO: President Biden
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: I stand with you. **Dear President Biden,

_I am FURIOUS that Republicans are hell-bent on impeaching you and destroying your reelection chances._**

This is the same House majority that ousted their own Speaker and nearly caused two government shutdowns. _The MAGA mob is an absolute joke!_

But let me be clear: Democrats aren’t going anywhere. **We’re proud to stand by your side and fight back against these baseless, shameful attacks.**

I’m committed to doing everything in my power to make sure Donald Trump never steps foot in the White House again.

[**So today, I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my support and to elect incredible Democrats up and down the ballot who will end the MAGA reign »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59545?t=9&akid=12404%2E878179%2EjZIyck) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59545?t=10&akid=12404%2E878179%2EjZIyck)

| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: Wisconsin Senate Update
subject: “Great Opportunity”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| We can’t slow down in our fight to defend Wisconsin.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1830%2E35263%2Er7Z3je)
Peter, headlines like this one are exactly why we can’t slow down — not even for a second — in our fight to defend Wisconsin and hold the Senate this year: **GOP Has 'Great Opportunity' to Retake Senate**
_— Newsmax_ | [DONATE NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3587?c0=tbe-em-jan24.9rGJ2t&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240109_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1830%2E35263%2Er7Z3je)
---
Here are the facts:
1. Republicans only need to flip ONE more seat to secure the Senate majority after Democratic Senator Joe Manchin announced he’s not running for reelection in Republican-stronghold West Virginia.
2. That makes Tammy Baldwin even more vulnerable as Republicans zero in on flipping Wisconsin red to take back the Senate.
3. Senate Republicans’ #1 candidate, megamillionaire Eric Hovde, is gearing up to run against Tammy — powered by a $20 million campaign war chest.

**The odds are stacked against us in our fight to keep the Senate blue, and the fate of our majority could all come down to what happens here in Wisconsin.**
**[Will you pitch in a donation of any amount today to help Tammy Baldwin defend Wisconsin and our Democratic Senate majority? She can’t win this without you.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3587?c0=tbe-em-jan24.9rGJ2t&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240109_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1830%2E35263%2Er7Z3je)**

name: Diane Sare
subject: 01/12 Friday Symposium: Music as Political Action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=through_beauty_we_proceed&n=1)
---
Friend, This week's Symposium will be presented with John Sigerson, on the topic of music as a form of political action. Hard as it may be to admit – most of people's beloved modern music is psychological warfare used to condition values and behavior.

Please RSVP below to attend in-person in Manhattan, and otherwise follow the event online at the live-stream linked below. | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/20240112_symposium_rsvp?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=through_beauty_we_proceed&n=2 "RSVP for in-person") [RSVP for in-person](https://www.sareforsenate.com/20240112_symposium_rsvp?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=through_beauty_we_proceed&n=2)
---
(For an example of Mr. Sigerson's work, follow [this link](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRZKOCIJRk8OgjFlRn80gjLpw-GWHJPSV5jdWnfQndh75IiX9v9iK7Y9yF26vSgQ7Po&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=through_beauty_we_proceed&n=3), where you will find him conducting the Schiller Institute's performance of Mozart's Requiem on the 50th Anniversary of the assassination of President John F. Kennedy.)

name: American Briefing
subject: Who controls whom?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zd7tf4h8lphs8j2t9uj4e05dc4jabu8ai7v93lko_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3gm4o32chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqf0364o23e18nrbhao6vpqnbsv0qoaofbgrm05o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3gm4o32chh2bs)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zl77a79udcsdho9q00fqejjq30nggdfdkq3rj7d0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3gm4o32chh2bs) [NO](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5pn35rqvleveari6hhj7gq9dvh0ahhiik81kr6g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3gm4o32chh2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrj8j2epaah9hc0uvd38hpkmohs72d9e4eqh9l6g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3gm4o32chh2bs)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Briefing
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zq1a8udl0aoqdluktcvv2dh5sucobbg0un2d805o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3gm4o32chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm8p79d9j6iprect66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni64oj3clj68oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0b1i7gjfapqa05no03g74jjlvofo0qusidtlom0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3gm4o32chh2bs)_

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9ade4afjk457u70glvet21478h3ltg5lqqvhm60_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr0c5ge2oj0c9i649fg)

name: Justice Democrats
subject: AIPAC spent more than ever before last November
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

A new FEC filing shows that anti-Palestinian, GOP-funded group AIPAC spent
a record amount of money last November, dropping MILLIONS in a single
month.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240109.nLaHBx&refcode=em20240109-32741&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=32741%2E1203867%2E8juZnd ]Tweet by Sludge: AIPAC showered donations on House members in November
as Congress tussled over aid packages for Israel: - Ritchie Torres:
$202,000 - Hakeem Jeffries: $200,000 - Gregory Meeks: $151,000 - Debbie
Wasserman Schultz: $141,000 More on AIPAC’s record giving:

It’s obvious why: AIPAC made massive campaign contributions to their
biggest allies — like Democrats Ritchie Torres and Hakeem Jeffries — right
as Congress was voting on whether or not to send more military aid to
Israel while its army continues its all-out assault on Palestinians.

They’re buying votes to support genocide.

AIPAC has long bought loyalty and influence in Congress, resulting in our
government’s unconditional support and funding of Israel’s human rights
abuses.

Justice Democrats’ leaders like Cori Bush, Rashida Tlaib, Summer Lee,
Jamaal Bowman, and Ilhan Omar are leading the call for a permanent
ceasefire and the human rights of Palestinians, in spite of AIPAC’s plans
to spend $100 million to oust them this year.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240109.nLaHBx&refcode=em20240109-32741&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1002&akid=32741%2E1203867%2E8juZnd ]Help us keep up the fight against AIPAC’s attacks and support our
progressive incumbents standing on the right side of history: pitch in
$3 or more to fuel our work to re-elect the Squad this
year.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240109.nLaHBx&refcode=em20240109-32741&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1021&akid=32741%2E1203867%2E8juZnd ]Contribute $3

We can’t afford to lose these courageous leaders who are unafraid of
pushing back against AIPAC and challenging the status quo. Thanks for
anything you can give to support us in this critical moment.

— Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1022&akid=32741%2E1203867%2E8juZnd ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1023&akid=32741%2E1203867%2E8juZnd ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240109-32741-footer&t=1024&refcode2=32741_1203867_8juZnd&akid=32741%2E1203867%2E8juZnd

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=32741%2E1203867%2E8juZnd

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

[ ]Tweet by Sludge: AIPAC showered donations on House members in November as Congress tussled over aid packages for Israel: - Ritchie Torres: $202,000 - Hakeem Jeffries: $200,000 - Gregory Meeks: $151,000 - Debbie Wasserman Schultz: $141,000 More on AIPAC’s record giving: It’s obvious why: AIPAC made massive campaign contributions to their biggest allies — like Democrats Ritchie Torres and Hakeem Jeffries — right as Congress was voting on whether or not to send more military aid to Israel while its army continues its all-out assault on Palestinians. They’re buying votes to support genocide. AIPAC has long bought loyalty and influence in Congress, resulting in our government’s unconditional support and funding of Israel’s human rights abuses. Justice Democrats’ leaders like Cori Bush, Rashida Tlaib, Summer Lee, Jamaal Bowman, and Ilhan Omar are leading the call for a permanent ceasefire and the human rights of Palestinians, in spite of AIPAC’s plans to spend $100 million to oust them this year. [ ]Help us keep up the fight against AIPAC’s attacks and support our progressive incumbents standing on the right side of history: pitch in $3 or more to fuel our work to re-elect the Squad this year. [ ]Contribute $3 We can’t afford to lose these courageous leaders who are unafraid of pushing back against AIPAC and challenging the status quo. Thanks for anything you can give to support us in this critical moment. — Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a ceasefire through [ ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them using [ ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this critical moment. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

Peter, We know that one-party Republican control is damaging our state, bringing down our quality of life, and driving our politics toward division. But together, we can change that trajectory this year. In 2024, there are over 1100 offices on the ballot, and bringing balance back depends on running everywhere. This year, we’re launching a candidate recruitment campaign encouraging thousands of Hoosier Democrats to run for office and be the difference in their communities. **[It’s more important than ever that Hoosiers have choices up and down their ballots in 2024. name: Carmen Goers
subject: Law Enforcement Appreciation Day: Stand with Our Protectors
body:
Join the Team

| | | | | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | **Law Enforcement Appreciation Day: Stand with Our Protectors**
---

Dear Peter,
Today, on Law Enforcement Appreciation Day, it’s a poignant time to recognize the unwavering courage and dedication of our police officers in Washington's 8th district. These men and women who wear the badge are committing their lives to our safety and upholding the law.
Our current Congresswoman claims to support our officers, but has voted against legislation to provide resources and support. Where is she? Her lack of action has left law enforcement without the tools for public safety, technical assistance, and training.
But **my campaign** fervently believes in supporting our law enforcement community, ensuring they have the necessary resources, training, and community backing to effectively and safely perform their duties.
Today, I'm reaching out for your support.

---
| | | |
---
| A contribution of $25, $50, or $100 will greatly aid our efforts to:

* Enhance the safety equipment and training available to our officers.
* Foster community outreach programs between law enforcement and the communities they serve.
* Advocate for policies that support the physical and mental wellbeing of our law enforcement personnel.

---
| [ DONATE TODAY! ](https://vgq.soundestlink.com/link/659d90a99e32504e3d55128e/659ccf82cf687b36174a58c4/652845d9aa222127cf458b43?signature=8986b983a15d37965f28a4a904c9f08f11397f8a959db3f7331b116ba0941270)
---
| | | Your donation is more than a gift; it's a statement of respect and appreciation for those who serve and protect us every day. On Law Enforcement Appreciation Day, let’s show our officers that we stand united with them.
Thank you for honoring our guardians in blue.

Sincerely,

Carmen Goers

---
|
---

name: Hill Harper HQ
subject: Can you help us out?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
We still need 1,000 founding donations by January 10. Can you help us out?
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=em20240109&t=1&akid=814%2E62735%2ElpdMrp)
Peter,
**We’re officially in election year, and we don’t have any time to waste.** That’s why we’ve set a goal of receiving 1,000 founding donations by tomorrow, _and we’re still 330 donations away as of right now_.
**Please join our 2024 Founding Donors today:****[https://act.hillharper.com/go/2024foundingdonor](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20240109?amount=5&refcode=em20240109-814&refcode2=814_62735_lpdMrp&akid=814%2E62735%2ElpdMrp)**
Becoming a founding donor would mean a lot as we try to create a completely different kind of political movement than Michigan has ever seen.
We’re rejecting special interests and big money and are 100% grassroots funded. We’re running this race for the people and by the people.
**We know:** It feels like money is getting tighter and tighter as we face inflation. Health care costs and child care costs are only rising. **And that’s just the start.**
We need representatives in the Senate who will not do the bidding of corporate lobbyists and fight for everyday people — **that’s Hill!**
[**Please, become one of our 2024 Founding Donors right now by making a donation of any amount right now. You can help us close our 330 donation gap today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20240109?amount=5&refcode=em20240109-814&refcode2=814_62735_lpdMrp&akid=814%2E62735%2ElpdMrp)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20240109?amount=5&refcode=em20240109-814&refcode2=814_62735_lpdMrp&akid=814%2E62735%2ElpdMrp)**
Onwards,
Hill Harper HQ
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-footer?refcode=em20240109&t=2&refcode2=814_62735_lpdMrp&akid=814%2E62735%2ElpdMrp)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=814%2E62735%2ElpdMrp)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.hillharper.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=814%2E62735%2ElpdMrp)

To give by check:
Hill Harper for Michigan
PO Box 13195
Lansing, MI 48901
Email us: [info@hillharper.com](mailto:info@hillharper.com)
PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN

[Happy 50th birthday, Endangered Species Act!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76775260/448426017/324651940?utm_campaign=rm-2024-01&utm_source=ea-rm&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVmODMzZjE2LTFkYWYtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=s1q5jnlozyJlqOirTUSTay8JH_J9IET3gUOcY43vB9U=&emci=63837f49-2c99-ee11-8925-002248223cbb&emdi=ef833f16-1daf-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=1504551)
President Richard Nixon in 1973 signed the Endangered Species Act, one of the most powerful and far-reaching pieces of environmental legislation in American history. In the 50 years since, the ESA’s impact on the national landscape – including the redwoods – has been profound.

clean_body: News from the League | January 09, 2024 | Gravity Ever wonder what it's like when one of the world's tallest trees comes crashing down? Griff Griffith details everything – from the initial seconds to decades later. And it’s awesome. Protection President Richard Nixon in 1973 signed the Endangered Species Act, one of the most powerful and far-reaching pieces of environmental legislation in American history. In the 50 years since, the ESA’s impact on the national landscape – including the redwoods – has been profound. Interpretation From the start, the voices and culture of the Tolowa Dee-ni’ Nation were central to storytelling and interpretation at the Grove of Titans — a project that earned Save the Redwoods League and its partners first-place honors from the National Association for Interpretation. Adventure Rugged Mendocino County is famous for spectacular stands of coast redwoods that hypnotize visitors with their pinch-me-I’m-dreaming beauty. Check out our top destinations and start planning your spring escape to the trees. Legacy League supporter Bruce Stangeland talks about how dedicating a redwood grove was the perfect way to remember his wife, Susan. | | Instagram Post of the Month ---|--- | | ---|--- Oprah wants to spend her birthday in the redwoods. name: ICYMI News
subject: Who controls whom?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdn7a5463oem3dmqkmpa9lj17tea49mideor9dko_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3gmco31cph2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhb7612b7a448o7v8hbupp45jq4h5is26bsehvao_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3gmco31cph2bs)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8fqrtb9ud067rn7lg4foo5350q1n0q6amoq0u1o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3gmco31cph2bs) [NO](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqj6h6f8pd58ol2fcuv47kkvtcbths5h16ghave0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3gmco31cph2bs) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8irvcoucip9c868hntnle37p4d9oku59uj3j00g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c3gmco31cph2bs)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

---

ICYMI News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Steve Simon
subject: Data expert hired by Trump campaign says 2020 election was not stolen
disclaimer_text: paid for by Simon for Secretary of State Committee
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76775397/448426522/1806191707?amount=15&refcode=ss_em_fr_30DO_240109&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTZkZjE5Y2ItMWRhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=69dJz9-BP3ofpecPwAkDokH3zdDugN7Dp_Gm6G7NhI4=) I am reaching out to you today to address a critical issue that continues to challenge the integrity of our democracy: Disinformation about elections. Since 2020, we’ve seen a coordinated push to convince Americans that the last presidential election was “stolen” - a false and poisonous proposition. Fortunately, a recent op-ed by Ken Block (who was hired by the Trump campaign in 2020 to investigate claims of voter fraud) unequivocally concludes that the 2020 presidential election was not stolen. **Block emphasizes that no credible evidence of voter fraud exists that would change the election's outcome.** _Despite this clarity, and a wealth of evidence proving the legitimacy of the 2020 election, the baseless claims persist. From stump speeches to outrageous lawsuits, the relentless push to delegitimize the election poses a threat to the truth._ _**My job as Secretary of State has never been more important. Since before 2020, I have consistently fought back against false claims and disinformation that erode trust in our democracy.**_ [**Leading with the truth is going to be more important than ever this year as Minnesotans start voting in the presidential election in just over a week. I need your help to keep fighting back and to dispel disinformation. We need to raise another $10,000 this week to keep going. With Steve’s leadership, Minnesota has led the nation in voter turnout for the past three out of four elections. His top priorities are defending our democracy, strengthening the freedom to vote for all eligible Minnesotans, pushing back against dangerous disinformation about our elections, providing support for small businesses, and enhancing security protections for our most vulnerable. clean_body: | = I am reaching out to you today to address a critical issue that continues to challenge the integrity of our democracy: Disinformation about elections. Since 2020, we’ve seen a coordinated push to convince Americans that the last presidential election was “stolen” - a false and poisonous proposition. Fortunately, a recent op-ed by Ken Block (who was hired by the Trump campaign in 2020 to investigate claims of voter fraud) unequivocally concludes that the 2020 presidential election was not stolen. Block emphasizes that no credible evidence of voter fraud exists that would change the election's outcome. Despite this clarity, and a wealth of evidence proving the legitimacy of the 2020 election, the baseless claims persist. From stump speeches to outrageous lawsuits, the relentless push to delegitimize the election poses a threat to the truth. My job as Secretary of State has never been more important. Since before 2020, I have consistently fought back against false claims and disinformation that erode trust in our democracy. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | **= | = | = | = | = | = Block rightly points out that claims of voter fraud lack the essential elements of detectability, quantifiability, and verifiability. In essence, there is no substantive evidence supporting these allegations. As we face ongoing challenges to the truth about the 2020 election, I am reaching out to ask for your support. We must stand strong against disinformation and ensure that the facts prevail. = | = The fight for truth requires collective action. Your support plays a crucial role in upholding the principles of our democracy. Thank you for standing with us. Steve | = | = | = With Steve’s leadership, Minnesota has led the nation in voter turnout for the past three out of four elections. His top priorities are defending our democracy, strengthening the freedom to vote for all eligible Minnesotans, pushing back against dangerous disinformation about our elections, providing support for small businesses, and enhancing security protections for our most vulnerable. = ** Prepared and paid for by Simon for Secretary of State Committee Simon for Secretary of State Committee P.O. name: Katie Porter
subject: I’m a straight shooter. That means telling you I could lose our race.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=36177%2E3422442%2EoRllvR)
Derek,
I’m a straight shooter, and I take a lot of pride in these emails being honest and transparent. **That means telling you I could lose our race for the U.S. Senate.**
Two December polls show me being pushed out of the primary. That means my time in Congress would come to an end.
Here’s why: California has a unique system. The top two vote-getters in March’s primary advance to the general election in November. **Early polling suggests that I am in a very strong position to win the general election, no matter the other candidate, but the math in this primary is weird.** A celebrity Republican is gaining traction in the polls, and he could advance to second place and keep us from qualifying for the general election.
**[Can you donate $5 today to help me communicate with voters and become California’s next U.S. Senator?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240109-1?refcode=em20240109-36177&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36177_3422442_oRllvR&akid=36177%2E3422442%2EoRllvR)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240109-1?refcode=em20240109-36177&refcode2=36177_3422442_oRllvR&akid=36177%2E3422442%2EoRllvR)
Thanks for being a part of our team.
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em&t=2&refcode2=36177_3422442_oRllvR&akid=36177%2E3422442%2EoRllvR)**

| | Hi Peter,

We wanted to fill you in on what’s going on in Georgia right now.

You may have seen that Brad Raffensperger is putting hundreds of thousands of voters in line to be purged from Georgia’s voter rolls – some of them just because they didn’t cast a vote in recent elections. **_Peter, voting is a RIGHT. It’s not a “use it or lose it” privilege._**

These purges are one of the top threats to voting in Georgia, and ensuring that voters are not disenfranchised is our top priority in 2024.

**But we’re going to need your help. Reaching thousands of eligible voters across Georgia to ensure they’re able to cast a ballot takes a LOT of work, and we need a strong team behind us.**

[**_Will you pitch in right now to help build our voter protection team and ensure that the Democratic Party of Georgia has the most robust voter protection program in the entire country?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76775731/448427623/710125701?refcode=20240109.1_GADVPT_1J&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGUzMDJjNS0xZWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hg_Px4Uk8Bw4IhGn2YrHlwwGU6mpFz5mEyQ9V1-wCZI=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Survey: What do you want from this Congress?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqAqsnaOulsFtjkTh64P77vUpCYIMPI6gKOD8cNKB2HV4hm8NKZbMcG36LGa3HbWI48GfbuDq3HLMucTNIfMtq_4OA6lwz4Tmat_2V1pBiCaiETkL9MMKP-uulBW1feo1ozYNYnETW2Tf7UUn54-tg_BM5gcA6Vg-Fzb6KrFRbYH_8-VIgbT9SAHUCSG6v6rrbyzW0OtKQuTy6bD7d0SiI7jZxTJyfLmnUZ0Ijv2XN_L3BZ9H3_xsmnqNQdm73dNKKMzCb08c--fztvnJpnLWQNeyWAE0Rl6VAcASzkGyBUFutdYk8EHuBp3WAi6nPeG3pEjfX9QRZ3MIeLhR6VF0s6Erg-AIUwwpieUp18vriVsfc/42u/gsiYFQoQRrKB0kmkGVT2DQ/h0/i37S9xMPEof2tH8b4fBlDrColIytIpHYvjQhwfxRK40)

Peter, Today I get to kick off my second session of Congress. It’s a new year, a new Speaker holding the gavel, but unfortunately a lot looks the same as last year. The GOP has never wanted to solve the problems that are most effective for their own campaigns. I’ve known this, I experienced this my first year, and some of their colleagues across the aisle have even said so out loud. **But I’m not going to stop fighting for Illinois’ 17th Congressional District and for what’s right, period. For this session, and with your support when Democrats retake the House majority.** And unlike too many Congressional Republicans, I will always sincerely value the feedback of my supporters and constituents. **So I wanted to ask you, Peter: what issues do you want to see us fight for first in this Congress?** [**With another shutdown looming, and a host of urgent issues that need our focus, I want to hear from you about what we need to prioritize. Can you fill out our priorities survey to let me know what’s on your mind?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlfE27RHrigaS8Y5HCAFF3HDnYudUJCs8mOFHd33mkAls4vm70BFjHjGSm5oofiA61D3GhIuNsqX07Ib3esWJZAV6d1kLT1DKt8vIlpLO6Jdf4AAV_q4upjO0O7se9f-o4tvZx6Ve8ekvmqQpZBRfF6TNm2Wi7Sd-EF04ck-b53K9l_bwhpuIU4C_XiBxL4tomQmlOp_XsdnIFDddJ4jCA8WbTiVCbAKdMCtkTrich9BrmgE4LcOl4J33jlD1xXDyxT5xnKhJOp9WK8eCUf-Ka-uF1uS5IBekmjYHeLZGk1LsG9ezsVU6QY1sFhFwVvLix5ODhRJ_NbKtWC-TRgau4r/42u/gsiYFQoQRrKB0kmkGVT2DQ/h1/1JVH8R2jppZmq9Q_T3pN7Uoha4NFa3HO6NHEMD-Lz7k)

---
I value the input of my constituents and supporters, and I’m not relying on pundits and polls to identify the issues folks care about. Your ideas – on surveys like this one – help me understand what folks in IL-17 and across the country are thinking about so I can better serve you in Congress. Some may call that apolitical. I call it common sense! So please, it takes less than 5 minutes. Let us know your thoughts -- I’d really appreciate it. **[Click here to take our survey.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlfE27RHrigaS8Y5HCAFF3HDnYudUJCs8mOFHd33mkAls4vm70BFjHjGSm5oofiA60CU4HW2eBcdDCeoy3HXzQZ9sIHgkXEWikkpA26OCdGZzSE7GDY7nEu1LZ08im4WitnS_XNv5ApOBzbgBDQd36LAtQOOUVpXIUHr-XJlpqIIdKhhbubAoBWuuMDAKuAAFvYoeyrCHBIkMTsCh66uCtQQUJ-yZTRx1BzfkXPnXbl0vTQx8fD2iU7PFSjT4xzBXtjK4LgTgyFaNHkchQd5I5SrdkZmfM1qRoQR4-AKKGxaFIGoYcfh4xgQOMKQ4kiBJalIm1IzyeiiZapIsxXs_nw/42u/gsiYFQoQRrKB0kmkGVT2DQ/h3/wifjKB7afRV00d05K0VMChc2Y0wuqQ-xeQlge1EVW9M)** Again, I can't thank you enough for your ongoing support. You are making this work possible. \- Eric

body:
Will you show your support for Tom Suozzi by splitting a contribution between our campaigns today?| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76775935/448428494/-1645665386?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2M3OTA5ZTYtMWZhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_IkuSES92drARqaTjs9xQj-4IxLKkUC3JfzQqcSWZ84=&emci=6fb0b57b-18af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=cc7909e6-1faf-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=9848080)

Friend, Following the expulsion of George Santos from the House of Representatives last month, Democrats in New York worked quickly to nominate former Congressman Tom Suozzi to return to Washington. Tom is the kind of champion for the people we need on Capitol Hill. During his previous terms in Congress and his decades of public service, he has fought to hold polluters accountable, expand affordable healthcare and prescription drug access, invest in infrastructure for the modern age, and work across the aisle to get things done. Tom is the kind of champion for the people we need on Capitol Hill. To: Interested Parties
From: Fair Fight
Re: 7 Key Takeaways from the 2023 Anti-Voter Playbook; Implications for 2024 Throughout 2023, far-right lawmakers and conspiracy-fueled election deniers have been honing suppressive tactics and laying the groundwork to support anti-voter efforts in the 2024 election
cycle. **Georgia continues to serve as the testing ground for a growing, nationally coordinated effort to push access to the ballot as far out of reach as possible — particularly for Black, brown, and young voters.** Right-wing policymakers and anti-voter extremists used the 2023 legislative session and election cycle to refine their playbook of silencing and intimidating voters while overwhelming election workers, all in a large-scale effort built on sowing doubt about the electoral process. As we approach the 2024 election cycle, it’s increasingly clear that the Anti-Voter Playbook is three-pronged: restrict voter access, attack election administration, and subvert the will of voters. Here are our top takeaways:
1. **Local election administrators are grappling with a barrage of unfunded mandates & lack of investment from the state.** When combined with Georgia’s failure to invest in elections administration broadly and the dramatic expansion of voter challenges enabled by SB 202, a lack of clear guidelines from the State Elections Board (SEB) has created mounting difficulties for election workers that will ultimately impact voters.
2. **Mass voter challenges continue in Georgia, and are an emerging anti-voter trend.** SB 202 emboldened conspiracy theorists, allowing any individual to challenge the eligibility of an unlimited number of voters in their county and disproportionately impacting Black, young, and likely Democratic voters.
3. **Far-right activists are now looking to private software companies, like EagleAI, to make mass voter challenges even easier.** EagleAI pitches itself as a tool that election boards can use to purge voters and that private individuals can use to challenge voter registrations — further opening the door for erroneous, unsupported challenges to untold thousands of lawful voters.
4. **Georgia’s anti-voter law SB 202 continues to serve as a template for omnibus voter suppression legislation in other states.** Since the 2021 passage of SB 202, at least 41 bills have been enacted in more than 25 states with similar anti-voter provisions.
5. **Efforts to prevent the certification of small-scale elections continue to ramp up, portending chaos for 2024.** While certification in Georgia should have been a breeze given the comparatively smaller Voting Eligible Population casting ballots with significantly lower turnout levels in 2023, that was far from the case.
6. **Georgia Republicans continue to flout federal protections against racial gerrymandering with new maps that dilute Black voting power.** Instead of following the judge’s order to remedy the violation and deliver fair maps, the state legislature convened for a special session where they once again prioritized partisan power-clinging over accurately representing the diversity of Georgia voters in the General Assembly.
7. **Impacts of SB 202 on voter access in Georgia remain glaring, with a major uptick in vote-by-mail application rejection rates raising alarms for 2024.** From mass challenges to restrictions on mail voting to unfunded mandates burdening election administration, the harmful impacts of anti-voter bill SB 202 continued in 2023.

**Fair Fight will continue working to protect the freedom to vote** by...
* Supporting pro-democracy champions in the 2024 elections and beyond.
* Contacting voters who’ve been affected by mass voter purges and helping them maintain or reinstate their registrations.
* Equipping voters with the educational materials they need to confirm they’re registered, find their polling place or dropbox, cast their ballot, and have it counted.
* Running online ads to reach new voters and support voter turnout efforts.
* Mobilizing Democracy Watch volunteers to attend Board of Elections meetings and help cultivate pro-voter leadership on those bodies.
* And more!

**It’s clear that it will take a full-scale organizing effort to push back against anti-voter attacks and ensure free and fair elections in 2024 — and we need every Fair Fight supporter by our side to get it done.**
---

name: Jason Crow
subject: I wanted you to be the first to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
I’m running for re-election in Colorado’s 6th district. |
#
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76776508/448430770/-240320482?refcode=AU_JC_EG_GEN_RES_AC30_20240108_PM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_JC_EG_GEN_RES_AC30_20240108_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTdjMzQ0OS0yMWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=azIAIsvZv9QMXp580dmscyS6mAlt4ElCFvMU1nT2LHE=&emci=3396030d-52ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=8e7c3449-21af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=29801744) Hi team, It’s Jason Crow. As one of my top supporters, I wanted you to be the first to know: **I’m running for re-election in Colorado’s 6th district.** I am so proud of our work to defend democracy, fight extremism, and protect women’s reproductive rights — but our fight is just beginning. Our country has a big decision to make in November: Will we choose to let our worst instincts dictate our decisions, or will we lead by example by being a beacon of hope and optimism? You know my answer. I’ve always gone where the fight is, and I’m ready to continue bringing servant leadership to the halls of power. **One of the most important ways to show early support is by endorsing our campaign from Day One.** **[So, will you be a Day One Endorser to my campaign for Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76776509/448430772/-240320482?refcode=AU_JC_EG_GEN_RES_AC30_20240108_PM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_JC_EG_GEN_RES_AC30_20240108_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTdjMzQ0OS0yMWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=azIAIsvZv9QMXp580dmscyS6mAlt4ElCFvMU1nT2LHE=&emci=3396030d-52ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=8e7c3449-21af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=29801744)** | [ENDORSE JASON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76776510/448430773/-240320482?refcode=AU_JC_EG_GEN_RES_AC30_20240108_PM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_JC_EG_GEN_RES_AC30_20240108_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTdjMzQ0OS0yMWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=azIAIsvZv9QMXp580dmscyS6mAlt4ElCFvMU1nT2LHE=&emci=3396030d-52ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=8e7c3449-21af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=29801744)

Even before serving in Congress, my career has been grounded in the spirit of servant leadership.
I served three combat tours in Iraq and Afghanistan. Even as I rose up the ranks to be Captain, I never forgot what it was like to walk in the boots of a Private.
We looked out for each other. Every single day.
**That’s the spirit I’m working to bring to Congress. We need leaders willing to step above politics, find common ground, and take action on the hard issues. That work continues.**
**[If you’re all in, I hope you’ll become a Day One Endorser of my campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76776511/448430774/-240320482?refcode=AU_JC_EG_GEN_RES_AC30_20240108_PM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_JC_EG_GEN_RES_AC30_20240108_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTdjMzQ0OS0yMWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=azIAIsvZv9QMXp580dmscyS6mAlt4ElCFvMU1nT2LHE=&emci=3396030d-52ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=8e7c3449-21af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=29801744)**

I will continue to fight for our shared priorities including protecting our democracy, passing gun safety legislation, addressing the climate crisis, and codifying the right to an abortion.
Thank you for trusting me with your support. Now let’s continue our work, together.
— Jason Crow

body:
I know it doesn't sound like much, but my entire fight for progress is fueled by grassroots gifts just like that.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76776495/448430753/-1997846893?refcode=jtk1304-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTdjMzQ0OS0yMWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1eVcGjgTgms5kw9j2uA1oHojAFYIS4oxsDS9MPrkyLE=)
---
$12.

I know it doesn't sound like much, Peter, but my _entire_ fight for progress is fueled by grassroots gifts just like that. [**That's why I'm going to ask you to donate $12 before my Jan. 12th public filing deadline**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76776497/448430755/-2022193277?&amounts=10,15,25,50,100,500&amount=12&refcode=jtk1304-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTdjMzQ0OS0yMWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1eVcGjgTgms5kw9j2uA1oHojAFYIS4oxsDS9MPrkyLE=) – but first I wanted to explain why your investment in my work is so important.
Growing up in Brooklyn meant that I didn't have any real power or privilege. I could do nothing as I watched corrupt government officials favor the powerful and wealthy over families like my own time and time again. I really, truly, felt voiceless.

**But when I made history in 2018 and became New York's first Black woman attorney general, I swore to never let another New Yorker feel the same way. So I rolled up my sleeves and got to work.**
And throughout my time in office, I have been able to secure _real_ wins for everyday, working families. From holding Big Pharma accountable for their role in the opioid epidemic to going toe to toe with far-right attorneys general around the nation, I have made it clear that New York is _not_ up for sale.
As you can imagine, my work has made me enemies. Thanks to supporters like you, I've been able to withstand their attacks so far – but as we head into 2024, I must keep that momentum going
**[That's why I'm asking you to invest just $12 for my Jan. 12th public filing deadline to help me continue my fight for progress. Can I count on you to chip in now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76776499/448430757/-2022193277?&amounts=10,15,25,50,100,500&amount=12&refcode=jtk1304-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTdjMzQ0OS0yMWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1eVcGjgTgms5kw9j2uA1oHojAFYIS4oxsDS9MPrkyLE=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76776501/448430759/-2022193277?&amounts=10,15,25,50,100,500&amount=12&refcode=jtk1304-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTdjMzQ0OS0yMWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1eVcGjgTgms5kw9j2uA1oHojAFYIS4oxsDS9MPrkyLE=)
---
Thank you for all of your support.

Letitia
With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a monthly donation to make sure I can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families?

subject: JUST IN: Menendez delivers alarming remarks on the Senate Floor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey

He’s on the Senate floor giving a speech accusing prosecutors of trying to "poison the jury pool" by releasing new indictments.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76776866/448432059/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTc3NDlhZi0yMWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3M_97YaxMo4vvB7js7_i9oquaPmKLEDZih58intzeQY=&emci=8ef71e6d-14af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=817749af-21af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=26261389)
