| | When we learned of Senator Menendez's foreign agent charges, I led the way in New Jersey calling for Menendez's expulsion from the US Senate. But Senator Menendez pushed back, again insinuating that _he's not going anywhere._ **Now, he's on the Senate floor giving a speech accusing the prosecutors in his case of trying to "poison the jury pool" by releasing new indictments.** He's saying that the United States Attorney's Office is engaged not in a prosecution, but a persecution. Despite multiple indictments against him, Bob Menendez thinks New Jersey owes him our Senate seat, and he's not backing down. Now more than ever, New Jersey needs hard working, trustworthy leaders focused on the common good and injecting some integrity and civility back into our politics,**not politicians only supported by the well-connected and well-off who think the rules only apply to them.** **You've heard me say before that I believe that the opposite of democracy is apathy.** We are losing more and more people to it while we allow this type of corruption to remain. [**We need to be doing things differently. That's why I'm running for Senate. Will you join me by making a donation today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76776868/448432060/-1197072038?refcode=2024-01-09-menendez&recurring=&amount=4&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=817749af-21af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTc3NDlhZi0yMWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3M_97YaxMo4vvB7js7_i9oquaPmKLEDZih58intzeQY=) Thank you, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life.
Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government.
Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home.

Once Membership is closed – it’s closed for good. To make things easier on you, I’ve even lowered the price for the next HOUR to just $25. | | | | Thank you for your continued support, | | Kat Cammack Congresswoman FL-03 | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- | Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life. Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government. Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home. | | FOLLOW KAT ONLINE | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- Donate by Mail Kat For Congress 5200 NW 43rd Street SUITE 102-180 Gainesville, FL, 32606 | | [PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]() Kat Cammack 5200 NW 43rd st, suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 \- =

name: Jeff Frazee
subject: Top political influencers on the 2024 elections… it’s not who you think
body:
Do Twitter and Instagram influencers sway elections?

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=39c1bc802c604b4ca9b2648a21a21108&_e=j5mYSiZ_30UnbN4aZwhJlN_B26peksr2TVjnhgT3-GOqznHLzaAEe5AJ5-eVKWDsNFeUnYAUqml5ts603g-HF5J8GmuWZS5PMaEgtXBR12yjOmDulzb54Nuf05AqNpApg8Iaux21JOh79ovqKMZPn-BNj8adxlYDw9W6t0xORspvvrxsrTgRMgZaZOcMuxFZzTIzafIKssTE7GQCmYZVYLxuktf3_ZL5GEN8QRLt8tFj-XbWAOE1dpsq4uMEzNnYr7hbLyFW-yXZdX5z0gvN-8ZxID14CaqJYCb2vatGrOSjxNxN9WMomliRZK_yxcMZSAAuXBVn4dzS_AEgZcQo2gr-eK2kVIubSlvHNOCUwIV7o1VE4WvYQhkPRwDxKmyofLpq2rFRUcnnMCKbLwpsJw%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do Twitter and Instagram influencers sway elections?

Everyone pretends to be an influencer from their armchair. But here's the reality behind who influences elections the most. The answer may surprise you, but I have facts to back it up.

Not Taylor Swit.

Not politicians Tweeting.

Not celebrities at the Oscars

**The biggest influencers on campaigns:** Door knockers.

Door knockers have the biggest impact on election outcomes, and I have the data to back it up.

First, please let me be completely transparent with you.

[I'm writing you with an urgent request to train 2,000 youth activists before the 2024 elections. I am going to ask you to support our efforts with a donation of $10 or more. Please allow me to explain why it's critical to winning in 2024.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=39c1bc802c604b4ca9b2648a21a21108&_e=j5mYSiZ_30UnbN4aZwhJlN_B26peksr2TVjnhgT3-GOqznHLzaAEe5AJ5-eVKWDsNFeUnYAUqml5ts603g-HF5J8GmuWZS5PMaEgtXBR12yjOmDulzb54Nuf05AqNpApg8Iaux21JOh79ovqKMZPn-BNj8adxlYDw9W6t0xORspvvrxsrTgRMgZaZOcMuxFZzTIzafIKssTE7GQCmYZVYAod3i-Tje4ZrbAd36y_zoYbiECaQLPDr-mjEZMYG4g6SC2lybOSu3s0p1CVH45_mgho7RJOvnG5AYym002Wyllxs8v9hojOI0poEw5tGtc-7_9TiI1bCSAPb2QBEO6QBFlHyJKZxMIbS9jT9aUGBRkK8q3HYAWSiHWeuK3gkdgBOV5-1EXireKdY_QbAu_EsQ%3D%3D)

I am under the gun to recruit college-age activists to door-knock for conservative, pro-Constitution, and pro-liberty candidates. It's called Operation Win at the Door (OWD).

First, please let me be completely transparent with you. I am under the gun to recruit college-age activists to door-knock for conservative, pro-Constitution, and pro-liberty candidates. name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: The impact of $5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Your support allows our campaign to directly reach undecided Missouri voters with Lucas’ message.
#
$5, Peter.
That’s what I’m asking you to chip in today to help us elect Lucas Kunce, defeat Josh Hawley, and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat this November.
**[CHIP IN $5 →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42451?refcode=em20240109-4573&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4573%2E614464%2Es8UxN_)**
$5 gives us the ability to reach 25 new Missouri voters with persuasive digital ads — or it allows us to send a piece of mail with more information about Lucas and our campaign to an undecided voter’s home.
**In a neck-and-neck race like this one, every single vote counts.**
And the best part? Every $1 spent here in Missouri can go nearly five times as far as it will in states like Texas and Florida. Our media markets are smaller and less expensive, and our organizers will have less ground to cover than in those big states.
**Investing in Missouri’s U.S. Senate race — our best shot to flip a GOP-held Senate seat this year — could be your chance to make a real impact in this election.**
**[So what do you say, Peter? Will you chip in $5 or more today to help us reach undecided voters with Lucas’ unifying vision for Missouri?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42451?refcode=em20240109-4573&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4573%2E614464%2Es8UxN_)**

name: Stop AIPAC via Our Revolution
subject: AIPAC isn't messing around
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13124?t=1011?refcode=email-20240109&akid=5161%2E5885482%2ER5Aj_w ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis, AIPAC isn’t
messing around:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13386?t=1052&akid=5161%2E5885482%2ER5Aj_w ][IMG]

The right-wing special interest group just made an $18 million down
payment on the 2024 elections (including nearly $100K to GOP Speaker Mike
Johnson).

AIPAC has pledged to spend a whopping $100 million or more against
Progressives fighting for peace in 2024 — all while supporting Netanyahu’s
relentless bombing campaign that has killed tens of thousands of
Palestinian civilians.

Our movement has beat big money before, and we can do it again if we
organize to defend Progressive champions like Jamaal Bowman, Rashida
Tlaib, Barbara Lee, and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez on the ballot this year.

In 2020, Bernie almost overcame the massive campaign spending by groups
aligned with AIPAC, but the Democratic Party machine coalesced against us
and millions of corporate dollars flooded the airwaves to do one thing:
stop Bernie Sanders from becoming president. We can’t let it happen again
to our Progressive advocates for peace in Congress.

In the 2022 congressional primaries, AIPAC supported 109 election-denying
Republicans and teamed up with corporate Democrats to try to stop
Progressive candidates. But with our relentless organizing and grassroots
support, we elected NINE new Progressives to Congress!

If we’re going to fundamentally change the Democratic Party and protect
our strongest Progressive seats in power, we’re going to need your
grassroots support.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13124?t=1048?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240109&akid=5161%2E5885482%2ER5Aj_w ]Chip in now to directly support our work to defend and expand the
Progressive caucus against $100,000,000 of AIPAC’s anti-peace,
anti-progressive spending. As the largest grassroots-funded progressive
political organization in the country, we’re counting on your
contributions in 2024.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13124?t=1035?express_lane=true&amount=12&refcode=email-20240109&akid=5161%2E5885482%2ER5Aj_w ]CHIP IN $12 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13124?t=1036?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240109&akid=5161%2E5885482%2ER5Aj_w ]CHIP IN $27

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13124?t=1039?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=email-20240109&akid=5161%2E5885482%2ER5Aj_w ]CHIP IN $100 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13124?t=1040?&amount=12&refcode=email-20240109&akid=5161%2E5885482%2ER5Aj_w ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

While we build on our Progressive organizing and calls for peace, top
Corporate Democrats like Hakeem Jeffries, Debbie Wasserman Schultz, and
Josh Gottheimer are taking tens of thousands of dollars in campaign
contributions from AIPAC. Wasserman Schultz and Gottheimer were two of the
Democrats who voted to censure Rashida Tlaib during her fight for peace
for Palestinians.

AIPAC is starting to deploy millions against Progressives and the races
are already heating up — early voting will start in a few short weeks for
Barbara Lee’s race against corporate Dems for the U.S. Senate seat in
California!

Progressive champions like Barbara Lee, Rashida Tlaib, Jamaal Bowman,
Ilhan Omar, and others have bravely spoken out against Israeli war crimes
in Gaza. And now AIPAC wants them out of Congress.

Corporate, right-wing spending in U.S. elections is completely out of
control. We’ve seen it defeat Progressives, and we’ve also beat the odds
and the money to WIN. This will be central to the battle ahead in 2024 and
beyond as long as we have a campaign finance system where the slightest
advocacy for peace or criticism of a bombing campaign killing tens of
thousands of civilians leads to $100 million lined up against Peace

clean_body: [ ]Our Revolution logo Peter Willis, AIPAC isn’t messing around: [ ][IMG] The right-wing special interest group just made an $18 million down payment on the 2024 elections (including nearly $100K to GOP Speaker Mike Johnson). AIPAC has pledged to spend a whopping $100 million or more against Progressives fighting for peace in 2024 — all while supporting Netanyahu’s relentless bombing campaign that has killed tens of thousands of Palestinian civilians. Our movement has beat big money before, and we can do it again if we organize to defend Progressive champions like Jamaal Bowman, Rashida Tlaib, Barbara Lee, and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez on the ballot this year. In 2020, Bernie almost overcame the massive campaign spending by groups aligned with AIPAC, but the Democratic Party machine coalesced against us and millions of corporate dollars flooded the airwaves to do one thing: stop Bernie Sanders from becoming president. We can’t let it happen again to our Progressive advocates for peace in Congress. In the 2022 congressional primaries, AIPAC supported 109 election-denying Republicans and teamed up with corporate Democrats to try to stop Progressive candidates. But with our relentless organizing and grassroots support, we elected NINE new Progressives to Congress! If we’re going to fundamentally change the Democratic Party and protect our strongest Progressive seats in power, we’re going to need your grassroots support. | | Patriot,

---
Now that I’ve boarded Trump Force One, I want to give you an update on my day in court.
---
I spent the day in the Washington, D.C. Circuit Court defending my rights that are under siege by Crooked Joe’s deranged prosecutor, Jack Smith – who was _ILLEGALLY_ _APPOINTED_ to the Special Counsel.
---
His appointment is in direct violation of the Appointments Clause of the U.S. Constitution.
---
But sadly, America’s “Justice” Department has been hijacked by lawless tyrants who would love nothing more than to run the Constitution through a shredder.
---
**While I will keep fighting in court to win this rigged case against me, I care _more_ about winning the battle in the __court of public opinion.__**
---
And I am confident that _WE_ are _winning_ that war.
---
We see it in the polls. We see it with the unbelievable love and support I receive on the campaign trail. We see it in our grassroots fundraising.
---
Our _true_ vindication will come on November 5, 2024 when the _PEOPLE_ of our country vote out the tyrants to save America. It will be the day that liberty and justice _TRUMP_ tyranny and corruption.
---
**And now, I’m humbly asking for your support to ensure we**** _keep_****winning the battle in the court of public opinion so that we can win back the White House and drain the Swamp once and for all.**
---
**[Please make a contribution before Trump Force One lands in Florida so that we can wrap up the primary ASAP and focus 100% of our attention on the _REAL_ mission: winning back the White House and peacefully saving America!](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=fdd4c64162544e039c981f0aec858f5c&_e=gajCbquScOJ0i4OeN19gY840GPpfhfXDbQDxeVm_NxX7in0p7nSv66tbvpKde-PxShGk5m1AMos9zXscKNY19JANbsllJ81CD-NgAON4w1ZZTCJCfNKgkHU8542K9XbzzZvm9_csf-s0HFY4dFEu6Nshiliw8A-1SlGnOvRVok1_jXndAJbybcIpUJeORN_GHkD7XqG1W9_GuMEURtuH-giqzc62KPM6rnUenL-iA10Pr7EUI4rIViZ9Q5rmkzU5hHRF6-YB-ow67VfKeN-h4xAfy5gKWoz0KLnsG_5VnABkc3faoxD-VMDqtD0Lj0f4vvR7qR6eVUBinHKHwOV0VKESn_PGo_8ihidBm4v_pMJg2zpZEUZmpmUd4UltLbUOD2Ggg6jpGb5fkCLcqHx9AMUUST2tjRaZ0oKt1Qb8PMJTYqsfJMWCtarbDL3qkKMwx8fYGEJtTaxqbaVfRHZrSqeV3vsjVctZB9DNmhGldWMWHgFCI24Tb25nUu_CBMpZ)**

It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. If you'd like to change your subscription status [follow this link.](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/e/encryptedConfirmUnsubscribe?_r=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_s=fdd4c64162544e039c981f0aec858f5c&_t=rQtU0glB5i7yGSzK_wEUm1G19R0_Cj23n5UeV5X0WbDlmnyiMC__MlOayf4lXnnQebt1pnt0rXchtzgAlAzyRswFol7OK6qWBmA1Q62evf9DZw_UH5txFRR5Jrm4BLNb2Osy09RQDyHfT__6QN8qbO3zkv0h6ry3-Uzja_8ndEs%3D)

clean_body: Briefing you on my day in court in Washington, D.C.| | | | | Patriot, Now that I’ve boarded Trump Force One, I want to give you an update on my day in court. I spent the day in the Washington, D.C. Circuit Court defending my rights that are under siege by Crooked Joe’s deranged prosecutor, Jack Smith – who was ILLEGALLY APPOINTED to the Special Counsel. His appointment is in direct violation of the Appointments Clause of the U.S. Constitution. But sadly, America’s “Justice” Department has been hijacked by lawless tyrants who would love nothing more than to run the Constitution through a shredder. While I will keep fighting in court to win this rigged case against me, I care more about winning the battle in the court of public opinion. And I am confident that WE are winning that war. We see it in the polls. We see it with the unbelievable love and support I receive on the campaign trail. We see it in our grassroots fundraising. Our true vindication will come on November 5, 2024 when the PEOPLE of our country vote out the tyrants to save America. It will be the day that liberty and justice TRUMP tyranny and corruption. And now, I’m humbly asking for your support to ensure we keepwinning the battle in the court of public opinion so that we can win back the White House and drain the Swamp once and for all. (To conclude my in-flight briefing, I must say that if you are doing poorly right now in Biden’s America, please do not feel pressured to donate at this time.) | | Thank you, Donald J. name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Dellicker?=
subject: Dellicker Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN DELLICKER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Support our Local Police |
---
| | [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=decaa14b75&e=1090c5c412)
---
| **CAMPAIGN ALERT!
Three Local Police Organizations Support Kevin Dellicker for Congress**
**[Read More Here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=9070866a53&e=1090c5c412)**
---
|
---
| Dear Friends and Neighbors,

Today is National Law Enforcement Day. Thank you to all the local police who work hard in dangerous and tough conditions to keep us safe and secure.

It’s been a terrible couple of weeks for violent crime in Pa.’s 7th District.

On December 29, three more shootings in Allentown killed two more people, including a 1-year-old baby. Those victims brought Allentown’s homicide total to 18 murders in 2023, double the number in 2022.

In response, a group of local activists and politicians, including Susan Wild, gathered in Allentown to decry the violence and offer their solutions. You can read about the rally [here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=933be6cde1&e=1090c5c412). One speaker said the city needs more youth programming and recreation centers. Another bemoaned the lack of parks. A third said we need more jobs and less homelessness. “When people are wrestling with poverty, they do what they need to survive,” he said.

Do you know what nobody reportedly said? “Support the police.”

In fact, some of those same activists and politicians who rallied in Allentown last week were marching in the streets to demonize local police a few years ago.

**I am pleased to announce the backing of my candidacy by three local police organizations representing hundreds of law enforcement officers in the greater Lehigh Valley:**
* Fraternal Order of Police Queen City Lodge #10, which represents **City of Allentown Police Officers** ([here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=fefc219491&e=1090c5c412))
* Fraternal Order of Police Bethlehem Star Lodge #20, which represents **City of Bethlehem Police Officers** ([here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=04d7d58b11&e=1090c5c412))
* Fraternal Order of Police Joseph J. Haggerty Memorial Lodge #40, which represents local **Pennsylvania State Troopers** ([here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=7991db3760&e=1090c5c412))

These officers put their lives on the line every day to protect and to serve. They’ve been warning for years that “defund the police” would result in dangerous conditions throughout our communities. They simply don’t have enough officers, training, equipment, or infrastructure to counter the threat.

In Congress, I’ll work to help local first responders get the resources they need to do their jobs. I’ll advocate for improvements in their family support infrastructure. And as someone who has worn a uniform in difficult circumstances, I’ll defend the profession from unwarranted criticism.

Our local police deserve our support. They have it from me.

**Keep America Free.**

_Kevin Dellicker is a Republican from Heidelberg Township, Lehigh County, running for U.S. House of Representatives in Pa.’s 7th District. He is a 28-year military veteran, technology company owner, husband and father to three sons. He’s not a career politician. He’s a proven leader with the experience and courage to Keep America Free. Learn more at[www.dellickerforcongress.com](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=1914fbc5ca&e=1090c5c412)._

clean_body: Support our Local Police | | | | CAMPAIGN ALERT! Three Local Police Organizations Support Kevin Dellicker for Congress | | Dear Friends and Neighbors, Today is National Law Enforcement Day. Thank you to all the local police who work hard in dangerous and tough conditions to keep us safe and secure. It’s been a terrible couple of weeks for violent crime in Pa.’s 7th District. On December 29, three more shootings in Allentown killed two more people, including a 1-year-old baby. Those victims brought Allentown’s homicide total to 18 murders in 2023, double the number in 2022. In response, a group of local activists and politicians, including Susan Wild, gathered in Allentown to decry the violence and offer their solutions. You can read about the rally . One speaker said the city needs more youth programming and recreation centers. Another bemoaned the lack of parks. A third said we need more jobs and less homelessness. “When people are wrestling with poverty, they do what they need to survive,” he said. Do you know what nobody reportedly said? “Support the police.” In fact, some of those same activists and politicians who rallied in Allentown last week were marching in the streets to demonize local police a few years ago. I am pleased to announce the backing of my candidacy by three local police organizations representing hundreds of law enforcement officers in the greater Lehigh Valley: Fraternal Order of Police Queen City Lodge #10, which represents City of Allentown Police Officers () Fraternal Order of Police Bethlehem Star Lodge #20, which represents City of Bethlehem Police Officers () Fraternal Order of Police Joseph J. Haggerty Memorial Lodge #40, which represents local Pennsylvania State Troopers () These officers put their lives on the line every day to protect and to serve. They’ve been warning for years that “defund the police” would result in dangerous conditions throughout our communities. They simply don’t have enough officers, training, equipment, or infrastructure to counter the threat. In Congress, I’ll work to help local first responders get the resources they need to do their jobs. I’ll advocate for improvements in their family support infrastructure. And as someone who has worn a uniform in difficult circumstances, I’ll defend the profession from unwarranted criticism. Our local police deserve our support. They have it from me. Keep America Free. Kevin Dellicker is a Republican from Heidelberg Township, Lehigh County, running for U.S. House of Representatives in Pa.’s 7th District. He is a 28-year military veteran, technology company owner, husband and father to three sons. He’s not a career politician. He’s a proven leader with the experience and courage to Keep America Free. name: Team AOC
subject: NEWS: Supreme Court will decide if we finally tax the rich
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
SCOTUS will hear a case on taxing the 1%. No wonder billionaires have been lavishing Justices with gifts.
#
Did you see this headline?

A new report shows that, in 2022, the wealthiest 1% of Americans avoided paying taxes on $21.2 trillion in financial gains — while paying an average effective tax rate of 8.2%.1 The average American family paid an average of 13.6%. 😱
Now, after a year of revelations that some Supreme Court Justices accepted lavish gifts from billionaires, SCOTUS is about to decide whether Congress and the President have the power to tax these untaxed profits for the ultra-rich at all.
Since her first day on the campaign trail, Alexandria has been demanding that the rich pay their fair share. As we’ve watched SCOTUS devolve into an ethics crisis, it’s never been more clear: **extreme wealth in the hands of very few people is simply not good for society.**
[If you can, will you please chip in $5 today so that Alexandria can continue to call out corruption and ensure that no one — no matter how rich or powerful — is above the law?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240109.xtv5GU&refcode=em20240109-5612-P_FND_EGR_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5612%2E2526796%2EIQD2qv)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240109.xtv5GU&refcode=em20240109-5612-P_FND_EGR_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=5612%2E2526796%2EIQD2qv)**
Whether or not you can contribute today, thank you for standing with our movement.
Thank you,
Team AOC
1: [americansfortaxfairness.org/ultra-wealthys-8-5-trillion-untaxed-income](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/22151?t=21&akid=5612%2E2526796%2EIQD2qv)

name: Wisconsin Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: Republicans have unconstitutionally diluted minority power. Period.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
In the two most recent presidential elections, Wisconsin was won by less than one point, but in the state Assembly, Wisconsin Republicans are just two seats away from a supermajority. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**It’s no secret that in states like Wisconsin, Republicans have gerrymandered maps to unconstitutionally dilute minority power and maintain undemocratic rule over state legislatures.** In the two most recent presidential elections, Wisconsin was won by _less than one point_ , but in the state Assembly, Wisconsin Republicans are just _two seats away_ from a supermajority: | **_Wisconsin Assembly Partisan Control_**
---
**Republicans:** | **64 seats**
**Democrats:** | **35 seats**
That’s why last month, the Wisconsin Supreme Court threw out the GOP-drawn maps – and now _the legislature could soon be up for grabs._
[Democrats could flip state legislatures in Wisconsin and across the country and pass meaningful abortion and gun safety legislation. We did it in Michigan and Minnesota thanks to generous donors, and we can do it again, but only with your help. name: Zach Shrewsbury
subject: Can I introduce myself?
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://gvxllm.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjc1ODc0OSxcImxcIjoxMDk5MjMwMzEzNTk0MjM3NTQsXCJyXCI6MTA5OTIzMDc4NTk3NzcyODUyfSIsInMiOiJlNDk2ZTU4ZWM3YzlkZjFjIn0)
| | | [ ](https://gvxllm.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjc1ODc0OSxcImxcIjoxMDk5MjMwMzEzNjY3NjM3ODgsXCJyXCI6MTA5OTIzMDc4NTk3NzcyODUyfSIsInMiOiI3MjFiNTFkZjE1ZTQ1ZDEyIn0)
---
|
---
Dear ,

Joe Manchin isn’t running to represent the people of West Virginia in the United States Senate.

But I am.

I’m Zach Shrewsbury. I’m a Marine Corps veteran, a working-class Democrat, a proud father, and a lifelong West Virginian. **I’m also the only Democrat in the race, making our candidacy not just a campaign for one seat, but a pivotal moment for maintaining Democratic control of the Senate.** Our vision for West Virginia is clear: a state thriving with new opportunities, embracing robust renewable energy investments, and ensuring universal healthcare for all.

[**If you haven’t become a founding member of Team Shrewsbury, now is the moment and it’s never been more important. Can you chip in $15 or more now and help defend the Democratic majority in the U.S. Senate?**](https://gvxllm.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjc1ODc0OSxcImxcIjoxMDk5MjMwMzEzNzIwMDY2NzAsXCJyXCI6MTA5OTIzMDc4NTk3NzcyODUyfSIsInMiOiIyMjY0MDkzNjg1NzgwMTViIn0)
| | | [ DONATE ](https://gvxllm.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjc1ODc0OSxcImxcIjoxMDk5MjMwMzEzNzcyNDk1NTIsXCJyXCI6MTA5OTIzMDc4NTk3NzcyODUyfSIsInMiOiI4M2JhYTE1ZjMyMGE2ZGI5In0)
---
|
---
So why am I the right candidate for the people of West Virginia? Because we always deserved better than we got in Joe Manchin.
* It’s not acceptable that working families have been sacrificed at the altar of corporations and their DC lobbyists.
* It’s not acceptable that extreme politicians threaten our right to vote, or access to the polls.
* It’s not acceptable that a full-time job doesn’t pay a living wage or that paid leave is not required by law everywhere in our country.
* It’s not acceptable that people in Texas and Georgia and South Carolina can be criminally prosecuted for trying to access healthcare when we could have codified Roe for everyone.

Our country isn’t working for the majority of working people. Republicans funded by big corporate interests have rigged the game against families, making it difficult to get ahead. The elected leaders we send to Washington must be accountable to the people they represent, and they must prove to voters that democracy can work for them.

My political opinions started to form when I joined the Marine Corps and were influenced by the Occupy Wall Street movement and later, by my organizing work as a climate activist. Seeing people around me working hard yet unable to make ends meet made me realize how it is not the merit that matters in our country but whether you have a wealthy family, what network you can lean on, and what advantages your upbringing provides. The United States is no longer a land of opportunity for my generation, but this is precisely why we are running this campaign.

I am from the same cloth as most Americans; I am a working-class West Virginian. [**And with your support, I will be a working-class Senator. Can you donate today to help us win one of the most crucial seats in the country? **](https://gvxllm.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjc1ODc0OSxcImxcIjoxMDk5MjMwMzEzODE0NDM4NTgsXCJyXCI6MTA5OTIzMDc4NTk3NzcyODUyfSIsInMiOiJlZTRmY2VhODc4Y2JmMDVkIn0)

For our future,

Zach Shrewsbury, Candidate, U.S. Senate (D-WV)

|
---
| | [ ](https://gvxllm.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjc1ODc0OSxcImxcIjoxMDk5MjMwMzEzOTA4ODEwNDcsXCJyXCI6MTA5OTIzMDc4NTk3NzcyODUyfSIsInMiOiIxMDFlYzk5YjA4NzQzYTA1In0)
---
| Zach Shrewsbury (D-WV) is running for the U.S. Senate seat as the only Democrat in the race. A native West Virginian, a Marine Corps veteran, and a grandson of a coal miner, Zach has a passion for making a difference in his community. He has seen firsthand the struggles faced by working families who are just trying to get by. Zach's military service experiences and his work as a community and climate justice organizer shaped his commitment to fighting for social and economic justice, and he's dedicated his career to making a difference in people's lives. [For Democrats to keep the Senate, Zach has to win. Support the campaign today.](https://gvxllm.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjc1ODc0OSxcImxcIjoxMDk5MjMwMzEzOTkyNjk2NjEsXCJyXCI6MTA5OTIzMDc4NTk3NzcyODUyfSIsInMiOiI4MzBkZGVkMTEwMDlmNWJlIn0)
|
---
| | [ DONATE ](https://gvxllm.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjc1ODc0OSxcImxcIjoxMDk5MjMwMzE0MDU1NjExMjAsXCJyXCI6MTA5OTIzMDc4NTk3NzcyODUyfSIsInMiOiIzYWVmMzk1ZTY5ODQ2Y2E4In0)
---
|
---

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76779825/448443291/-1710610234?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmE5MjI3MzAtMmJhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=By2dgyJz24hRt3Hnz1mFxF-fDpbFKhwnMlF4iaLS7_Q=) Friend,

Less than a week from the start of the Republican presidential primaries, and a chilling message has been sweeping around our capitol:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76779826/448443292/-1710610234?refcode=em-1.9.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmE5MjI3MzAtMmJhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=By2dgyJz24hRt3Hnz1mFxF-fDpbFKhwnMlF4iaLS7_Q=) _“California’s waivers are now a perennial punching bag for congressional Republicans, who have taken aim at the state’s electric vehicle mandate and ban on gas-powered lawn equipment. And a group of red states, led by Ohio, is challenging the constitutionality of California’s unique authority to set stricter-than-federal air quality standards, in a case that could reach the Supreme Court._ _A former U.S. EPA scientist who worked at the agency during the Trump years said that not having the waivers in hand would make it still easier for a second Trump administration to prevent California from implementing its rules.”_ **At a time that CA-30 is electing a new representative for the first time in over twenty years, we have to make sure we elect someone who can take on the mantle of being a tireless fighter for us in Congress and not allow any potential Trump administration any attacks on our state.** | ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76779827/448443293/-1710610234?refcode=em-1.9.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmE5MjI3MzAtMmJhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=By2dgyJz24hRt3Hnz1mFxF-fDpbFKhwnMlF4iaLS7_Q=)****

>From authoring meaningful legislation to add more affordable housing, protecting wildlife in California, and authoring first-in-the-nation legislation to combat climate change, I have proven myself to be the most viable progressive woman, our biggest climate champion, and the most accomplished policymaker running for this seat.
In fact, in 2018 I authored AB 2975, a bill to protect California’s wild and scenic rivers when the Trump administration was trying to take away their protections. Under my leadership, we held strong and California prevailed.
**This is our chance to set the tone about the type of leadership we want to keep in Congress, but doing this depends on your support:**
[**With less than two months until our competitive primary, please chip in $3 or more today to elect the best person to carry on Adam Schiff’s legacy of standing up to hostile Republicans in CA-30.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76779828/448443294/-1710610234?refcode=em-1.9.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmE5MjI3MzAtMmJhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=By2dgyJz24hRt3Hnz1mFxF-fDpbFKhwnMlF4iaLS7_Q=)
Thank you as always for your support,
Laura

clean_body: | = Friend, Less than a week from the start of the Republican presidential primaries, and a chilling message has been sweeping around our capitol: = “California’s waivers are now a perennial punching bag for congressional Republicans, who have taken aim at the state’s electric vehicle mandate and ban on gas-powered lawn equipment. And a group of red states, led by Ohio, is challenging the constitutionality of California’s unique authority to set stricter-than-federal air quality standards, in a case that could reach the Supreme Court. A former U.S. EPA scientist who worked at the agency during the Trump years said that not having the waivers in hand would make it still easier for a second Trump administration to prevent California from implementing its rules.” At a time that CA-30 is electing a new representative for the first time in over twenty years, we have to make sure we elect someone who can take on the mantle of being a tireless fighter for us in Congress and not allow any potential Trump administration any attacks on our state. | **= From authoring meaningful legislation to add more affordable housing, protecting wildlife in California, and authoring first-in-the-nation legislation to combat climate change, I have proven myself to be the most viable progressive woman, our biggest climate champion, and the most accomplished policymaker running for this seat. In fact, in 2018 I authored AB 2975, a bill to protect California’s wild and scenic rivers when the Trump administration was trying to take away their protections. Under my leadership, we held strong and California prevailed. This is our chance to set the tone about the type of leadership we want to keep in Congress, but doing this depends on your support: = Thank you as always for your support, Laura If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: It’s a great day to be a Michigander
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1010%2E135344%2E_nt8Ay)

Friend,
Last night, like the rest of Michigan, I watched with bated breath as the Wolverines capped off an undefeated season, beating the Huskies and winning the National Championship for the first time since 1997. Governor Whitmer has declared today the official “Wolverine Day” in honor of the occasion.
There is no doubt that, as the representative of Michigan State, I bleed Spartan green. But, at the end of the day, we’re all Michiganders, and I for one am always happy to see our state come out on top – especially against a team from the coast. And with Michigan taking the Championship, the Lions in the playoffs this upcoming weekend, the Red Wings on a three game streak, and the Pistons pulling off a recent win – there is a TON to be proud of here in Michigan.
While the Wolverines can take a much deserved break and celebrate their victory, Team Slotkin is full steam ahead. We’re onboarding new staff this week, settling into our new HQ, and traversing the state to talk to voters, no matter what color they wear on game day.
[**We’ve got a lot of work to do to make sure the state of Michigan says “Go Blue” once again on November 5th. Our race is a dead heat, and our opponents are preparing to spend millions of dollars to flip the seat red. Will you chip in $3 to my campaign?](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-jan24.--Kpen&refcode=em240109-1-15&t=2&akid=1010%2E135344%2E_nt8Ay)**

body:
We knew today was going to be the day that Trump’s lawyers argued for his presidential immunity before a federal appeals court.
#
Derek,
We knew today was going to be the day that Trump’s lawyers argued for his presidential immunity before a federal appeals court.
What we did not know was that Trump’s attorneys would argue — in court — that Trump could order SEAL Team 6 to carry out political assassinations without threat of prosecution as long as Congress fails to remove him from office.
This, after Trump has already threatened the former Chairman of the Joint Chiefs with execution and to purge the ranks of senior Military officers.
After Trump's team released plans to gut the Federal government and replace career public servants with loyalists and sycophants.
After Trump called his political opponents “vermin,” and threatened to use the Military and Department of Justice to root out people who disagree with him.
After Trump advisor Roger Stone called for the assassination of Democratic Congressmen...
What else do we need to say, Derek? There is no greater threat to our democracy than Donald Trump. None.

name: Team Spanberger
subject: results-driven leader
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
During Abigail’s time in Congress, she’s been focused on progress. If there’s one thing that Virginians know, it’s that she’s results-driven and delivers on her promises to our community.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76780359/448445183/1993432125?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-01-09_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2QwYmFmZGMtMmRhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=x4_9JkoppWcifUZXCMteV3KEigbFX1zyxPVGmHZWsSA=)
---
| Peter,

During Abigail’s time in Congress, she’s been focused on progress. If there’s one thing that Virginians know, it’s that she’s results-driven and delivers on her promises to our community.

She’s delivered time and time again, whether it be lowering healthcare costs, supporting our veterans, investing in our physical infrastructure, taking care of our neighbors struggling with addiction, or standing up for our national security.

We deserve leaders like Abigail, and we’re already assembling the building blocks of our gubernatorial campaign to make sure she can continue to serve our Commonwealth.

name: Susan Wild
subject: re: good quality, affordable health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
I’ve been fighting for affordable healthcare and lowering prescription drug prices since I got to Congress.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76780887/448446950/-1109429436?refcode=BLU_EM_SWC_2024-01-09_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDQ5ODAxOS0zMGFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=43DCZP6Wt1l8rf3jJWyxTSmDVuyGSMELo2DVrTDsJj8=)
---
Peter,

I recently wrote a piece in The Hill on the challenges of finding good quality, affordable health care – a topic I hear about everywhere I go in my district.

Across my district, access to health care in the rural parts of the Lehigh Valley is a recurring challenge. This is a huge issue for access to preventive care, an aspect that is critical to overall health and well-being.

That’s why I’m pushing to pass the bipartisan Fairness for Rural Teaching Hospitals Act. This would ensure that rural teaching hospitals are receiving higher and fairer funding for the work they do in training the next generation of rural physicians.

I know that ensuring our rural hospitals are properly funded is key to retaining and attracting physicians so that people in need can access good quality, affordable health care.

[_**I’ve been fighting for affordable healthcare and lowering prescription drug prices since I got to Congress. Now, I’m facing a tough election this November, so will you chip in to keep me in this fight?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76780888/448446951/-1109429436?refcode=BLU_EM_SWC_2024-01-09_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDQ5ODAxOS0zMGFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=43DCZP6Wt1l8rf3jJWyxTSmDVuyGSMELo2DVrTDsJj8=)

name: Blake Dellinger
subject: Lawn Signs Are Here!
body:
[image: IMG_5161.jpg]

Friedman Supporters,

I have an exciting update! *Our yard signs are fresh on the press and ready
to be delivered. *If you live in CA-30 we would be happy to drop one off to
you!

Putting up a campaign sign in your front yard or on your window is a great
way to show your support of Laura!

*If you would like a sign delivered to you, please use the link below to
request one and we will have them delivered to you this week/weekend. *

https://lauraforcongress.org/sign

If you do not have a front yard that's okay, we can give you just the sign
so you can display it in your window!

Thank you for your support of Laura, and let us know if you'd like to help
us reach as many voters as possible by volunteering between now and
election day.

Sincerely,
Blake Dellinger
Political Director
Laura Friedman for Congress

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazi for Congress
body:
Special Election EMERGENCY UPDATE

| |
---
| | | *****EMERGENCY NEW YORK SPECIAL ELECTION UPDATE*****
_A major Left Wing Group has just lined up a jaw-dropping $5.9 MILLION ad buy to flip NY-03 blue and crush our GOP nominee Mazi Pilip in this MUST-WIN Special Election._
---
| [](http://links.greatamericatoday.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=28b1bb7fd1d8485cbb7f51a69abaf869&_e=JI9P8CVw5s0gzWuKQlg4fQ7Kgso2xy4sa4aebn8EE1fODHgBwb8CsQuEd7uoZf0qE32bjDpkWgzejOjZLIgP5J64W_K9csP21jLDWRUzCn52e7OVCdouPFtIur-nmXJWZoLC4BZYX9xVXaF9-kumdDYBWKUj4WMTq-1IHFJZI5vNCGUOqGHaJgE6_jrk0oSQwkjf2eAv0GEwyfMqav6j--RvY0S26eKJ-BIOjqEiMXmQYD-AbfdnsKraMqFTlUSl_ntF1qzovVtI3QXn6G4A_zSvZbmzt0S3i2LrWgBeoEoREVALZdDPNj3t50tf7chQAdF77NxDjTu0T0y9MZ4e5vIJJHy76urJmOO1ldhjUxhM1sXtH6xkRSKz_S15hwiIlZz_2ik-GmwkMhOfvTOoII6tveS1avAsl88n-PT9JNQ%3D)
---
It's like we've been hit by a ton of bricks - and what happens now will decide everything...

Our hopes of winning this race and protecting our House Majority rely on the immediate responses we get to this email.

**So please, please, help before it 's too late.**

This is the first & biggest race of 2024. We cannot lose this race or it will give Democrats all the momentum they need to crush GOP candidates across the country and end our House Majority.

With how much Democrats and their big-money donors are spending, we could just throw in the towel now...

name: Kathianne Sellers Williams
subject: I’m grateful Brian has you by his side
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Hi, Peter, I’m Kathianne, Brian’s wife, and Abeni’s mama (and mama to our dogs, Disco and Moe, of course!). [**I'm reaching out to ask you to chip in $5 to Brian's campaign to help us keep up our momentum.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76780936/448447165/-1417367329?refcode=em24_240109_RFR_fnd_gq_act___KSW_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240109_RFR_fnd_gq_act___KSW_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=&refcode2=8954cda3-30af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODk1NGNkYTMtMzBhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QgnLM9gbwBHTgi2N--zqTOH_iiEwq5cEei2coiPGW6E=) But first, I want you to know why your support is so crucial.

Brian and I have been together since July 4th, 2001. Since the beginning, we’ve been two very different people.

Brian is the oldest of two children; I’m the youngest of six. Brian grew up in a military family that moved around; I lived in the same house until I left for college. I’m an open book; Brian’s an intensely _private_ person.

The course of our entire lives changed on Thursday, July 7th, 2016, when Brian picked up a trauma surgeon shift at Parkland Hospital. That night, he was tasked with caring for seven police officers who were gunned down at a Black Lives Matter march and sadly had to tell many of their families that he was unable to save them.

While he’s declined media interviews in the past, the hospital had scheduled a press conference the next day. He had an opportunity to use his voice as a Black doctor to speak about race, gun violence, and the pain the Dallas community was feeling.

Something changed in him that night. My private, introverted husband took a chance at vulnerability. Without seeking it, he **was given an incredible platform and a chance to give a voice to the voiceless.**

We both knew he couldn’t stop there.

Throughout his entire life, Brian has dedicated himself to service. First in service to our nation in the Air Force, then in the trauma bay (When we met as he was starting his career, he was pulling 120+ hours a week!). Now, he’s running to serve TX-32 in Congress.

I’m so proud of my husband for choosing to **Be the Change** , and I’m so grateful that he has you by his side on this campaign. [**I hope you’ll help us continue building momentum with a donation toward Brian’s campaign. Any amount will make a big difference!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76780937/448447166/-1417367329?refcode=em24_240109_RFR_fnd_gq_act___KSW_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240109_RFR_fnd_gq_act___KSW_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=&refcode2=8954cda3-30af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODk1NGNkYTMtMzBhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QgnLM9gbwBHTgi2N--zqTOH_iiEwq5cEei2coiPGW6E=) Our time at HER Time PAC may be coming to an end, but I look forward to continuing this fight. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76781100/448447679/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20240109_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODllYjdlN2ItMzFhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JFPuQ0jDpENihdzYDUMJ5Z5N_sEeP3YTsiT479vMj4E=)
---
I have some exciting news, Peter. I’m proud to announce that HER Time is joining forces with [**Her Bold Move**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76781101/448447680/-1746803361?refcode=AU_HTP_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20240109_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODllYjdlN2ItMzFhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JFPuQ0jDpENihdzYDUMJ5Z5N_sEeP3YTsiT479vMj4E=&emci=708b7dd1-2eaf-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=89eb7e7b-31af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=1720400), a PAC that uplifts the voices of progressive women nationwide so we can make sure that women have a seat at the table where priorities are set and decisions are made. Simply put, we need more women in power, but too many of us with the vision and drive to make lasting change don’t have the resources needed to win elections. That’s why I launched HER Time PAC — and I’m proud of the fact that our work has helped women candidates across the country win elections, earn a seat at the table, and break down those final glass ceilings one crack at a time. **None of this would have been possible without you, Peter.** Our team relied almost exclusively on donations we received in response to emails like this, and your commitment to supporting women candidates for public office made me more hopeful about the future of our country than ever before. **But our work isn’t ending here! ** Men still make up the vast majority of elected officials across the country — and we’re going to continue the fight to change that. That’s why I’m thrilled that we’re merging with [_**Her Bold Move**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76781102/448447681/-1746803361?refcode=AU_HTP_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20240109_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODllYjdlN2ItMzFhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JFPuQ0jDpENihdzYDUMJ5Z5N_sEeP3YTsiT479vMj4E=&emci=708b7dd1-2eaf-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=89eb7e7b-31af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=1720400), which has been doing incredible work, and will operate under that name moving forward. With resources spread thin and so much on the line, we know that together, we will be able to accomplish so much more. Your support means the world to me — and while our time at Her Time PAC is ending, I’m so proud of everything we achieved together and know that our shared future is filled with hope. Thank you for all your support, Katie
HER Time PAC
2120 University Ave
Berkeley, CA 94704
United States **[her-time.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76781103/448447682/-1008269585?refcode=AU_HTP_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20240109_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODllYjdlN2ItMzFhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JFPuQ0jDpENihdzYDUMJ5Z5N_sEeP3YTsiT479vMj4E=&emci=708b7dd1-2eaf-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=89eb7e7b-31af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=1720400) | [team@her-time.com](mailto:team@her-time.com)** | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
---
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/P8DKmcHQ9Eujx6QvYfJaPQ2?unsubscribedata=ozM05Er7ePIsWqQhWU5UIzGOz4dTxqf4pxcsZFmUEu9ZUOOmNi9IScNDZh7O3el5GzkqC68q4jDxtPSLfMdihfVhkZG84kgZX1kL0kHDEMLflwlt29YHgRZPT9kjNDpXaPkCoaHIrW1l097tMLFkjJGROI8iPCpBGyJxWQJxS66z2d2sa3wRXUHEfdUU%2F5Qkrpe%2B5MPBWxrS9MWasL7soE%2BPkb%2BCQ1jpkcYj%2BUEvTUtE1OzJpcBqsSuNgrAsa2nADylUAep5bwqlVZ7h25EJWex8Cf30A56ZQNPthNT7egsuGUAdcyi1uzid3m%2BASsQFwO8kn8L9LWFwC88RT7%2FOfrl1HmT6xbU2pT05i0LVHzMO4MpLVkvfkppnMoFhshU4VszHYRvCzHxEGE0eV%2B7mugjIWgpDLdHdqFRn284%2BxuH%2BBgO2pyx5STzccz79sPiR)

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Will you help me strike out this liberal lineup?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=0c624dcf46e047c6a7d54e714e9a670b&_e=-lN3lcqXn2sSG0rm8-rUu4a8m8WP6h2yfgWP1mvSB-egO1xqRg1bY8kl2Mk_jXBaNBhFTg0Zt9OORsfhLVYxJJkQUvIGLCgRx-9IHpiwnVS7fk2rf_z6bH6BQzLaYgRW60C01M0eA2jCYzpSXQaMrW2Vid9RS2oUA60rv0fNfIQI0ymHQ64GD4GZAYe0S0pxWaUZmufg4KTE9eikNstcbA8vCLBtTWk8as2I571Eip8FRITACnZg-m9WvLGe4WUACSkHHaWaym6YI7CRnup75t2GTmUPyviSkz2D6hbBqc_XH4CQ5tjpOLWx2wFIMP3RyaH6olXpX5sFMoa9e2pWqwdFqzkfhAxJdlHGMSmYlvDDxo03gtgQx0uXjuuanHMihVm503VLwqWWOU_U0Tlszw%3D%3D)

| | Fellow American, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=0c624dcf46e047c6a7d54e714e9a670b&_e=-lN3lcqXn2sSG0rm8-rUu4a8m8WP6h2yfgWP1mvSB-egO1xqRg1bY8kl2Mk_jXBaNBhFTg0Zt9OORsfhLVYxJJkQUvIGLCgRx-9IHpiwnVS7fk2rf_z6bH6BQzLaYgRW60C01M0eA2jCYzpSXQaMrW2Vid9RS2oUA60rv0fNfIQI0ymHQ64GD4GZAYe0S0pxWaUZmufg4KTE9eikNstcbA8vCLBtTWk8as2I571Eip8HYls0OjFWqRhrzFlHPjh5p6nTseuWmYDVmlbW-6xqFLzYBUTYGs9nzVQ-9roTPzxUK_LZwgbUhMesgANwAaAJbwEcLHLtF4eIQb8hK185ZGtLVIp9z8j2gToBUDlSCgJ8i5HMH49CMvyNrZWA5wcKw1h2sKz7j-Jq1iIkuF7pnQ%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=0c624dcf46e047c6a7d54e714e9a670b&_e=-lN3lcqXn2sSG0rm8-rUu4a8m8WP6h2yfgWP1mvSB-egO1xqRg1bY8kl2Mk_jXBaNBhFTg0Zt9OORsfhLVYxJJkQUvIGLCgRx-9IHpiwnVS7fk2rf_z6bH6BQzLaYgRW60C01M0eA2jCYzpSXQaMrW2Vid9RS2oUA60rv0fNfIQI0ymHQ64GD4GZAYe0S0pxWaUZmufg4KTE9eikNstcbA8vCLBtTWk8as2I571Eip-ifyP0vmlBSwrDI0vssg3NBbfMW7xKn0bhhL686KUkvN2y9zpy_WrNp-0PL0tKaBTnt4apCurR3YXxDb_wNiMjFsDmpq4yDnevMOjzmlz1mrvuQViRFV4yJvSf61DT0Dxvo6nSvPBnKR4uifYXKHhFIfKiD12dFrC3U-_Yyf3UXw%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=0c624dcf46e047c6a7d54e714e9a670b&_e=-lN3lcqXn2sSG0rm8-rUu4a8m8WP6h2yfgWP1mvSB-egO1xqRg1bY8kl2Mk_jXBaNBhFTg0Zt9OORsfhLVYxJJkQUvIGLCgRx-9IHpiwnVS7fk2rf_z6bH6BQzLaYgRW60C01M0eA2jCYzpSXQaMrW2Vid9RS2oUA60rv0fNfIQI0ymHQ64GD4GZAYe0S0pxWaUZmufg4KTE9eikNstcbA8vCLBtTWk8as2I571Eip-4TL55KakKF9-qOGUAmnqvKYOQNYJC5sp3AwqkU7wyco1pqio3KXXS-D4lPwirlNTrPPnGtBj3QUGM1jLtd912VdSqcEG6H3Tw3lb-oFtN48gaVdAZIgy6IOlWO1MF-z4hQIqC4sLxG3rTBZ5VV0ySjFPUPOUz03aw4Ops2euGwQ%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=0c624dcf46e047c6a7d54e714e9a670b&_e=-lN3lcqXn2sSG0rm8-rUu4a8m8WP6h2yfgWP1mvSB-egO1xqRg1bY8kl2Mk_jXBaNBhFTg0Zt9OORsfhLVYxJJkQUvIGLCgRx-9IHpiwnVS7fk2rf_z6bH6BQzLaYgRW60C01M0eA2jCYzpSXQaMrW2Vid9RS2oUA60rv0fNfIQI0ymHQ64GD4GZAYe0S0pxWaUZmufg4KTE9eikNstcbA8vCLBtTWk8as2I571Eip_skhdpKqZZUg_CWJEGQrxCavzZiHAMA7oTtY7aU9DPl0iMYaivxkD40KnjfMYWxhVA9PbRcSd5TIcQQha12lv8xOqhI_RQGx7IF1_66TuDRPlTWTQQwt-vhvG1fSW5zEfcA1z-MbhO0gzs1gmXEe13IXom9t3814itnSJ0L9lXRQ%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate

**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.

Hi Peter, I have an exciting update to share with you:

**Our campaign recently put up billboards advertising our campaign to flip CA-27 blue.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76781354/448448772/-46109959?refcode=em-1.9.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjAwMzczMS0zMmFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MiqeEOAdz44RIDwGx9wXIfapn9I-PppTCI0UAgHAHh4=) _Catch our billboards in Santa Clarita and on the 14!_
Billboards have the potential to reach tens of thousands of commuters in our district. It’s an important way to boost my name recognition ahead of our must-win primary election in less than _two months_.

**[As you can imagine, keeping billboards up isn’t cheap, and we’d like to add a couple more before the primary. Will you chip in $3 to make sure they stay up during this important period? We set a $10,000 goal before the end of this week to keep these billboards fully funded. Every dollar you give makes an impact.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76781355/448448773/-46109959?refcode=em-1.9.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjAwMzczMS0zMmFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MiqeEOAdz44RIDwGx9wXIfapn9I-PppTCI0UAgHAHh4=)**
| ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76781356/448448774/-46109959?refcode=em-1.9.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjAwMzczMS0zMmFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MiqeEOAdz44RIDwGx9wXIfapn9I-PppTCI0UAgHAHh4=)****
---

With each day that passes, the urgency of flipping CA-27 blue grows.

Rep. Mike Garcia continues to fall short for our community – from his ethics violations to aligning himself with the far-right reaches of the GOP.

And don’t just take my word for it: **Recent polling shows that Garcia’s approval rating in the district has plummeted by nearly 10%** thanks to his recent votes for a national abortion ban and against protecting our health care.

The Antelope, San Fernando, and Santa Clarita Valleys deserve better, and I’m confident that we are the campaign to get it done.

Remember: This is a toss-up race, and every moment counts. That’s why keeping our billboards up is so important – _Garcia narrowly won in 2022 by a narrow 333 vote margin._

**[Can I count on your support with a donation of $3 (or any amount that you can afford) toward our billboard fund?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76781357/448448776/-46109959?refcode=em-1.9.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjAwMzczMS0zMmFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MiqeEOAdz44RIDwGx9wXIfapn9I-PppTCI0UAgHAHh4=)**

**_NOW, IN 2024:_** Donald Trump is trying to coast into the presidency AGAIN using the Electoral College – **_he could become president AGAIN without ever winning the popular vote!_**

name: Bryan Steil
subject: Biden’s Border Crisis in Wisconsin.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN INC
body:
This administration’s open border policies make our communities more dangerous.
| [](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=de412159d685444e8f44f7d68eb428ce&_e=d5cSurqqjitNnFGGeFiKJ-msU3se-otNIji-AVg7_ZFZ-49JWuAYWStbnSK5azO2OZ6XT2WyQ9CgiPfV0IFSKsXL0A0_qC6pK79JfVmuXP9Wy9uN5qjM3V-YSYmJTfAwEDfKk7oxcqhAflVxq6YNcg9AqeIDhu0V4N9_C0Zbl-vr6dHxeUv1j447uUEj7UqLTL0-2G0sGY2f8H1Gu5_C2alBASaFiyUZswm_eXt3NNH96p-diGPGRvR7yLejIDLfc_EDbpObDXHploYFg-XOlAoHr5FQQHDTDcIj4kXQfFgdgvtvMOP1cn9bx8L0DMpN7-nhRzbz135iY_81rszLesbUQCwBUQyLpng2sj5YYtlU3AwTMrifwXRQBSN610IABPT0dZxHXEJAlAtHOGeC9qlydSDJQVlQ05dBS_1C5CV50CNTaWPOeib95MRePpoU84MZ-LLSO6XTolYYMCE7VlM5SzwDnF7yFDSMA6EGS1Y%3D)
---
Friend,
---
Back in November, I held a roundtable discussion with Senator Ron Johnson to address increased drug cartel activity in the town of Whitewater, Wisconsin.
---
Law enforcement officials in Whitewater recently documented **$250,000** in transfers that was funneled to Mexican Cartels from criminal activity in Whitewater.
---
This money is coming from illegal activity such as drug and sex trafficking and selling fraudulent ID documents.
---
Biden’s border crisis is having serious impacts on Wisconsin towns like Whitewater.
---
After taking a trip to Eagle Pass, Texas with House Speaker Mike Johnson last week, I saw first-hand what a humanitarian disaster the Biden Administration has caused there.
---
[](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=de412159d685444e8f44f7d68eb428ce&_e=d5cSurqqjitNnFGGeFiKJ-msU3se-otNIji-AVg7_ZFZ-49JWuAYWStbnSK5azO2OZ6XT2WyQ9CgiPfV0IFSKsXL0A0_qC6pK79JfVmuXP9Wy9uN5qjM3V-YSYmJTfAwEDfKk7oxcqhAflVxq6YNcg9AqeIDhu0V4N9_C0Zbl-vr6dHxeUv1j447uUEj7UqLTL0-2G0sGY2f8H1Gu5_C2alBASaFiyUZswm_eXt3NNH96p-diGPGRvR7yLejIDLfc_EDbpObDXHploYFg-XOlAoHr5FQQHDTDcIj4kXQfFgdgvtvMOP1cn9bx8L0DMpN7-nhRzbz135iY_81rszLehX1NmjmjNfedbI6gYMxBrKjufZznMFIF2-WsrHgYA_IL0aFdlvL43Womfl7a4fIhHfuyoGTXUc8eBUMyReJEH6qAUe_cqVxWgqU_vJxbqY2kK0LoDyvnAYb2TzePYVv0VKsRfj320KD3u4YtnEDHZk%3D)
---
Our border is **NOT** secure. We need to enact common-sense policies to secure our border and protect our communities. But the Biden Administration won’t act.

clean_body: This administration’s open border policies make our communities more dangerous. | Friend, Back in November, I held a roundtable discussion with Senator Ron Johnson to address increased drug cartel activity in the town of Whitewater, Wisconsin. Law enforcement officials in Whitewater recently documented $250,000 in transfers that was funneled to Mexican Cartels from criminal activity in Whitewater. This money is coming from illegal activity such as drug and sex trafficking and selling fraudulent ID documents. Biden’s border crisis is having serious impacts on Wisconsin towns like Whitewater. After taking a trip to Eagle Pass, Texas with House Speaker Mike Johnson last week, I saw first-hand what a humanitarian disaster the Biden Administration has caused there. Our border is NOT secure. We need to enact common-sense policies to secure our border and protect our communities. But the Biden Administration won’t act. More illegal immigrants have arrived under Biden’s rule than have under any other President in this nation’s history. Dark money liberal groups will continue targeting me for supporting these common-sense policies and standing up to the Biden-Harris immigration agenda because they want to FLIP Wisconsin’s 1st Congressional District. I need your help. Wisconsin’s 1st Congressional District is crucial to maintaining a Republican Majority in the House and continuing our fight to secure the border. Thank you, Rep. Bryan Steil PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN INC 1818 MILTON AVE. #1448 JANESVILLE, WI 53545

Hello,
In 2022, no one gave my husband Adam Frisch a chance against Lauren Boebert.
Everywhere you looked, the political pundits were calling Colorado’s 3rd congressional district “Safe Republican” or “Solid R.”
Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight only gave Adam a 3% chance of defeating Boebert. They projected he’d lose by over 45,000 votes!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76781804/448450422/1610638071?refcode=em20240109pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=8b0f79d5-33af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjBmNzlkNS0zM2FmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vBV4Kct9qADdufC3TfiR5M9NFP8oo1Sx23bBofOOKRM=)
In the end, though, the race went to a recount. **Lauren Boebert won by just 546 votes, and Adam lost the closest race in the entire country.**
Because here’s what their “models” and “forecasts” didn’t factor in: Adam put in the work. He traveled 24,000 miles in our red pickup truck to every corner of the district. He met thousands and thousands of voters – and he _listened_.
Now, my husband’s running again, and I’ll be honest: The first campaign was hard. But replacing Lauren Boebert in Congress with someone like Adam is just too important to sit this out. **Adam’s all-in to finish the job in 2024. I’m all-in. Can we count on you?**
[**Please, if you can afford to, will you chip in $5 or more right now to Adam’s campaign and help him replace Lauren Boebert in Congress? We were outspent in 2022 and just barely lost. Whatever you can afford to give today will help us invest early and win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76781805/448450423/1610638071?refcode=em20240109pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=8b0f79d5-33af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjBmNzlkNS0zM2FmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vBV4Kct9qADdufC3TfiR5M9NFP8oo1Sx23bBofOOKRM=)

clean_body: In 2022, no one gave my husband Adam Frisch a chance against Lauren Boebert. Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight only gave Adam a 3% chance of defeating Boebert. They projected he’d lose by over 45,000 votes! Hello, In 2022, no one gave my husband Adam Frisch a chance against Lauren Boebert. Everywhere you looked, the political pundits were calling Colorado’s 3rd congressional district “Safe Republican” or “Solid R.” Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight only gave Adam a 3% chance of defeating Boebert. They projected he’d lose by over 45,000 votes! = In the end, though, the race went to a recount. Lauren Boebert won by just 546 votes, and Adam lost the closest race in the entire country. Because here’s what their “models” and “forecasts” didn’t factor in: Adam put in the work. He traveled 24,000 miles in our red pickup truck to every corner of the district. He met thousands and thousands of voters – and he listened. Now, my husband’s running again, and I’ll be honest: The first campaign was hard. But replacing Lauren Boebert in Congress with someone like Adam is just too important to sit this out. Adam’s all-in to finish the job in 2024. I’m all-in. Can we count on you? = Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = This is a journey we’re making again because so many people like you reached out and encouraged Adam to run one more time. I know it means a lot to Adam that you have his back. Thank you, Katy ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

National Law Enforcement Day 2024

| | | |

---
| | |
---
| | **THANK YOU 🚔**
---
| | Friend,
I can’t let this day go by without expressing my gratitude for the folks who put on a uniform and protect our communities each day.
---

| | To everyone a part of our police departments, highway patrol, and every other law enforcement agency—thank you will never be enough. Your dedication and service do not go unnoticed, and we are blessed to have you on the frontlines. May you feel loved and appreciated today and always! Sincerely, Tim Burchett

subject: The NRA is FINALLY on trial!
body:
Three years after the original complaint was filed, the corruption lawsuit against the National Rifle Association is finally headed to trial today.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76781821/448450551/444630146?refcode=1-9-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzY2MzNTIzLTM0YWYtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_kZRhMckJOBX-1OeNhxL72PPqkDlj60RReYA1pMnv2E=)
---
| | Friend, Three years after the original complaint was filed, the corruption lawsuit against the National Rifle Association is finally headed to trial today. The NRA has gotten away with the mishandling of funds and abuse of authority for too long, and it’s time for justice to take its course. The New York lawsuit alleges that former NRA CEO Wayne LaPierre abused his authority so the NRA could pay for personal trips and expensive gifts and that he corruptly gave consulting contracts to NRA insiders. These are just two prime examples of the rampant corruption happening within the NRA. And you know that there has been plenty of corruption in Congress thanks to the NRA. **[**Until the NRA is held accountable, their massive amounts of money will continue to halt progress on gun reform and have undue influence on our elections. If you want to get blood money like this out of politics, please chip in $10 today so we can keep working to give power back to the people.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76781822/448450552/444630146?refcode=1-9-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzY2MzNTIzLTM0YWYtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_kZRhMckJOBX-1OeNhxL72PPqkDlj60RReYA1pMnv2E=)** The NRA is wildly corrupt, but we knew that already. This lawsuit is one in a long list of reasons why this organization should not have this amount of sway over American politics. Now more than ever, it’s important for corrupt politicians and organizations to be called out and held accountable. [**We’re eagerly awaiting the outcome of this trial and hoping that the NRA is**** _finally_****held accountable for their disgusting actions. In the meantime, please contribute $10 so we can keep working at giving power back to the people and away from Big Money groups like the NRA.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76781823/448450553/444630146?refcode=1-9-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzY2MzNTIzLTM0YWYtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_kZRhMckJOBX-1OeNhxL72PPqkDlj60RReYA1pMnv2E=) Thank you,— Team ECU/LAV Action

| Hey Peter,

As we step into 2024, I wanted to take a moment to reach out and express my gratitude for all of your support for my campaign over the past year.

Supporting campaigns like mine will be critical to taking back the House in November and protecting vulnerable communities that are seeing legislative attacks on _voting rights, reproductive freedom, Social Security, and Medicare._

This election will be pivotal in determining the future of our country, and I need your help to ensure we have the resources we need to take back the House. Supporting campaigns like mine will be critical to taking back the House in November and protecting vulnerable communities that are seeing legislative attacks on voting rights, reproductive freedom, Social Security, and Medicare. | **JANE PAC's MOST WANTED:** We've compiled a list of our country’s worst climate villains.

**Our Goal:** Expose and derail their anti-climate agenda.

**🔥In the Hot Seat Today:** ExxonMobil

**Decades of Deception:** Exxon knew about the dangers of fossil fuels and climate change as early as the 1970s but funded millions in disinformation campaigns to sow doubt.

**Lobbying Against Progress:** They've spent big bucks lobbying against climate-friendly policies, undermining their own pledge to cut carbon emissions.
