# Sens. Jeb Bradley & Sharon Carson: GOP will defend and extend NH's advantages
Jan 7, 2024

---
| |
---
| RISING PRICES nationwide have made life challenging for Granite State families. That’s why in 2023, we passed a budget that protects New Hampshire families, small businesses, and our state’s economy from new and higher taxes while prioritizing spending on our state’s most vulnerable populations and increasing education funding. The 2024 legislative session will focus on keeping New Hampshire affordable and protecting Granite Stater’s wallets, while also keeping our state the safest in the nation, empowering our parents, and providing more opportunities for affordable housing. Republican policies have lowered business tax rates, strengthened our economy, and produced budget surpluses. This year, we will protect business tax cuts, and block policies that would hurt workers and drive up costs for our small businesses. We will always fight to preserve the New Hampshire Advantage by opposing an income tax, a sales tax, a capital gains tax and the return of divisive donor towns. We will also continue our efforts to lower property taxes. In the 2021-2022 session, we provided $500 million to cities and towns, public schools and counties. In the 2023 budget we increased education funding by $169 million, dedicated $260 million of the Rooms and Meals Tax Revenue to cities and towns, and more than $50 million to local water projects, roads, and bridges. Given this sound fiscal management, it’s no accident that New Hampshire has the lowest poverty rate in the nation, third lowest unemployment rate, the eighth highest median family income, and is ranked first for economic freedom! In New Hampshire, we also see the results of open border policies as drugs flow across the southern and northern border to every community in the state. We have thankfully avoided much of the crime wave gripping the nation because New Hampshire has not defunded the police, which is why we are the safest state in the nation. We will continue to focus on public safety by introducing bills to keep drugs and crime off the streets, instituting bail reform to ensure violent repeat offenders are seen by a judge before being released, and strengthening penalties for DWIs. According to the Northern Border Alliance Task Force, 7,000 illegal interactions occurred across the northern borders of New York, Vermont, and New Hampshire this year, which increased by nearly 5,000 interactions from last year. That is why we allocated $1.4 million to the Northern Border Alliance. It’s imperative to guard our northern border so we can prevent drug smuggling and human trafficking into our state. We will be fighting for a Parental Bill of Rights to ensure parents know what children are doing in school, including keeping parents informed and involved in decisions regarding their children’s health care and mental health treatment. We will protect educational opportunities for children, Education Savings Accounts, and school choice. An activist judge recently mandated spending an additional $535 million for education funding, ignoring our just-approved Student-Centered Education Funding Formula that increased state aid by $169 million in this budget and by 31% per pupil over the next decade. This ruling would force communities to send excess Statewide Education Property Tax to the state, creating donor towns. Increasing spending by this much would require a broad-based sales tax, income tax, return of donor towns, or all of the above. The legislature is elected to set education funding in New Hampshire; not a single judge. Senate Republicans will fight this overreach. Finding affordable housing is not only a challenge for New Hampshire families, but an obstacle to our state’s economic well-being. Building more affordable workforce housing is critical as well as supporting programs to combat homelessness. Republicans plan to address this issue by doubling dedicated funding for the Affordable Housing Fund and making it easier for people to find housing in our state. There is more to do in Concord to help Granite Staters succeed. Republicans will continue to fight for you so that we have the most affordable, safest, and freest state in the nation. We will continue to protect our wallets, safeguard our communities, and empower our parents. This conservative, commonsense plan will further opportunities for all Granite Staters across our great state. Senate President Jeb Bradley (R-Wolfeboro) represents District 3. Senate Majority Leader Sharon Carson (R-Londonderry) represents District 14.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Friend, ICYMI, below please take a look at Senate President Jeb Bradley and Senate Majority Leader Sharon Carson's latest Op-Ed about the recently released 2024 Legislative Priority Agenda! \- NH Senate Republicans P.S. | | | | | | | | | Sens. Jeb Bradley & Sharon Carson: GOP will defend and extend NH's advantages Jan 7, 2024 | | | RISING PRICES nationwide have made life challenging for Granite State families. That’s why in 2023, we passed a budget that protects New Hampshire families, small businesses, and our state’s economy from new and higher taxes while prioritizing spending on our state’s most vulnerable populations and increasing education funding. The 2024 legislative session will focus on keeping New Hampshire affordable and protecting Granite Stater’s wallets, while also keeping our state the safest in the nation, empowering our parents, and providing more opportunities for affordable housing. Republican policies have lowered business tax rates, strengthened our economy, and produced budget surpluses. This year, we will protect business tax cuts, and block policies that would hurt workers and drive up costs for our small businesses. We will always fight to preserve the New Hampshire Advantage by opposing an income tax, a sales tax, a capital gains tax and the return of divisive donor towns. We will also continue our efforts to lower property taxes. In the 2021-2022 session, we provided $500 million to cities and towns, public schools and counties. In the 2023 budget we increased education funding by $169 million, dedicated $260 million of the Rooms and Meals Tax Revenue to cities and towns, and more than $50 million to local water projects, roads, and bridges. Given this sound fiscal management, it’s no accident that New Hampshire has the lowest poverty rate in the nation, third lowest unemployment rate, the eighth highest median family income, and is ranked first for economic freedom! In New Hampshire, we also see the results of open border policies as drugs flow across the southern and northern border to every community in the state. We have thankfully avoided much of the crime wave gripping the nation because New Hampshire has not defunded the police, which is why we are the safest state in the nation. We will continue to focus on public safety by introducing bills to keep drugs and crime off the streets, instituting bail reform to ensure violent repeat offenders are seen by a judge before being released, and strengthening penalties for DWIs. According to the Northern Border Alliance Task Force, 7,000 illegal interactions occurred across the northern borders of New York, Vermont, and New Hampshire this year, which increased by nearly 5,000 interactions from last year. That is why we allocated $1.4 million to the Northern Border Alliance. It’s imperative to guard our northern border so we can prevent drug smuggling and human trafficking into our state. We will be fighting for a Parental Bill of Rights to ensure parents know what children are doing in school, including keeping parents informed and involved in decisions regarding their children’s health care and mental health treatment. We will protect educational opportunities for children, Education Savings Accounts, and school choice. An activist judge recently mandated spending an additional $535 million for education funding, ignoring our just-approved Student-Centered Education Funding Formula that increased state aid by $169 million in this budget and by 31% per pupil over the next decade. This ruling would force communities to send excess Statewide Education Property Tax to the state, creating donor towns. Increasing spending by this much would require a broad-based sales tax, income tax, return of donor towns, or all of the above. The legislature is elected to set education funding in New Hampshire; not a single judge. Senate Republicans will fight this overreach. Finding affordable housing is not only a challenge for New Hampshire families, but an obstacle to our state’s economic well-being. Building more affordable workforce housing is critical as well as supporting programs to combat homelessness. Republicans plan to address this issue by doubling dedicated funding for the Affordable Housing Fund and making it easier for people to find housing in our state. There is more to do in Concord to help Granite Staters succeed. Republicans will continue to fight for you so that we have the most affordable, safest, and freest state in the nation. We will continue to protect our wallets, safeguard our communities, and empower our parents. This conservative, commonsense plan will further opportunities for all Granite Staters across our great state. Senate President Jeb Bradley (R-Wolfeboro) represents District 3. Senate Majority Leader Sharon Carson (R-Londonderry) represents District 14. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | via NH Senate Republicans PAC | | | | | | Paid for by New Hampshire Senate Republicans PAC. Jeb Bradley, Chairman | | P.O. Box 30, Concord NH 03301 United States | | ---|--- You received this email because you signed up on our website, donated to our organization, or made a purchase from us.

subject: Countdown to the Caucus
body:
| |
---
| | |
# Campaign News and Views
---
| [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=c4fc544ce1&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### The Caucus is 1 Week Away
On January 15th, during the Iowa Caucus, Ryan will encourage Americans to vote for something they _[believe in](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=0b3dcd731b&e=c1403f41d3)_. You can be a part of that by _[signing up](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=6d8c4e9298&e=c1403f41d3)_ for the Iowa Caucus.
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=7bceef5858&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### Scott County Republican Women
Ryan talked about his time in the 'dual lanes' of business and ministry, and how it led to his presidential campaign._ [Watch here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=ea3016fc8d&e=c1403f41d3)_
---
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=31857beb7a&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### Talk 107.3 FM Interview
Ryan joined Brian Haldane on 103.7 FM for a discussion on America's border crisis. He explained why the current administration's plan won't work and how to fix it. _[Listen here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=1f350c30e4&e=c1403f41d3)_
---
| |
---
### New England College
Ryan joined the 2024 New England College Convention by Zoom this week. He answered student questions about his policies and message for America.
---
|
####
**Coming Up**

---
|
---
### Telephone Townhall Tonight
Dial in at (855) 756-7520 to hear Ryan take questions from the audience. Our campaign team will also share updates from the field in Iowa. The event begins **tonight,** at 7:30 PM CT, January 9th.
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=e309247c84&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### Speaker Training
Calling all Caucus speakers! Please join our Zoom meeting **tonight,** at 6:30 PM CT. Professional speaker David Ohrvall will give helpful tips for speaking on caucus night. [_Register_](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=d73f887f51&e=c1403f41d3)
---
| |
---
### Polk County Lunch
Ryan will host a luncheon at Papa's Pizzeria, where he'll talk with the people of Iowa about his plans to unify the nation. The event starts at 11:30 AM CT on January 10th, at 214 Van Dorn St, Polk City, IA.
---
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=37e53ba011&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### Campaign Zoom Update
Ryan wants to share the campaign's progress. Join him on Wednesday, January 10th at 7:30 PM CT / 8:30 PM ET for an update on the campaign trail in Iowa. [_Register_](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=1a382e1a50&e=c1403f41d3)
---
|
####
**How Can I Help?**
---
| [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=6922c3443c&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### Iowa Caucus Registration
The Iowa Caucus is the first presidential primary and it plays a pivotal role in election year politics. Can you join us in Iowa on January 15th to support Ryan at a local caucus meeting? [_Sign up here!_](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=7b6aacac45&e=c1403f41d3)
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=e2e01336b6&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### 90-Day Push to the Primaries
Will you help bolster our outreach to voters over the next 90 days? We're asking for dedicated volunteers to make calls to Iowa and New Hampshire voters. [_Sign up here_](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=b222905179&e=c1403f41d3)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: They tried to kill me
body:
Liberals are out of control
| | Did you see this, Fellow American? On Christmas day, radical Left-wing activists tried to kill me by having my home swatted AGAIN.
---
| [ ](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9baefc275c864623826615a619e9e9b6&_e=yvMNYgDledS4TJTK6cm9dM3yXtD1zOdpqzMypz0-Nl8LhhcuuzETqmHzP71rraXmIP0mJtgaGfq-CXMr5qa9LW8YHJ7LBDqoDTstR-NKsVSTzg2AE6wXHqJs7SomOvfSJSvnQJ-Fqhkvt4YIFZEbxVULFdqQsNuPbx74PIXO27qZY7m7146p4stTuX1fmbr6_S7_yU1Rb8uIlyrlctZ0YIKDQFAdduB6MrGAgnYaD8ZW9PDhA1A95gCEj7USFum6rVSz0c6IQr-i2gJLlE6_4qeYhD2NnNyS8uPzGBKoQvlfNcO6Sx3nt8WE8ifxAP7GIGESl0YUBHz2oMgTW41ppA%3D%3D)
---
They even swatted both of my daughter's homes. **I am under fire like never before and need reinforcements to help me hold the line.** The Communist Democrats, funded by their _dark money contributions from their globalist puppet masters_ , are hell-bent on silencing conservative voices. That's why, earlier this week, I extended our crucial fundraising deadline to ensure I have the funds needed to continue fighting the Left without missing a beat. **But I only have a few days to meet our $50,000 fundraising goal, and we are still thousands of dollars short.** I need to know now if you stand with me. **[Will you rush an emergency donation before the deadline](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9baefc275c864623826615a619e9e9b6&_e=yvMNYgDledS4TJTK6cm9dM3yXtD1zOdpqzMypz0-Nl8LhhcuuzETqmHzP71rraXmIP0mJtgaGfq-CXMr5qa9LW8YHJ7LBDqoDTstR-NKsVSTzg2AE6wXHqJs7SomOvfSJSvnQJ-Fqhkvt4YIFZEbxVULFdqQsNuPbx74PIXO27rMw63Q51yLVnO0APCBd7nv0j-Oj6dUjMBYbhNx0IA02T_vjW6mBBsym4YXyZVsMN1kFFLw4RdABhjCTE8dNNVFdHgsYTQU18aTkaWC4I0TQZfx3RSrkMzDbWwcWvgFoqZg_odfxc-dFG_u1wAWc00jGqDqyrRYkT0i8CN-5WUJXg%3D%3D)?**
| [ **DEFEND MTG** ](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9baefc275c864623826615a619e9e9b6&_e=yvMNYgDledS4TJTK6cm9dM3yXtD1zOdpqzMypz0-Nl8LhhcuuzETqmHzP71rraXmIP0mJtgaGfq-CXMr5qa9LW8YHJ7LBDqoDTstR-NKsVSTzg2AE6wXHqJs7SomOvfSJSvnQJ-Fqhkvt4YIFZEbxVULFdqQsNuPbx74PIXO27rcQQ0kwt943xzHxWIMS9FTgscykPUL6tWTsjDiM95zF1XbxcwyY3PWE2qYJT_8GTS0xyYkIPkcc9gMAWOUxPwSIymy9CuzAr2cOcBAhwDW-T4tf1lePUmqxiKzcWiVwM6ZJKFaFT886PVD2nsuBBBAPTiT9aVm_HIp_HZlBEPXIw%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American, I've been swatted 8 TIMES, and these criminals have even targeted my family. And while I understand why most people would give up after having so many attempts on their lives, **_you can be damn sure I will never fold or cower in the face of their attacks. _**
Because I know there is too much at stake, and I could never look myself in the mirror again if I gave up now. Especially when I'm fighting the same Communist psychos who are willing to put my children in harm's way because I offended their fragile little hearts. That's why I am fighting every day against the Democrats and the Washington Swamp to set the record straight and promote our American values... But I won't lie to you - having to defend against the onslaught of vicious attacks and nasty smears has been costly. **And if we do not have the resources to match the Woke Liberals in Congress, I will be unable to defend myself, President Trump, and our America First movement from the attacks and smears constantly coming from the Radical Left.**
**That 's something that we just can't allow to happen.** Not when we have a real shot in the 2024 elections to grow our majority in Congress that will show show the Communist Democrats that we still stand with President Trump and the fight to put America First is stronger than ever.
Your donation gives me the ability to KEEP FIGHTING by gifting my campaign the resources to hire staff, make videos, and travel the country to spread the message of AMERICA FIRST. **But right now, I 'm worried my campaign won't reach our $50,000 goal before the deadline. **
I know times are tough. So I'm only asking if you can absolutely afford to chip in at this time.
**[If $15 or more is too much, even a gift of $10 or just $5 goes a long way](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9baefc275c864623826615a619e9e9b6&_e=yvMNYgDledS4TJTK6cm9dM3yXtD1zOdpqzMypz0-Nl8LhhcuuzETqmHzP71rraXmIP0mJtgaGfq-CXMr5qa9LW8YHJ7LBDqoDTstR-NKsVSTzg2AE6wXHqJs7SomOvfSJSvnQJ-Fqhkvt4YIFZEbxVULFdqQsNuPbx74PIXO27rP4DaDfQ-RRc1YoqGl-vntYTsLH72rzgzTiH9NQ5aNAwWsaFYrdQu7dbBZ8-7s8FcugS_74JUGDwv_03R5iFZ8HzEthW1GMX90LB5oPcB7md2VfHcr2G9EJ0RKpP-kG52ypkjE9UufTmLgoVEyM6hmCphqbt6SGwPahwfRfb6rmw%3D%3D). **
I'm so thankful to Patriots like you for having my back. None of this would be possible without you. I'll be in touch.
_Talk soon,_
Marjorie Taylor Greene
| [ ](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9baefc275c864623826615a619e9e9b6&_e=yvMNYgDledS4TJTK6cm9dM3yXtD1zOdpqzMypz0-Nl8LhhcuuzETqmHzP71rraXmIP0mJtgaGfq-CXMr5qa9LW8YHJ7LBDqoDTstR-NKsVSTzg2AE6wXHqJs7SomOvfSJSvnQJ-Fqhkvt4YIFZEbxVULFdqQsNuPbx74PIXO27qRHb_NUO8-7Wd_WRhkIXhEqEK05l2dGYtzQxFVo-OqA9kZsS3tTebdSGntCY8Q7m-zNb-t6-VvQhUeCamPI8pirYmb5g2EEqY88--JysbohZ6sA2KTRQERvrjHYVq3k1FwwriBX3-VHu75sqLHRxDlitvW2_dyxT9G-4vW_uMJGA%3D%3D)
---

name: Andrei Cherny
subject: My friend Gabby Giffords
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrei for Arizona
body:
Thirteen years ago, on the morning of January 8, 2011, I was driving from Phoenix to Tucson to meet with Congresswoman Gabby Giffords.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76782375/448452380/1272516037?refcode=em_XX_XXXX.XX.XX_XX_XX_header_logo&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDAwNGJlMTEtMzdhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4bz0bc0yddpvCAQ5F-XIQL97nr3aYNpmjIGeheckBFw=) Hi Peter, yesterday morning, I stood at the Arizona Capitol with activists and volunteers from Moms Demand Action and Everytown. Together, we called for critical gun safety legislation that would keep guns out of the hands of criminals. Gun violence prevention is incredibly personal to me, and I have a track record of action. That’s why I’m one of only five candidates for Congress in all of America to be endorsed by the Brady PAC against gun violence. [**Peter, if you’re with me and believe we need to take action against gun violence, will you chip in today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76782376/448452381/-677050522?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240109_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDAwNGJlMTEtMzdhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4bz0bc0yddpvCAQ5F-XIQL97nr3aYNpmjIGeheckBFw=) At the rally, I wore this T-shirt saying, “Together We Thrive.” Here’s the story behind why I wore that shirt on a chilly Arizona morning and behind my commitment to making a difference when it comes to guns. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76782377/448452382/-677050522?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240109_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDAwNGJlMTEtMzdhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4bz0bc0yddpvCAQ5F-XIQL97nr3aYNpmjIGeheckBFw=) Thirteen years ago, on the morning of January 8, 2011, I was driving from Phoenix to Tucson to meet with Congresswoman Gabby Giffords. She had been my friend for years, but I had mixed emotions about the meeting we were to have that day. The day before, she had sent what would be her last tweet for a long time endorsing me for Chair of the Arizona Democratic Party. It was not a job I had been looking for. I had a new baby girl and a young son at home. I wanted a break from politics. Then Gabby called. She said the post was one from which I could help bridge divisions and offer new ideas. I still hesitated. And then she said words I can still hear, echoing over the years, _“Andrei, sometimes you don’t get to choose the way in which you’ll serve.”_ And I said yes. That morning, as I was driving to meet with Gabby, I got a frantic call from my wife, who was down in Tucson with our kids at a coffee shop across from the shopping center parking lot where Gabby was meeting with constituents. Ambulances were screaming by, and a helicopter was landing in the middle of the street — there was chaos everywhere. On that day, January 8, 2011, Gabby and her husband Mark's lives, along with the lives of too many Arizonans, were changed. **All because of an act of senseless gun violence.** Following that tragic day, as Chair of the Arizona Democratic Party, I led the fight against our state’s Republicans, like then-Governor Jan Brewer, who was hell-bent on slashing even the most basic of common-sense gun legislation. As I said, this cause is personal, and it’s why I went on to build a company that helped people move billions of dollars away from the big banks that are financing the gun manufacturers profiting from violence and funding the gun lobby. After the shooting in 2011, many of us gathered at a candlelight vigil in Tucson, where we wore these “Together We Thrive” shirts. That’s why I wore the shirt yesterday, and that’s why I’ll never give up in the fight to protect people from gun violence on the streets, at work, and in schools. **I’m in this race to fight for common-sense laws that will keep guns out of the wrong hands. As one of only five candidates for Congress endorsed by the Brady PAC, I’m asking:** [**Peter, will you donate whatever you can today to help us flip AZ-01 blue and ensure Americans have a champion for common-sense gun laws delivering for them in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76782378/448452383/-677050522?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240109_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDAwNGJlMTEtMzdhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4bz0bc0yddpvCAQ5F-XIQL97nr3aYNpmjIGeheckBFw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76782379/448452384/-677050522?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240109_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDAwNGJlMTEtMzdhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4bz0bc0yddpvCAQ5F-XIQL97nr3aYNpmjIGeheckBFw=) | [$25 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76782380/448452385/-677050522?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240109_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDAwNGJlMTEtMzdhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4bz0bc0yddpvCAQ5F-XIQL97nr3aYNpmjIGeheckBFw=)

name: Isaac M.
subject: I won’t “get over” the shooting at myson’s school
body:
In May 2019, at STEM Highlands Ranch K-12, Two students armed with guns and other weapons hidden inside guitar cases walked into the school and opened fire on their fellow students. | | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w89kKB5u2yVtf13KRofeKJGdrgL12dZcpvEVWWJ_yI6Ri1kYSPIc5QEA4URMCKr2eJ1zpy3AePn28TVQbFmmrmT0nAoBY8lykBpK2-4zQ5_MyUi2Z6pVq9Ii3-hLjKbNBi5FkBbaVGIrG_KhTscQ2PaZddAnO8z3DEEfmolNq23BkXePa8ksb52rgGJe5VyN-w0M_PJkVTgLpqw4rnJaxY7g5XVC82NMSkHuAxGKyWheZ32j73lYH5uw6wxi_i8G6cGLrIoEX1woqaPG-A_a0FU505l3hImePWncT00P3HMikkHPo5iRkXN1ZxwtdcyRHJSLRDqSPaWDqBi9U-NmsJfNeyC4RD6oQ4Gjib-zHxiQ/42u/BjwTuyzWR7-EYzyGe80KVA/h0/LHC0aBtdLZg56Lb2eLkkG5paq3tHWSJ_AASQy57Cdlk)
---
Friend, In the aftermath of an Iowa school shooting that left one dead and at least five wounded, Donald Trump stated in a speech this past weekend that the community should: _“Get over it”_ Trump’s insensitivity, lack of empathy, and unwillingness to take any action on school shootings is disgusting. My oldest son’s school experienced a mass shooting in 2019 and **five years later, I still****refuse****to “get over it.”** In fact, it is why I am running for Congress and am doubling down after Lauren Boebert moved to run in my district in December. In May 2019, at STEM Highlands Ranch K-12, Two students armed with guns and other weapons hidden inside guitar cases walked into the school and opened fire on their fellow students. Luckily, brave students, among them Kendrick Castillo who was killed by one of the gunmen, rushed the gunmen and subdued them, ending the shooting. When the official report from the Douglas County Sheriff arrived, one was killed and eight had been wounded.
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w89kKB5u2yVtf13KRofeKJGdrgL12dZcpvEVWWJ_yI6exfJJz_kV9F0qzNliwfuyYUvg8HZ6Ca9Ug7yKlF8ZnzhXKJEMNRKnx_vmkM2eFLTwkfEC8bd8GG4SaNz-jYiDG9v8lFHgVfh0cARpG3Bw58-LsNOuW-XbSPdOAD3gOxn990HkA_8JjLuQRcYKOnOCTdj3gqU05-zKNgtc2_-DW7hsKkprR4AmZchKO1dQ-TFMh5NLB5d-mHxvI3x_hFmU105VZsLkpAJ3TCyhZouPGuEnZDWIryLVrvBqok3QttLq1Vpxh2_cSjMsw38TUjAG2tKxFaYwaIKZYeLD4qfgbt4l0ZSwgXZpf9mJd8POxZGg/42u/BjwTuyzWR7-EYzyGe80KVA/h1/TCPr3EOl3xz6w2RIb9ksAmqscj-LqVHboqUjm6Bs3aw)
---
_Kendrick Castillo being honored by his classmates. His death occurred just weeks before he would have graduated._
---
That day was the scariest day of my life, and, as an Iraq combat veteran, I’ve had some scary days. My son did not have his phone with him that day and, for two and a half hours, I anxiously waited for news that he was okay. Eventually, he called from a friend's phone and I was overcome with emotion and relief. _I was lucky. But, for hundreds of parents every year, that call never comes._ **My opponent Congresswoman Lauren Boebert’s dangerous rhetoric on guns and violence along with her outright refusal to address the issue makes her complicit in this suffering.** In response to the Uvalde shooting, Boebert blamed the shooting at the elementary school on “godlessness that is overtaking America." And when school shooting survivors took to Capitol Hill and encountered Boebert in the hallway, they gave her a pin of the green converse shoes that Maite Rodriguez (one of the young victims in Uvalde) was wearing when she died. Immediately Boebert _threw away the pin_ in a nearby trash bin and **shook her head no when the activists asked her if she would take action on gun violence prevention**. **[Every day that Boebert continues to hold office is another day that she has a platform from which she can worsen America’s gun violence problem. For the safety of Coloradans, and all Americans, I am asking if you will chip in $10, $25, $100, or whatever you can spare to take away Boebert’s bully pulpit once and for all?](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w89kKB5u2yVtf13KRofeKJGdrgL12dZcpvEVWWJ_yI6VfWvs4RENITtYSpJejTYj3-S1k2V5kAQjIietsY8dBT656zs32rgXQDkfAMjKDnb8zwcL3rpFZtmAWReNDI925rFylBSueKFlmbxRVfRuVvpyKDuNYmMPB_ro2IwpA5pM8D_mhE47HgVmcSmyW83bm65eAWhRGyzRU413Y7RGdL3Y2huJYlbxE3XjaZArqq5UcIdKyUDhggWCYzLSKltY9t7ePRu8eXZTrpbHiEa8ba9-85o4IPD49SARYSl8ftAh8GiHBGV7b-GG0FbNO6ydeNiSvgfi5g8a-LDTiqEIXi7a7-IVaOUexZVKPnRq4DtQ/42u/BjwTuyzWR7-EYzyGe80KVA/h2/5jmMAqoDOJBpuI3cY0DPnW_EE1XcJMWDL4PMw5XxM8w)**

clean_body: In May 2019, at STEM Highlands Ranch K-12, Two students armed with guns and other weapons hidden inside guitar cases walked into the school and opened fire on their fellow students. | | Friend, In the aftermath of an Iowa school shooting that left one dead and at least five wounded, Donald Trump stated in a speech this past weekend that the community should: “Get over it” Trump’s insensitivity, lack of empathy, and unwillingness to take any action on school shootings is disgusting. My oldest son’s school experienced a mass shooting in 2019 and five years later, I stillrefuseto “get over it.” In fact, it is why I am running for Congress and am doubling down after Lauren Boebert moved to run in my district in December. In May 2019, at STEM Highlands Ranch K-12, Two students armed with guns and other weapons hidden inside guitar cases walked into the school and opened fire on their fellow students. Luckily, brave students, among them Kendrick Castillo who was killed by one of the gunmen, rushed the gunmen and subdued them, ending the shooting. When the official report from the Douglas County Sheriff arrived, one was killed and eight had been wounded. | Kendrick Castillo being honored by his classmates. His death occurred just weeks before he would have graduated. That day was the scariest day of my life, and, as an Iraq combat veteran, I’ve had some scary days. My son did not have his phone with him that day and, for two and a half hours, I anxiously waited for news that he was okay. Eventually, he called from a friend's phone and I was overcome with emotion and relief. I was lucky. But, for hundreds of parents every year, that call never comes. My opponent Congresswoman Lauren Boebert’s dangerous rhetoric on guns and violence along with her outright refusal to address the issue makes her complicit in this suffering. In response to the Uvalde shooting, Boebert blamed the shooting at the elementary school on “godlessness that is overtaking America." And when school shooting survivors took to Capitol Hill and encountered Boebert in the hallway, they gave her a pin of the green converse shoes that Maite Rodriguez (one of the young victims in Uvalde) was wearing when she died. Immediately Boebert threw away the pin in a nearby trash bin and shook her head no when the activists asked her if she would take action on gun violence prevention. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. or Over the past two decades, I have watched in horror as violence like what I bore witness to in Iraq slowly crept its way into my country. I will not sit idly by as our nation is overtaken by terror and violence orchestrated by the extreme right, and I hope you won’t either. It’s now or never. The time to push back is now. Yours in the fight, Ike McCorkle Democrat for Colorado’s 4th USMC Retired | | Our mailing address is: Ike McCorkle for Congress , | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Ike for Congress, please .

name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: Tomorrow is the First Day of Session
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
From the Desk of Senator Chase
| | | | CUT TO THE CHASE WITH SENATOR AMANDA CHASE Session begins TOMMORROW!
---
|
---
---
|
---
|
---
---
---
| 2024 SESSION BEGINS TOMORROW
---
| Dear Friends,
While I may not be returning to the General Assembly tomorrow in an official capacity, I look forward to staying engaged with you as together we closely monitor bills that come before each committee. Every bill that comes before the General Assembly can effect the quality of your life and we have to be alert and stay active.
After serving you for 8 years in the Senate of Virginia, I intend to use my knowledge and experience to keep you informed and help you participate in the process.
Tomorrow, January 10, 2024 the General Assembly gavels in at noon, as it does most every day except Fridays.
If you'd like to watch the swearing in of our legislators please click the link below.

---
|
---
---
| First Day of the 2023 Session: Wednesday, January 10, 2024 at noon
---
| All bills have to be filed by 10am, a deadline to complete the pre-filing of bills before legislators gavel in at noon for Floor Session to adopt the procedural resolutions for both the House and the Senate.
Once complete, we can get started. With every passing day the Floor Session will get longer as bills pass out of committee and on to the floor.
---
| | |
---
|
# Annual State of the Commonwealth Address at 4pm
---
| At 4pm, the Senators will join the members of the House for a Joint Assembly in the House Chambers. The Governor and his Cabinet will join the legislature for the Annual State of the Commonwealth in which the Governor addresses the joint assembly and then offers his vision and current state of the Commonwealth. Check your local news station.

name: Sam Brown
subject: They blew up my body, but they’ll never destroy my spirit.
body:
You can never take away the heart of a soldier
| |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=69e9cfe412344bfd90b28e453411d6e4&_t=oXEr8E9dooPgnSDKtL9UEzHsZe9brTV32ORz8lKoFheSDbmWa_oQEoV6D57cmlCv64QXlhyr-P52ZnjszoMjTQHTa4_2-Z1kM9SstZEyg8A%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=69e9cfe412344bfd90b28e453411d6e4&_t=oXEr8E9dooPgnSDKtL9UEzHsZe9brTV32ORz8lKoFheSDbmWa_oQEoV6D57cmlCv64QXlhyr-P52ZnjszoMjTQHTa4_2-Z1kM9SstZEyg8A%3D)

| Friend,

**[This was God's message for me.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=69e9cfe412344bfd90b28e453411d6e4&_e=ll0ofXQCviKHRJV9o_-u1d6FMFuEubK6x20sd3h27ajYRTwJhcSLkJULb1FrvpCl6T1B-EVEixUDWHXvnLv7okn46bQa6h96fNGJ8YCwmCwQNEhqokiSiV-0PwELst-wapiFunVC9TfPji4A4YjreeFfFAWUt6JZD77Ek47-UGW5YSG-5zTgGmd0aUj1B4QyEwkZD4xs3BPqH1XZE_tZgy-_fqKDn3gefBCb52BAkNiD2Os1dxnadk_5WFFYb_NPlRq0PK7A6T5obwDxxVX7gPVzTWN2bWZaBNR1PKsBhl-vx3DxYXRSC3fRf9AICcGn "This was God’s message for me. ")**

I didn't know if I was going to survive -- but I knew if I did, my life would belong to Him forever.

In 2008, a roadside bomb in Afghanistan left me with burns over half my body. This was my vehicle after the explosion.

---
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=69e9cfe412344bfd90b28e453411d6e4&_e=ll0ofXQCviKHRJV9o_-u1d6FMFuEubK6x20sd3h27ajYRTwJhcSLkJULb1FrvpCl6T1B-EVEixUDWHXvnLv7okn46bQa6h96fNGJ8YCwmCwQNEhqokiSiV-0PwELst-wapiFunVC9TfPji4A4YjreeFfFAWUt6JZD77Ek47-UGUvw09HXMZwsEOxDIsQp3Cub9cWsNj6vD9JKP9VEu3qiIl8Mm5az9im0DCDm6tdf4FrTEiZvF-SrcGXYzihPMxTecPpYdMCj87zx4SM_2xWgJRSZDqlg_3-v8kjdVNMMt1bLG50LAF6P5na9-4PJtX3)
---

My path to recovery wasn't easy -- I spent months wondering if my life could ever be the same, asking myself why God spared me that day.

**But that was God 's way of speaking to me, THIS was His message to me...His plan for me.**

Friend, I realized that my life would NEVER be the same, but that was okay. I was alive for one reason:

_**My new life belonged not to me, but to Him.

That's why I've lived every day since with three things in mind: My country, my family, and God Himself. **_

God used the tragedy that resulted in my injuries to tell me something.

Through 3 years of recovery and over 30 surgeries- I was never alone. Not for one second.

God stayed with me through it all and he made it clear to me that I was NOT called to wish for my old life.

**Instead, I was called to live my new life to the fullest in service to Him.**

That's why I spent the last 15 years starting my family, serving fellow veterans through the business I started, and most recently, **[I launched my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Nevada.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=69e9cfe412344bfd90b28e453411d6e4&_e=ll0ofXQCviKHRJV9o_-u1d6FMFuEubK6x20sd3h27ajYRTwJhcSLkJULb1FrvpCl6T1B-EVEixUDWHXvnLv7okn46bQa6h96fNGJ8YCwmCwQNEhqokiSiV-0PwELst-wapiFunVC9TfPji4A4YjreeFfFAWUt6JZD77Ek47-UGUbkjF5NV3FFDG5Kiyluvi3k3wQWdk2bEJubEVgFITCwZ39AlPNZKkmEUZbLC9Ua3cuoBlzkUG1NnFHy2IEIz2nhrAmoUJw4R5esSSBOVECLOdJQ5-m1jw9CvfR3mNeLlyTwKnwjPp1fCa4L7zk0K7A "I launched my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Nevada.")**

America is at a tipping point.

Corrupt leaders are leading us into total madness.

Our border is collapsing.

Parents are being cut-off from their children in schools.

We're spending away our future and the future of our children's children.

I'm running for U.S. Senate to bring a new generation of Conservative leadership to Washington D.C.

But to do that, Friend, I'll need your help.

So I'm hoping that you can help me with 1 or 2 things.
1. Would you please keep me and my family in your prayers as we take on some of the most powerful elites in the world?
2. **[Would you consider sending in $5 or $10 to help fund my campaign?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=69e9cfe412344bfd90b28e453411d6e4&_e=ll0ofXQCviKHRJV9o_-u1d6FMFuEubK6x20sd3h27ajYRTwJhcSLkJULb1FrvpCl6T1B-EVEixUDWHXvnLv7okn46bQa6h96fNGJ8YCwmCwQNEhqokiSiV-0PwELst-wapiFunVC9TfPji4A4YjreeFfFAWUt6JZD77Ek47-UGVXINUqSMqpJ6Yj8U_zy46LEK5zl0zhlZPMuTSXjHVoMQt20slBnyiWDc_NxnyuUiRf-EwWvcmcjFfvACB7HMUXFvSsTFZ5NRNzZl6SCPMWpi8JPt451V6Mie1qyrfK0iIGbv_8vC_rcfXWKqpu-KOr "Would you consider sending in $5 or $10 to help fund my campaign?")** I don't come from money and I'm no millionaire- that means that support from people like you will have a real impact on this election.

Asking for help isn't something that comes easy for me. I'm a combat veteran and a man of faith. But God has humbled me enough to know that I can't do this with HIM and without people like YOU.

Duty First,
---
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=69e9cfe412344bfd90b28e453411d6e4&_e=ll0ofXQCviKHRJV9o_-u1d6FMFuEubK6x20sd3h27ajYRTwJhcSLkJULb1FrvpCl6T1B-EVEixUDWHXvnLv7okn46bQa6h96fNGJ8YCwmCwQNEhqokiSiV-0PwELst-wapiFunVC9TfPji4A4YjreeFfFAWUt6JZD77Ek47-UGVFaa7l7p7vbQLCSo3uQHA29foCRFjFRigaHS0DPTc5AXeaICaddJ_MHOGgdp4550eIhrxqrWK7buulj9DwRdi9U2zKDeQVjQ2BOR3OFnQ5JB7rjE5VqpNmdVnUBSAclQqBG5ePqfFo-fz7PFmsDP3O)
---

Sam Brown

---
| | [DONATE](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=69e9cfe412344bfd90b28e453411d6e4&_e=ll0ofXQCviKHRJV9o_-u1d6FMFuEubK6x20sd3h27ajYRTwJhcSLkJULb1FrvpCl6T1B-EVEixUDWHXvnLv7okn46bQa6h96fNGJ8YCwmCwQNEhqokiSiV-0PwELst-wapiFunVC9TfPji4A4YjreeFfFAWUt6JZD77Ek47-UGXrCXR7oHiA7UsNJYY6ewQ55wj473d9_FseJrdGqdI5lsF4gXzaNkuvPIch1dYeuIc1AfbZ_GkoK12sglSiZtMEF6_mG5l3A1wURvzbC2vbyBL1GroZHsnOT31l01jycfURPhYGjxTOzy6kRoXUDP5d)
---
|
---

---

name: Adam Schiff
subject: All for the price of a cup of coffee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| In these next eight weeks, we need to reach the millions of undecided voters across California with our vision for the future of our state.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5018%2E5257348%2EKxYKvw)
**[Derek — With only eight weeks to go until the U.S. Senate Primary on March 5, I’m asking you to start a weekly contribution of $5 to my campaign — that’s the cost of a cup of coffee each week until our Super Tuesday Primary Election. Can you start a weekly recurring gift today?**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3443?c0=jan2024_abs_em_recurring.YutajK&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240109_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=5018%2E5257348%2EKxYKvw)
[DONATE $5 WEEKLY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3443?c0=jan2024_abs_em_recurring.YutajK&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240109_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=5018%2E5257348%2EKxYKvw)
---
Eight weeks is not a lot of time, Derek — and the support we can count on each week in this homestretch directly impacts the kinds of budget decisions we’re able to make.
In these next eight weeks, we need to reach the millions of undecided voters across California with our vision for the future of our state.
This is the very first time I’ve run statewide, the first time I’ll be appearing on millions of Californians’ ballots, AND many voters will be getting to know me for the very first time.
I’ll need your help to stand up to the GOP’s attacks against me.
Now that GOP celebrity candidate Steve Garvey is surging in the polls, the California Republican Party is energized.
Because my primary is on Super Tuesday, the day when Californians also vote for the presidential candidates, _I’m going to be on the same ballot as Donald Trump._
And you better believe he’ll be doing what he can to win ‘bigly’ while keeping me away from the General Election — because the last place he wants me to be is the United States Senate.

subject: Why I’m running

body:
what I learned as the granddaughter of Jewish immigrants |
#
Team, this is Senator Jacky Rosen from Nevada. I know my “why.” Growing up as the granddaughter of Jewish immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran, my family instilled in me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence at a young age. **These values have informed my "why" – why I ran to serve in the Senate in the first place and why I'm running for reelection so I can continue fighting for working families like mine.** But to be honest, as I face my toughest race yet, I can't win without your help today. Right now, polling shows me 2 points down, and **a shady MAGA billionaire recently donated $2 MILLION to help my GOP opponent defeat me.** If I'm going to fight back, pull ahead, and keep Nevada blue, I need your urgent grassroots support. **[So please, will you rush $5 or more right now, split between my campaign and Tina Smith, to help me defend this battleground seat, protect our Democratic majority, and keep fighting to make a real difference for you and your family?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76782743/448453560/-1273059122?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20240109_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDJlMzQ5NC0zOWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TcWcQRSLwwCVmcHH_PXTpO-K1gUjqEGcmyfnBc0Ca3Y=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tina Smith and Jacky Rosen will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76782744/448453561/-1273059122?express_lane=true&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20240109_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDJlMzQ5NC0zOWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TcWcQRSLwwCVmcHH_PXTpO-K1gUjqEGcmyfnBc0Ca3Y=)

body:

Friends —
As we kick off the 2024 election year, we want Robert to know that he has this team behind him. Because he is going to need your unwavering support to win his first reelection campaign.
So we have a simple and easy way you can show Robert that you stand by his side.
[**Can you add your name to personally endorse Robert Garcia’s reelection campaign? We want Robert to know that while he continues to fight for working families and the accountability of lawmakers in Congress, he has this grassroots team behind him.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76782753/448453599/567760124?refcode2=603d37e6-39af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&refcode=em240109-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDNkMzdlNi0zOWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cFGfeESzyKMxOsFaUN7gMPxVMabwo9NL0ZbwcuwmQjA=&emci=26ad0452-34af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=603d37e6-39af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=16877361)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76782754/448453600/567760124?refcode2=603d37e6-39af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&refcode=em240109-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDNkMzdlNi0zOWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cFGfeESzyKMxOsFaUN7gMPxVMabwo9NL0ZbwcuwmQjA=&emci=26ad0452-34af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=603d37e6-39af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=16877361)
In Robert’s first year in Congress, he has fought relentlessly for California families, climate protection, and the accountability of fraudulent and extremist lawmakers like Marjorie Taylor Greene in Washington.
He launched multiple life-changing bills including ones to remedy the housing crisis, strengthen America’s role in protecting and promoting LGBTQ+ rights globally, protect our environment, and regulate ammunition sales across the country. He was also the first lawmaker to force a vote on the expulsion of fraudster George Santos.
Robert has been fighting for you in Washington, and as he continues his work in Congress, we want Robert to know who his top supporters are and who is by his side. The best way to do that is to see your name on his list of endorsers.
[**Please add your name to personally endorse Robert Garcia’s reelection campaign. We want Robert to know the widespread support he has.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76782755/448453601/567760124?refcode2=603d37e6-39af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&refcode=em240109-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDNkMzdlNi0zOWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cFGfeESzyKMxOsFaUN7gMPxVMabwo9NL0ZbwcuwmQjA=&emci=26ad0452-34af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=603d37e6-39af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=16877361)
When thousands of us come together to say we are with Robert, we become part of something much bigger — we become a movement for change, a movement for equality, a movement for accountability.
Thank you in advance for adding your name and being a part of our movement.
Team Robert

In Robert’s first year in Congress, he has fought relentlessly for California families, climate protection, and the accountability of fraudulent and extremist lawmakers like Marjorie Taylor Greene in Washington. He launched multiple life-changing bills including ones to remedy the housing crisis, strengthen America’s role in protecting and promoting LGBTQ+ rights globally, protect our environment, and regulate ammunition sales across the country. He was also the first lawmaker to force a vote on the expulsion of fraudster George Santos. Robert has been fighting for you in Washington, and as he continues his work in Congress, we want Robert to know who his top supporters are and who is by his side. The best way to do that is to see your name on his list of endorsers. When thousands of us come together to say we are with Robert, we become part of something much bigger — we become a movement for change, a movement for equality, a movement for accountability. Thank you in advance for adding your name and being a part of our movement. Team Robert * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click to unsubscribe.

name: Ben Goldberg
subject: Let the countdown begin…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY QASIM FOR CONGRESS]
body:
[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/9?t=1001&akid=35142%2E120265%2EyAQ5a3 ]Qasim for Congress

Today marks 10 weeks out from Election Day.

It’s true, in 10 weeks, folks in Illinois’ 11th District will be heading
out to the polls to decide their Democratic nominee for Congress.

That means it's officially crunch time. We need to keep our TV ads up,
digital ads running, and organizers and volunteers in the field. Winning
this race means connecting with every single person in the district — and
making sure they know that Qasim is committed to ensuring justice,
opportunity, and equity for all Americans.

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/5131?t=1002&akid=35142%2E120265%2EyAQ5a3 ]But this doesn’t come cheap. With just 10 weeks left until Election
Day, can you rush a $10 contribution right now to fund our voter outreach
efforts?

DONATE $10

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/5132?t=1003&akid=35142%2E120265%2EyAQ5a3 ]DONATE $20

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/5133?t=1004&akid=35142%2E120265%2EyAQ5a3 ]DONATE $30

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/5134?t=1005&akid=35142%2E120265%2EyAQ5a3 ]DONATE $40

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/5135?t=1006&akid=35142%2E120265%2EyAQ5a3 ]DONATE $50

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/5136?t=1007&akid=35142%2E120265%2EyAQ5a3 ]DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT

I know 10 weeks sounds like a lot of time, but when you’re running against
an incumbent who’s had 16 years to campaign, we have a lot of ground to
make up.

Bill Foster thinks he can beat us because he’s been in Congress since 2008
– but we’re ready to outwork him, out-campaign him, and prove that the
people of IL-11 are ready for new leadership. [ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/5131?t=1008&akid=35142%2E120265%2EyAQ5a3 ]Can you make a $10
contribution right now to fund our voter outreach efforts and topple this
16-year incumbent?

Thanks for all you do,

Ben Goldberg
Campaign Manager

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.qasimforcongress.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1009&akid=35142%2E120265%2EyAQ5a3

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: How should we elect the President?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

| | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3966d8937e00424983c18d6111bf5d48&_e=cgihWSEntL83xkp-B5a8uPOXlr7xqjpriYT7d21nhp1V4yq2I1Almjo1a3IbeoCoMZeoC7KzTTvkEYkponx5aghkuJXGlEnvcjiZQ7ycJocn2jdOrh8YiGTkP83MdijYMnzyIft_83u56JcbGnA_bhjIvKnlh4I3f3y448PP8Ww8FJ6UscCj_ZI5BPf1D9ChGgJ3v2zJzySLX3bq0KPricOdQNBv28gefYgil7XBVSswIZQn82o5XR9YFDVYWFRRYN6QyNVl5GXWX6906ro3rVYy26CmfzidFY3nRe6doaevptetHiiQ109SPOhQXECrAoz0pqkRgDumGJ00aFBeHFvBXaa0bIHRd71OUfQA0vO49KwpzKxYPUA7NX089caGpehPD9dyKqqhgxo8fHljVEAFSBYPdktPTGAPI-FRHKg%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3966d8937e00424983c18d6111bf5d48&_e=cgihWSEntL83xkp-B5a8uPOXlr7xqjpriYT7d21nhp1V4yq2I1Almjo1a3IbeoCoMZeoC7KzTTvkEYkponx5aghkuJXGlEnvcjiZQ7ycJocn2jdOrh8YiGTkP83MdijYMnzyIft_83u56JcbGnA_bhjIvKnlh4I3f3y448PP8Ww8FJ6UscCj_ZI5BPf1D9ChGgJ3v2zJzySLX3bq0KPricOdQNBv28gefYgil7XBVSswIZQn82o5XR9YFDVYWFRRlHjCsO76Xf-wCoSseDTYIZmnjOoqcxU6GMfErkyBuesp0lHXtAClQQmeI3k0FEMgkUWrTHQmrxXcR1lzCFEL6xnbTt81uXhURpGYA2TKuy4JpzP4ETQ0gEQQBXImy5QiV1VsQDzWptwhJKgaTD-vDapf1Scpb2Ow-me7YTRY94o%3D)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3966d8937e00424983c18d6111bf5d48&_e=cgihWSEntL83xkp-B5a8uPOXlr7xqjpriYT7d21nhp1V4yq2I1Almjo1a3IbeoCoMZeoC7KzTTvkEYkponx5aghkuJXGlEnvcjiZQ7ycJocn2jdOrh8YiGTkP83MdijYMnzyIft_83u56JcbGnA_bhjIvKnlh4I3f3y448PP8Ww8FJ6UscCj_ZI5BPf1D9ChGgJ3v2zJzySLX3bq0KPricOdQNBv28gefYgil7XBVSswIZQn82o5XR9YFDVYWFRR2gA1qRXRjFfZm2Ae5X-wyqG7KHOdxhhRU1S2C5WnVxm6MJzomi-RzWSERi3ITBBugsQCBwBfdNMHPT_fBXr8mBU43tNt8dT5-UUwN6Pntfg6MBz1ymT_VP-YPFoMSXn9-vWrMKD9mznJe9e3O3FP-j7c3clF1cN7Xq9BwSgLkNk%3D) [NO](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3966d8937e00424983c18d6111bf5d48&_e=cgihWSEntL83xkp-B5a8uPOXlr7xqjpriYT7d21nhp1V4yq2I1Almjo1a3IbeoCoMZeoC7KzTTvkEYkponx5aghkuJXGlEnvcjiZQ7ycJocn2jdOrh8YiGTkP83MdijYMnzyIft_83u56JcbGnA_bhjIvKnlh4I3f3y448PP8Ww8FJ6UscCj_ZI5BPf1D9ChGgJ3v2zJzySLX3bq0KPricOdQNBv28gefYgil7XBVSswIZQn82o5XR9YFDVYWFRR4_31v21xUjhWi5jp2dr2YNG_JgBJYTLZHNwOU0yzORUihcjgcTTcirOCo14CbgaB2mHB0rQP2RAP0QxicYYfxhZ8ZOOdk2TZPfHN_4pCAXjohWB5AqosNNgCDKuZFWCGX2pVcLw7NkKuwJ4xNMaW6n29pZ0Cv2Ckfsd41eaIAEA%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3966d8937e00424983c18d6111bf5d48&_e=cgihWSEntL83xkp-B5a8uPOXlr7xqjpriYT7d21nhp1V4yq2I1Almjo1a3IbeoCoMZeoC7KzTTvkEYkponx5aghkuJXGlEnvcjiZQ7ycJocn2jdOrh8YiGTkP83MdijYMnzyIft_83u56JcbGnA_bhjIvKnlh4I3f3y448PP8Ww8FJ6UscCj_ZI5BPf1D9ChGgJ3v2zJzySLX3bq0KPricOdQNBv28gefYgil7XBVSswIZQn82o5XR9YFDVYWFRRQYwjlQIFjKwoU1kSLdDrn1NvCcyyTl3R0GiREShMwDGhIFz5rnFh5DLXFir2KVEycMZPHtQXPxEAB5GlmO_-LPJSbDfYgJsTO58PXz8GdkBVNPZEvq5KrDzbpiGCNsVoNHufSJWv_cxsHnIMUaWWTesH6891WIBZM8Z482EoqwU%3D)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Defend the Constitution
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=3966d8937e00424983c18d6111bf5d48&_t=SggT9cThx2mzn1ZuASYk7wNzQQUPZIqxQoXlRBhnpX18pYCKKgWV6l5rQOV2IhUcUGdo8Kfh7CdvITwkn_v7tnf_lJNAgdZeYbCgEs6VEprV6aZCunYHGEq01isswdh8rJQ9cBKdJ1p-sJcCnuHYz_fTU182IC7bU-B98hQ827g%3D)

name: Madeleine Dean
subject: Three years since the insurrection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mad4PA PAC
body:
**** This past weekend marked three years since we experienced the greatest attack on our democracy in our nation’s history – January 6th.

I’ll never forget that day – the banging on the doors, the frantic calls to loved ones, the violence-laden chants, and ultimately, the resiliency of our democracy.

_That’s why I’m writing to you today._

In the years since that fateful day on January 6th, 2021, the MAGA GOP has only gotten bolder, testing the fences of our democracy, seeking power, and undermining election integrity and voters’ rights in the process. They’re doing everything they can right now to be in the position to secure the election for Donald Trump and his allies around the country in 2024.

Are Democrats ready, willing, and able to defend our Constitution from these MAGA-aligned ideologues? I am, and I hope you are too.

**[Show your commitment to democracy this election by instantly adding your name.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76783017/448454667/1174079002?amount=25&refcode=01092024_md_jan6_en_1&refcode2=8f6acc6a-3aaf-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjZhY2M2YS0zYWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZxPTa7wT5lhrdDZ3FzyTd8NE9oQjS-hlj3Y_0ahz_XY=)**

Despite the efforts of those who seek to undermine it, I am optimistic that we will defend our democracy again in 2024.

Thank you for standing with us.

– Mad [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76783018/448454668/-850630802?amount=25&refcode=01092024_md_jan6_en_1&refcode2=8f6acc6a-3aaf-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjZhY2M2YS0zYWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZxPTa7wT5lhrdDZ3FzyTd8NE9oQjS-hlj3Y_0ahz_XY=)
* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.**Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress.**_ _We are excited to have you on Team Dean! Our campaign is funded by people who care about our democracy and want to see continued progress in our community and in our country. If you'd like to donate,[**click here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76783019/448454670/-850630802?amount=25&refcode=01092024_md_jan6_en_1&refcode2=8f6acc6a-3aaf-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjZhY2M2YS0zYWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZxPTa7wT5lhrdDZ3FzyTd8NE9oQjS-hlj3Y_0ahz_XY=) If you’d like to volunteer, [**click here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76783020/448454671/-410778297?refcode=01092024_md_jan6_en_1&refcode2=8f6acc6a-3aaf-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjZhY2M2YS0zYWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZxPTa7wT5lhrdDZ3FzyTd8NE9oQjS-hlj3Y_0ahz_XY=&emci=4921eaf8-0eaf-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=8f6acc6a-3aaf-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=36373569)_ [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76783021/448454672/-850630802?amount=25&refcode=01092024_md_jan6_en_1&refcode2=8f6acc6a-3aaf-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjZhY2M2YS0zYWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZxPTa7wT5lhrdDZ3FzyTd8NE9oQjS-hlj3Y_0ahz_XY=) | Paid for by Mad4PA PAC

clean_body: ** This past weekend marked three years since we experienced the greatest attack on our democracy in our nation’s history – January 6th. I’ll never forget that day – the banging on the doors, the frantic calls to loved ones, the violence-laden chants, and ultimately, the resiliency of our democracy. That’s why I’m writing to you today. In the years since that fateful day on January 6th, 2021, the MAGA GOP has only gotten bolder, testing the fences of our democracy, seeking power, and undermining election integrity and voters’ rights in the process. They’re doing everything they can right now to be in the position to secure the election for Donald Trump and his allies around the country in 2024. Are Democrats ready, willing, and able to defend our Constitution from these MAGA-aligned ideologues? I am, and I hope you are too. = Despite the efforts of those who seek to undermine it, I am optimistic that we will defend our democracy again in 2024. Thank you for standing with us. – Mad = Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress. We are excited to have you on Team Dean! Our campaign is funded by people who care about our democracy and want to see continued progress in our community and in our country. | | Fellow American, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://links.freelibertyinfo.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a5cb193cdbeb4d0b9ae351bd67afa28a&_e=wLKuDIla-bd4L0px8LD5tpOCfIIcuMy-tYE1KePs7XlkmyLWYgB5Cb2il6fuyrgoEHCjDZRUTL4FYKyeM4sfv-h7NUzzvgUHsWlcaOX2CY9ISKLk7pKx4O2C0bKl2wEQwuM_N-_JV8xqzjKXfswlcfdLc2DbL3xI9uptzNPiBQnZXrnbUs_kcmpGCK-JNu2u-Cr20SJ8veV9e28ajHPTSZoXwTmK6gNEiLGOcyu6wWQuIn9tcVBKuxlNLRi_LBjejtG8ok4lN5TBTJqsWGFE2ZQILJBdFnlCZ65_4YYjVdS7fOHeHqFMo8Xh78EYJwORVALOAOcTZS-uEjCrUuJbOrBe4dBXBwnE17Qn1bZuEMrmGwHv38I3OGz2m-aPUT507xKPw9C1Y2zoNicVZyJCsQ%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://links.freelibertyinfo.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a5cb193cdbeb4d0b9ae351bd67afa28a&_e=wLKuDIla-bd4L0px8LD5tpOCfIIcuMy-tYE1KePs7XlkmyLWYgB5Cb2il6fuyrgoEHCjDZRUTL4FYKyeM4sfv-h7NUzzvgUHsWlcaOX2CY9ISKLk7pKx4O2C0bKl2wEQwuM_N-_JV8xqzjKXfswlcfdLc2DbL3xI9uptzNPiBQnZXrnbUs_kcmpGCK-JNu2u-Cr20SJ8veV9e28ajHPTSZoXwTmK6gNEiLGOcyu6wWRWGoKiX24m-reTxmRJy5YezHaI7dE-PiZzDsFwCxpCPZCG8AAeZnVADNXvAWrcOObjqXvR_dsWcGqtFzT9AdrSUSeLdDeYHjFPxNREOq89h9_QQ0pTk98otuQ8JBQaFjxXSn3rQ2k1ztwwfbY1BrpiBXZInZqI1JmOlur4TN9Pgg%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://links.freelibertyinfo.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a5cb193cdbeb4d0b9ae351bd67afa28a&_e=wLKuDIla-bd4L0px8LD5tpOCfIIcuMy-tYE1KePs7XlkmyLWYgB5Cb2il6fuyrgoEHCjDZRUTL4FYKyeM4sfv-h7NUzzvgUHsWlcaOX2CY9ISKLk7pKx4O2C0bKl2wEQwuM_N-_JV8xqzjKXfswlcfdLc2DbL3xI9uptzNPiBQnZXrnbUs_kcmpGCK-JNu2u-Cr20SJ8veV9e28ajHPTSZoXwTmK6gNEiLGOcyu6wWTHeJy6FI1fgpNACF66-8SkJJ9BOS25YKTvrn1f_gWsaWhPxS6NdBMqrlKtuOh0jTQDt2Ti5Up-r1_fxLKYm33CwyGn4hT9qtTXz4kfr8jGYOUoxp4f73xh3f4Q_5gpzS43KPB4pxq1qG4r8y3btX8r9CqtvUW4BvCXhXjso0_o7w%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://links.freelibertyinfo.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a5cb193cdbeb4d0b9ae351bd67afa28a&_e=wLKuDIla-bd4L0px8LD5tpOCfIIcuMy-tYE1KePs7XlkmyLWYgB5Cb2il6fuyrgoEHCjDZRUTL4FYKyeM4sfv-h7NUzzvgUHsWlcaOX2CY9ISKLk7pKx4O2C0bKl2wEQwuM_N-_JV8xqzjKXfswlcfdLc2DbL3xI9uptzNPiBQnZXrnbUs_kcmpGCK-JNu2u-Cr20SJ8veV9e28ajHPTSZoXwTmK6gNEiLGOcyu6wWQpCf62SBf-S8q9NFnpFfbRRAbHIH8WbBO7JJDi1tizxoCL54Wvp2_be-i9Jo8PA45cX11CCD4gK20oeeEYy4BneURyiT5mxKK7Dpo9XMcXjqLAIAmDqhjUIFxAy4g4Ebhso1cFtBd8IDTIITTzCm-AuqdQQB05i9iE8LaW7eFeiQ%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---

Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate

**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: This is terrifying.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Trump’s lawyers just argued that he could assassinate a political rival and avoid criminal charges.
#

Peter:
In 2019, Congress voted to impeach Trump for extorting Ukrainian President Zelenskyy over military aid. The Senate failed to convict and remove him from office.
In 2021, Congress voted to impeach Trump for leading an insurrection against the seat of our government on January 6th. Again, the Senate failed to convict and remove him from office.
And today, before a federal court, Trump’s lawyers just argued that he could assassinate a political rival and avoid criminal charges, as long as the Senate fails to convict and remove him from office.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240109-2-30&t=1&akid=1691%2E734936%2EQ4WCph)
We know Trump’s plans — eviscerating career public servants, purging senior ranks in the military, rooting out political opponents. Revenge.
And now we know that he thinks there are no limits on his power. A dictatorship.
This is terrifying, but it is also a time for courage. We need to do everything we possibly can to make sure Trump is defeated, and to keep the supporters he relies upon the most — people like Kari Lake — as far away from the levers of government as possible.
Ruben Gallego is on the frontlines of that fight, and he needs your help. He will work to defeat Kari Lake, and he will stand against Trump. He will not back down.
[**Please, rush a $3 donation to Ruben’s campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona. The Senate could be the last line of defense against Trump’s reign of terror, and we’ll need him there if worse comes to worst.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240109-2-30&t=2&akid=1691%2E734936%2EQ4WCph)

Peter: In 2019, Congress voted to impeach Trump for extorting Ukrainian President Zelenskyy over military aid. The Senate failed to convict and remove him from office. In 2021, Congress voted to impeach Trump for leading an insurrection against the seat of our government on January 6th. Again, the Senate failed to convict and remove him from office. And today, before a federal court, Trump’s lawyers just argued that he could assassinate a political rival and avoid criminal charges, as long as the Senate fails to convict and remove him from office. We know Trump’s plans — eviscerating career public servants, purging senior ranks in the military, rooting out political opponents. Revenge. And now we know that he thinks there are no limits on his power. A dictatorship. This is terrifying, but it is also a time for courage. We need to do everything we possibly can to make sure Trump is defeated, and to keep the supporters he relies upon the most — people like Kari Lake — as far away from the levers of government as possible. Ruben Gallego is on the frontlines of that fight, and he needs your help. He will work to defeat Kari Lake, and he will stand against Trump. He will not back down.
