name: Restore Our Nation
subject: Who controls whom?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | | This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/PAkj0dMBFA5adkOYVY22Ow~~/AARclAA~/RgRngHUqP0S5aHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2VsZWN0b3JhbC1jb2xsZWdlLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA1ODROMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVsZWN0b3JhbF9jb2xsZWdlX3N1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1ZRVNOT19QQS1ST04tMjAyNDAxMDlXA3NwY0IKZZgaxp1l49d9w1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/PAkj0dMBFA5adkOYVY22Ow~~/AARclAA~/RgRngHUqP0S5aHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2VsZWN0b3JhbC1jb2xsZWdlLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA1ODROMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVsZWN0b3JhbF9jb2xsZWdlX3N1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1ZRVNOT19QQS1ST04tMjAyNDAxMDlXA3NwY0IKZZgaxp1l49d9w1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/PAkj0dMBFA5adkOYVY22Ow~~/AARclAA~/RgRngHUqP0S5aHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2VsZWN0b3JhbC1jb2xsZWdlLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA1ODROMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVsZWN0b3JhbF9jb2xsZWdlX3N1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1ZRVNOT19QQS1ST04tMjAyNDAxMDlXA3NwY0IKZZgaxp1l49d9w1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) [NO](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/PAkj0dMBFA5adkOYVY22Ow~~/AARclAA~/RgRngHUqP0S5aHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2VsZWN0b3JhbC1jb2xsZWdlLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA1ODROMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVsZWN0b3JhbF9jb2xsZWdlX3N1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1ZRVNOT19QQS1ST04tMjAyNDAxMDlXA3NwY0IKZZgaxp1l49d9w1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/PAkj0dMBFA5adkOYVY22Ow~~/AARclAA~/RgRngHUqP0S5aHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2VsZWN0b3JhbC1jb2xsZWdlLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA1ODROMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVsZWN0b3JhbF9jb2xsZWdlX3N1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1ZRVNOT19QQS1ST04tMjAyNDAxMDlXA3NwY0IKZZgaxp1l49d9w1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/YFVdjoSihxlg4--HaIjFJQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRngHUqP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmWYGsadZePXfcNSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VMXBF282A9FoPLuM4es1aA~~/AARclAA~/RgRngHUqP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgplmBrGnWXj133DUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

He _never_ gives up. He _never_ quits.

_That’s why I promised to compile a very special list that I’m going to share with my father later tonight of ALL the patriots who stepped up to have his back on this dark day in American history._

clean_body: He just marched straight into the belly of the beast.| | | | | Patriot, Today, my father is fighting on appeal for his presidential immunity while Crooked Joe’s Department of “Justice” is attempting to unlawfully STRIP it from him as a completely innocent man in the D.C. And it’s why he just marched straight into court in the belly of the beast – Washington D.C. – to fight for what he knows is right! But while my father is willing to sacrifice everything to save our country from Crooked Joe and the Left’s tyranny, I wanted to be sure that he KNEW he wasn’t alone today. I wanted him to know that while he may be surrounded in D.C. at this very moment by Radical Democrats, Crooked Joe’s accomplices, disloyal RINOs, and the Deep State, the AMERICAN __PEOPLE– from every corner of the country – are surrounding their favorite Presidentwith their love and support! Team, Do you remember how it felt in the immediate aftermath of the 2020 presidential election when the race was too close to call? Americans across the country waited anxiously to find out who would be their President for the next four years. Political pundits went back and forth on who they thought would be declared the winner. And MAGA Republicans were already laying the groundwork to declare the election stolen before we even knew the final results. In 2024, we want to make sure that President Biden and Vice President Harris are reelected to the White House **on Election Night.** That’s why we’re kicking our operation into high gear as quickly as possible. **[If you support our efforts to help President Biden and Vice President Harris win reelection to the White House, chip in to Fight Like Hell PAC today to show them that they can count on us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76783992/448457911/232286791?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240109_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDJmZDkwMDMtM2VhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wqpf0fkGyBMexp0gD7QAH_-V-cUJN7ADnJZab2-OEtI=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76783993/448457912/232286791?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240109_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDJmZDkwMDMtM2VhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wqpf0fkGyBMexp0gD7QAH_-V-cUJN7ADnJZab2-OEtI=)

clean_body: | Team, Do you remember how it felt in the immediate aftermath of the 2020 presidential election when the race was too close to call? Americans across the country waited anxiously to find out who would be their President for the next four years. Political pundits went back and forth on who they thought would be declared the winner. And MAGA Republicans were already laying the groundwork to declare the election stolen before we even knew the final results. In 2024, we want to make sure that President Biden and Vice President Harris are reelected to the White House on Election Night. That’s why we’re kicking our operation into high gear as quickly as possible. = | = Earning the result we want on Election Night means we need to start engaging voters now. That’s why our team will be spending the next several months talking to voters and supporting Democrats up and down the ballot who will defend working people and protect our fundamental rights. And that’s where your donations come in. While your small donations of $5 or $10 may not seem like all that much, trust us when we say that your support helps us build our campaign operation and provide support to Democrats across the country who will fight like hell to create a better future for hardworking Americans. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thanks, Team Fight Like Hell PAC Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

name: Conservatives Give
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

| | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59eff86fe0494f4298e35a46261ae63b&_e=tjwxwRzpLtyjtIgMLDZzl7PePAhXGWLdxh7NZc1rkuNmkM1ioiOANQ8-aCzqkxiIA-BrYVulHIDgTlVUK497QVhZD9qBfL624ttXWQjxY0LtKLQA-5w7rIT_4ey40PNx53gVZESwksbLim6b0O0bpRQaCi5VK0GMqQIZaRvEOFNGe4Y8pMX3UqMVTQiEXRfOpeZDjS3ce45FMHVsyoXnpc5qtH4fZA-HKwqM4-Tp9GRn7AhECNGnguVWFMjC2JcKFxRA9WRyh7n_d3OEfAPx7NBDK3bm5Cj83KV8XX6vFUnet3X6I7hz9p5F_B530mRDTrp8EgQTAcnEMniyI8hiLr8TVTkP9YPGQxMol1lB0LdLc20TvcnoFdpjXBAvhXxchmW01_jADwTfLqACyIUsPQiVjZe3SIH2DnMJk6B0UBQ%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59eff86fe0494f4298e35a46261ae63b&_e=tjwxwRzpLtyjtIgMLDZzl7PePAhXGWLdxh7NZc1rkuNmkM1ioiOANQ8-aCzqkxiIA-BrYVulHIDgTlVUK497QVhZD9qBfL624ttXWQjxY0LtKLQA-5w7rIT_4ey40PNx53gVZESwksbLim6b0O0bpRQaCi5VK0GMqQIZaRvEOFNGe4Y8pMX3UqMVTQiEXRfOpeZDjS3ce45FMHVsyoXnpc5qtH4fZA-HKwqM4-Tp9GRn7AhECNGnguVWFMjC2JcK4eRE-9EONJyl11rkwv_IcuFDA30vI1bd0NKZ-7tD6jUhUa0CKJKtnvpPuqnOxDXMQZWkjhpP_TttbJcCNCd_Wz9vz0UQ2N_DpmvRxtckzCeWtZbRNZcnI27xu8LyCUEpU3uRahansdf2Vhx1Og8qyaY_dx7eI8V6mQOYkrvnkrg%3D)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59eff86fe0494f4298e35a46261ae63b&_e=tjwxwRzpLtyjtIgMLDZzl7PePAhXGWLdxh7NZc1rkuNmkM1ioiOANQ8-aCzqkxiIA-BrYVulHIDgTlVUK497QVhZD9qBfL624ttXWQjxY0LtKLQA-5w7rIT_4ey40PNx53gVZESwksbLim6b0O0bpRQaCi5VK0GMqQIZaRvEOFNGe4Y8pMX3UqMVTQiEXRfOpeZDjS3ce45FMHVsyoXnpc5qtH4fZA-HKwqM4-Tp9GRn7AhECNGnguVWFMjC2JcK3MldqcuCWoWHxM-IpkpRgCxoXSkoTkry6SKTCI2uIMvmUvNHPgf-HJIpdZ3evG1LQhuEe-IxRQ-o-PdNKfcSAACrplqr9aFE_SLj__XnaL5qeVzarilaWNMZkQ3celW5nfDFVd3BejpwJJqTmBbW7TDXvvSqYEVVpxtwl6KfZt4%3D) [NO](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59eff86fe0494f4298e35a46261ae63b&_e=tjwxwRzpLtyjtIgMLDZzl7PePAhXGWLdxh7NZc1rkuNmkM1ioiOANQ8-aCzqkxiIA-BrYVulHIDgTlVUK497QVhZD9qBfL624ttXWQjxY0LtKLQA-5w7rIT_4ey40PNx53gVZESwksbLim6b0O0bpRQaCi5VK0GMqQIZaRvEOFNGe4Y8pMX3UqMVTQiEXRfOpeZDjS3ce45FMHVsyoXnpc5qtH4fZA-HKwqM4-Tp9GRn7AhECNGnguVWFMjC2JcKj6S7tQFywLk5nXUe0pBKl3ro53VBQUNsMta2D6HAM5J7_yCnlRTLYdj8Hy8mnN8uoppWVnmvYH8Na3p4qf0stYptvR-OpMuaI5LcVqBQvGDyrtss_IGkfNtSwdJ1rWAnbT5hNz8dv5A-LkBWqGHeODf5_NTrRW9V6BBX4aS4ikI%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59eff86fe0494f4298e35a46261ae63b&_e=tjwxwRzpLtyjtIgMLDZzl7PePAhXGWLdxh7NZc1rkuNmkM1ioiOANQ8-aCzqkxiIA-BrYVulHIDgTlVUK497QVhZD9qBfL624ttXWQjxY0LtKLQA-5w7rIT_4ey40PNx53gVZESwksbLim6b0O0bpRQaCi5VK0GMqQIZaRvEOFNGe4Y8pMX3UqMVTQiEXRfOpeZDjS3ce45FMHVsyoXnpc5qtH4fZA-HKwqM4-Tp9GRn7AhECNGnguVWFMjC2JcKBXc8Z6FfrwWe1qEoiikupn53p95rZGN4EaE2JGpAPfLKPU_MIcvvKfZWj4TDyhpauXr_n-AOSXsRaeSd3R0aI_7P_bCDHNCnBA0EFTuwlEyOsgXZHJWR6RH7oPQF6mZB4s5stETgizsurjzbqZ2PEPySiUjDVasZ6a6dCmlM_Tk%3D)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Conservatives Give
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=59eff86fe0494f4298e35a46261ae63b&_t=haM0zsFQIRmcRsvjaJX1ma2yj2FbdJXSDge3bPcwiXLdJ1QSIhmfeQiYRbhySd6KOmj7O72YrdI77VabU7abgZH8B_g67_Ptp5B2b6w_3LsifPOKL01-0A1uDoqdCT725EVX6-lO5BJEXOprO8a5F4uV9rr8eQjlxP1jN8YCQt4%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59eff86fe0494f4298e35a46261ae63b&_e=nNS6GXl1DGI8vmi4ydHP8GZdiz_RTXWSj56qsOvgkb68pfyIDxLAfwMombfGKFgY7TP4yntfEUWYhNY856teYBfhl_mj0uucP2O8QmUNO38cr0X60bFuzhNTMJXBu0b9pW1YXg1EI6-EmpaioRMfSrkWU94wnzcALEI9yDsVI6K60ef-EAbzxb0PZ3uLcr3c4OBtnRc2GpUND7EHWfR1LqnbXxyLelCThphWvD_1iMVZ5wLXkY27evKIlgHAixAj1brl1maQ1PNEiYg4e29lTw%3D%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59eff86fe0494f4298e35a46261ae63b&_e=tjwxwRzpLtyjtIgMLDZzlxH_izdRPolBtgeo_LOK6BufuJRhbvh89xvdM6939yKTCYvbJdhFZEmUU5QVIjNiltvJ-7pJIU769qplW9VYX75CH0ZXNfiL6YxDPE83MnkIqik1N0GjhacoLpTnyFzv34bap9bXauG80abwmrHpG7qsmgNUAxY4YFSD_QfOyf4Zad5IklXK483gZCbkyZHHMr7vv8wCfOK8rm7sw9g6h1Y%3D)_

The 2023 elections signaled that Virginians are ready for pro-choice leadership at every level of government, and this is _one of our best chances to replace an anti-choice GOP governor_.

**That's why we're proud to support Rep. Abigail Spanberger, the pro-choice champion running to stop the dangerous Republican anti-choice agenda in its tracks.** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76784670/448460172/1237601583?sourceid=1052681&refcode=WTEFEM11_20240109_Spanberger_ND_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTdjYmJiMi00MWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0rhZJ0UBeIHQcJq7xFa3BESbUaGM4IgTYAvpatD0tuM=) In Congress, Abigail Spanberger has fought for all Virginians by lowering costs, creating jobs, and fighting for Virginians' right to choose. If elected, she'd be the first woman governor in the state's history.

**Virginia's governorship is a must-flip office.** We can't let the state's radical GOP extremists get away with their plan to roll back reproductive rights, restrict public education, and threaten our democracy. ****Abigail Spanberger is the woman for the job. name: Emilia Sykes
subject: Personally asking for your 2024 support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
I’d be grateful if you could read my team’s note below and become one of our 2024 Founding Donors.
[see enclosed information]
Hi Peter,

I’ve been so honored to represent Ohio’s 13th Congressional District in Congress over the past year. Since day one, I’ve advocated for the issues important to Northeast Ohio families, and I’ve fought to put people over politics every day in Washington.

**Together, we’ve accomplished so much – but our work isn’t finished.[That’s why I’m asking for your support to help my team kick off 2024 today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76784732/448460349/-1745565447?refcode=em_fr_2024.01.09_b1_es_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjNiOWU5Yi00MmFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FCQ9T5ogF3BIaNPPmF7lL4ZO7WX-LnTwZ6cZxImHwNY=)**

Nonpartisan elections experts are calling our race one of the most competitive in the entire country, so we can’t afford to take our foot off the gas for even a moment. It is _absolutely critical_ that we grow a grassroots movement that can win in November, and that work starts now.

**[I’d be grateful if you could read my team’s note below and become one of our 2024 Founding Donors. Your support means the world to me, and it makes a real difference in a race as competitive as ours.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76784733/448460350/-1745565447?refcode=em_fr_2024.01.09_b1_es_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjNiOWU5Yi00MmFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FCQ9T5ogF3BIaNPPmF7lL4ZO7WX-LnTwZ6cZxImHwNY=)**

_Emilia_

If you’re ready to join me in taking on the failed Biden agenda, **[anything you can contribute](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=3d2bcacaa03c476599b578d5ee58da38&_e=cT0JCemts7Ug7S879PpIpPHgLFQyDvDQVeIrs9mwWtpt9zKXMtO4TRt_iMqjmEjt8iCFaXtZxNevyZlGSbgx9BfkxMR7tPqoVGrY-SLZ7n4BJZ-B6yqNLNpnsAE7tJF2QnHthFDo_KIzE07Dvzrsgp9PDa6zSQvoEtg8Ipb-JhdmKx3uIkDnj7pDKdrFz7GYl9X3Kxdsll-fo-1RMzuuikRPrgUbVgUgsx6JsW5dL0KDBc7lL5RV3gYcD_zQSMF5GLw8ioF3kdtULEF6G_PRQseZgs6rTASWDSWewSWaQ2NOXZDm3KhsABesFGGZzm9gxKhguq100bWgjhmDwI4BfNDhcdVawYwPMC6c3tzs_a0MZKNZ2mrDPoKnSVSOmfTfigVS7hCYSRH3RWq0PkP_3Czl5hOyiwG7fY78Saz_mcU%3D)** will go a long way toward helping me do it! clean_body: Christian, conservative, American – and that’s non-negotiable | | | Peter, “You have to compromise your values to get things done.” That’s the conventional wisdom in Washington, D.C. but I’m here to tell you that any politician who tells you that is simply wrong. This is Senator Katie Britt. I’m a Christian, a conservative, and a proud American – and that’s non-negotiable. As one of only a hundred people in the U.S. Senate, I take my duty to my constituents extremely seriously. I owe it not just to Alabamians, but to every American to secure our border, stop Joe Biden’s failed agenda, and remain steadfast in our conservative principles. If you’re ready to join me in taking on the failed Biden agenda, will go a long way toward helping me do it! As long as I’m serving you, I’ll never waver on fighting for our values. Can I count on your help? Sincerely, Senator Katie Britt | | Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

name: Bob Casey
subject: What I’m asking this year
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
This year I am asking for the honor of your trust.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1646%2E552475%2EHaCC7c)
**_"All public service is a trust, given in faith and accepted in honor.”_**
Peter, those are the words inscribed over the front door of the Finance Building in Harrisburg, where I began my public service as PA’s Auditor General.
But they’re so much more than words to me.
One thing you might not know about me is that my wife, Terese, and I raised our four daughters in the same community where I grew up — my hometown of Scranton, PA.
Pennsylvania has been and always will be my home. If there is anything I've learned from serving the Commonwealth, it’s that PA’s hardworking people need an actual champion in Washington — which brings me back to those words.
**_All public service is a trust, given in faith._** As your Senator, I am reminded every day that you have put your trust in me to fight for what’s right.
**_And accepted in honor._** I work to earn that trust by standing up for you and your families: against Republican attacks on Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid; against tax cuts for the ultra-rich; against countries like China that threaten our jobs with unfair trade practices; and against big health care companies raising costs for the middle class.
Peter, my record as Senator makes it clear who I’m fighting for in Washington. My Republican opponent, on the other hand, has a decades-long record of selling out working people and shipping jobs overseas — to enrich himself and his Wall Street friends. That’s why the stakes are too high to sit out this election.
I am once again asking for the honor of your trust:
[**This year’s re-election fight promises to be among the most expensive and competitive Senate races in the country. I will do whatever it takes to defend this seat and our Democratic majority — and I’m asking you to make your first founding donation of 2024 to fuel the fight.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240109-2?refcode=em20240109-2&refcode2=1646_552475_HaCC7c&akid=1646%2E552475%2EHaCC7c)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240109-2?refcode=em20240109-2&refcode2=1646_552475_HaCC7c&akid=1646%2E552475%2EHaCC7c)**
Thank you for being part of our team.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

* * *

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=1646%2E552475%2EHaCC7c)

* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1646%2E552475%2EHaCC7c)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)

body:

**FIRST:** Our team came together to send John to the Senate to fight for the working families of Pennsylvania -- and won.
**THEN:** The GOP and their super PAC million$ are preparing to do everything they can to flip PA red this year and with it, take back the Senate majority.

Hi there — I wanted to bump this email to the top of your inbox.We are still hoping that 18 more Democrats from 95811 will step up and become 2024 Founding Donors of our statewide campaign to flip tossup U.S. House seats from red to blue.

We can’t afford to wait until the last minute — not when there is so much at stake. We must invest in our Forever Organizing program and ensure we are on the ground in the pivotal districts that’ll decide the House Majority *right now*.

That’s why we are asking our supporters to become 2024 Founding Donors. Can I count on you? I am dropping my personal ActBlue link below, and I hope to see your donation come in.

Thank you,
- Yvette

But here at the California Democratic Party, we are committed to organizing and mobilizing in key districts around the clock, all year long. Why? That’s how you win.
Our Forever Organizing team is working every day to:
🚪Knock on doors;
📋Attend events;

📣Get the word out about our people-powered Democratic candidates who are working to unseat Republicans in purple districts.
Do you remember back in 2022 when we were waiting for DAYS to figure out whether Democrats or Republicans would control the House? Most of those razor-thin seats were here in California.
That’s why we are activating our 2024 Founding Donor program and asking you to invest in the team that will successfully flip these seats and the House Majority this year. Can we count on you? name: Matt Gaetz
subject: I may not survive this
body:
This is your last chance
| | [ ](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=509dabef73434264ad7b5521824c149b&_e=GTJiE8q3lwUvVcKWQSq9zAvKfyS3J5868B7HD5UcMgNJxu4Gq6Cd79tJg-kTgyQGbecSh2wT0CTmyavkziGeDckb0j_GQrA8fVYLmkbKA7R-a7JATAZx2poskDBCOSbG2_XW8owJ-lncUkO4x3E8rHxnlZwhJU-qyzbFkS7yENCdIEk4qTMyhBTFoURWPtBZMF9E8FS9KfAs4JyT8SbHESKDAskP-GXftCwTiYzJaAvKyEwWiRfTOp1Qj7Zvf7aiuvS8WEY4dPixVMJwpcxwGr-NFHBvO73_CrdeyEeDVro%3D)
---
Fellow American, I just came back from the border, and I was shocked at what I saw.
Make no mistake: Joe Biden and the Democrats have ripped our border wide open so they can use the illegals invading our country as a tool for a total takeover of America.
| [ ](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=509dabef73434264ad7b5521824c149b&_e=GTJiE8q3lwUvVcKWQSq9zAvKfyS3J5868B7HD5UcMgNJxu4Gq6Cd79tJg-kTgyQGbecSh2wT0CTmyavkziGeDckb0j_GQrA8fVYLmkbKA7R-a7JATAZx2poskDBCOSbG2_XW8owJ-lncUkO4x3E8rFGYAPG21nnbHOgCS3dOndPXd3cpuFUb4e87qlikUDd3BcVe7_rl9M1XerNzVcjQxgzT6LhbEVhDBakkexQDD4Qmf9wuC-vaHwj2HbzfZou1t5_AymFVuIIciHdJl_5bReOWg7uNqDjNpUt-6VqR3KI%3D)
---
While Biden and his radical Democrat goons sit atop their pedestal in the Swamp and debate which ice cream flavor is the best, I'm fighting to make America better and safer for our citizens.
Because at this rate, **with OVER 300,000 illegal immigrants crossing the border just this month** , Americans could be the minority in our own country.
_**I 've spent many years in Congress backing Trump and his secure-border, America-First policies, and I'm proud of that.**_
**However, amidst the Left 's full-on assault against me, I fell _thousands_ of dollars short of our most important goal to date.**
**[And if my campaign doesn 't meet that goal before the extended deadline the swamp-dwellers will have all the tools they need to take me out](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=509dabef73434264ad7b5521824c149b&_e=GTJiE8q3lwUvVcKWQSq9zAvKfyS3J5868B7HD5UcMgNJxu4Gq6Cd79tJg-kTgyQGbecSh2wT0CTmyavkziGeDckb0j_GQrA8fVYLmkbKA7R-a7JATAZx2poskDBCOSbG2_XW8owJ-lncUkO4x3E8rFwItdkJGAe2-a-sGz0OhL4wMlY5JZaH9N-BV_yyA_NhTNs50laQRDa_bC_wWsG86JyxpsSP1De1aQ_7mxHjBzpNF3BoCE_j79vx_ATVgdoohIqkPTlRTrqykYfLU_Y7yj7odA583VXsDE1FBy27Ryw%3D).**
| [ ](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=509dabef73434264ad7b5521824c149b&_e=GTJiE8q3lwUvVcKWQSq9zAvKfyS3J5868B7HD5UcMgNJxu4Gq6Cd79tJg-kTgyQGbecSh2wT0CTmyavkziGeDckb0j_GQrA8fVYLmkbKA7R-a7JATAZx2poskDBCOSbG2_XW8owJ-lncUkO4x3E8rH6xWm8mJTpMVG_AIDqq6EU3q4O49iOr0ylTudKwMx_nh-47K_wXXjOhIupLJRlcmhaUrU6XCeCGzWfsPKackRUWwLBFCqk5sW9wqUjSfRgBOpEMWEV58nsnbv1xmn1uW-HvA0XX2n1ttdfNU9bY9mo%3D)
---
| [ **STAND WITH GAETZ** ](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=509dabef73434264ad7b5521824c149b&_e=GTJiE8q3lwUvVcKWQSq9zAvKfyS3J5868B7HD5UcMgNJxu4Gq6Cd79tJg-kTgyQGbecSh2wT0CTmyavkziGeDckb0j_GQrA8fVYLmkbKA7R-a7JATAZx2poskDBCOSbG2_XW8owJ-lncUkO4x3E8rF7ja5PwCoOlwVDsjP1EurYeOJgthsIvf8sePJ7c-U4k1Hr9LGCHOC10KF5P9REEBAQDk_qA6Hz7MeyVFZTGEjo4zyZ8k-NjoxeacmnGAnX9BkNO-yEsJa72P7PTvkYOPVROi7yoYKNcuvEoOVKEN0A%3D)
---
With me being at the top of the Communist Democrats' hit list, failing to meet this goal would be a huge setback for my campaign and a monumental win for the Left.
And we CANNOT afford to give them so much momentum at the start of this monumental election year. There is too much at stake.
**[So please, Fellow American, as a humble representative of you and the rest of the great citizens of the United States of America, I 'm asking you to contribute anything you can](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=509dabef73434264ad7b5521824c149b&_e=GTJiE8q3lwUvVcKWQSq9zAvKfyS3J5868B7HD5UcMgNJxu4Gq6Cd79tJg-kTgyQGbecSh2wT0CTmyavkziGeDckb0j_GQrA8fVYLmkbKA7R-a7JATAZx2poskDBCOSbG2_XW8owJ-lncUkO4x3E8rEDYJru6iH3wPbvnVkoewsmaisDsWVPZGibtavRGTt4OqM0QXsj1Ya2OftCCvJGB10x512vOAQiEdB4WIhewqFhJLMgVVVEGncg-eJJbYZ6T8SvECfxi4nchzyzXUtN5j-TUAUIZ4DnQOp85J4s6oKk%3D).**
Whether it be $50, $25, or even a small gift of $10, [any amount you can afford to give is absolutely crucial in helping me continue the good fight in Congress](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=509dabef73434264ad7b5521824c149b&_e=GTJiE8q3lwUvVcKWQSq9zAvKfyS3J5868B7HD5UcMgNJxu4Gq6Cd79tJg-kTgyQGbecSh2wT0CTmyavkziGeDckb0j_GQrA8fVYLmkbKA7R-a7JATAZx2poskDBCOSbG2_XW8owJ-lncUkO4x3E8rGYDuOwXkb5hMG9zcHx7qovK6EgLOfiP_Vkz5j_BhO9uETfmXgTZ1nkl9CMCzQVcAK865z5rwyYqFdRO6-6nJVQDWepIUm1sfauh3jVEjcjatL_oG9ONa-bUYHEITVLcaiJXFdp_U6DaQ8LQ8sRe3eE%3D).
Unlike the Democrats in D.C., I take pride in the fact that I don't rely on giant wads of cash being handed to me by lobbyists and dark money groups.
**I rely on the everyday, hard-working American like YOU.**
And I'm counting on you like never before.
There's no time to waste. You have never let me down and I know you won't now.

| | | | Peter... Don't you think Alaska deserves better than Mary Peltola? Here are just a few reasons to go out with the old and in with the new this year: Peltola is against American Energy... I will vote to unleash it! Peltola doesn't support Israel aid... I will always stand with our allies. Peltola refused to give hardworking military personnel a raise... I will have their backs, just like they have ours! Seeing a trend, here? If you agree that we deserve better representation in Congress and a public servant who actually does her job, I hope you'll join my team today. clean_body: | | | | | | | | | Peter... Don't you think Alaska deserves better than Mary Peltola? Here are just a few reasons to go out with the old and in with the new this year: Peltola is against American Energy... I will vote to unleash it! Peltola doesn't support Israel aid... I will always stand with our allies. Peltola refused to give hardworking military personnel a raise... I will have their backs, just like they have ours! Seeing a trend, here? If you agree that we deserve better representation in Congress and a public servant who actually does her job, I hope you'll join my team today. Unlike Mary Peltola, who is busy fundraising from special interests in the lower 48, this campaign is powered by grassroots conservatives like you. Let's team up. Let's bring a conservative voice back to Congress. I hope I can earn your support, Nancy Dahlstrom Candidate for Congress, Alaska At-Large | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | No longer want to receive these emails? .

We're in for an uphill battle: _Politico_ is calling the Senate map "hell" for Democrats. If Mitch McConnell flips seats in Ohio, Montana, Pennsylvania or West Virginia, we'll lose our two-seat majority.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=20Edwards?=
subject: Introducing the Governing Group
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOVERNING GROUP PAC
body:
In November, we announced the launch of the Governing Group PAC. Will you join me as we begin this movement? | | | | |
---

Team Becky,
I hope you had a wonderful beginning to 2024. Utahns have been buzzing with excitement as we just wrapped up a week bustling with candidate filings for office. From legislative races to the U.S. Senate race, there’s a burgeoning hope for better politics – **and that’s where we come in!**
In November, we announced the launch of the Governing Group PAC. Through this initiative, we’re harnessing the power of Team Becky to elect local and state officials across Utah. Our focus is on helping elect those committed to governance and finding solutions to our greatest challenges–not just those who yell the loudest.
However, this can only be achieved with your continued support in the coming months and years. We’ve set an ambitious goal to raise $50,000 for the 2024 elections. [**Will you pitch in a donation today?**](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=c98677d3ea&e=6484bb6dd5)

| [DONATE TODAY!](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=ec69fe8971&e=6484bb6dd5)
---
Since our last election, political discourse has unfortunately become even more toxic. The House of Representatives struggled for nearly a month to elect a Speaker due to political obstructionism. The federal government has been teetering on the edge of catastrophic shutdowns. And even here in Utah, we're not immune. Too many of our elected officials, from both parties, are more focused on winning social media skirmishes than on enacting meaningful legislation.
By donating today, you will directly support the funding and infrastructure of candidates who prioritize principled results over partisan soundbites. [**Will you join me as we begin this movement?**](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=5d490e912b&e=6484bb6dd5)
Stay updated and involved by following us on social media. There, you’ll learn more about the Governance Group, our candidates, and ways you can help ensure a better and brighter future for our Beehive state.
With Gratitude,
Becky Edwards

|
---
#### PAID FOR BY GOVERNING GROUP PAC
| | | | [](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=9845dfd941&e=6484bb6dd5)| [](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=f03324d010&e=6484bb6dd5)| [](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=8fe20b4544&e=6484bb6dd5)

body:
|
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76785625/448463422/43924808?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240109_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY1YjBjODJmLTQ1YWYtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LMVd3J5uZOWBULnyvFLl2bd07SUxmgzCJMCaPlthD1E=)

Peter, it’s Wendy Davis. Where do I even start?

As we speak, the anti-choice laws engineered by Texas Republicans like Ken Paxton, Greg Abbott, and Dan Patrick and supported by Ted Cruz are forcing women to flee our state to receive needed and emergency health care.

**Nobody deserves the trauma or the _unbearable_ emotional and physical stress that Texas’ abortion ban has wrought.**

I’m outraged by what extremists in our government are putting women through. _They are not reflective of who we are – _[and that’s why it’s essential that we elect leaders like my friend, Colin Allred, who will defend women’s reproductive rights. Can you split a donation between Colin and Defeat Republicans right now to help send Colin to the U.S. Senate? ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76785627/448463424/43924808?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240109_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY1YjBjODJmLTQ1YWYtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LMVd3J5uZOWBULnyvFLl2bd07SUxmgzCJMCaPlthD1E=)

We deserve better, and that starts with defeating anti-abortion extremists like Ted Cruz and electing leaders – like Colin – with a record of standing up for the dignity and rights of Texas women.

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: Mike Rogers does a 180 and endorses Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1011%2E135344%2E90fB53)

Friend -
We’re writing with a big update: After years of hammering Trump, and even running against Trump, GOP Senate candidate Mike Rogers has shocked us by coming out today and endorsing Trump for President. It’s a Shakespearean turn for a man who prided himself as a so-called moderate.
For years, Mike Rogers tried to paint himself as someone who pushed back against Trump. He was a paid CNN commentator, doing repeated interviews critical of Trump. After he was fired by Trump’s transition team, he wrote op-eds condemning Trump’s refusal to accept the 2020 election, and was disgusted enough by Trump that he prepared to run for president AGAINST Trump.
Then, this morning, Mike Rogers endorsed Donald Trump for President of the United States in an op-ed in the Daily Caller, [**which you can click here to read.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1995?t=2&akid=1011%2E135344%2E90fB53)**
**Here's the truth:** Mike Rogers is a political player who has seen the way the wind blows and sacrificed his integrity.
We need your help to fight back against yet another leader who has compromised his own values to Trump.
The overwhelming majority of the donations we receive come from lots and lots of people giving small amounts of money -- many of them in response to emails like this. So if we are going to have the resources we need to win this race, your willingness to click and donate is a big reason why.
[**Will you click this link and contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to Elissa’s campaign for Senate in Michigan today? This race will determine whether or not Democrats can keep control of the Senate.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-jan24.--Kpen&refcode=em240109-2-30&t=3&akid=1011%2E135344%2E90fB53)**

The overwhelming majority of the donations we receive come from lots and lots of people giving small amounts of money -- many of them in response to emails like this. So if we are going to have the resources we need to win this race, your willingness to click and donate is a big reason why. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you in advance for contributing today. It means a lot. name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

| | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5952f06622ff4e15889dc340d0870c29&_e=gHc8k56l-n62RtscsPbiJ793bSU5EGd31bOl_eWT0unhLdJ6mMDoTWbbvrYrGKvH94h0rrXvcd_DEi1D17nRYKqO61UNy5cPnGcQg0M7EeGxHRE362feJDsxgkLAoQfEWkpJ_Q8Y34od0LA-A_heiqfQ2qEmfy4Sqq-T9OHIcf4WX67fu7dBjO49Zo47mSUqoMZjXJrgCd0L-CeHg1ETdtY4IudvBOTfAEHFRvqPM_NjSOnGjtXYTwCdFufYCVJTlLb3MBXhVM7JhP8kWwaV0WyDI7qzLuHPlAqy8eyMF6JE2UN2lHji9NS0XZ3GfGcsqLO8TfXstyIAYp2NKwTMEnqyLwkNfeyuUZe5Kz1Uvy0-35PMJjS0rIj20Z_jmTmkqACbRv96-pkXQpkbIruX4FwYf6VbMJcdp8J6a0fGli0%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5952f06622ff4e15889dc340d0870c29&_e=gHc8k56l-n62RtscsPbiJ793bSU5EGd31bOl_eWT0unhLdJ6mMDoTWbbvrYrGKvH94h0rrXvcd_DEi1D17nRYKqO61UNy5cPnGcQg0M7EeGxHRE362feJDsxgkLAoQfEWkpJ_Q8Y34od0LA-A_heiqfQ2qEmfy4Sqq-T9OHIcf4WX67fu7dBjO49Zo47mSUqoMZjXJrgCd0L-CeHg1ETdtY4IudvBOTfAEHFRvqPM_NjSOnGjtXYTwCdFufYCVJTUzMDZeYjWnFgSCHmgJd8jXCi8t8s_-fJvtYyvFVKqFVuqvsBiaq6l-jpW0UFnIbiC8Do6fKPzQOXXoAc_uAdO3wiuLNH8li_2mY2yxSkcVGWlwtHGp8e3m7LH52UqgjN3HxGj3PVEFO4OhDTpbqWfHjEKXfhe8WI9HWwQ0RpvME%3D)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5952f06622ff4e15889dc340d0870c29&_e=gHc8k56l-n62RtscsPbiJ793bSU5EGd31bOl_eWT0unhLdJ6mMDoTWbbvrYrGKvH94h0rrXvcd_DEi1D17nRYKqO61UNy5cPnGcQg0M7EeGxHRE362feJDsxgkLAoQfEWkpJ_Q8Y34od0LA-A_heiqfQ2qEmfy4Sqq-T9OHIcf4WX67fu7dBjO49Zo47mSUqoMZjXJrgCd0L-CeHg1ETdtY4IudvBOTfAEHFRvqPM_NjSOnGjtXYTwCdFufYCVJT-t7Edm48pNUPWAe1PUzmdDuoBOnrpA7NQs6uOFV0BFlhxO2XjdMCL4FZCFc1LB4ZXfMHzxgSVt1FsG1Estxm6I1O_aJ1e9AF3xXU33wDMyfTbOD6V4OJoTeGsynllMGcxbz5OKVzz0GMS98bMduNsVLzIuYnwEemVQrwuMKJqN4%3D) [NO](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5952f06622ff4e15889dc340d0870c29&_e=gHc8k56l-n62RtscsPbiJ793bSU5EGd31bOl_eWT0unhLdJ6mMDoTWbbvrYrGKvH94h0rrXvcd_DEi1D17nRYKqO61UNy5cPnGcQg0M7EeGxHRE362feJDsxgkLAoQfEWkpJ_Q8Y34od0LA-A_heiqfQ2qEmfy4Sqq-T9OHIcf4WX67fu7dBjO49Zo47mSUqoMZjXJrgCd0L-CeHg1ETdtY4IudvBOTfAEHFRvqPM_NjSOnGjtXYTwCdFufYCVJTfyW3ts3HNXPjc84he4jiqAR51Y6IVVTBp68K1Ut-CnDTfpLbH_zKQNDU2jhx49NyOAIVbXbtLyq39MzcwNbWkV7R0HvKD_9gvuFCMEfKpk7EcfJ1JsMrJlsahly2Q7Jguljwpnl4n11wUO7kPbjSSBwLXMu6dQxakNi9JbE8Sd0%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5952f06622ff4e15889dc340d0870c29&_e=gHc8k56l-n62RtscsPbiJ793bSU5EGd31bOl_eWT0unhLdJ6mMDoTWbbvrYrGKvH94h0rrXvcd_DEi1D17nRYKqO61UNy5cPnGcQg0M7EeGxHRE362feJDsxgkLAoQfEWkpJ_Q8Y34od0LA-A_heiqfQ2qEmfy4Sqq-T9OHIcf4WX67fu7dBjO49Zo47mSUqoMZjXJrgCd0L-CeHg1ETdtY4IudvBOTfAEHFRvqPM_NjSOnGjtXYTwCdFufYCVJTGGS-raAzyM57ceRTy61onvUt4MgIoXPYfyIZBxqFg6er28QEV_HvKLFJ-kgcxWKOfD7U2PvxdXG6DLn4dFGzSKxhUPZ0acS3z82ELlS55SCM9t-jHKkilwti2aNbVUXrC5l_wNirOjk1YALZiyuF5xp7HJorRGOYAUNSQ_-M_EI%3D)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=5952f06622ff4e15889dc340d0870c29&_t=x7JadgPqfkw0U7rJr0Yd4F8xf7yCHEtIqwZTRjw9J1cCzHhHCUqRpWp3dwyv-dJr5EyR2HNWD1XHHflURuJvlB7xmapGPTSz1hfCBj7mp94FgRwF9Q9MN48lEsTEQ5Q11MHdFfWYzOdPGU9WB11IfzH77KLlQkrloxa9pYrjpGw%3D)

name: Endorsement Alert: Team Hill Harper
subject: 🚨Our newest endorsement 🚨
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Can you help us celebrate our newest endorsement?
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=em20240109&t=1&akid=815%2E62735%2EHk3p6H)
Hey Peter, we have some exciting news:
**Renowned community leader, political activist, and founder of Fems for Dems** — an independent political action committee based in Michigan that has been pivotal in shaping the political landscape — **just endorsed Hill Harper!**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20240109-2?amount=5&refcode=em20240109-2-815&refcode2=815_62735_Hk3p6H&akid=815%2E62735%2EHk3p6H)
**[Lori Goldman sees that Hill Harper is the progressive champion that will bring transformative change to Michigan and fight for everyday working families. If you do too, please chip in anything you can right now to help support our campaign!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20240109-2?amount=5&refcode=em20240109-2-815&refcode2=815_62735_Hk3p6H&akid=815%2E62735%2EHk3p6H) **
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20240109-2?amount=5&refcode=em20240109-2-815&refcode2=815_62735_Hk3p6H&akid=815%2E62735%2EHk3p6H)**
We’re so grateful that Lori Goldman believes in our vision for Michigan.
For too long hard-working people across the state have had to accept the bare minimum from Washington. We need progressive policies that help Michiganders not only survive but thrive.
To do that, we’ve got to keep spreading the word, and keep connecting with folks like Lori Goldman who support our campaign.
**[We rely on YOU to help us ramp up our campaign! Let’s take this momentum all the way to Washington! A donation of any amount right now will help us build off our newest endorsement!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20240109-2?amount=5&refcode=em20240109-2-815&refcode2=815_62735_Hk3p6H&akid=815%2E62735%2EHk3p6H) **
Let’s do this,
Team Hill Harper
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-footer?refcode=em20240109&t=2&refcode2=815_62735_Hk3p6H&akid=815%2E62735%2EHk3p6H)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=815%2E62735%2EHk3p6H)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.hillharper.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=815%2E62735%2EHk3p6H)

To give by check:
Hill Harper for Michigan

Lansing, MI 48901

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Circling back in the New Year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Hi Peter!
I hope you had a great start to the new year.
Scott and I rang in 2024 by hiking the Silver Peak Trail with some good friends. You can see the pictures we took below!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_010924_Hiking_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_010924_Hiking_act] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_010924_Hiking_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_010924_Hiking_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_010924_Hiking_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_010924_Hiking_act]
Starting off 2024 with a big uphill climb felt fitting.
We have a big race ahead. In 2022, we lost this seat by one percentage point. In 2024, we can win — but it will take a lot of hard work.
My team set an ambitious fundraising goal for the end of December. We passed our goal because of your incredible support, but our fight is just getting started.
These resources will help us build a powerful grassroots campaign ready to knock on doors, mobilize voters, and flip AZ-06 in November. But we’re facing down millions of dollars in Republican spending to beat our pro-choice, pro-climate campaign.
This is the most competitive House race in Arizona — and the GOP will be desperate to protect their majority in Congress.
Our people-powered campaign is hitting the ground running in 2024. By donating, you can help us build a winning campaign and flip Arizona’s Sixth Congressional District blue. Can you chip in just $10 now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_010924_Hiking_act&amount=10]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_010924_Hiking_act]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_010924_Hiking_act&recurring=1]
Thank you so much, Peter.
Kirsten
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_010924_Hiking_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_010924_Hiking_act] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_010924_Hiking_act]

While the media and Big Tech pivot to their Election Year tactics to spin and manipulate the public debate, my job stays the same . . . **I 'll be bringing truth to the light.**

Last year was the inaugural year for OMG, and every team member brought their "A game."

We exposed . . .

* The financial giant, Black Rock, and their war-profiteering in the Ukraine conflict
* Public school programs to assist transitioning children behind the back of parents
* Illegal Chinese bio-labs operating in the United States
* The racist hiring practices of IBM in their quest for "Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion"
* Shady political donations from payment processing companies of both the Democrats and the Republicans, ActBlue and WinRed
* The racial and religious discrimination against Christians taking place in Best Buy's workplace
* And much more.

None of our work would have been possible without the support of the American public, and that need for support never stops. To kick off 2024, **[please donate as much as possible to OMG today](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxEj72unDAQRp9m6EBmbP4KiiSIFJHSp4r8M-w6YdassYX27a9Aq3vb8x0dezRvq19eI3TfAfHu3Q6IIL8B4vPPwTH_418_S16pfLa_uTlH_AGI6bXRp_mOVMTaryftpsKNcnFCFTTWnVC9krXoivs4mF4oNNaoYSBFrVOiN63QwklrugELP6JAJWoxoJS1klXTi1q2g3UD9kunGlDieqfSTNFbXe_p0DGGwJUNXKzjPaVtvz42A8472Ryp0g9yIZ0G4Bz-Ey3E5Ly-xZA3wNlk3l5lDNqVbMrAIGfNIT8SyKkRgG1O_HcPOVoCOX3Z7-VsZQY5nf2LWM2b9rcHyInNmyWKp3PEuoij2w6_rn5vO1Didl1kA38EAAD__8hEfeo).** Every penny counts!

In addition to our investigations, OMG started The O'Keefe Academy to introduce aspiring reporters to ETHICAL undercover investigation journalism. Our graduates have already produced blockbuster investigations.

We also started regular webinars, kicking them off with the successful "American Swiper" series.

As my friend, the late Andrew Breitbart, would say, "Content is King!"

And we have also found ways to produce cost-effective, reliable, and ethical content with our training program and whistleblower outreach.

Think about it: If government bureaucrats, elected leaders, and corporate executives had cameras on them, would they keep doing the shady and corrupt things they have been doing behind closed doors for decades?

Since we can't get behind those closed doors by knocking on them (trust me, I've tried), we wire up our journalists with hidden cameras or offer a safe avenue for disclosure to our whistleblowers.

The work and the content we produce are never-ending, and the impact is clear. Years ago, with a team of a few guys walking into voting sites, I was able to change Voter ID laws in 17 states. Using similar tactics and a small team, we saved taxpayers hundreds of millions of dollars by exposing Medicaid fraud.

Our work is challenging, but I know how to do it, and train others to do the same, better than any other journalist today. I'm not bragging, I'm just paying attention -- the mainstream media REFUSES to do its job and go undercover.

That leaves me, my team at OMG, **[and your backing](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxEj72unDAQRp9m6EBmbP4KiiSIFJHSp4r8M-w6YdassYX27a9Aq3vb8x0dezRvq19eI3TfAfHu3Q6IIL8B4vPPwTH_418_S16pfLa_uTlH_AGI6bXRp_mOVMTaryftpsKNcnFCFTTWnVC9krXoivs4mF4oNNaoYSBFrVOiN63QwklrugELP6JAJWoxoJS1klXTi1q2g3UD9kunGlDieqfSTNFbXe_p0DGGwJUNXKzjPaVtvz42A8472Ryp0g9yIZ0G4Bz-Ey3E5Ly-xZA3wNlk3l5lDNqVbMrAIGfNIT8SyKkRgG1O_HcPOVoCOX3Z7-VsZQY5nf2LWM2b9rcHyInNmyWKp3PEuoij2w6_rn5vO1Didl1kA38EAAD__8hEfeo).**

In January, to cover operation costs, staff, attorneys, editors, and the extensive travel, I have to raise $184K. That's a lot of money, but we can do it a dollar at a time. **[Will you chip in right now to help?](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxEj72unDAQRp9m6EBmbP4KiiSIFJHSp4r8M-w6YdassYX27a9Aq3vb8x0dezRvq19eI3TfAfHu3Q6IIL8B4vPPwTH_418_S16pfLa_uTlH_AGI6bXRp_mOVMTaryftpsKNcnFCFTTWnVC9krXoivs4mF4oNNaoYSBFrVOiN63QwklrugELP6JAJWoxoJS1klXTi1q2g3UD9kunGlDieqfSTNFbXe_p0DGGwJUNXKzjPaVtvz42A8472Ryp0g9yIZ0G4Bz-Ey3E5Ly-xZA3wNlk3l5lDNqVbMrAIGfNIT8SyKkRgG1O_HcPOVoCOX3Z7-VsZQY5nf2LWM2b9rcHyInNmyWKp3PEuoij2w6_rn5vO1Didl1kA38EAAD__8hEfeo)**

Together, we will make an impact in 2024. You keep me and my team at OMG going, and we will work to deliver the results like no other.

I appreciate your support, and if you haven't already, **[please donate here.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxEj72unDAQRp9m6EBmbP4KiiSIFJHSp4r8M-w6YdassYX27a9Aq3vb8x0dezRvq19eI3TfAfHu3Q6IIL8B4vPPwTH_418_S16pfLa_uTlH_AGI6bXRp_mOVMTaryftpsKNcnFCFTTWnVC9krXoivs4mF4oNNaoYSBFrVOiN63QwklrugELP6JAJWoxoJS1klXTi1q2g3UD9kunGlDieqfSTNFbXe_p0DGGwJUNXKzjPaVtvz42A8472Ryp0g9yIZ0G4Bz-Ey3E5Ly-xZA3wNlk3l5lDNqVbMrAIGfNIT8SyKkRgG1O_HcPOVoCOX3Z7-VsZQY5nf2LWM2b9rcHyInNmyWKp3PEuoij2w6_rn5vO1Didl1kA38EAAD__8hEfeo)**

In Truth,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: Bob Casey
subject: I’m writing with an important request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
We need to be able to fight back against the millions that McConnell and the GOP are going to spend here, which will hinge on our ability to show the strength of this campaign.

| Hello Peter,

I’m writing to ask if you will make a donation to our campaign. I hope you will give me a minute to explain why this request is important — _[**but if you are ready to do your part right now, you can split a donation between my campaign and Fight for Progress at this link.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76786061/448465065/-887798292?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-01-09_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3ZGFlMWE5LTQ3YWYtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=A83itLBYnO17y1cWx77BgGvN6_ohr8hlaA-9Y1bksY4=)_

The truth is, defending this Senate seat isn’t only about ensuring we can keep fighting for Pennsylvania families in Washington, as important as that is.

This is also the race that could decide if Democrats hold our Senate majority. We know that, and Mitch McConnell knows it, too. It is hard to understate the stakes, Peter: Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid, women’s rights, LGBTQIA+ equality, the right to vote, and more are on the line if Republicans flip the Senate.

We need to be able to fight back against the millions that McConnell and the GOP are going to spend here, which will hinge on our ability to show the strength of this campaign.

[_**Can I count on you to split $5 or more between our re-election campaign and Fight for Progress today, Peter? I need your help to build a winning campaign.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76786062/448465066/-887798292?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-01-09_1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3ZGFlMWE5LTQ3YWYtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=A83itLBYnO17y1cWx77BgGvN6_ohr8hlaA-9Y1bksY4=)

name: Rick Larsen
subject: The difference between running away to join the circus and being elected to Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
This is not what we mean by a big tent...
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76786176/448465385/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTc3NDY1Zi00OGFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bGYZYAS-i4RZjbhywGcK4vVasrcJZEpSJbtfxQKBTcI=&emci=1c099a9b-44af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=1e77465f-48af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=9494239)
---

| | The storybook hope: running away to join the circus, or running away from one's problems, works every time. **The reality: too many Washington D.C. Republicans are making a mockery of our constitution and government, turning a solemn duty into a three-ring circus.** ...I know Democrats often say we have a**big tent** , but that is not exactly what we mean. Not even close. **Congress has a responsibility to the American people to put differences aside, focus, and work on our most pressing problems.** That is what I will be looking ahead to this week, as our next Congressional session gets underway. On the surface, my biggest priority for 2024 is to work as hard as I can, in part to make up for all the ridiculousness being peddled by parts of Congress right now. Because in spite of all the pie-in-the-face and clown car politics that the American people see on the nightly news, there are still so many urgent issues that demand our attention. **Averting a government shutdown:** we cannot run a functioning government when we are constantly sidelined to pass emergency continuing resolutions to keep the government open. We are making progress on this now, but the last stop-gap legislation expires in just a few days. **Infrastructure:** how we get people around their own communities, and connect the many states in our union. **Health care:** how we take care of our own, no matter what comes their way. This includes the right to a safe and legal abortion, which Republicans want to criminalize with almost zero exceptions. **Social Security** : do not forget that Republicans, if they win, will look to gut Social Security, Medicare, and other pillars that support our nation's seniors. **Keeping our lights on** : it does not benefit anyone if our government shuts down, or if we default on our loan obligations. I will always fight to keep things running, because it is the right thing to do. **The future of our very democracy:** can you guess what a Republican member of Congress has called people facing justice for attempting to incite an insurrection? This is a dangerous reminder that our democracy is still very much under attack, and those who wish to undo centuries of work are still powering along, clown cars and all. **This is serious work that requires serious effort. My priority in 2024 is to give you just that: my all.** Because, no matter what, this matters. A lot. _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

name: Julia DeGraw
subject: Support Our Priorities for the 2024 Session!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters
body:
The 2024 short legislative session begins in less than one month, and I’ll be in the Capitol beginning tomorrow for January Legislative Days! We’ve already begun working to make sure that we pass strong legislation to protect Oregon’s climate and environment this year. On behalf of OLCV and our partners in the Oregon Conservation Network (OCN), I’m excited to announce our 2024 Priorities for a Healthy Oregon! [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76786221/448465490/-1501998768?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlMDRjNGE4LTQ4YWYtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wyiiACZCcGLv-j7xXaiy_3mb5SqpfZy51lj9CovasWE=&emci=284e2340-45af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=de04c4a8-48af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=2107230) | | | Dear Peter, The 2024 short legislative session begins in less than one month, and I’ll be in the Capitol beginning tomorrow for January Legislative Days! We’ve already begun working to make sure that we pass strong legislation to protect Oregon’s climate and environment this year. On behalf of OLCV and our partners in the Oregon Conservation Network (OCN), I’m excited to announce our 2024 Priorities for a Healthy Oregon! This year, in addition to our every-year priority of passing strong **Natural Resource and Environmental Budgets** (so our state’s programs to protect the climate, air, water, forests, and wildlife get the funding they need), we have selected three Priorities for a Healthy Oregon. **[We hope you’ll ask your state lawmakers to support these priorities.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76786222/448465491/-1501998768?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlMDRjNGE4LTQ4YWYtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wyiiACZCcGLv-j7xXaiy_3mb5SqpfZy51lj9CovasWE=&emci=284e2340-45af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=de04c4a8-48af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=2107230)** **2024 Priorities for a Healthy Oregon:** **1) A Strong Climate Budget:** We must continue to make progress on climate every legislative session, and this year our priority is to ensure a strong climate budget. We must continue funding the incredible climate programs we passed over the last few years. We are asking for a $50 million climate budget that prioritizes two things: 1) a $15 million investment in the the Healthy Homes Program to enable urgently-needed home repairs including health, safety and efficiency upgrades, and 2) a $20 million investment in the Charge Ahead Electric Vehicle rebate program to make new and used electric vehicles more affordable and accessible for lower-income Oregonians. Together, these continued investments in successful programs that are running out of funding will lower the cost of living, improve health and resilience, and reduce climate pollution. **2) Marine Reserves:** A decade ago OLCV and OCN prioritized creating the Marine Reserves Program to establish protections for five marine habitat areas off the Oregon Coast. It was a hard fought and hard won victory, and since then the program has proven to be a huge success winning over fisherman, coastal communities and lawmakers. Last year, a 10 year review process came out with recommendations on what the program needs to succeed moving forward, and a bill (HB 2903) was introduced to meet those recommendations. Unfortunately, last session, that bill died. This session we plan to reintroduce this bill to ensure this wildly popular and successful program can continue. **3) Right to Repair:** You may recall this bill as part of our Zero Waste Priority bill package from last session (SB 542). Well, the bill didn’t quite make it (largely due to the historically long Republican walkout), and we’re bringing it back this year to get it over the finish line! People should be able to repair their electronics just like they can repair their car. This will save people money and reduce electronic waste. States like New York and California have passed similar legislation, but in Oregon our bill is poised to be the strongest version passed by any state. [**Will you take a few minutes today to urge your lawmakers to support these Priorities for a Healthy Oregon for the 2024 short legislative session?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76786223/448465492/-1501998768?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlMDRjNGE4LTQ4YWYtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wyiiACZCcGLv-j7xXaiy_3mb5SqpfZy51lj9CovasWE=&emci=284e2340-45af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=de04c4a8-48af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=2107230) In addition to these priorities we all know that addressing our housing crisis is one of the biggest priorities of the 2024 short session. We will continue to fight for strong climate friendly, affordable housing policies while also making sure Oregon doesn’t needlessly expand our Urban Growth Boundaries (UGBs). We will support strong infrastructure investment within UGBs where we can build more of the dense, affordable, and climate smart communities our residents need and deserve. We have a lot of important legislation to pass this session, and only about a month to do it. **[Please join us in pushing for the strongest environmental policies possible in the 2024 short legislative session!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76786224/448465493/-1501998768?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlMDRjNGE4LTQ4YWYtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wyiiACZCcGLv-j7xXaiy_3mb5SqpfZy51lj9CovasWE=&emci=284e2340-45af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=de04c4a8-48af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=2107230)** Thank you,

Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV

P.S. Most of these bills are still in draft form and have not received bill numbers yet. We will keep you posted as our priority bills receive bill numbers and as they move through the legislative process. | |
---|---|---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Faulconer=20for=20Supervisor?=
subject: NEWS: Mayor Faulconer Raises $525,000 In Less Than 6 Months As He Works To Oust Supervisor Terra Lawson-Remer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Supervisor 2024 - FPPC ID 1461674**
body:
NEWS: Mayor Faulconer Raises $525,000 In Less Than 6 Months As He Works To Oust Supervisor Terra Lawson-Remer | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/44d1d99db869/news-mayor-faulconer-raises-525000-in-less-than-6-months-as-he-works-to-oust-supervisor-terra-lawson-remer?e=784f78234b)
---
| |
---
| |
# FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
JANUARY 9, 2023
CONTACT: press@kevinfaulconer.com

**Mayor Faulconer Raises $525,000 In Less Than 6 Months As He Works To Oust Supervisor Terra Lawson-Remer**
SAN DIEGO, CA -- Former San Diego Mayor Kevin Faulconer announced his campaign to defeat Supervisor Terra Lawson Remer broke the half-million-dollar mark, raising more than $525,000 since his entry into the race in July 2023. Faulconer’s strong fundraising numbers are fueled by over 600 unique donors after being in the race for less than six months, indicating momentum is clearly on the former Mayor’s side:
“I’m proud of the movement we’re building – a movement seeking action on issues like homelessness,” said former Mayor Kevin Faulconer. “For too long, Terra Lawson Remer has sat idly doing nothing as homelessness continues to skyrocket under her watch. When I was Mayor, we took aggressive action to clean up our streets and reduce homelessness while many other cities and the county as a whole saw increases. Our compassionate but firm approach providing a right to shelter with an obligation to use it proved successful. That’s the type of active approach desperately needed to clean up our streets and get people the help they need.”
Since entering the race in July of 2023, Faulconer has attracted a growing number of endorsements from local organizations, including San Diego Working Waterfront,The Lincoln Club Business League, the San Diego Restaurant Association, the Building Industry Association, the Associated General Contractors of San Diego, and Associated Builders and Contractors of San Diego. As Supervisor, he’ll lead on pressing issues like homelessness on day one – working to clean up the streets and get people the help they need to turn their lives around, just as he did as Mayor of San Diego, where he presided over double-digit decreases in homelessness.
To learn more about Kevin Faulconer and his campaign for Supervisor, visit [www.kevinfaulconer.com](https://kevinfaulconer.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c8e1915e5d9cc8e4a2f64f766&id=8e5022e861&e=784f78234b)###

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Lenney?=
subject: are we good?
body:
RE: gov speech |
---
| | Before COVID, Idaho basically had a $9 billion budget...

Then the "pandemic" hits, and suddenly, we're swimming in a colossal $22.9 billion cesspool of Fed cash (this is how we easily dis so many "one-time" "tax cuts" and "investments").

But, Governor Little said in this State of the State speech that we should tell those big spenders in Washington D.C. to live within their means (what he called the Idaho way).

Yet, here we are, grabbing fistfuls of federal dollars like there's no tomorrow. We're talking about billions – money that's not just magically appearing.

It's borrowed (on the backs of our grandkids, no less).

We're in a situation dripping with irony and laden with debt.

**_This is your wake-up call._**

We need to take a long, hard look at what this means for Idaho's future and our so-called commitment to "fiscal conservatism."

Are we walking the talk, or just talking a big game while the debt pile grows?

**LISTEN** : [https://twitter.com/i/spaces/1gqxvQWjEEAJB?s=20](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=55b04222e4&e=dea908e0fe "listen to this valubale recap")

Cheers,

Brian

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: I can’t be in this fight alone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
It might be a new year, but we’re still stuck with the same chaotic GOP.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240109-3372-footer&t=1&akid=3372%2E420207%2ERTvh5c)
Peter,
It’s a new year, but we’re still stuck with the same chaotic, cruel GOP.
Congress needs to reach two fundraising deadlines to avert a government shutdown.
**Meanwhile, Republican legislators remain hell-bent on holding our economy hostage to pass a set of draconian immigration policies at the southern border.**
I’m not going to let this blatant display of brinkmanship and unbridled chaos from MAGA Republicans stand in the way of our ability to make real progress **— but I can't be in this fight alone.**
**It’s clear that we’re going to need a ton of resources to help stop another Congressional session from being hijacked by the GOP chaos caucus.**[**Can we count on you to chip in $3 or to ensure that our progressive movement can continue standing up and speaking out for our values and vision for the future?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240109.0Hj6_v&refcode=em20240109-3372&t=2&akid=3372%2E420207%2ERTvh5c)

Onward,
Pramila Jayapal

Meanwhile, Republican legislators remain hell-bent on holding our economy hostage to pass a set of draconian immigration policies at the southern border. Here’s a list of a few of the Arizona Republicans that participated in the Big Lie and are actively working to corrupt our democracy:
**State Senator Anthony Kern** was pictured on the steps of the Capitol building as rioters began to climb the scaffolding to breach the doors and windows of the building. Anthony allegedly used campaign funds to get there.
**AZ-8 House candidate Jacob Chansley** better known as the Q-Anon Shaman infiltrated the building and desecrated the Speaker’s desk while shirtless adorned with face paint and a fur hat.
**State Senator Janae Shamp** and her husband were caught on video in the crowd on the Lower Terrace of the Capitol with the crowd that would eventually turn violent and attack the Capitol building. In the days and weeks after the insurrection, Janae continued to share and regurgitate conspiracy theories on social media.
**Senate candidate Kari Lake** continues to be Donald Trump’s biggest MAGA mouthpiece and has been touting the Big Lie since Republicans stormed the Capitol. She’s even taken a page out of Trump’s playbook, and STILL won’t admit that she lost to Governor Hobbs last year.
**Senate candidate Mark Finchem** attended the insurrection as a state legislator, even tweeting a (now-deleted) picture with the hashtag #stopthesteal. In the days following the insurrection, he continued to spout baseless theories blaming antifa for the violence, and signed on to a letter with other Arizona Republicans asking Congress to reject the votes of Arizonans.
**AZ-08 candidate Blake Masters** stood by Donald Trump’s Big Lie throughout his losing campaign against Senator Kelly last year. Only after he came under fire did he scrub language about a “stolen election” from his campaign’s website.
**The entire GOP is complicit in this attack on our democracy, full stop. And in the three years since, they’ve only further supported and uplifted the biggest mouthpieces for the Big Lie. **

name: ElizabethWarren.com
subject: Special interests and right-wing extremists would be more than happy to fund a challenger against Elizabeth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1889%2E4032634%2EAVJl8S)
---
It's time to square our shoulders and get into election mode for 2024. Right now is “go time” for our campaign to re-elect Elizabeth here in Massachusetts. As organizing and campaigning for the November election picks up, this is a time when a Republican challenger could throw their hat into the ring. The chair of the Massachusetts Republican Party promised to put up a Republican challenger for this race — and GOP insiders have been strategizing on who that will be. **That’s why it’s incredibly important that Elizabeth kicks off 2024 with the strongest grassroots support possible. Any sign of weakness or decline of support right now could serve as a green light for well-funded challengers to jump into this race and threaten our plans for big, structural change.** [**So could you please make a donation of $28 or anything you can to make sure Elizabeth can keep fighting in the Senate? Massachusetts families and working people across the country deserve a fighter for them in Congress — and we need to be prepared to compete against any GOP challenger.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1137?amount=28&t=8&akid=1889%2E4032634%2EAVJl8S)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1137?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=1889%2E4032634%2EAVJl8S)
---

---

---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1137?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=1889%2E4032634%2EAVJl8S)
---

---
Elizabeth has big plans to make Supreme Court justices follow a basic code of ethics, prevent members of Congress from being able to trade or own stocks, create universal child care, ensure the right to an abortion across the country, and make the wealthy pay their fair share in taxes. The special interests and right-wing extremists who have the most to lose from these plans would be more than happy to fund a challenger against Elizabeth — to get her out of office and stifle the momentum for our progressive plans. A contribution of $28 or any amount you can give right now sends a message to those special interests and out-of-touch ideologues that you’re still in this fight — and that together, we are going to defeat them. [**Elizabeth is running for re-election because there’s a lot we’ve got to do in order to save our country from extremists and make real change for our working families.But she needs you by her side in order to stay in the Senate and continue this important work. Can you please rush a donation of $28 or anything you can to help show any potential challenger that Elizabeth has a strong grassroots movement by her side?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1137?amount=28&t=14&akid=1889%2E4032634%2EAVJl8S) Thanks for all you do, Team Warren

# Americans need a 2nd and 3rd job in Biden's economy...
A trusted Trump economist Steve Moore joins me to discuss the Biden economy and why how Americans feel the economy affecting their bottom line matters more than anything.
Then Congressman Doug Collins joins me to breakdown the plan Speaker Johnson has to ensure the government doesn’t shutdown, why he thinks Secretary of Defense should be fired and more.
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=549df5abbf&e=f6564bbe3b)
